name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 9/22/2025
body:
What was meant to silence has sparked revival
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**September 22, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
Two weeks ago, our dear friend Charlie Kirk was taken from us. It’s still hard to put into words the grief and shock—but this past week, at both the CSU memorial and the Arizona funeral, we witnessed something powerful: **revival.**
On Thursday evening, [thousands filled CSU’s Canvas Stadium](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for a memorial that was both somber and defiant. I was honored to speak there, sharing my personal memories of Charlie and calling for courage in the face of growing hostility toward faith and freedom. From CSU to classrooms across our state, the question now isn’t whether Charlie’s voice will be silenced — it’s how boldly the next generation will carry it forward.
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
| | That spirit carried us to Arizona, where Tori and I arrived at 4am to wait in line for his funeral [[you can watch the full service here]](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). It was worth every moment. The outpouring of love, the worship music, and the tributes from leaders across the nation reminded us that Charlie’s movement is not ending—[it’s multiplying](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). We were reminded that his vision was never about one man, but about equipping millions to live out truth with conviction.
Erika Kirk’s strength — anchored in faith even as she spoke about losing the husband who [foresaw the danger he was in](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) — moved the nation. It was one of the most powerful and grace-filled moments of the day. Standing before hundreds of thousands of people, she spoke through tears of her husband’s faith and courage — and then did something that left the entire stadium in stunned silence. [She forgave the man who killed Charlie.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_“On the cross, our Savior said, ‘Father, forgive them, for they know not what they do,’” Erika reminded the crowd. “That man. That young man. I forgive him.”_
In an era where anger and vengeance dominate, Erika modeled the forgiveness and faith Charlie lived by. And now, in a fitting continuation, she has stepped in as [CEO of Turning Point USA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to carry on Charlie’s mission.
Of course, the divide is still stark. While candlelight vigils and stadium memorials drew thousands, some in academia and media [mocked his death](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) — including a CU Boulder lecturer and a Vail teacher now under scrutiny for their callous remarks. It’s a sobering reminder of the culture war we are in. Yet, even these attacks seem to be [fueling the fire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of a movement Charlie gave his life for.
Some say [vigils and memorials aren’t enough](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And in a sense, they’re right — Charlie himself would want us not just to mourn, but to act. To organize. To build. To take up the mantle of truth without apology.
What we’ve witnessed in these days proves that’s exactly what’s happening. From Colorado to Arizona to Washington, D.C., Charlie’s legacy is not fading. And here at Rocky Mountain Voice, we are committed to telling the story of how this revival takes root in the Rockies and spreads across the nation.
Charlie once said, “The courage of a calling is greater than the comfort of silence.” This is our moment to live that out.
Stay strong, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Elon Musk Slams “Soft-on-Crime” Policies in Clash With Governor Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE WESTERN JOURNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Elon Musk confronted Colorado Democratic Gov. Jared Polis over a violent criminal released back on the streets, prompting a response from the official that failed to acknowledge how he signed a law allowing such circumstances to arise.

**[From CSU Canvas Stadium to classrooms: Colorado faces a culture reckoning](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In Fort Collins, Canvas Stadium was bathed in light as thousands raised their phones in unison, a modern candlelit vigil for Charlie Kirk. The glow stretched across the stands, a silent tribute led by the students he had inspired.
**[Gold standard or clear failure? Colorado trails 36 nations on election rules.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado’s election rulebook emphasizes convenience—automatic mail ballots, long voting windows and ballot harvesting—exactly where most countries draw hard lines. That philosophical split is why Colorado lands at 50 out of 100 in a new international survey, and why the authors behind it want an on-the-record conversation with the secretary of state.
|
---
**STATE**
**[“God’s timing, not mine”: Rose Pugliese on closing one chapter and trusting what comes next](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rose Pugliese describes her resignation from the Colorado House as one of the hardest decisions of her life, shaped by prayer, sacrifice — and the voices of her children. “I truly want to follow God’s path and I think part of God’s path for me now is making sure I prioritize my children,” she explained.
**[Evergreen High secures full-time school resource officer for added protection](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Jefferson County Sheriff’s Office says a full-time school resource officer will be assigned to Evergreen High School when students return to that campus after a school shooting there. The Evergreen Parent-Teachers-Students Association had been hoping for a full-time officer.
**[Is the Colorado Economy More of a Train Wreck than it Currently Appears?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Given all the sad news last week, a September 9 press release from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) announcing a major downward revision in job numbers for March 2024 to March 2025 was understandably overlooked._
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Armed Queers group trains radical Marxists to shoot near site of Charlie Kirk’s murder](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Amid the snow-capped mountains and Mormon churches of Utah, not far from where FBI agents continue to scour for more evidence in Charlie Kirk’s assassination, a self-described armed revolutionary group openly aligned with Cuba has risen up on the streets of one of America’s most conservative states.
**[RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz unveil $50B plan to transform collapsing rural health care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [USA TODAY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Despite higher rates of chronic disease in rural areas vs. their urban counterparts, rural America’s health care infrastructure is collapsing. Since 2010, about 150 rural hospitals have closed or been converted to other facilities, and fewer than 4 in 10 rural hospital beds are typically occupied – substantially less than urban areas._
**[For Erika Kirk, a husband’s life ended by violence he seemed to foresee—yet faith anchored him](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE NEW YORK TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) During the past 11 days of heartache and anger, Erika Kirk has found herself returning, as if by gravitational pull, to a single moment. It is the recollection of how, on what turned out to be the last night of Charlie Kirk, her husband, he was too excited to sleep.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Families Mourn After Experienced Hunters Found Dead In Colorado Wilderness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Two elk hunters missing since Friday were found dead Thursday morning by Colorado search and rescue teams, according to Lynne Runkle, the aunt of Andrew Porter, one of the missing men.

**[Deputies sound alarm over risks of ‘Senior Assassins’ student game](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Douglas County Sheriff’s Office on Sunday issued a “public safety announcement” warning the community of the risks associated with a high school tradition after two “alarming” calls of students playing “Senior Assassin.”
**[Religious Freedom and Property Rights Collide in Teller County over “Illegal” Greenhouse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A battle between a Divide couple who built a greenhouse next to their home and Teller County commissioners who want them to tear it down has moved to the courthouse
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Colorado’s laws put parents on the sidelines — and kids at risk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado politicians have been busy passing laws that put government between parents and kids. From mental health and gender identity to abortion and what’s taught in the classroom, the message is clear — parents don’t get a say. Families across our state are raising the alarm, sharing stories of confusion, heartbreak, and harm._
__
**[The Union vs. Students: Why I Walked Away](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY PRISCILLA RAHN,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _For 32 years I poured my life into teaching, believing the teachers’ union stood for students and educators like me. But somewhere along the way, the mission shifted—from strengthening classrooms to fueling politics. That’s when I knew I had to walk away._
__

**[State school trust lands were meant to fund education, not environmental agendas](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY GREG WALCHER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _A land ownership checkerboard exists in nearly every state because of an oddity called “state school trust lands.” The federal government granted those lands at the time of statehood, under the Land Ordinance of 1785. Thomas Jefferson’s system divides and records land into townships, each with 36 one-square-mile sections._
__

**[The Sword of the Spirit: Defense in the Advance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _It’s football season in Colorado, and for us Broncos fans, there’s nothing like watching a defense stand tall. Sure, a flashy offense may steal the highlights, but every fan knows the truth: defense wins championships._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🥣 DID YOU KNOW?** **Cap’n Crunch’s real name is Horatio Magellan Crunch.** Though fans once noted his uniform showed only three bars (a commander’s rank), Horatio defended himself on social media, saying captaining the S.S. Guppy made him a true Cap’n. In 2024, his box art was updated to display the proper four bars of a Navy captain.
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Here’s what I’ve been telling people →
body:
---
Hey Derek, Here’s what I’ve been telling people in Kentucky, where I’m grateful to serve as governor: **If you feel like the current president is against you, I want you to know you have a governor who is with you.** **And that’s what I’ll say to you, too:** Wherever you live, you may have a mayor, a member of Congress, or a city council member who’s with you. And you certainly have a Democratic state party and the Democratic National Committee with you, too. You’ve got people fighting to move us all forward. Here in Kentucky, I’ve worked for progress on health care, public education, and creating good jobs for our people. But under this administration, all of those priorities are under attack, and I’ve learned two important lessons I’d like to share with you: First, that for all of us trying to serve our states, towns, or districts, our work is connected. What the Republican majority in the U.S. House and Senate do — like passing the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history with Trump’s budget — directly impacts families in my state. And second, I’ve learned that Democratic governors stand as our last line of defense against this administration. That’s why it’s so important that we elect a Democratic governor in Virginia and New Jersey this November. It’s also critical we take back Congress. These fights matter, Derek. I’m doing all I can to protect our people, and I know my fellow Democrats are with me. **I’m writing to you now because these lessons make clear the importance of a strong Democratic National Committee. Only the DNC works to support and elect Democrats at all levels of government, nationwide, every single year. That work is more important than it’s ever been.** **[Derek, the DNC is the place to chip in if you want to both support public servants fighting for our shared values now _and_ strengthen Democratic power in the years to come. Please make a donation today:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250922_4634_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4634_22930333_DNJZpB&akid=4634%2E22930333%2EDNJZpB)**

name: Mark Warner
subject: From the Oval Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
| Peter — Last week, from the Oval Office, Donald Trump had a complete and total meltdown, attacked me and my good friend Tim Kaine, and smeared our record of delivering for Virginia. Look, Peter, I’m not losing sleep over the fact that Donald Trump thinks I’m a “bad guy” or "among the worst” Democrats. And I’m sure as hell not going to hesitate to call out his administration for their corruption, chaos, and downright incompetence. But here’s what I _am_ worried about: **Trump’s allied super PACs are paying attention, and they have their marching orders now.** This is how it goes — first Trump attacks you, then the super PACs swoop in. And frankly, with control of Congress on the line, I’ve got to be prepared for my toughest and most expensive campaign yet. **That’s why I called my campaign manager and increased our fundraising goals for the quarter. With just 8 more days left in the month, it’s going to be an all hands on deck moment for our campaign.** **[This is not something I do lightly, but we need to be ready. So if you can spare $5 or $15 or even $50 — I’m asking you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Roy Cooper before the end-of-the quarter. clean_body: | Peter — Last week, from the Oval Office, Donald Trump had a complete and total meltdown, attacked me and my good friend Tim Kaine, and smeared our record of delivering for Virginia. Look, Peter, I’m not losing sleep over the fact that Donald Trump thinks I’m a “bad guy” or "among the worst” Democrats. And I’m sure as hell not going to hesitate to call out his administration for their corruption, chaos, and downright incompetence. But here’s what I am worried about: Trump’s allied super PACs are paying attention, and they have their marching orders now. This is how it goes — first Trump attacks you, then the super PACs swoop in. And frankly, with control of Congress on the line, I’ve got to be prepared for my toughest and most expensive campaign yet. That’s why I called my campaign manager and increased our fundraising goals for the quarter. With just 8 more days left in the month, it’s going to be an all hands on deck moment for our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Patriot, Tom Cotton here.

_**I’m running for re-election in Arkansas and I’ve been fully endorsed by President Trump and conservative leaders across the entire country.**_

_All that’s missing is you, and there’s no better time than now to reinforce the fight._

I have a major fundraising deadline on the 30th. It’s real and it’ll shape our ability to keep Arkansas red next November.

clean_body: let me explain | | | Patriot, Tom Cotton here. I’m running for re-election in Arkansas and I’ve been fully endorsed by President Trump and conservative leaders across the entire country. All that’s missing is you, and there’s no better time than now to reinforce the fight. I have a major fundraising deadline on the 30th. It’s real and it’ll shape our ability to keep Arkansas red next November. If Republicans are going to keep the Senate, we need to take Arkansas off the board. And if everyone reading this pitches in a small amount, even just $10, before the 30th, we’ll be that much closer to doing so. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. name: Mark & Tim
subject: As message from Trump’s least favorite senators:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Hi folks. Mark Warner and Tim Kaine here — also known as Donald Trump’s least favorite senators.
On Friday night during a meltdown about a US attorney he himself nominated failing to produce criminal charges against one of his perceived political enemies, Trump turned his wrath to us...
Warner and Kaine.
Two bad guys!
Bad senators!
They do a terrible job for the people of Virginia!
Now we may be biased, but we tend to disagree with Trump’s assessment of our work. We’ve both served as Governor of Virginia and as U.S. Senator to this great Commonwealth, and we love the people of Virginia. We’ve fought for our state to be a great place to live, do business, and raise a family — and it is!
We’ve been so proud to work with each other, with our strong congressional delegation from across VA, and with our great partners in Richmond to get things done for folks — expanding broadband access, securing funds for hospitals and other job centers, lowering costs, making communities safer, strengthening our schools, and so much more.
But Derek, Trump can attack us all he wants. Our focus isn’t on the President’s temper tantrums, but on making life better for Virginians — and winning in 2025 and 2026.
If you’re ready to deliver a strong rebuke to the reckless and lawless Trump administration, please consider splitting a contribution today between Mark’s re-election campaign and Tim’s Common Ground PAC. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Together, we can help Virginia Democrats win big this November, send Mark back to the Senate next November, and fight back against this administration’s dangerous policies and rhetoric.
Thanks for being a part of this work!
—Mark Warner and Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Yassamin Ansari
Date: September 18, 2025
Subject: re: Jimmy Kimmel_
Holy shit, Peter:
ABC just pulled Jimmy Kimmel off the air after threats from Trump's FCC chair.
This is unbelievable behavior from a corrupt Oval Office, and it’s not just one joke and one comedian. _It’s a pattern._
Already this year, Stephen Colbert's been targeted. Trump and his admin have filed lawsuits against the _New York Times,_ the _Wall Street Journal_ , and 60 Minutes. He has squeezed CBS and ABC into settlements. He’s blocked the Associated Press from accessing the White House.
Now he's politicizing a horrific murder and using this tragedy to silence critics and scare people into staying quiet. **That's the authoritarian playbook.**
You don't have to like Jimmy Kimmel or agree with his jokes to see how dangerous this is in a democracy, where dissent shouldn't be optional. This is what keeps leaders accountable.
Trump is coming after our First Amendment rights. If we don't push back, dissent disappears, and with it goes democracy. **That’s why I’m introducing a resolution to protect free speech — stay tuned. **
**[We are organizing and fighting back. Now is not the time to stay silent — we need to speak out. clean_body: | Big news, Peter — ABC and Disney just reinstated Jimmy Kimmel. Last week, I introduced a resolution in Congress supported by more than 115 of my Democratic colleagues standing with Jimmy and condemning the Trump regime’s assault on free speech. Millions of you spoke out and mobilized, too. Our calls to action worked. We used our voices to call out the attacks on our democracy and free speech — and ABC and Disney listened. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Yassamin \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Yassamin Ansari Date: September 18, 2025 Subject: re: Jimmy Kimmel Holy shit, Peter: ABC just pulled Jimmy Kimmel off the air after threats from Trump's FCC chair. This is unbelievable behavior from a corrupt Oval Office, and it’s not just one joke and one comedian. It’s a pattern. Already this year, Stephen Colbert's been targeted. Trump and his admin have filed lawsuits against the New York Times, the Wall Street Journal , and 60 Minutes. He has squeezed CBS and ABC into settlements. He’s blocked the Associated Press from accessing the White House. Now he's politicizing a horrific murder and using this tragedy to silence critics and scare people into staying quiet. That's the authoritarian playbook. You don't have to like Jimmy Kimmel or agree with his jokes to see how dangerous this is in a democracy, where dissent shouldn't be optional. This is what keeps leaders accountable. Trump is coming after our First Amendment rights. If we don't push back, dissent disappears, and with it goes democracy. That’s why I’m introducing a resolution to protect free speech — stay tuned. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Peter, we are on a dangerous path toward authoritarianism. If we don’t use our voices to speak out, we could lose the ability to dissent altogether. Now’s the time to organize. Thanks for joining me. — Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on
body:
For Charlie. For America.
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=afe5900d031c459e80ed2ec226ad4475&_e=93qdQ2lHR5ASdPDkNz_5dCPSIGUAW5lT95jBdiBwWHbYzadhlyrkW6GF90Hc3S2YwBhvKixGPhaCIm4pDaAHhsZDKi1m04lMymJWMiezrAVGR2cIJa3jiDxmKwTuVzwqxrQ1jaLheOCLA8g4IgYFpB5TFV1Sq4j_Icdz7Ig6m58SJrfW9E7WBX1T8acVcc3k1oTIFzx9rUMYSPADNGvZOnCD32BUJm02KpGdRTZuQj6unPI230DojtleQ8jFiuNAJkHCs9thesnvRCO77o4_bLmdnttDH7PIkELucvCp8sy94dPRjyRIP855CifqBTHaKZCcd60QvrvO1AmT3rF68FBvldbViaQ26rMhKYZ-3k4-5q0nEjr02KOLoN0aNu5vEpRW-afxRW4r4c7NnK7LUNKVYa22mHFl2Vxvysj7vVOb_NYHeBFHI7sePA8cnD27Oxg6It0UOSw7eVjNvizkO7f1RWnL29qOUS2ZeclDO-w2rsv60LFVLGnfDhq5detHx3eVYc1Cv-mHX4gL8xRIyqcXmsm_Hr7rvR5eHXKydMv0TWdPEUMNaDPCSTbqzWwcQ8oVPuKARKQdbp26vHhswZQS1SDx2ul7IFhXHsWqeJcfp8gNa2lrkEwiofWR9hQhA5sx9bb1eLQRH-CDGjkr7gWt8_bekeGi2s5xzEUcGGR6eFfM2a96J9td0QL1Idrr5S2CimynpiO9C_3wUs33eg3EcBE_ZtJsv7PFKPEmi3k%3D)
---

Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=afe5900d031c459e80ed2ec226ad4475&_e=93qdQ2lHR5ASdPDkNz_5dCPSIGUAW5lT95jBdiBwWHbYzadhlyrkW6GF90Hc3S2YwBhvKixGPhaCIm4pDaAHhsZDKi1m04lMymJWMiezrAVGR2cIJa3jiDxmKwTuVzwqxrQ1jaLheOCLA8g4IgYFpB5TFV1Sq4j_Icdz7Ig6m58SJrfW9E7WBX1T8acVcc3k1oTIFzx9rUMYSPADNGvZOnCD32BUJm02KpGdRTZuQj6unPI230DojtleQ8jFiuNAD9RzZ-RTU3dVX8Jo-h3JmN5EL5VkOUamgyjpe7bzUzpEMpd63x38prOesD1UGwBGEAk-VnUz1qduvt1tE6oujr4NO1DNTmMOsRblynq3A5MLxLdlorlqHIv8WUMfNDywrTlLxXX9rrAliZ_nZ4PKbsbKMCVIWahoAgLcYiISbXXC6Rvt6KzC8DVEwD0dFdwNMG2PeDPQLHuiN1g5o8GBn9hAwGToordMTLgDT_a0cQpAZ_GIFEvqZgwbKf3BKkPOvlA-aQWd1mHf51nBMJtOhpmg7gaXeejZvaX8Tm2wLzTPzUq0_tksjJO_ebdPxoWsrfIs3W8KjW6rOzool2AQFLnnQftktRnrdesnkYKIxZiJRZQZpKjgn4Y8oDsbBY77XmLvgxgMZEidt25IGf8kykSt8sOo7_gAhj46-MNdmrrQB56de4VbfMWFPl692IObkzOf_lWvpN6dFY9dHMStuXp-YDrRcsqXxtq_hvaSFpA%3D)
---
I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough. _But his memory will._ _And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._ Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. ** He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA. No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again. He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him. **Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people. **As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations. _Let 's make the world remember him._ **[Friend, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=afe5900d031c459e80ed2ec226ad4475&_e=93qdQ2lHR5ASdPDkNz_5dCPSIGUAW5lT95jBdiBwWHbYzadhlyrkW6GF90Hc3S2YwBhvKixGPhaCIm4pDaAHhsZDKi1m04lMymJWMiezrAVGR2cIJa3jiDxmKwTuVzwqxrQ1jaLheOCLA8g4IgYFpB5TFV1Sq4j_Icdz7Ig6m58SJrfW9E7WBX1T8acVcc3k1oTIFzx9rUMYSPADNGvZOnCD32BUJm02KpGdRTZuQj6unPI230DojtleQ8jFiuNA13disPaT6-Y7TLgC5_ZDnto980zNVCK_A1TQEfCIKC5UVM6FgGRgfycQrj3iNhc5nx3CFU6ioovj1oJBTcPrBclocSY0HIYZaQ9NLY_dmTb3-5N1irwVVz-XKeHnEeSojJWqo08nd83-X0ZWqEU_dMBbZXcZUtfJ4vDo_n8DI_4SJBCpCApqBPGUhR25KQrJY-88L6J9DmW5Dzm2yGkSHeh4AXGTooLrvKhZKnIj_F0ho9ye8MsqaWA2aihfdUhTDnnOXlgZAqyUuV9O727KJY3-b6nYM7n9qEiOXgKyi-vcswTGG4kUab1PJcdcDXm5QOQrUbqro6fErcwcqB_nU6ipl3tbPtrq4KKiwpc0O50s6BtCF4zLQ0IxrxKR60PR1Nq0syOapW1LYck-uxsrWpFtxOhsLx1aHPxK4b3IeeDtDqAoiLwsIxgCjhomDjSQuRvIUgHbUqJEGIiDJBJkcUFOAmgStRC4RPAzSmoIoHE%3D)**

Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever. **For you, we 'll save our great country.** Rest in peace, brother. **For Charlie,** Don Jr.

| | Tim Walz announced this week that he's **running to continue serving as Governor of Minnesota.** He's led the charge in the state to cut child poverty, expand labor rights, invest in education, make sure every student gets free breakfast and lunch at school, and so much more. He's putting people first — and giving folks the freedom to live their own lives the way they want to live them. But everything he's helping build is under attack. Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms. That's why Tim is staying in the fight — because we've got a lot more work to do, and he's sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red. clean_body: Will you join me to support his re-election campaign? | | | | Tim Walz announced this week that he's running to continue serving as Governor of Minnesota. He's led the charge in the state to cut child poverty, expand labor rights, invest in education, make sure every student gets free breakfast and lunch at school, and so much more. He's putting people first — and giving folks the freedom to live their own lives the way they want to live them. But everything he's helping build is under attack. Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms. That's why Tim is staying in the fight — because we've got a lot more work to do, and he's sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Tim Walz and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Republicans want to gut your benefits and hand out tax breaks to billionaires. They think no one will notice. And if we do, they think we won't fight back. We're going to prove them wrong. But to do it, we need the resources to fight back starting right now — there's no time to waste. = = Onward, Ron | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. body:
You could feel the energy across southern New Mexico.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=cjFoCx3ckqi0SGNTogW%2BWe6%2BF%2BZW1vMWJY86or0zlI76x4c7SDpKE7lrhVLCg4%2BWYPZAkXJTlu5sAKLMmQOjSRvkLCVZQ%2FOXIo4k7GoQPzZqEwI5O50r6q6g8ULsmijhoqbO6nxEFITm0ykgAOqhx1D5rBJOll9OWaeM5R5%2FtPvBNY6FlX5%2BfFdjZlqBgThFTDcgnzRa3ZBTCTPa62coVlrvL9%2F7ycIM9P%2FpxmsAbrFqUJTP78aIz4NZeO6SfyB%2BWKEE5w64X8yaRMii8yyUt66FU1FxGVIq7RMb%2BPKQHGwWfNBHznD5fSael0J7Qlx1X%2B%2BrHDpDHQYcKPdNfNN%2BT4z27f7nWmssPiBqrcH4dZ3EA%2Fjsb2lbgtJlWF6TnlhsQDULywUS8JM2ioTBu3W3GTjeUxholf%2FfJAIYt5Pr3X0%3D)

What a weekend! We officially launched Gabe’s 2026 reelection campaign — and from Albuquerque to Doña Ana, the energy was **electric**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115730579/571292393/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092225_LAUNCHRECAP_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWVjOGQ5Mi0xNDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y05orLHsESuqN_t4gcBM1WZpXvDybQUnOg9MSQlBSPg=) Crowds showed up. Voices rose together with purpose and pride. It wasn’t just exciting — it was energizing. It reminded us exactly what we’re fighting for. Right now, across the country, we’re seeing coordinated efforts to divide and distract — to turn neighbor against neighbor, roll back hard-won rights, and stack the deck for the wealthy and well-connected. But here in New Mexico’s 2nd district, we’re standing up and speaking out. We’re sending a clear message: **no matter what they throw at us, we won’t back down — and we won’t be divided**. Gabe is running for reelection to keep delivering for working families — to fight for good-paying jobs, clean air and water, affordable housing, and a government that puts people first. This campaign is about defending our values and building a future where every New Mexican has a fair shot. That’s why your presence this weekend mattered so much. You didn’t just show up — you helped send a message that Southern New Mexico is united, determined, and ready for the road ahead. Let’s keep the momentum going — **together**. — Vasquez HQ [P.S. We officially launched Gabe’s 2026 reelection campaign — and from Albuquerque to Doña Ana, the energy was electric. = Crowds showed up. Voices rose together with purpose and pride. It wasn’t just exciting — it was energizing. It reminded us exactly what we’re fighting for. Right now, across the country, we’re seeing coordinated efforts to divide and distract — to turn neighbor against neighbor, roll back hard-won rights, and stack the deck for the wealthy and well-connected. But here in New Mexico’s 2nd district, we’re standing up and speaking out. We’re sending a clear message: no matter what they throw at us, we won’t back down — and we won’t be divided. Gabe is running for reelection to keep delivering for working families — to fight for good-paying jobs, clean air and water, affordable housing, and a government that puts people first. This campaign is about defending our values and building a future where every New Mexican has a fair shot. That’s why your presence this weekend mattered so much. You didn’t just show up — you helped send a message that Southern New Mexico is united, determined, and ready for the road ahead. Let’s keep the momentum going — together. — Vasquez HQ = | | = | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This is the man I loved…
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qsjzry2q2br5uao3qewejdqb3wlilxxw75fkhed7hemusr5dtqzs6yi0ejfwi8qq4fnc0nopb&__stmp=t30mt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30mt3&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30mt3&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qsjzry2q2br5uao3qewejdqb3wlilxxw75fkhed7hemusr5dtqzs6yi0ejfwi8qq4fnc0nopb&__stmp=t30mt3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vlqvoi6t4cxzexd606o5x9vx1rfmwebqhn0u46tsesxq6nmkvop4kvgena6fa16kmt76dsb2d55fp2fui1pmn5n8rgpej9xeqma7km0erwewdkkd1u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30mt3&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4j6u8zmnrfqe3qxm0obrivzchtuiab0ps003fj6xt30hme82ba2fpjitry6inv7t2nfm5l2qwmtvd09k2girndntd1thlap1727bz9znkb9m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30mt3&__onlt=h)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie's voice. I knew his heart.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvqu0wwe4z020oixx73grg57p7h2k4lijtlm3ncv2833pyumam1u72duw1596eyjvcvnq9zlv0mixy58&__stmp=t30n65&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30n65&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30n65&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvqu0wwe4z020oixx73grg57p7h2k4lijtlm3ncv2833pyumam1u72duw1596eyjvcvnq9zlv0mixy58&__stmp=t30n65&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20az0u1axv4owl94x106qxpk8knoo9uvsb4iov2a4mga5h1dj88t23zy2hnlukfb0ob8dnbdsjxexzpde8cevskwx4blcozx33mdyytjw77zcab3it23s9tvltbw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30n65&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldvm5ux2nruzv7mj6q1psr098jgijwk3kq1mku5nv3gda4cwnifuihvrfbju93cqc1781y52zxlzp0mpqo1pzzl24o80dmslow6l3ert8nj9a4fv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30n65&__onlt=h)

#### **Jimmy Kimmel may be coming back. But corporate media proved they can make Trump-critical media disappear. Independent media is all we have. Please keep us** _**Fighting**_**with a** _**Paid Subscription**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZNzmdGNhDgWDaJc1HBcQ_KfJfeh9y4BcDk3QdMjvA4g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=174282372)
_I've given up. I 'm sick of feeling. Is there nothing you can say? Take this all away
I'm suffocating. Tell me what the f*k is wrong with me?..._
_Put me out of my misery. Put me out of my misery. Put me out of my --
Put me out of my f*king misery - **Linkin Park, "Given Up"** _
_**\- Which it feels like some of those who SHOULD BE fighting have done.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a8dc2ec-eb57-49b0-9ba8-6d0b11a343da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 1963, all-time great journalist Jimmy Breslin wrote a book about the impressibly horrid expansion franchise, the NY Mets. In their debut season as--_in theory_ --a professional baseball team, they set a modern day record for futility not broken til last season.
The Mets went 40-120, winning only 25% of their games (a doubleheader was rained out, hence 160 games).
**The name of Breslin 's book **on the subject was _**Can't Anybody Here Play This Game?**_**(** On a side note, God, [does corporate media not make 'em anything like Breslin anymore](https://substack.com/redirect/cc3293c1-da9c-42b8-8957-776be1d73f0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We could use him about now).****
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/773f670a-731a-40c4-8529-41c4a1ee7a72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Which has me thinking about the Democratic Party. Let me put this gently. _Can anyone in our leadership and the majority of our members play this game?_
Do they think they're actually...doing well?
The Democrats, _in theory_ , are a party that stands in opposition to an aggressively fascist force in the person--or oviparous animal--of everyone's favorite piss-cotton-candy-haired, girdle-turtle with a crapper decorated by our most sensitive secrets.
That'd be Donald J. Trump.
The worst American--and I use that term loosely--in our long history of calling this continent home. And, no, I haven't forgotten about Jefferson Davis, Son of Sam or Laura Loomer.
One might think Democratic Senate and House Leaders--Hakeem Jeffries and Chuck Schumer--would be familiar with the Mets. They're residents of Brooklyn, the borough next door.
And assuming they are, do they think that _losing to the other team three out of every four times_ is a good thing? Something that makes them stronger?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7bf1994d-3ba5-478c-9805-272f1097bd10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because I really, really want to know how after 30 annums of Republican lawbreaking, ethics-stomping and norms-banging, Democrats still can't or won't play the game how a two-year old can see by now it must.
And with our time as as democratic-republic potentially potentially on a stopwatch.
Assault after onslaught on all that did make America great, this should be easy.
Do you want me to write some "We Didn't Start The Fire" verses about it? Ok:
> Buchanan, Bennett, culture war, Newt Gingrich, man-whore; had 3 wives he still impeached, a Dick Armey steps in the breach; Miami-Dade, Brooks Bros Mob; O'Reilly, Rush and Babghdad Bob; Sinclair, Salem and Lou Dobbs; Brownie...heck-uva job!;
> Pre-9/11 Bush drops the ball; aluminum tubes, curveball; invade Iraq with lies & haste; Cheney shoots friends in the face; Mitch McConnell corporate pet; we gonna leave Iraq yet?; filibuster all the time, Boehner loves to chug red wine;
> Ben-ghazi, tan suit bullshit, birth cer-tificate; Moscow Mitch, no SCOTUS vote, Putin backs a wrinkled scrote; corporate media robo-fails, where are Hillary's emails?; How did we elect this man?, at least we won'd do that again...
Ok, that got us up to 2016, and frankly out of my system.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZNzmdGNhDgWDaJc1HBcQ_KfJfeh9y4BcDk3QdMjvA4g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174282372)
The point? Trump's a fascist, [who's taking America into authoritarian territory](https://substack.com/redirect/dabc5bb5-40ac-4a74-bc11-74275ce54051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) via some combination of lifetime loathing, intellectual constipation and diarrhea-mouth dementia + potential heart disease.
He's so weak, Vance, MTG and others are circling like they're sharks with batteries in the water.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c5e9aa-9499-48c7-b0c2-eef5d3b45675?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But the bigger point is the GOP has been demeaning and dehumanizing Democrats as a group at least since Buchanan's 1992 speech at the Republican Convention.
They've attacked democratic norms, rules and laws solely for the sake of power, never stopping to give a shit what it would do to our country. Some patriots.
And the bipartisan comity needed in the House and Senate? Pinned below the crushed pillars of democracy that buckled under the weight of GOP treachery.
So how the f*ck have Democrats not figured out yet--with the exception of a half dozen governors and maybe two dozen Democratic members of Congress--that you fight fire with napalm. Or a Michael Jackson Pepsi ad (old school reference there, kids).
How do I end up watching **all but** **58** Democrats in the House vote for a day of remembrance for Charlie Kirk?
Kirk, a man who who shouldn't have been shot, because this is America and we believe in democracy. But a day of remembrance?!?
For the guy who said "I think empathy is a made-up, new age term that does a lot of damage." Oh, and these two gems, procured from many:
> Black women do not have the brain processing power to otherwise be taken really seriously. You had to go steal a white person's slot to go be taken somewhat seriously. **And:** Gun control, like vaccines and masks, is focused on making people feel 'safe' by taking freedoms away from others. Don't fall for it.
Democrats? Any answers?
If you were doing this at all, why not **demand** a day of remembrance be included for schoolchildren shot and killed (because Republicans don't want gun buyers slightly inconvenienced by background checks)?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/561141b3-8bce-4676-a214-4b0acfdfe196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Or**** former MN St. House Speaker, Melissa Hortman--[murdered by an incel-loon with easy access to guns](https://substack.com/redirect/e12c39d6-c602-4634-becc-28320da8fcb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and incited to violence--both GOP specials? How about BOTH?
How is it you have no idea how to use power yet?
That you have no idea that there _is power_ in numbers and if you vote in a bloc--in solidarity---like Republicans have mostly been doing since Bill Clinton's first stimulus bill in 1993-- **you show strength**. You show confidence.
You don't pull a Kevin Bacon from Animal House every. GD. Time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09653c7a-076a-4dd7-bc18-7229f8d17e72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Merrick Garland protected the reputation of the DOJ at the expense of prosecuting criminals by holding weekly press conferences, doing what Republicans would do--and setting the narrative, so Republicans couldn't retcon January 6th.
So, that DOJ reputation he worked so hard to protect--how do you think that's going just about now [with Dead-Eye Dick, Kash Patel, stinking up the joint](https://substack.com/redirect/1d461de3-a33d-4790-8fac-ec809aada695?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? Politicizing every single thing. Trump calling for political prosecutions.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZNzmdGNhDgWDaJc1HBcQ_KfJfeh9y4BcDk3QdMjvA4g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174282372)
So not doing everything in his power--including communicating!--to make sure Trump and his cronies paid for their crimes and couldn't come back to haunt us...[that protected it DOJ? No, it. has destroyed it](https://substack.com/redirect/ce04e47a-b343-4b2a-af43-876066248197?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Do you think there's a lesson there, Dems?
Or nah, if you bow down to Republicans on Charlie Kirk votes, that totally won't just divide Democrats, dispirit your base and empower Republicans? At a moment when if you could remove your heads from..well, you know, you'd see your numbers absolutely suck, because we want you not to fester-in-febrility, but fight.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd5e543d-fd37-464e-8a0a-a585c881ea05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My Democratic friends, that is ugly. Everyone hates Trump and hates Republicans. Yet, they like us even less, because our loudest voices who fan out for tv hits, and our leaders, appear weak AF.
We could be accumulating, building on, joining with all that populist, anti-corruption, [anti-Trump/Epstein](https://substack.com/redirect/57d75b81-64d2-4610-813e-ae0e3c4772f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), anti-Trump economy energy, preparing for an FDR moment. But you're pissing in the wind, hoping Trump will trip and fall over, and you'll collect the pieces.
**That 's not how this works.**
Schumer, Jeffries, Pelosi, Durbin. I honor what you did in the past. But I don't care anymore. I don't want my kids growing up in the Biff Tannen'd, _Idiocracy_ version of an Orwell creation.
[Let anyone with the courage to speak, stand, fight, tour, scream,](https://substack.com/redirect/1cdd19c2-04d6-4407-9036-a369526e754b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) block, procedurally screw over, back-stab, provide vision, strength and a willingness to grab a 60-40 election by the horns, Take Over. And Lead.
This person, I believe her name is Representative Jasmine Crockett 😉, yeah, she seems about right:
> If there was any way I was gonna honor somebody who decided that they were going to negatively talk about me and proclaim that I was somehow involved in the great white replacement...Yeah, I'm not honoring that kind of stuff, especially as a civil rights attorney.
> It's unfortunate that more of my colleagues -- even on my side of the aisle -- couldn't see the amount of harm that this man was attempting to inflict upon our communities.
Lead and you can win over the obviously large number of voters Joni Ernst, in +13 Trump Iowa, just saw in her polling hate Trump, hate her and made her drop out.
Lead and you can win pissed off Farmers, small-business owners, ranchers, workers, Latinos, younger voters, Republican women, hell, even white working class voters. All are showing a willingness to drop Trump like his cranium dropped one side of his face last week.
Lead, by doing the opposite of what you did on this silly procedural vote.
Which is the opposite of disunity, disorganization, terror, lack of communication about what the hell the vote was about--defining the debate--and what you, the heroes of the story, were doing about it to oppose the bad guys and a bad vote.
**Let 's try this again, Dems: corruption, cruelty, criminality and incompetence. It tells a helluva story.**
One of the most famous lines from The Shawshank Redemption, said by the innocent but imprisoned Andy Dufresne, was "get busy living, or get busy dying."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/110ebd6b-a257-421a-8d66-b0627bb53476?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We're not ready to die yet. And we're not willing to live in a prison of MAGA's making. _We 're ready to break out of it._
So every Democrat ready to capitulate, ingratiate and mitigate go into a different business. Every Democrat ready to liberate, defenestrate and irradiate, enter stage Left.
We have no more time for homonculi. It's time for heroes.
#### **Jimmy Kimmel may be coming back. But corporate media proved they can make Trump-critical media disappear. Independent media is all we have. Please keep us** _**Fighting**_**with a** _**Paid Subscription**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZNzmdGNhDgWDaJc1HBcQ_KfJfeh9y4BcDk3QdMjvA4g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=174282372)

body:
Peter,

**[BIG NEWS:](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/21ls5TVcJBiQ-D37ABg9QV-YyHufxwye_2uScltXlRBjgfgmrMDmKtHrjVJTvBdq-hzygZlq8AA3uZfpnkkWl_xml-zR_VC6RiJ6S39PUkpqNwRkP108oKayHk6tjz8s84SBOhrtUoE-oWhAITU-p63EXiRVDtmrznlPh0DgLgl8_hzuiNxvmS-B9pR15dfwmhfUoJA5kUG0UBX4Vbu08wTT7vrKr20uS4aaD9g1EOAIcIzQF4mL3_VvarrBlMV5X2t34H9Wk_1-89iVrfYmDzxZ6gzVABbwRHgcUOb93LWVIc6FK7Nax-HHrWEuepaz0x1GvMXKHxeUIXhAay0200lkGYcAmUIw3Lfcj5-L-SV2t5tmDgSlatDEV1Tr1Vy06eqcR95tMZdk-s-55cPap5tIl9qVg5FUcWozOpzs91T48WFcDjUYwbeNic0wk6VYugRNVGfBwUnHyoeA47zVEexgT01ulyojKgUW_lwtsye3uMBCWbnRv6uxmBcIwOHm_8h-rQHdKBVO71f7kmRN_RZ4hzQsOOxDcACv0JhrGEkV6FIltUC-ceHhIbEQiNJBOLbnt86DqlAhl-oM6-LEQeowWGt2veuoqhkmZcKtDzAsSg1AWCWRRRKuyidBQ9mW8Jk0VWbuP3JaH5qt9tRze5WjIj1TqKN3giT6KmTHwjYWpCeydNBJJHz14_VdxDhru_Xjh_eU-lKV8bsezPv8hWAyOZz86JoPG_UeOjBdegxMlZJOSCW5kE16r8-Fi6M97bo6zdBhqC2aGDxdLSwkMbyXQvTlqjA56OF4QLddbkxqa0xvbkuFezQPLwWZB6NyMhgncUKukmlEXb4G2oxMNFqwJ0VPeOqswAFx1fdAjMPmBDeJJToD3ly15D6UYgPFCfQQydHwEgvHwgu1UhV8zaWCS3PZWhRnU0YN1VRa1xelEE8_dcgyxKtKG9oPXiVv-zRX1xaqDwhWrC3WWpCxOeyTTT2Qgx8vtKVlYXcv1LHDu6n3W-RRk0iGX2OoTib9u44oCPldqbesRHkVWG24FUV37rfrWrraI23fWl8f3gT5frB_mKNu1xdItBNqf2PKstmY9U11G8IGTms/xMVSiLoS9aHXL24l85Q7nvq9fr4NWhn-/13) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

name: TRUMP
subject: While working in the Oval Office, I dropped a big Truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I need MAGA to pay close attention! I am calling on the entire MAGA Movement to stand behind me as I fight to bring Law and Order to every state in America!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
|
---
This is President Trump!
I put out a MAJOR Truth and I wanted to make sure you saw it!
__“I have seen the horrific video of a beautiful, young Ukrainian refugee, who came to America to escape the vicious War in Ukraine, and was innocently riding the Metro in Charlotte, North Carolina, where she was brutally ambushed by a mentally deranged lunatic.”__
**CRIMINALS LIKE THIS NEED TO BE LOCKED UP!**
This beautiful young woman came to our country, because she believed in the AMERICAN way of LIFE, LIBERTY, and HAPPINESS!
But the Radical Left released a vicious animal on her.
**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!**
Our beautiful country can’t survive if we allow these animals on our streets.
**[I am calling on the entire MAGA Movement to stand behind me as I fight to bring LAW AND ORDER to every state in America!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
I have already deployed the National Guard, FBI, and other law enforcement to our INCREDIBLE WASHINGTON DC. It is now a BEAUTIFUL CITY, so safe that I went out to dinner with members of my cabinet.
But EVERY city in America should be this safe. **And we can’t wait another second.**
[ SIGN PETITION FOR SAFE AMERICA](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**[I need all of MAGA to sign this petition for a SAFE AMERICA!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Our country hangs in the balance - please don’t wait another second.
STAND WITH TRUMP AND SAVE AMERICA!
[SIGN PETITION FOR SAFE AMERICA](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump 45th and 47th President of the United States of America

name: Brianna Shamsuddoha, NDRC
subject: Ugh… the SAVE Act is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We won’t let them get away with this sneak attack on our right to vote.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115731062/571318158/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YjY0YjAwLTIxOTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a04UhvK7qkX4D9_CqdUZdeKrVjws9rWOSbgiEdHLlsw=&emci=9156dffb-d797-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=47b64b00-2198-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Remember the SAVE Act, Peter? I know how hard it is to keep track of everything these days, so here’s a refresher: It’s the extreme anti-democracy bill that passed the House earlier this year but got blocked by the Senate after a public outcry. This bill would be a cudgel to voting rights, and would likely disenfranchise millions of people, including women, younger voters, naturalized citizens, and low-income voters. Now, some extreme lawmakers are trying to sneak the bill through the Senate by attaching the SAVE Act to a budget resolution or the National Defense Authorization Act — essentially, slipping it through alongside essential legislation, hoping no one will notice. [**These are the types of fights the NDRC was made for. Help us push back on all attempts to take power away from voters — whether it’s in Congress or the states.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115731063/571318159/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MAGASaveAct_email_20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MAGASaveAct_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MAGASaveAct_&utm_campaign=MAGASaveAct&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YjY0YjAwLTIxOTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a04UhvK7qkX4D9_CqdUZdeKrVjws9rWOSbgiEdHLlsw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The SAVE Act would require all American citizens registering to vote or updating their registration to present proof of citizenship — either a passport or a birth certificate. Government-issued driver’s licenses wouldn’t work, putting the onus on each individual voter to prove that they’re American citizens.
And if your information doesn’t match what’s on your birth certificate — say you changed your last name after getting married, like 84 percent of married women, for example — then you might not be able to vote. Or say you lost your birth certificate in a move or a house fire? Too bad.
Bottom line: The SAVE Act would turn voting rights upside-down and disenfranchise millions of Americans. And that’s the whole idea — Republicans these days are terrified of the will of the people. That’s why we exist: to fight for people’s rights to be heard. Right now, we’ve got to pull out all the stops to prevent this bill from ever passing the Senate.
[**Help us mobilize against extremist attempts to make it harder for people to vote. clean_body: We won’t let them get away with this sneak attack on our right to vote. | Remember the SAVE Act, Peter? I know how hard it is to keep track of everything these days, so here’s a refresher: It’s the extreme anti-democracy bill that passed the House earlier this year but got blocked by the Senate after a public outcry. This bill would be a cudgel to voting rights, and would likely disenfranchise millions of people, including women, younger voters, naturalized citizens, and low-income voters. Now, some extreme lawmakers are trying to sneak the bill through the Senate by attaching the SAVE Act to a budget resolution or the National Defense Authorization Act — essentially, slipping it through alongside essential legislation, hoping no one will notice. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The SAVE Act would require all American citizens registering to vote or updating their registration to present proof of citizenship — either a passport or a birth certificate. Government-issued driver’s licenses wouldn’t work, putting the onus on each individual voter to prove that they’re American citizens. And if your information doesn’t match what’s on your birth certificate — say you changed your last name after getting married, like 84 percent of married women, for example — then you might not be able to vote. Or say you lost your birth certificate in a move or a house fire? Too bad. Bottom line: The SAVE Act would turn voting rights upside-down and disenfranchise millions of Americans. And that’s the whole idea — Republicans these days are terrified of the will of the people. That’s why we exist: to fight for people’s rights to be heard. Right now, we’ve got to pull out all the stops to prevent this bill from ever passing the Senate. = Thank you, Brianna Shamsuddoha, Director of Mobilization National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. That puts MORE urgency and pressure on flipping seats from red to blue in California than ever before. Right now, the California Democratic Party is working hard to get Prop 50 passed while also preparing for both scenarios. We can’t be complacent or just hope for the best. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- The entire team at the California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. subject: Tomorrow's the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
It's now or never! Join us tomorrow for Election Day and for Adelita!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b4a16ca7a6e/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308954?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=0d6d35e9c6&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | | |
# **🚨LAST 24 HOURS!🚨**
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter, | | Tomorrow is **ELECTION DAY🚨** and there’s still time to help elect **Adelita Grijalva** as the FIRST LATINA FROM AZ to go to Congress! We’ve got plenty of opportunities to get involved.
Every moment counts. Every vote matters. This is how we make history—**together**.
**Will you join us during these final 24 hours?**
---
| | **ELECTION DAY OPPORTUNITIES:**[ Lit Drop ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=ea057f36cc&e=f7c3700ccb)[ ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=5cec52524a&e=f7c3700ccb)[**E LECTION NIGHT PARTY**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=3f6c727772&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | **📆 Tuesday, September 22, 2025 – ELECTION DAY!**
* **5:00 AM** [– Literature Drop Meetup @ HQ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=96efb95703&e=f7c3700ccb)
_Please join us bright and early to drop off reminder notes with voters to remember to vote before they head off to work!_[
](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=d030257f04&e=f7c3700ccb)
* **11:00 AM – 2:00 PM** –[ ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=62c173a022&e=f7c3700ccb)[Virtual Phonebank Shift 1](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=48b4fe290b&e=f7c3700ccb)[
](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2251ff18e8&e=f7c3700ccb)
* **2:00 PM – 5:00 PM** –[ Virtual Phonebank Shift 2](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=cd6dd39213&e=f7c3700ccb)[
](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=78b743f4f3&e=f7c3700ccb)

Join us in celebrating the labor of love poured into this movement at one of our favorite spots—a place full of heart, history, and community. We’ll see you at El Casino Ballroom!
**7:00 PM** –[ Doors Open for Election Night Party](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=e306359a29&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=572c851295&e=f7c3700ccb)
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=d0cec38373&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **VIRTUAL PHONE BANKING**
---
| [RSVP to VIRTUAL PHONE BANK](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=8afbe30924&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | | | **IF WE WANT TO WIN WE NEED ALL OF US TO PITCH IN! 🔥**
---
| | Thank you for all the energy you’ve brought so far—your time, your voice, and your presence are making a real difference. As we head into these final days, let’s stay grounded in our shared purpose and continue showing up for one another.
If you have any questions or need anything from our team, we’re here to support you. Reach out anytime at **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
Hasta la victoria, **Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**
