Reach out anytime at volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com Hasta la victoria, Naomi De La Rosa Arellano** | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 129, Tucson, AZ, 85702 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This is the man Charlie really was...
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihi3ghqfhb9o5pyog2rr6wrbuhmouxq0b37ibppqfobjf25f4aasadc80wlvzo2eo2nfs73lygpqucx9p2jfy8oshh590&__stmp=t30sgx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30sgx&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30sgx&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5rm10oy7ofl186dhzbzqveplnepzsabus4hsqlnhhvnsy3gxvk3wtdi31rpdwq4ax9nhxdgmlsgsf0mqenehvywao2zviv09ldufky7rlah5xkrpx4i4vybwwujmmjc2kg98asxt0rt4d14izig3pryt09brppfsfc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30sgx&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=2ckkjtiswb42vdk0wxztv9x7gw2jysqt112u9depv497yz90g4sx8vop3muvy888se01swgdgye3ys6gah2u49nhstbsp70lannaw76fefcnamok13ywzanjt3u2phfi6pelu8ams76ledgq0e3qs32f5wpq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30sgx&__onlt=h)

**Last year, Kamala Harris carried this district by less than 1%.**
That razor-thin margin shows what’s possible — but only if we turn out every single Democratic voter in this Prince William County district.

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie’s voice I knew his heart
body:
I don’t know how else to begin except with this

| | |
---
Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2mrqcmprmefer6h6082gtb9houle6b5589g0b10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh68or4cph2bs)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---

The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Friend. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Friend. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Friend. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Friend, that's why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It's how I first met him -- driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. name: Shane Jenkins, Stand in the Gap
subject: They lied about J6 and they are still lying
body:
Pelosi lied about the guard... and everything else

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0304c8tkje92ou8o3570vl2r2nk7ind0nnua3l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh68or4cph2bs)

Friend,

It’s almost impossible to count the number of lies the Democrats have told about January 6th.

They exaggerated how violent the protest was, calling it an “armed insurrection.”

They completely disregarded the presence of Antifa and FBI operatives in the crowd who tried to incite violence.

Former U.S. Capitol Police Chief Steven Sund recently called out Nancy Pelosi for LYING about the deployment of National Guard troops on January 6, saying he REQUESTED them. But her Sergeant at Arms DENIED his request.

The January 6 Committee (or other investigatory bodies) manipulated evidence, cherry-picked footage, altered timelines, or misrepresented what happened.

While the Democrats spun their narrative, the January 6 patriots were hunted down like dogs...

**Even after President Trump pardoned us, the Democrats’ lies are making the challenging task of rebuilding your life after prison even more difficult.**

Stand in the Gap is a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of the 2020 election.

Our goal is to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

[You can help January 6th defendants find the strength to start anew and reintegrate into their communities by donating $100, $50, or even just $10 today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs4qkv16ip9q3893rescrvbkqlcn3uu5do5jt2co_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh68or4cph2bs)

The truth is that _our people_ , American patriots, were brutalized and attacked on January 6th.

All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment.

And today, January 6th patriots _still_ face...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm
* Mental health challenges that their families can never understand

Even though President Trump pardoned many of the J6ers, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

We also have a number of J6ers whose sentences were commuted, but who still need pardons.

Stand in the Gap is working tirelessly to advocate for these patriots and provide them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

**No one should have to face these hardships alone.**

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And the Democrats lied about their involvement and hunted them down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

There are nearly 1,600 American patriots who need to rebuild their lives. That’s exactly what Stand in the Gap is helping them do!

We are committed to providing help, hope, and healing through comprehensive
Care, legal representation, and practical support to ensure that each individual can rebuild their life with dignity, hope, and purpose.

And for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance.

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie’s voice I knew his heart
body:
I don’t know how else to begin except with this

| | |
---
Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbkn12j1r7glp46btkjc6cdtao8sr1s2jqs4mh1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh68or4cph2bs)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhocjudm57fssvlvnh0o8ufsj3ifeubf815ap2vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh68or4cph2bs)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie’s voice I knew his heart
body:
I don’t know how else to begin except with this

| | |
---
Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zngu1t510s27bgo1kclo94gpluu9j24q4i7gdir8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh64pb4c3h2bs)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjql3p6fu2u1jkki5pjes9lc49n0a1gh523ceos0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh64pb4c3h2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Friend. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Friend. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Friend, that's why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It's how I first met him -- driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. We 'll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvaqgibl9nr3btng3r9tfcqi204mb3l7aihlbnjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh6eo34c5h2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6tl33tsffil3qo6k54jpdjj80e484bmajko206o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdh6eo34c5h2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. ### LAST CALL!
### This is Your Final Invitation to Join a Special RNC Election Integrity Training TONIGHT
---
---
| Tonight at 6PM, ambassadors from the Republican National Committee will be teaching a Massachusetts-focused election integrity class. Will you join us?
This virtual training is geared toward grassroots conservatives who want to protect the right to vote in 2026. Don't miss your only chance in 2025 to learn from the team that helped President Trump win all 7 swing states by stopping voter fraud.

## Trump Ties Tylenol to Autism Increase
President Trump said Monday the FDA will add [new warning labels to Tylenol](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdLMyYwNLQZGG7qVNibwwBueZMbKHXfH3EVH-IN1ornSuzv31NX25EAOvP91Og_g0MX1KJBHKk1yROMWPyxx4_Q77TjGTnHlCjQ3oHtBMiwvxmmy1DJ4IyVQ01F3zbLF-9k21DUuLXTtr_TJtXc96ccbg02vbdH1vrNFVGG6a7tHUWtvGPmrdd_blrWn72pP2ympagqT8-J0Cy0Y-XulN-TGnvYrDJnIUZX4oHBWOfB2pyB0pHG-wwlH3940Kx7PA7adwlHzuBzjmdPJMBfzi4BNihHlzvBL8c4fiPMkF0b0owplXKnBkWtmxwJ5ko1xA0v17Ewu4U0LZIYfyDYFh3kJcMrHCscrDctwNobSdsnrdXYh_FeS_dn8P-CcAAP__K8CZDA), citing research linking acetaminophen use during pregnancy to autism. He told reporters that pregnant women should avoid the drug unless treating a high-risk fever, and that doctors will be formally notified of the new guidance.

The [White House pointed to studies](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D0OnDAQxfHTQGdkjFmgcJGGbtOmRMaM8WT9gewBxO2jjXKDXODp9_6_3stbo8e4_9QBFNm0RLiLByLICz0eYvK3zhHj_sEQwGegMy-Ci57xiYlu2TT6Z5H1piyAgK4G1Q79-BLtOPW1U2YdRyP4IM3Ku8luq-SWj6sxUz9w2_Ia1XeNT6JrOZe9bFo-DXK1sntNrQVuK8lhQ0q5-Z0wkgPrn3RBbkwKtVeO6ChV96MScyXm-74b50qzp6sS85GhFJZTCpWYnSuM8hkO9oEYYXuYPglLYBiRUBNeUJiH06QrZYzs332WoYDOxrGvs3EUfJ3VdtzoPZbXUEm-B43-L4f-q-GlxJ8AAAD___gSiW0) from Johns Hopkins, Yale, and Harvard showing associations between prenatal acetaminophen and neurodevelopmental issues. The American College of [Obstetricians and Gynecologists maintains](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfY7ag4zggHjx0YUvXjsgx5-TaA0eOG8q_r-hf6PakJ33Sex-X6eJFZb29-4VdiWlaeXsql8J5KrvymnTzeZX19iXLwpq5fOcJAbsT2BO20-xF94mq2UVm5LZi1wzducfmbLvq7gA49F3kwZKfA1IgRrYco237gTBU4g4NLLYNAHVUN2AHukZqe9tEhmgIeJaScv2ZZC13jrqnF-c6pKVSdy_l8TTtm8HR4LhtW329hqMzOB5jDI4-FwnKRww_CDNp7gdNVXbzYxNVefaDIbgtXvRPLf-64uXwNwAA___-zXLN) there's no clear evidence linking the proper use of Tylenol to developmental issues. The administration also announced it will begin the approval process for leucovorin, a cancer drug that has shown early promise for easing autism symptoms.
## Kimmel Returns to ABC Without Apology
Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel [will return to ABC](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ9G3hjItOxEg4Yu3m7XjoZiUwlv9BNIzA389oXTR-h2AAKH33f-fC1fniPn22-fyEkoS6Z3iyRCdZE9Ui7x7WvmfHtwShQryasuqHEEbQGHZfMc98V0mwtESENHrj-Plwn7ix27uzPY93rAYRyni101btM4TfqsyRoyfrh07I42bXHotTajOfXans01mGGyfSAdlNG0sZR6-i6c5U4h7uWH6mktqYvuLvJsavilcFY45_1ZmhwnhfNRrHDW9siocL6-GmdqTeH8zSnt8E8KGglIgY9cPpK_rlAyyIva5nfwQajClTjfYPf5QRuUEMBzhYME1ruvkQkeXB-wlpQoy_Gkq257vjlGbtNZGX1LnuOHW_5r7B-HfwMAAP__wUKT1Q) tonight after a weeklong suspension over remarks about Charlie Kirk’s killing, but news reports say he doesn't plan to apologize. The late-night host, who earns about $15 million annually, negotiated his comeback directly with Disney CEO Bob Iger and Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden, according to reports. He will reportedly address the controversy in Tuesday’s monologue, but stop short of an apology. On his Sept. 15 broadcast, Kimmel offended many viewers by saying, _“We hit some new lows over the weekend with the MAGA gang desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them and with everything they can to score political points from it.”_ Authorities have disputed that, saying the accused shooter had left-wing views. Kimmel's return [will be pre-empted by at least one large TV station group](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OpDAQBOCnMZmRfzEEDi4h20svRAaaoffaNjLeQbz9aWeSyzfroFWqr_58TB8BCdPjd4jg65anBNdJUCuUqd4EKdMVSsL0-IsxAhWoX2VSQlkuBq70tAakezLN6jcABboBL53tOyX7wTa7N2ZxsAkLslfCBBlcNwttbRDLvPZdaNB_p4lBaSmEsaaVYnBm3ozuBrmB2JgRsGLNpf3MmOoOG935CaVdcmzI77UeJ9O_mBqZGq_ravdMdF85rwWOXOr7k6lx_joxwXn-d_JvLlPjiWmhgIUfBSAelX9ijDd_mznhE_hLnniYFy6V7rRzxlmmxqb49biQCM_OMSMeMSC9utUfDfr06l8AAAD__3g8jH4). Sinclair Broadcast Group, the largest owner of ABC stations, with 38 across the country, including WJLA, the ABC affiliate that serves the Washington D.C. metro area, has said it will run other programming.
## Trump to Meet Arab Leaders at UN
President Trump is scheduled to meet a group of [Arab and Muslim leaders on Tuesday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OnDAQhJ_G3HpkbAaWA4eJIm67UpRDjqgHt5nO-ofYnrHI00fkFfZWUqlKn75f78s7suOwfaCnqdi4BKrZUSmUlnI4CtFVTIHD9snek0tUnmlRUl1BjqD0YpDdsXSNmSyRIt3Q1A7Xt161b-O1eUwGe1S04tj1psXe3HEYLKlRj1K31uqGp_NNjkq3UnbX7tLKcejuttP92FqSVnSSDJeYLr8jh_Ig6474onRZo2_c9Chlz0LfhJqFmmutF5_D2Qk1U4BnFmreo-PC6xm3cxo8hSLUnNcYdyjp6XfYHYYM-ek9F-AAgSocMX1C5fIATHgHR2goZYgBNvyLUDEJNWOC2639kD_sH6HnuLIR-vu30ynV_JPS3qTJ7JWd49wPopObR3b_6cuXlL8m9S8AAP__Hr6Y1A) in New York during the United Nations General Assembly meeting to discuss efforts to end the war in Gaza. The meeting comes as Hamas prepares to send a [letter to Trump proposing a 60-day ceasefire](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU8DnZGxDQuFizTbbdqUaIJnwNkxXtneJdw-IjlCqpHeSF___Y_bdAPPflveIaAtFKcN98xYCqapHIxb5B3S5rfl7kNATlieaVJSdUKOQunJgedjMrWzhKhQ12jbSzf0qh3Grl4t0az12M-DGjoJrTNu0DAb6fRIjlqqvT3T5Kh0K6XpTNPK8WI-yeh-bAklVUai8yWm5iv6raxIfMQXpmaOoWa7lvLIlX6r1LVS133fG4rfp8X5P0lM7Cp1XSFAFn9qoqRneAjI9yx6KRwcYkbISD6hcAgsEvIJxApMYo25wIJZ5PhM83nhqJN1j90z-9xfKiOXAJ5_K5V_7fiy6icAAP__GtqKzw) in exchange for the release of half of the hostages held in Gaza, according to reports. The letter is expected to be delivered this week. The U.S. State Department denied visas to Palestinian leaders, including Mahmoud Abbas, effectively blocking them from attending the General Assembly in New York, citing national security concerns. President Donald Trump [will speak at the United Nations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2u2yAQRp8G74gAQxIvvKhUeXer7rq0xjA40_ITwfhG7tNX6Svc9Sd9Ouf8-lg_gBKV_QdknDnWteCrJ2TGtvKZsNT0glao7H8oZ0wN-WirUcZJNUkzrgEonasdwhwRDY4Dzvrm7lej75MbHjNYHTVu9wnAG3TemVFvygbvtfVBu4Hm95uazKiVss5etJpudot2vE46oorCKgzEtV1-Vyr8wJjO-ont4mse0vxgfnYxfhNmEWaBzb8NLnt9z8IsP2siJt-FWbgd-SkfCKHLHQs2SBJ6x7ylU8aDj4byCQk7U0G5w1-QoWYqwCjM0rm2U4wLBTF-18bdJnWd3NDm8HxRStSvN2HVnoHSfzL-Us7P2fwLAAD__1BWi2c) General Assembly today. His address follows a decision by several U.S. allies, including France, the U.K., Canada, and Australia, to formally recognize a Palestinian state, joining 142 of 193 UN member nations in supporting a two-state solution.

He told reporters that pregnant women should avoid the drug unless treating a high-risk fever, and that doctors will be formally notified of the new guidance. The from Johns Hopkins, Yale, and Harvard showing associations between prenatal acetaminophen and neurodevelopmental issues. The American College of there's no clear evidence linking the proper use of Tylenol to developmental issues. The administration also announced it will begin the approval process for leucovorin, a cancer drug that has shown early promise for easing autism symptoms. Kimmel Returns to ABC Without Apology Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel tonight after a weeklong suspension over remarks about Charlie Kirk’s killing, but news reports say he doesn't plan to apologize. The late-night host, who earns about $15 million annually, negotiated his comeback directly with Disney CEO Bob Iger and Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden, according to reports. He will reportedly address the controversy in Tuesday’s monologue, but stop short of an apology. On his Sept. 15 broadcast, Kimmel offended many viewers by saying, “We hit some new lows over the weekend with the MAGA gang desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them and with everything they can to score political points from it.” Authorities have disputed that, saying the accused shooter had left-wing views. Kimmel's return . Sinclair Broadcast Group, the largest owner of ABC stations, with 38 across the country, including WJLA, the ABC affiliate that serves the Washington D.C. metro area, has said it will run other programming. Trump to Meet Arab Leaders at UN President Trump is scheduled to meet a group of in New York during the United Nations General Assembly meeting to discuss efforts to end the war in Gaza. The meeting comes as Hamas prepares to send a in exchange for the release of half of the hostages held in Gaza, according to reports. The letter is expected to be delivered this week. The U.S. State Department denied visas to Palestinian leaders, including Mahmoud Abbas, effectively blocking them from attending the General Assembly in New York, citing national security concerns. President Donald Trump General Assembly today. His address follows a decision by several U.S. allies, including France, the U.K., Canada, and Australia, to formally recognize a Palestinian state, joining 142 of 193 UN member nations in supporting a two-state solution. name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes Rebuked in Citizens' Letter
body:
| | | | |
---
| \-- Reporting from the Political Front --
---
---
| | September 23, 2025
Much has been said in the wake of Charlie Kirk's horrendous assassination. One of those is Jim Himes, the Fourth District's sorry excuse for a "representative." Last week, he circulated yet another duplicitous letter to his us, his constituents. As usual, he looks down his nose and insults us.
Two of our friends from Ridgefield, Chris Murray and Sean Archambault, decided to respond to him with a letter submitted to the local Hearst Media, CT leftist propaganda organ. The letter appears directly below, with Himes' piece below that. Typeface comes thru a bit small, but I'd urge you to give them both a read.
---
|
---
|
---
The Himes letter above is a perfect example of Himes, as he often does, using the pseudo-reason of accusing the Right of blaming the Left "before a single fact was known." That is an Alinsky technique deployed to silence us - to stop us from identifying THEM as the culprits. We know the motivation for the assassination - it is self-evident. In the wake of this horror, and the violence the organized American Left has wrought on our nation, we must shift gears and relentlessly call out those, like Mr. Himes, whose rhetoric has paved the way for the culture of Leftist violence we are currently enduring. Our Ridgefield friends have taken a step in that direction. Who's next up?.........
---
---
---
| In Liberty,
Bob MacGuffie bobmac@rightprinciples.com

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: 'Grue Jay' Spotted, Sheriff Arrested, and Zoo Babies
body:
UT Austin researchers have identified a strange-looking bird in San Antonio as the offspring of a male blue jay and a female green jay. It's the [first time](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOw0cgdGC4jV289pbGoSDMkEwwIzj39_M_MLtdrKTtZL1c5_v2gcf1_96R1XfLs0RzxKwVszzmp_40Fc5Uq1oy4bZO6dzxhkoiJaOLfSz1T5cM2-sWqgdWYOK3cQgQcAgm02hcT0yLmAYByOlHgGlYFIMji_GCNp49YHREXrGKIO-6-3NaWo013wR1iHhFK2vKXd1w4pvXVy40gtzZ9LeBLXVehTS_yMwEZjO8-yOdBTjPzeBCePL5xR3jJXAtIQntg99tWtGjN-1XUv2lsDUZGWP04fgi7wRTtdd-_CV1L-leSn4DQAA__9d-Hoj) a “grue jay” has been observed in the wild.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGngS0WXMAxA0Olyh2qpGoVqd0sbC4xLYkjICF5-8p9he7fOcP_uRt2NsRwPu7tCU25-2U4Y80RS8E0HNMVv-0jX5ZS0OUZU_DepoQDMFAbpjcgBmdDfAySOjMypzlFw7eqa0FB19LZTBal8Mx3kwatBWoGoOXkRqeskhxoMOsZ0yA4ZxxEI9zWWzZZaeWonEciGbpQltSUGQvebfbxsdwwNdNyotHMpVwyEU8EegJ9rbWpafoJ5zHGVRDo4YV3nL9DS6A_iP2Hkq8rFn2-jpyI58NX_0aTcZcaYgy53RLJjicb_va0_K_LzcBvAAAA__9Em3Uj) | |
# Tuesday, September 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1900, chemical engineer and entrepreneur [Fred C. Koch](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAUgPGnwVssfIBgDwxXV_JSpWtHdBwO9mlJsIDmz9tX6St0_Jbf8H2c_Ak58XV9xwu59ojZX-leE7VGxa_lmz7xWffcGoW6UeEYsRTyIMEc5HQA5QNyenrdBbfIMA0ducGa8QgGxmO3OVQQtR0iShv0NCoTFjtqE_ViDYzT1LF7YXICNQxyANWrYCPKM2rUiwmRhJYUuOXSt40aPbDG9Mw3Kv05X7rkttb2KtQ_AbOAma79nb94p8DY57IKmF8tYJ4LBf-_92_5vHXFhf3OKXE9WqHlekFOv17724Wbg58AAAD__wdscYs) was born in Quanah. He improved the thermal cracking process for converting crude oil into gasoline. The company he founded—now known as [Koch, Inc.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFy6yAQgOHToM6aZUGWKCheo86vTcmsxWKRIKMBYtm3zzhXSP3PfMX_cXEXiineb_9pY9ueIbs7HzVxa1zcrXzzJ73qnltjX1cuMQQqhR0CDicwJ1TOU0wvpztvr-CN7NjKcZjOOOB07lYLagE_GR_GCbSCgNqQ0TLokQz5Cbto3xgYVFKCRNUrPwaChTTp6-ADCw3sY8ulbys3flIN6ZUfXPolb12ya2t7FeqfwFngfBxHH3K5cn1ngfOSt53ukavA-Ssvq8C5K9bvR0wp1vMoNNw2iulXa3978LD4EwAA__9PenEW)—has grown to become the second-largest private company in the U.S. Today is officially the [first full day of fall](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-2nCAQxp8GO_bgiLoWFmnobtqUnlEGlwTBwHhd3z7HfYV0X_E7379fX9MX-uDj-hM3Gvnt0hTpLIGYKU9rPug3XmVPzGTLi7J3DnOmCRS0Ug0SmsmiD9ekKzvOyg51RWPdt88OWnh21Wvs61r3trN6WRrVd7MenMbWuR4WcqDmyo-3mRqgqWtVQ_NobO9QLahRz611JLQi6znlB7-I6Y3FhSt9U34saavC-GLei2h-CDACzHmeDwo7lsR-o3IzAkzhlC8BJnhHAkw62KaUiwBzhwswarg1CDDO58LS4iWTkw5DkJ-xePCxRQyS_h4-prfc8A8VOdPqY_RxvelCWFIUYJ4dPId2AKV6AabKo91PH4IvXS-0Wjf04VOe_-_y7xH-BQAA__9lXJVB), but it doesn't feel like it for much of the state. ## Paxton Criticizes UNT over Response to Student
Attorney General Ken Paxton is "demanding answers" from administrators at the University of North Texas after a student claimed she was [kicked out of class](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQAL_GdBvhxZCkoEhDlyvvSrTYa_Bh7Mg2j_D3p-QXrh5pNJo_z_FJzrsw_6KN-_K2cQx8ZM-lcBrntPNfOvMrlsImL5yctZQSj1hjC_UdsBkNOX-OqjL9VJu7rLiX1_bWYYu3rlp6S0qznBojjW46ajWqVt4meeuUVdZMles_svqOjZS1xObSmKulWpMiNbXGslA1G1diupSFC78pW3_GH04XHbfK90spryyah8BB4HAcx2XL4cMEDhxgzwIHndzGAoeZAyfyAoevCGiGF71LDJDpzLCHArnshkMB8p5nNv6E1emVDdgUN9CecgYbExgOcQ_ahRn0Qsk7htWlFVbnP0MFDpTg8ZDP3w9WVerN6_iQ3F2FqueNnP_2l_-7_tPjvwAAAP__bembgw) for confronting classmates celebrating the assassination of Christian conservative activist Charlie Kirk. "_Why are we cheering for someone getting shot?_ " asked the student in her [viral video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO4zAQBNDTUJkNsvkRFTDYRJk32GRDoSU2JQ5oyyDbv9sPNFeYrFDBA6r-X6YL5pJv61-8UuB32qcbvVohZqrTWh_0hZ9235kpto1qTglrpQkk2JMcTqCniLl8JtPFMMs4qI6C6q13YMG7bgtotLHeOjcs2hiM1oJfrNcJfQ_zPHQ5HJgcQCslFeizjn1CuaBBM9uYSBhJMfNez7wR0xtbKp_9SfW87NeuhI353oT-I2AUML6PVsD4L68b420tdAwSMDZGfhxBDc4pD9L0WksprZG-qyHeX7mU3FwvjFyvmMsPz7875RngOwAA__-v8XQo) of the confrontation. In a follow-up [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlPSICEUKLiEzJdeqBqjkdFZWC4xa8zfb7G_sGl3Vfer9-_qr5hyet7_4kqOP7H4J-1bJmaq_l6_6D8e26swU9gWqilGrJU8CNAXYS_Q-4ApH161wd1EsLIlJ40eB9AwDu3ibmEwcxwjDgA2KiNVL6NVYxxQ9UKZNrlzTFjopRQS-q4PJqKYUaG66RCpUYJC4lI7Xojpg1vMR3lT7eayttktzK-t6f80MDUw7fvecXpweZz1mSmxYj1m5JP_SV40ML1ToNLAZLQatZVagjDCDNZq2VYXXnvKOW2DaZS4r5jyzxX_TtDbwXcAAAD__30deFY), she claimed some of her classmates said, "_This needs to happen to Trump_." The student alleged the professor told her, “Y _ou all should probably take this outside,_ ” and then laughed. After leaving the class, the student discussed the incident with the dean of students, who suggested she [switch classes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2ypDoQg58GMlPGNn8BwU0mOzfdkGro9tC7xp6ye-DM229xXmFjqSR9pV9fyxdw4Pj8Hw6a5dunJdJVAolQXp75Tb_hU15JhLDslNl7yJkWo02n9KSMXRA4fBZX47xqnNqa5nboxt50ZuzrfTZrj-h6WjV5P67oVo1-9H07oBumTdc832F6MrZtdWtsY3HwoDdw4NYOPVVOE7Kk3MhOQt9QfPikk3KzpaMO8y7yKpX9rzKPyjyu62qi_Iy69co8bqDKPN6RT8qF5aMybcQnFbXC9idA2RV4oaxORkoqeVXkjRRFbSn6nKKAcIoKlPBBgSPdnnf0KSDHp6KTotwVkIW3QAus4wS6NWqibVROd70CC6C8ReMsgnFgm12OUOcZXxeHwKUfKqefB3D4wZJ_O-Oczd8AAAD__4C7ozY). "_Instead of addressing the disgusting celebrations of political assassinations, UNT has protected these terrorist sympathizers and punished the brave student who stood up to the radical mob_ ," Paxton said in a statement. In a [response](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2yqyAURp8GOxzY-BMLitvY5ba3dBA2kSsRB7Yxefsz5hVOvWbWfN_6d5_uJsSwPf6aJ2p6-zRteJaIRJinRz7wv_mUPRGhKwvm4L3JGScQ0HIxcFCTMyF-pqZyehZukBVq2be3Dlq4ddWilbMCrLDKYAc4eKWslbLv2huqWTZQBX3JxABKSiFB1cr13ghrGtPMrfPIGoEuUMo1LUj4NsXHT3phrm16VlEvRHth6g-DkcF4nme9zdb588IMxusPgzEmayKD8SvgK258N29KGz824oUOhxvxNdgVHU8H8eS5jaYUvoa88jXEqxKDUQ0g1dAxGKus3X5eoHQ9a8TjaUL8bqLflXxp-AkAAP__4o6JxQ), UNT President Harrison Keller said the school is "conducting a thorough review of recent actions."
## Baseball Coach Shot by Stray Bullet
A 27-year-old baseball coach was [struck by a stray bullet](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO3CAURleDO0Zw8bOgSONu0qa0LnCxmWBjAfPw7qPJFv7qKz7p6Oj8uS93DDEc62_cSdePT8tB7xKpVsrLmp_0wKucqVZyZaMcvMecaQEBHRcTB7U4DPFa2sZpI9wkG9Jy6MYeOhj7ZtOm71ojR2eMF72yhL0fcRRIgFM7qa4J-gsTEygphQR1U27wKCy22JrOeWKtIBdqyre6UaUPFh-v9KJ8s2lvot5qPQtTvxjMDGY0Vqrvw2A-U6kMZpvQbjwcj2cmx8uWUg3Hyt0zf-cv1osbLGQwRr7iTjyj5bQXXvAqDGY5jD3IbmQwN1m78x1iDKUfWCvWHUP871F_Vu-l4V8AAAD__38qhSQ) during a Sunday morning game at The Rac sports complex in Katy. He was transported by Life Flight to a local hospital and was later released. The gunfire came from an adjacent property where people were [shooting at targets](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OrCAQhZ9GdxgoxZ8Fi7tx13c7S1NKoUwQOoBt-_YTO_MGs6l8SSVfzjlfj-mB1lm__sedVH6bMHk6k6OcKU5rPOgbr_QMOZNOG0VrDMZIE3CQjA8M6kmjddfUlFrNXA-iJCU62bcgoW_LTQ18kNKAaKmre9ASiIRpRdMIKeXAl9KqW8YHqIXgAuqq1p1BvmCDzSy1oaLhpG0OscobZXpjMu4KL4rVEvbSqS3nZyrqfwWMBYzneVZ-Xu4W97-A8cYCxiOxX_o42BWOvLEZE83oHFsCLhtLW8j3OZymyNLhNV5sD9Fbv7IVd2Jx8Qg19IMoo9LP0zpnU9sVDV93tO6TKf9tyZeCnwAAAP__k4CKcg). Three individuals have been questioned, but no one had been arrested as of Monday afternoon. The bullet ricocheted off a pole before striking the coach in the shoulder. A [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7HggXFcUGzj3SZpt7Se_R4xMyREwMRxvn6U-YXpbnF1jnT-n6YThhhulzNe2dWnT9ONtxK5Vs7TJX_xB-7lnmplKivn4D3mzBNI6A5yOICeCEPcJ9OQmyUNqmGn-u5ooYOjbVZnEGfWIKmHRRKAt4vXaJbBKmVJzU1wb5gcQCslFehWU-9RLmjQzB15FkYyhZpyW1eu_MTi454enNslXZvo1lrvReg_AkYB47ZtrceF55Q-3wcB498cXq-9_EuJzrwVAeMjEKf36EAOFnRvjNF2UE12dN9CjKHYXhh5uWKIP5r6uzgPB98BAAD__7x6eM4) shows coaches and players scrambling for safety as shots ring out. The [facility is closed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1ywyAUhE-DOmngIfRTUKRR57QpNU_iYUiw0AC2rNtn7Bwh7e7szu73dZkv6IPfrp94I12eNs4bHTlQKZTma7rTN555j6WQyY6StxZTohk4qJqPNcjZoA_n3FZGL9yMoiItejV0oGDoKqd7PhgrRxzsKFo5gFoGpYQxi2pXAj5WXr_K-AhSCC5ANtL0FvmKLbaLMpZYy8n4ElNTHBV6YrbhjA9KzRpvVdCulD0z-cFgYjAdx9GsLsXt5TKYXncYTC7ec4lb_c4zmDAVvwZiMP1gOf_kesFMC4ZQrxFXV2cXSw2CdxxG2exur5I2--FD8LnrWcuvN_ThvaL8j91Dw28AAAD__ymdhK8) until the investigation is concluded and new safety measures are implemented.
## 'Grue Jay' Spotted in San Antonio
UT Austin researchers have identified a strange-looking bird in San Antonio as the offspring of a male blue jay and a female green jay. It's the [first time](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOw0cgdGC4jV289pbGoSDMkEwwIzj39_M_MLtdrKTtZL1c5_v2gcf1_96R1XfLs0RzxKwVszzmp_40Fc5Uq1oy4bZO6dzxhkoiJaOLfSz1T5cM2-sWqgdWYOK3cQgQcAgm02hcT0yLmAYByOlHgGlYFIMji_GCNp49YHREXrGKIO-6-3NaWo013wR1iHhFK2vKXd1w4pvXVy40gtzZ9LeBLXVehTS_yMwEZjO8-yOdBTjPzeBCePL5xR3jJXAtIQntg99tWtGjN-1XUv2lsDUZGWP04fgi7wRTtdd-_CV1L-leSn4DQAA__9d-Hoj) a “grue jay” has been observed in the wild. Blue jays are found throughout the Eastern U.S., and green jays are common in Central America and Mexico, but their [habitats have expanded](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL8GMyy84igBwUvM5qUbWle4KFsoFrDj-Pdbbu0fbH66q_t8PKcn-uD35T9upMvbxWmnMwcqhdK0pC_6xCsfsRSyeaXkncOUaAIBHReKQztZ9OGaZGX1LKxqKtJN3w0P6GB4VKsmB30njSBjBonCoACYhUNChLYfVOX1XSYUtE0jGmjr1vbuBiXKubOOmBRkfYmpLisVemN24YovSrWJWxX0WsqRWfuPwchgPM-z3q6MO-4l7j7eEIPxfsVgDNFgYDBiKt4EYjAmTMTXa07e8tknyzPu_DfLoRGdUmqoj_WokrbH6UPw-dEzKZYNffiZUP4m7qXhOwAA__-NmoR3) in recent years, providing the two species opportunities to mate. Graduate student Brian Stokes said he saw a photo of the bird on social media and reached out to the woman who posted it. After [capturing the bird](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LsSmzAQBdCvgW4ZvXgVKtK4c9qUjEArsx7xiLQ2Jl-fwZM_SL-z95776z7cHUVaHz_dgpY_YRtWPHJEZkzDI73w6c68b8zo84yJQnAp4aCEqkH0oPTgHcVzMKW3o_C9LNHKtu4aVauuKWcrDfZjo1Uwop20ULLVtVF-lLITrhWiJHs9E73SUgqpdKV9G5yYnHFmrH3Awgj0xFuqeEbGj8shntsbUzVtSxntzLznQv8o1K1Qt-M4KgoxT4TrhNdJoW4LIgPPCJcInu4EByP9uSiQXEIYKXn45wRa4RsDlMHBa6XfL4T5HBN52ALwsYGnEDDhypB3nAgzdKJrmzJZvx8UI-WmLYx4LI7ityb_37hvq_4GAAD__x8ckWM)—"it was really uncooperative," Stokes said—he banded its leg and took a blood sample. "_Hybridization is probably way more common in the natural world than researchers know about because there's just so much inability to report these things happening_ ," [Stokes said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u6yAUBODV4A4LDv6JC4rXuMtrb2kdwyEQkRABjuPdXzlbuP1oRt_8XJcrhhiet__4IF0_Li1P2kukWikvt7zRHY_ySrWSLZ5ycA5zpgUE9FxMHNRiMcRj6RqrV2En2ZCWY38ZoIfL0Hi9rmowRo5OwUUBTZ0ZxbgqZ5UhiWpogj7LxARKSiFBtcqODoXBDru1t45YJ8iGmnJbPVX6YHHxSG_KrUmPJmpf66sw9Y_BzGA2z9Ju31RLdmMwnx4Gc6ZCmI1nMJfEd4-VF5-2aPlO3GCM_NTyOx5N1va1hxhDGUbWidsDQ_xu1b899NbwGwAA___k8nzX).

"Why are we cheering for someone getting shot? " asked the student in her of the confrontation. In a follow-up , she claimed some of her classmates said, "This needs to happen to Trump." The student alleged the professor told her, “Y ou all should probably take this outside, ” and then laughed. After leaving the class, the student discussed the incident with the dean of students, who suggested she . "Instead of addressing the disgusting celebrations of political assassinations, UNT has protected these terrorist sympathizers and punished the brave student who stood up to the radical mob ," Paxton said in a statement. In a , UNT President Harrison Keller said the school is "conducting a thorough review of recent actions." Baseball Coach Shot by Stray Bullet A 27-year-old baseball coach was during a Sunday morning game at The Rac sports complex in Katy. He was transported by Life Flight to a local hospital and was later released. The gunfire came from an adjacent property where people were . Three individuals have been questioned, but no one had been arrested as of Monday afternoon. The bullet ricocheted off a pole before striking the coach in the shoulder. A shows coaches and players scrambling for safety as shots ring out. The until the investigation is concluded and new safety measures are implemented. 'Grue Jay' Spotted in San Antonio UT Austin researchers have identified a strange-looking bird in San Antonio as the offspring of a male blue jay and a female green jay. It's the a “grue jay” has been observed in the wild. Blue jays are found throughout the Eastern U.S., and green jays are common in Central America and Mexico, but their in recent years, providing the two species opportunities to mate. Graduate student Brian Stokes said he saw a photo of the bird on social media and reached out to the woman who posted it. After —"it was really uncooperative," Stokes said—he banded its leg and took a blood sample. "Hybridization is probably way more common in the natural world than researchers know about because there's just so much inability to report these things happening ," . | Flying together with our sponsor Step into better health with—designed to align your posture, reduce joint pain, and support natural movement. # [Don't let Trump Border Czar get away with $50,000 bribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49aa7411-2c65-4cf8-9f2c-4e01ffe7da7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | [**> > **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff44d3c6-c448-42c9-bc7f-cc8cc921fe32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[**Add your name, and demand Homan face a real investigation, and real punishment if convicted. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T435636db-f9b3-4f0f-899e-97cff82041aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Terrible human being apparently even more terrible than previously thought: _" In an undercover operation last year, the FBI recorded Tom Homan, now the White House border czar, accepting $50,000 in cash after indicating he could help the agents — who were posing as business executives — win government contracts in a second Trump administration, according to multiple people familiar with the probe and internal documents reviewed by MSNBC."_ Homan would likely be in jail right now, except the Trump Justice Department moved quickly to drop the case when Trump took office (claiming it was the work of "deep state"). The guy was literally handed a bag of cash -- a bribe. It's on film. This isn't even a close one. But they just let him off? To hell with that. [**Add your name, and demand Homan face a real investigation, and real punishment if convicted. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28a91971-4f97-45e0-92b6-008525c2e47f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of this disinformation.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5ct50yuTblbF2TIm-uRcT-bGOcsMavTkYKP9KgTs2bVysSyby6hEe0-lrF0lDVeFT4CkLsEpbt0QNNVO2Zn2tESTt2bAg4Pqf1-qAUcdpzETuseRYmKGW6PC1FFqwRaISvN1ep0Jg9KaeVHHWAHWf2YorpnC5JMxRxWXjQf9GqUU4cjeIEoFEd-cDmFSdjbisIDczL-sXbYxaqsYhfau5aYd7ZT2jH3vqGnecyNfnw=&c=9ps1sy76Y6RHyCdMxzyw44HFec6edIERRZfqUHKDaIIfKEihAUfcXA==&ch=JsAmIjPLE02u4IXnY40ZfpgxPyx5Q5bbW_15B6RyBjDiE5nyDHEeOA==)
---
| Peter,
The flood gates of dark money spending have opened in the run up to the obscure but massively important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If Democrats lose this court and Republicans successfully get a majority of Pennsylvanians to vote no on retaining the justices who give the courts its 3 vote democratic majority, here's what's at stake:

* MAGA can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes go red.

* Trump will push for a redistrict of Pennsylvania's Congressional map erasing blue seats.

* An extreme abortion will be upheld.

Voting yes on retaining the justices ensures the court's Democratic majority guaranteeing fair elections, no gerrymandering, and no extreme abortion ban.
Which is why MAGA is especially depraved for using this vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5ct50yuTblbF2TIm-uRcT-bGOcsMavTkYKP9KgTs2bVysSyby6hEe0-lrF0lDVeFT4CkLsEpbt0QNNVO2Zn2tESTt2bAg4Pqf1-qAUcdpzETuseRYmKGW6PC1FFqwRaISvN1ep0Jg9KaeVHHWAHWf2YorpnC5JMxRxWXjQf9GqUU4cjeIEoFEd-cDmFSdjbisIDczL-sXbYxaqsYhfauxZ-jW56WSRy0TAGTPEKlPc=&c=9ps1sy76Y6RHyCdMxzyw44HFec6edIERRZfqUHKDaIIfKEihAUfcXA==&ch=JsAmIjPLE02u4IXnY40ZfpgxPyx5Q5bbW_15B6RyBjDiE5nyDHEeOA==)
---
One of the hundreds of MAGA dark money ads that Pennsylvania social media users are being saturated with on a daily basis.
---
| | | | The above ad is being pushed by the innocuously named, Citizens for Term Limits, an insidious MAGA dark money PAC, which is urging voters to: "term limit the court" a reasonable sounding proposition which will "protect women's rights" and can be accomplished by voting no.
Voting no will not protect women. It will guarantee an abortion ban.
These ads are meant to target Democrats and unless we can counter their propaganda, thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of disinformation.
Defend Our Courts has a solution:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5ct50yuTblbF2TIm-uRcT-bGOcsMavTkYKP9KgTs2bVysSyby6hEe0-lrF0lDVeFT4CkLsEpbt0QNNVO2Zn2tESTt2bAg4Pqf1-qAUcdpzETuseRYmKGW6PC1FFqwRaISvN1ep0Jg9KaeVHHWAHWf2YorpnC5JMxRxWXjQf9GqUU4cjeIEoFEd-cDmFSdjbisIDczL-sXbYxaqsYhfau763DjSgSFd1CvRLyK3Kv64=&c=9ps1sy76Y6RHyCdMxzyw44HFec6edIERRZfqUHKDaIIfKEihAUfcXA==&ch=JsAmIjPLE02u4IXnY40ZfpgxPyx5Q5bbW_15B6RyBjDiE5nyDHEeOA==)
---
The most effective way to counter disinformation is one on one conversations with voters. This past weekend alone the Defend our Courts field team spoke with over 3500+ voters at their doors ensuring that they would vote yes.
It's a start but if we want to counter MAGA's disinfo at a strategic level we need to scale our scrappy team of fifty canvassers into the hundreds--rapidly.
[We have 42 days left until E-day to get the real facts to PA voters before they are drowned out by disinfo. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $55 (the average cost to earn one vote in this race) or whatever you can spare? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5ct50yuTblbF2TIm-uRcT-bGOcsMavTkYKP9KgTs2bVysSyby6hEe0-lrF0lDVe1aAQ0wLBYM1Qh0t8tl-e8GP6oD1Qh5CoyR1JSvUrY93Z-oJ2n22hjnamkWGqkqSTPQ5J5xMvcujbuXOU9qAH4zlLMephZS0Hw2bAddz-pXN9T6WQyWd9I0BzfHh5OeYlnvrxOPCU74zM6hRQQm9xbbcYhlCoFq35lsLlKbDhwqzLnf3dDM5CiQ==&c=9ps1sy76Y6RHyCdMxzyw44HFec6edIERRZfqUHKDaIIfKEihAUfcXA==&ch=JsAmIjPLE02u4IXnY40ZfpgxPyx5Q5bbW_15B6RyBjDiE5nyDHEeOA==)

clean_body: Thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of this disinformation. | | | | | == | Peter, The flood gates of dark money spending have opened in the run up to the obscure but massively important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election. If Democrats lose this court and Republicans successfully get a majority of Pennsylvanians to vote no on retaining the justices who give the courts its 3 vote democratic majority, here's what's at stake: MAGA can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes go red. Trump will push for a redistrict of Pennsylvania's Congressional map erasing blue seats. * An extreme abortion will be upheld. Voting yes on retaining the justices ensures the court's Democratic majority guaranteeing fair elections, no gerrymandering, and no extreme abortion ban. Which is why MAGA is especially depraved for using this vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters: | == One of the hundreds of MAGA dark money ads that Pennsylvania social media users are being saturated with on a daily basis. | | | | The above ad is being pushed by the innocuously named, Citizens for Term Limits, an insidious MAGA dark money PAC, which is urging voters to: "term limit the court" a reasonable sounding proposition which will "protect women's rights" and can be accomplished by voting no. Voting no will not protect women. It will guarantee an abortion ban. These ads are meant to target Democrats and unless we can counter their propaganda, thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of disinformation. Defend Our Courts has a solution: | == The most effective way to counter disinformation is one on one conversations with voters. This past weekend alone the Defend our Courts field team spoke with over 3500+ voters at their doors ensuring that they would vote yes. It's a start but if we want to counter MAGA's disinfo at a strategic level we need to scale our scrappy team of fifty canvassers into the hundreds--rapidly. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Help us ensure that the truth wins out in the life or death battle for this critical court. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Protect Texas Students from Vaccine Discrimination | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY2MzM1MzAzMzIyMTc0ODMxLFwiclwiOjE2NjMzNTM0NTk5NTAyNDEzOH0iLCJzIjoiYTU1NTY4OWUwNDllOTQ3YyJ9)
