|
# TAKE ACTION - Urge AG Paxton to Respond to Opinion Requests

---
| |
---
| | _Yesterday’s White House press conference on**autism** drew unprecedented public attention to the issue many of us care deeply about. While much was discussed, no actual **changes to vaccine policy** were announced. TFVC will continue monitoring developments and share official updates with you when they are released._
---
| Texans for Vaccine Choice is committed to reforming and strengthening Texas statute through a **multi-pronged approach**. Obviously, legislation is our main focus, but there is more than one way to skin a cat. Over the course of the last few months, TFVC has submitted, by way of Chairman Gary Gates, **opinion requests to the Office of the Attorney General** seeking clarification of current statutes as they related to vaccine exemptions, as well as any necessary correction of rulemaking authority interpretations on the part of the Department of State Health Services.
Our first request, [RQ-0604-KP](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY2MzM1MzAzMzQyMDk3NzgzLFwiclwiOjE2NjMzNTM0NTk5NTAyNDEzOH0iLCJzIjoiNWVjMzMyNjkxYjM5YTkxZiJ9), calls on the Attorney General to clarify whether Texas Education Code Chapter 38 authorizes the DSHS Executive Commissioner to empower school superintendents or their designees to unilaterally decide whether or not to **exclude a student with a vaccine exemption** from campus for purposes of controlling the spread of a certain infectious disease. This code specifically states that students _may be_ excluded only if the DSHS Executive Commissioner declares an emergency or epidemic, but the rules adopted by the agency compel “school administrators” to exclude exempted students simply for being exempt, without any such declaration. In fact, **DSHS believes that they can _and should_ exclude students based on suspicion** of having a communicable disease, even in the absence of symptoms. Our newest request, [RQ-0615-KP](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY2MzM1MzAzMzQ5NDM3ODE4LFwiclwiOjE2NjMzNTM0NTk5NTAyNDEzOH0iLCJzIjoiNDBjNTc5MzM2MGZiZTc1YyJ9), is more of a preemptive move. Since SB2 passed in the 89th Legislative Session, an educational savings account program has been established in law. This is more commonly known as “school choice”. What is missing from this bill is an **explicit requirement for participating schools to accept the Reasons of Conscience affidavit** or any other state-recognized exemptions from vaccinations. Therefore, we have asked the Attorney General to research whether the receipt of taxpayer dollars from this new program compels these schools to comply with state law regarding vaccine exemptions. _You can help us correct unlawful DSHS rules and expand vaccine choice for Texas school kids by submitting comments on each of these opinion requests!_ **Contact Ken Paxton's office today** and demand they clarify Texas law and protect our children from exclusion or denial of enrollment at schools over their vaccine status.

---
|
---
**Two Ways to Make Your Voice Heard!**

| **Online:**[ https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/contact-us-online-form](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY2MzM1MzAzMzU3ODI2NDI5LFwiclwiOjE2NjMzNTM0NTk5NTAyNDEzOH0iLCJzIjoiOGMzY2JlNGNjMWM4NDgxMyJ9)
_(From the dropdown, choose: I want to register my opinion.)_ **Constituent Services Line:** 800-252-8011 _**Sample Message for RQ-0604-KP:**_ I urge you to quickly respond to Opinion Request RQ-0604-KP regarding the authority to exclude vaccine-exempted students. The Department of State Health Services has abdicated the powers given to the agency by statute and is misapplying the law to be more discriminatory toward exempted students. _**Sample Message for RQ-0615-KP:**_ I urge you to quickly respond to Opinion Request RQ-0615-KP. Students who participate in the ESA program should have the same rights as students who attend other publicly-funded schools.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

Friend,

Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us.

And his vision — TO BUILD THE MOST FAITHFUL AND THE MOST PATRIOTIC
GENERATION IN AMERICAN HISTORY — is why Turning Point USA exists
today.

Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you...

In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us,
Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students
who want to start or join a chapter:

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

GOD IS SO GOOD. ✝️🙏🕊️

To give you perspective, friend...

Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+
college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.

It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact...
_But now? _

These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They
weren’t recruited...

THEY FELT IT WAS THEIR TIME TO STAND UP FOR THIS COUNTRY AND HONOR
CHARLIE.

Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed
God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And
his vision of a better America for us all.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

He always believed this day would come.

He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would
shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning
Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in
America.

And now...

_It’s happening._

Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.

And more beautiful than we can even describe.

AGAIN, FRIEND, GOD IS SO GOOD.

Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers.
Emails. Messages.

Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your
children’s or grandchildren's lives.

And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_

As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up
with every chapter request.

And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism
kits.

EVERY NEW CHAPTER RECEIVES THESE KITS FROM TURNING POINT USA WITH
EVERYTHING THEY NEED TO GET STARTED — INCLUDING:

✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear

Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t
be a small task. _

But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. _FOR CHARLIE._

_And here’s how YOU can help with this..._

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT — READY TO
DEPLOY INTO A NEW TURNING POINT USA STUDENT CHAPTER...

How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of
new student chapters that are just getting started?

1 KIT = $25
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

2 KITS = $50
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

10 KITS = $250
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

100 KITS = $2,500
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

1,000 KITS = $25,000
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

SPONSOR ACTIVISM KITS
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make
Charlie’s vision a reality...

THIS IS IT.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70721]

Also...

HERE’S ONE MORE POWERFUL THING YOU CAN DO:

📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or
any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who
wants to join or start a chapter...

PLEASE SEND THEM THIS LINK: TPUSASTUDENTS.COM/STARTACHAPTER
[https://www.tpusastudents.com/startachapter]

Friend, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated...

If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this
painful week...

If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...

THANK YOU.

We can never say it enough.

If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this...

YOU’RE THE REASON CHARLIE’S MISSION AND VISION WILL GROW FOR
GENERATIONS TO COME.

God is so good.

FOR CHARLIE,

-The Turning Point USA Family

P.S. Please know if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask
for are your prayers.

Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all
you can give today, _we’re grateful._

But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that
students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission...

Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and
gets new student chapters off the ground floor...

And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought
possible.

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT READY TO
DEPLOY TO A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER.

SPONSOR AN ACTIVISM KIT
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

Thank you for your help and for your prayers.

GOD IS SO GOOD. 🙏

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: [] Friend, Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — TO BUILD THE MOST FAITHFUL AND THE MOST PATRIOTIC GENERATION IN AMERICAN HISTORY — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: [] GOD IS SO GOOD. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They weren’t recruited... THEY FELT IT WAS THEIR TIME TO STAND UP FOR THIS COUNTRY AND HONOR CHARLIE. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. [] He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It’s happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. AGAIN, FRIEND, GOD IS SO GOOD. Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your children’s or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, “What can I do?” As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. EVERY NEW CHAPTER RECEIVES THESE KITS FROM TURNING POINT USA WITH EVERYTHING THEY NEED TO GET STARTED — INCLUDING: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... this won’t be a small task. But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. FOR CHARLIE. And here’s how YOU can help with this... EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT — READY TO DEPLOY INTO A NEW TURNING POINT USA STUDENT CHAPTER... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? 1 KIT = $25 [] 2 KITS = $50 [] 10 KITS = $250 [] 100 KITS = $2,500 [] 1,000 KITS = $25,000 [] SPONSOR ACTIVISM KITS [] Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie’s vision a reality... THIS IS IT. [] Also... HERE’S ONE MORE POWERFUL THING YOU CAN DO: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... PLEASE SEND THEM THIS LINK: TPUSASTUDENTS.COM/STARTACHAPTER [] Friend, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated... If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... THANK YOU. We can never say it enough. If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this... YOU’RE THE REASON CHARLIE’S MISSION AND VISION WILL GROW FOR GENERATIONS TO COME. God is so good. FOR CHARLIE, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all you can give today, we’re grateful. But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT READY TO DEPLOY TO A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER. SPONSOR AN ACTIVISM KIT MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE Thank you for your help and for your prayers. GOD IS SO GOOD. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32783?t=1062&refcode=email-20250923_v&akid=9410%2E5885482%2ESE54DK ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

We're going all in to elect Zohran Mamdani – and we need you with us right
now.

Last week, volunteers from across the country joined Our Revolution phone
banks, calling voters in NYC about this crucial election. We fanned out
across the subways and key neighborhoods in NYC to deliver our message.
And we delivered 80,000 signatures straight to Schumer and Jeffries
demanding they finally endorse Mamdani after his overwhelming primary
victory.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32997?source=email-20250923&t=1112&akid=9410%2E5885482%2ESE54DK ]Headline: Schumer, Wary of Blowback, Holds Out on Mamdani

The establishment thinks they can block progress by ignoring us –
meanwhile billionaires are FLOODING the race with dark money to try to
stop Mamdani from winning. We are NOT going to let them beat us. But it’s
going to take all of us chipping in to fuel the grassroots movement we
need to fight back – and win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32997?source=email-20250923&t=1111&akid=9410%2E5885482%2ESE54DK ]Headline: Activists deliver 80,000 petitions urging Schumer, Jeffries
to back Mamdani

Every week, we’re running three phone banks. We’re flooding sidewalks and
subways to talk to voters in the Five Boroughs. We’re texting New Yorkers
about Mamdani and how they can make a plan to vote.

This is exactly what the establishment is afraid of: a candidate who
inspires a movement – who gets regular people out in the streets
organizing for real change the donor class doesn’t like. This is how we
build power to challenge the status quo.

Mamdani is the leader we need right now leading the biggest city in the
country. But to help him win, we need resources – to print materials for
canvassing, to send more texts, to hire more organizers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32783?t=1105&amount=22&refcode=email-20250923nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9410%2E5885482%2ESE54DK ]If we stand together, we’re unstoppable. That’s how we’ll elect Mamdani –
without permission or approval from Schumer’s Big Money donors. Chip in
now and give our people-powered campaign the boost it needs in the
homestretch to Election Day.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, We're going all in to elect Zohran Mamdani – and we need you with us right now. Last week, volunteers from across the country joined Our Revolution phone banks, calling voters in NYC about this crucial election. We fanned out across the subways and key neighborhoods in NYC to deliver our message. And we delivered 80,000 signatures straight to Schumer and Jeffries demanding they finally endorse Mamdani after his overwhelming primary victory. [ ]Headline: Schumer, Wary of Blowback, Holds Out on Mamdani The establishment thinks they can block progress by ignoring us – meanwhile billionaires are FLOODING the race with dark money to try to stop Mamdani from winning. We are NOT going to let them beat us. But it’s going to take all of us chipping in to fuel the grassroots movement we need to fight back – and win. [ ]Can you chip in $15 – or whatever you can afford – to help us mobilize every last voter for Mamdani? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT [ ]Headline: Activists deliver 80,000 petitions urging Schumer, Jeffries to back Mamdani Every week, we’re running three phone banks. We’re flooding sidewalks and subways to talk to voters in the Five Boroughs. We’re texting New Yorkers about Mamdani and how they can make a plan to vote. This is exactly what the establishment is afraid of: a candidate who inspires a movement – who gets regular people out in the streets organizing for real change the donor class doesn’t like. This is how we build power to challenge the status quo. Mamdani is the leader we need right now leading the biggest city in the country. But to help him win, we need resources – to print materials for canvassing, to send more texts, to hire more organizers. [ ]If we stand together, we’re unstoppable. That’s how we’ll elect Mamdani – without permission or approval from Schumer’s Big Money donors. Chip in now and give our people-powered campaign the boost it needs in the homestretch to Election Day. When we organize, we win. name: Marialana Kinter
subject: You're Invited: Park Clean-up & Screen Printing get together
body:
Happy Monday,

With how stressful and intense things have been lately, I wanted to put
together a simple, feel-good community event to bring people together,
relax, and do something positive for our community.

This *Sunday, September 28th*, I'm hosting a *Community Park Clean-Up &
Screen-Printing Social* at *Maitland Community Park from 11:00 AM to 1:00
PM.*

The plan is simple: we'll spend a little time cleaning up our beautiful
park, and then we'll have a fun, creative screen-printing session. It's a
chance to connect, de-stress, and make a tangible difference, together.

I'll provide all the supplies for the clean-up (gloves, bags, etc.) and the
screen-printing. All you need to bring is a positive attitude and something
you'd like to decorate—a t-shirt, a tote bag, you name it!

If you're able to join us, please RSVP using the Google Form below so I can
get a headcount.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScVoFQK0ckzARogMbl2k3-figrvse0iMqHlDfGRZxGb6i2FhQ/viewform?usp=header

I can't wait to see you there!
[image: Copy of Clean Up.png]

In solidarity,
--
Marialana Kinter

*U.S. Navy Veteran | Congressional Candidate, FL-07*
‪321.247.8403‬
KinterForCongress.com

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s fight lives on… in you and me
body:
He fought for you. Now fight for him.
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | [ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2c553705b22f4e1c8d982948893d0033&_e=8c6eEsJJqeuKf7OZox93TnJCopwyW0OJBmxWL8sbGRHl74mepFzlucBztDtAOr-WTtQUZ6LUSnz88z7k8qVms-CjjtZVsbA_Lcb92kUIEMHFvBcS1TCDG0K7ORie2KTihj4ID5VM2KNX-_RD_O1Nq4-3TAi8BSZjPEfMVySKDpHP0BTT7FcgeN6COPMhFZBAzWDyh9gqtOIwmk-KANofodIulhACp0cZSWjTxggf5oBPwDy6sJYwCHmh5-uMsLmZzg5x81NZizD5W3xwE2hvoX3-q21FEcU9NYGQTZSTc8vkvAdA5RbUTmQ67BZpt2SuffcI6LMSdCDRroAcgphI088JRbYeJE1izRFlqFA6fjIMXtxo4lvyNi06aRiHllAyWofOjq5EqibKY4XQ4g4a-VDQwV4WTEWejisdJClaWw0l8PWiCwQVo9YX_qob96Wbxblyv2578scUqyrAEP7d7rhBLe3ghrt7rJ5hNVj5Oe0p9DzYiT4UvYKtO9LvXA5leWf_EG2NS7mhJ2y0kgjwQBze2cCfA9-yAfz2JQrohmYqZrqno-GhtR9ja8BlkKjWIhsbFkj4KJSs03OiVgBxIT3HLA7bNogG3JhSxJ0-wYbzvtyM9gujQLdJiKJJFcwSYJnImC7BXS8hixHaL0yJ8GMfSb5sRfJUAxFaNOnSmJGucKaHR7C80yI8ZrNuHLj_EaI8FF32Yv4X1buBa7oyofDgQfXcIdWTWqoankElRKc%3D)
---

Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2c553705b22f4e1c8d982948893d0033&_e=8c6eEsJJqeuKf7OZox93TnJCopwyW0OJBmxWL8sbGRHl74mepFzlucBztDtAOr-WTtQUZ6LUSnz88z7k8qVms-CjjtZVsbA_Lcb92kUIEMHFvBcS1TCDG0K7ORie2KTihj4ID5VM2KNX-_RD_O1Nq4-3TAi8BSZjPEfMVySKDpHP0BTT7FcgeN6COPMhFZBAzWDyh9gqtOIwmk-KANofodIulhACp0cZSWjTxggf5oBPwDy6sJYwCHmh5-uMsLmZUEDFfF4ZBL4ipPEgTz6ymNMlS9yI6WlH1bWGK9WO9z0aX22TW-NgbJCEcRLu1Gzspl8vvYN325ZPsS4f-5pg40AxCoU_RSRg3ac47jWdV77FXJAVvbj6x-Rrzs3u0LYlZOQ8Kg59igEnt-2rYc0KAU7EMZmGGZXEDG6a-VHf4OPa1B2r-IKe0Np40u4qIsjsbWwkgbgWxx36PwJ1c3X3lttvZGjQofrZjdsMk903Orman6KmoYHOQAbAFpgRHrxIDwNTp59FLVzhHzpLiAJ2Bbw99rr-szEOmX3rW5F24bAWHCI7Pr5hWLetNZqGXC6IEpu0XPLUkCM9UQ5kNQtowMneEbD5cVCHR52llzbSz3Z0XeWQEVz8ACPnn9sZZQMooRO-eK3FGwuG8mKGMQdmplwnBtQTx4foK-kHn0_6zT4Qk-WsZC1j6N2B2yQ1voqti0JLlBaGkGGfKMm6QTzKQyKB0mqRFhF-FM0STLiSdKs%3D)
---
I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough. _But his memory will._ _And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._ Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. ** He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA. No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again. He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him. **Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people. **As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations. _Let 's make the world remember him._ **[Friend, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2c553705b22f4e1c8d982948893d0033&_e=8c6eEsJJqeuKf7OZox93TnJCopwyW0OJBmxWL8sbGRHl74mepFzlucBztDtAOr-WTtQUZ6LUSnz88z7k8qVms-CjjtZVsbA_Lcb92kUIEMHFvBcS1TCDG0K7ORie2KTihj4ID5VM2KNX-_RD_O1Nq4-3TAi8BSZjPEfMVySKDpHP0BTT7FcgeN6COPMhFZBAzWDyh9gqtOIwmk-KANofodIulhACp0cZSWjTxggf5oBPwDy6sJYwCHmh5-uMsLmZvZtIvrD0TvmU1nj-bqeGQJ1XDyrCWZKF6cPGXOme4r64x7gH5J4Q27JL1SMMQKPCP1896WHX5P0YJCi_Oe-KHhviEurlgKHRmDCMHzMOBi2Ju1MVdCm7gsJhxaALuVHa-4Hc2DkDSWMgpjsly6zSncAIvUKLU2hjOJS6Kw-XSlfU8Aw3AO3uFt9OaCK3vpDURa0s632u68Drbn8xIDM3mk5_v35-l-wr4KtJ5R2_OD3z60cY5FjoZ3-x6OjyF02JrUNb0L3cEfyIrE9SUj8WCZM_-ugiyT1iM2-MUWBwMzdPwtusY8T8VBsEznq4n3hP_MQ57yEVjWDbUKN2QkXTs6gDhqDkYKJ8ZfREBJxpGjDNwYd4irkhOq9zEt_YFIEIar2rg22jMpBSbpYQp-z2T0m3pWEzi0lvr6tyyfPHcBI8Q3XwFrxa2ON6IdtVhhlGMPy1kJvDCD-Ep3fDB9BK1hYE_7QXPzviriwpC7UHpVs%3D)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2c553705b22f4e1c8d982948893d0033&_e=8c6eEsJJqeuKf7OZox93TnJCopwyW0OJBmxWL8sbGRHl74mepFzlucBztDtAOr-WTtQUZ6LUSnz88z7k8qVms-CjjtZVsbA_Lcb92kUIEMHFvBcS1TCDG0K7ORie2KTihj4ID5VM2KNX-_RD_O1Nq4-3TAi8BSZjPEfMVySKDpHP0BTT7FcgeN6COPMhFZBAzWDyh9gqtOIwmk-KANofodIulhACp0cZSWjTxggf5oBPwDy6sJYwCHmh5-uMsLmZ10zZ2K_iwfNffuI7wNsTr5HXe6sMGWjCDZ_pPgURS8O7pR6Ybp2i-0Je74tqFQPVRg_ZO63W5ZJJf7ZW4nqeK1dDQfW6OagOrwSeFQghsHMXopDLOF6f-fFfSf6VOFalkbQmrKCEvcgoJ8YJjiQyx_17FWd8kdcKQlVM3Q-wnhru-yYeL64NvprShMqEhMMGNPqX1S3inkodKQ7TvwOXuoaIFdfTLNYYSwH6fslYCUMTBwiLA_wxNlOsZxBMaqdWnQ8tZuWe9aqWtavR4ZDcL2J1C7YoAfpgjAdvmCTDdxTqnCMTGY4lsA1S1uwx5ApmgZ3qcd35FjOE6c9n0IvVwf4h4bA9GKLUrMWzRldTI92a-sMQ0YKei15rQgqzOLEtZO60Al4daWhEo7R6GHh-BA0-P4ToLDzeaPNFc8zzPntRiNqpAjIyhkBDBgB9mgylzWOMPxexT0ipUNYm155v6SommOGtaVW7gdRyv6os0Mg%3D)
---
Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever. **For you, we 'll save our great country.** Rest in peace, brother. **For Charlie,** Don Jr.
---

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3cv7hrvn497lghl54aiqtvpk6t1lhmqqri8cp88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs) [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8lhfqutq53fmq3fgr265u8s0b01ltj97ho199r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zovainkdh8984gbebhl5pn060qlqpvajnotp3u5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlaivr8ui5uqm029ol368g1f9eh1t2e14tlshblg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbmqk4e1sn2abvc0vtn026rbnnmgd57tturlrcng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp9165straaca022hag1sqdaenu6su86iigl3vd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdgm6o76cph2bs)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: God wrote our love story.
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Peter. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Peter. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Peter.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/nCBuA2EECcichJwtv2ZxiA7_XnWv7eed0cylZM532eqtkMDv-4DYh3Uzvdy3tsdrrto27Y_6xmzUOf6Fj24cnRHg2iOBciJmA-mG8Mr4klrEFlHd73hXKIrnd-51Yy6oK1zdYXBG2fjt_jVdnNdU-5P452W73aSdBDI7xtWFwE1l6XONcczsDzRHQEXKNjqC2holBeqt1_EwpuxKA6xTE8apAwDYChT0ISWCDePga-x-hZBXW-uWH6lBJm9qUL_Dirc_HHjMndKksSrJXOUrOSLygKILskYOm_It3lpvn8gHly0K3RDBhvXk9qDuTIXn3oTRfmpyu5JhFx1XcK5G00vkAwZC-D_eYxshYBAu2NW30A05JlcnNJkwJuvBI-QGunNWyK7-bDtg-7GtXLPFT83IwFj50Yk3CZ5cTZHzZ-ygUWb_bJhiVXn_hCHBamwgsDSF9_07svOfVpBu6UitfM7knj5BHD0SvOXd2zxQ-2Dpr-a004uHMVNJSzz9v0Rzf4yy-q-DZSo_ltlG2R4LbZaD6IkZIma4m1lfY192ptDfV4hHnbbo9OM7FNHKPy21MD5h8bSRY5QGI2aiHCU2fGFUS7VWKMVNoPmAETtYLCw04fhAc1BbSfNaLmSjUbWYOtZiAJ3DkzMjEqr3e-501pgyKmKXJuheKNgMFgpRLiaW7RwWp8ncfJqXJf8xGFk4-Emxr5vi6AX27f0XMcOrOrdTGyBd3yJhr8vKjMaWEyaHW8EPEKy9dWiALICO0HHpWB4aBFKiUvEaWFZagaR6A_ASB074vf2os-6UJpckd8xgc0C8hTAySR9Ion3wRrhHd8LZqu2GQ5IeMiZPEf1sNgJqfWve3AFDWFnrzf1abgZjfAyalp_bQcUfmaaZ8JqpSlj7/lqVVj6OwDMZehcbvkk-r3o0ulGBnKiWU/13)
---
**P.S.** Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Peter, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/beKlgxlBJWq7XZIG9eeFOvfU6UXC0CX35WlhyZr2MVJLqgOKBKJL1ib0BiiTaolXxtDTHaOPVzdeMN_eR8wArBaieuKvdFyPr-XxDSpnp9yR1NlO2kMFp6K3RBFmSvOKpyL_GC3uw_ElgYgH3m_GCmSgD3K_cjo-jRUgcUwX378Iw9b004GT1Kq8ZRqYqr2Eag1hx7LOICCShJkcEzwIYEe9oFktYvkce9dsb8PnWrz9sewvCNh3lE9DzxzkxtTCPJR_G-Z1joKrOhUYr1UacDR2tgKj8ielKf7Bt9-_F9BvHjb3n0qhqScnMtlqbSfER2816ADF7iasWVnabXQXQ-U1q5hhZHYgVTeaZPMpE-vJQYvwlbzoLgLPhGYQc-ZiUXMwlYukhvNxxcfZyuv4XvRBo5F4KnAOX1KH1l9Vc2hUJyt-h4H7LFBFu2NfLMxWL7FWiwatnDCxzECk-yfhx5UwxNvqLNda6gY15zyYaXydOezAyo9lXYJloH5BBBj6M_KQ4HZWEB847Eq5BZ6wveyW8cOuVNa69h_U_n8W1-CSCNUrB8I1nd4jWZhvo9E0oEFQYatn9OenzQF-g4_APwop4raB7GCtP-N_qjYanWtNU_SNgooHznZbQpOxKuSEyYA_BUBDgXF4EnjpEzjY2Bp0ZaU-w-Cx9crgeDo3j8UIwc78IP_Wxy1Iwmlryxv9a8yzpWkMXq6fvtWkGTSM-5C1PbsAh0FxHjqx2vG89MWlalnwTV_FBNeXA9YwTD8t3jpw2hUNBKV57x3A_l3CAq1DRYijC0tu81rKHeo_2BuiR582KtjDcS7s60I8Nk8vgZG6WgKhJQAiTQqUxgWxaiXs1NPggO6Z6xcS7hhSUE9iPjkTnYp3rc5gbYGPp5A050ym/qJQRrFHRHiOrY78OXsrTKNyVpONfi2ss/13)

A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Peter. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Peter. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Peter. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Peter, that's why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It's how I first met him -- driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. We 'll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e7809902/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbXhCamVxSGNRag/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsbnpCU0tHag/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0JTYThqSDVLMFdscw/gaNKeqw/sfr3d8c8c55)

| | | | | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e7809902/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsbnpCU0tHag/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0JTYThqSDVLMFdscw/gaNKeqw/s7sd241e83a)

Deputy Assistant to the President Sebastian Gorka **[exploded at a Times Radio host,](https://substack.com/redirect/87d078a3-1e05-40bd-a13e-5688843bb0b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** demanding he provide just one concrete example of President Donald Trump acting like an authoritarian after he accused Trump of being one.
"I'll ask again give me one example! You are failing!!" Gorka erupted. **[Watch the tense clash here...](https://substack.com/redirect/87d078a3-1e05-40bd-a13e-5688843bb0b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# [[TRAITORS?] Republicans turning on RFK Jr?](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just testified before the US Senate, and it was an all-out _**WAR**_.
Angry liberals questioned his assault on _**untested vaccines, the CDC and Big Pharma**_ ...
But instead of defending him, multiple turncoat Republicans _**joined in**_ on the attack.
Kennedy REFUSED to back down.
He boldly stood up for the American people and VOWED to tell them the truth.
And now, he's issued **[a terrifying new warning](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Americans need to hear in 2025.
If you were born before Jan 1st, 1965, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** affects you most of all.
Get the full facts **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
P.S. Liberals will call **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** crazy too, until they see **[the data](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Learn why RFK Jr is warning Americans about this emerging health crisis before it's too late. Watch **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e6e341-fbd6-45ca-92a7-494959f695d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Jimmy Kimmel is back, without an apology to Charlie Kirk's family
ABC's Jimmy Kimmel **[negotiated his return](https://substack.com/redirect/503de7da-7436-47b4-b2f6-91783168c1ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** directly with Disney CEO Bob Iger and will address the controversy in his Tuesday monologue but will not apologize for falsely claiming Charlie Kirk's alleged killer was part of the "MAGA gang," despite authorities saying the suspect held left-wing views.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/503de7da-7436-47b4-b2f6-91783168c1ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Major affiliates may still refuse to air the show:** Sinclair Broadcast Group and Nexstar Media Group, which own dozens of ABC affiliates, had demanded Kimmel apologize to Kirk's family and donate to Turning Point USA, with Turning Point's spokesperson saying Disney's decision to bring Kimmel back is "their mistake to make" and affiliates don't have to follow suit.
* **Hollywood rallies behind Kimmel amid censorship claims:** Approximately 400 entertainment figures including Tom Hanks, Meryl Streep, and Robert De Niro signed an ACLU letter condemning the suspension as government censorship, while Howard Stern canceled his Disney+ subscription and former Disney CEO Michael Eisner accused the company of capitulating to "intimidation" from Washington.
* **White House denies government pressure:** The administration rejected claims of free speech suppression, with spokesperson Abigail Jackson calling Kimmel a "low-ratings loser" and stating the suspension was "a talent problem" not a free speech issue, while Disney cited avoiding "further inflaming a tense situation" as the reason for the temporary suspension.

* * *
# **Customer receives hateful message on Starbucks cup after ordering Charlie Kirk 's famous order**
Ohio resident Autumn Perkins **[ordered Charlie Kirk's favorite drink](https://substack.com/redirect/1eef7f85-3fd2-4ce8-afc3-1f030ef7f70e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (mint majesty with two honeys) at a Kroger-operated Starbucks location and discovered an employee had written "racist's fav drink" on the side of the cup.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1eef7f85-3fd2-4ce8-afc3-1f030ef7f70e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Employee fired after admitting to writing message:** After Perkins spoke to the manager, the employee admitted to writing the hateful message and was subsequently terminated by Kroger, with both Starbucks and Kroger condemning the behavior as unacceptable and contrary to their values.
* **Perkins emphasizes Kirk's message of respect:** The customer said she believes Kirk stood for respectful disagreement, stating "we don't have to agree on everything" but "we can't communicate and grow if we're disrespecting each other," while agreeing that termination was appropriate given that "actions have repercussions."
* **Customer vows to boycott Starbucks:** Perkins announced she no longer plans to spend money at Starbucks despite frequently visiting the chain while traveling, saying "I don't intend to spend another penny at Starbucks -- and as far as I'm concerned, neither will my children or anybody else in my family who will listen to me."

* * *
# **North Carolina officer fired after declaring himself "Antifa" and calling for violence against "traitors"**
Brian Edwards, 37, a corporal with the Orange County Sheriff's Office, **[was terminated after posting on BlueSky](https://substack.com/redirect/9c425651-266d-4388-b3ff-8e1c26429282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that he identified as "Antifa" and called for "war crimes trials" against right-wing "traitors," suggesting bringing back the guillotine for executions.
"There will be war crimes trials and I can't wait to see every one of them thrown into prison for the rest of their lives," **[Edwards wrote.](https://substack.com/redirect/ffa01eb2-cc90-41a2-abfd-02139ef9728b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "It may even be time to bring back the guillotine."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ffa01eb2-cc90-41a2-abfd-02139ef9728b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Posts violated department conduct policies:** Orange County Sheriff Charles Blackwood confirmed Edwards' termination for violating the office's standards of conduct and social network policies, emphasizing the need to "maintain the public trust" and "treat everyone with dignity and respect."
* **Trump designates Antifa as terrorist organization:** President Donald Trump declared Antifa a "major terrorist organization" on Wednesday, citing the group's involvement in violent riots following George Floyd's death in 2020, Portland riots in 2021, and the 2019 assault on journalist Andy Ngo.

body:

null, it's Haley.
I know that there's a lot of fear and uncertainty in our country right now – which is why I'm running for Senate. **But I need you to know exactly what's at stake in my battleground Senate race, and _[why I'm about to ask you to chip in $5 today.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6075?t=3&akid=918%2E49239%2EkxrIW1)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6069?t=4&akid=918%2E49239%2EkxrIW1)
---
Democrats need to gain four seats in the 2026 midterm elections to win a Senate majority – and our seat right here in Michigan is crucial. If we win, we’ll be able to put a critical check on Trump and his chaos agenda.
That means real leverage to fight back against Trump’s misguided policies – cuts to cancer research, SNAP, and health care – and to rein in the shoot-from-the-hip tariffs that have given massive companies the green light to jack up prices on the goods and services we rely on every day.
**I'm running for Senate to fight for working Michiganders and protect them from even more of this harmful chaos.**
But to do that, my team needs the resources to compete with MAGA Mike Rogers, Trump's _handpicked_ candidate. This is shaping up to be the most expensive race in Michigan’s history. Republicans are expected to spend at least **$80 million** against me trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat, and a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to back Rogers.
**That means I’m going to need the strongest possible grassroots campaign to win.[With only a week until my FEC EOQ deadline, will you chip in $5 or $25 right now to join me in this fight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6069?t=5&akid=918%2E49239%2EkxrIW1)**

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. This news is exciting for so many reasons. For one, Debra **absolutely destroyed** her male opponents, securing nearly 40% of the vote, while the runner-up was a Republican man with 17.4%.

**This means Her Bold Move’s 100% winning streak CONTINUES. Her Bold Move has not had a single loss in more than 10 months. This is unbelievable. We are proud, but we are not surprised. We are proving that if we take a chance and implement our tailored programs for qualified women running for office, _regardless of where they live_ , we can win. **

In 2024, the Republican (an incumbent at the time) running for this seat defeated his Democratic challenger with more than 70% of the vote. However, we knew not to count this Georgia district out. The results from this election show that Georgia is still very much a purple state, and like all of us, voters in the state are sick and tired of _**male** GOP supermajorities_ writing dangerous laws about women’s bodies.

The bottom line: if you’re losing hope, given everything that’s been happening since Trump took office, we believe there’s plenty of reason for optimism. Incredible, progressive women are running for local and statewide office in red states and districts – and WINNING.

[**The top two candidates from this special election will face off for the runoff on September 23. This seat is flippable, and would give pro-choice Democrats one more influential seat in the Georgia State Senate – which currently has only 16 female lawmakers. Debra needs our help to make this a reality. You can join Debra’s race for this seat by rushing a split $20.25 or more donation today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115755343/571364431/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250923Tmrw_EH_NO_7_G_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MmIxOTY0LTgxOTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r_BO3yAYOle47KUEh-r95x-pdwFW20n8b7-yOgsIsSQ=)

body:

And my seat is key to holding the House majority.**But let me make one thing very clear: if Democrats win back control of Congress - the Trump presidency is over.** We can’t afford to let them roll back our accomplishments and impeach President Trump again.That’s their agenda.

And my seat is key to holding the House majority.But let me make one thing very clear: if Democrats win back control of Congress - the Trump presidency is over. We can’t afford to let them roll back our accomplishments and impeach President Trump again.That’s their agenda. The Q3 campaign finance reports are due in one week - September 30th - already have several well-funded opponents, including Joe Biden’s Ambassador to Ukraine and a former top military aide to Barrack Obama and they are both getting hundreds of thousands of dollars from the DC Swamp.We have to fight back and that’s why I need your help. | | | | | | | | | mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Did you see this New York Times article?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0923_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0923_e]
Friend,
Did you see this New York Times article? 18th Congressional District voters are facing unprecedented confusion. Between gerrymandering and delayed special elections, many residents don’t know when—or even if—they can vote.
This chaos isn’t just inconvenient, it threatens our democracy. I’m running for Congress to make sure every Houstonian has a voice, every vote counts, and our community is represented by leaders who fight for us, not political games.
It’s time for clarity. It’s time for leadership. Let’s make sure Houston is heard. Can you chip in to help out? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0923_e&refcode2=6db29095-8598-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/22/us/politics/texas-redistricting-houston.html [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/22/us/politics/texas-redistricting-houston.html]
Read more about the challenges facing Houston voters on The New York Times. [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/22/us/politics/texas-redistricting-houston.html]
Thank you,
Amanda K. Edwards

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: May God help us if we lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Ballots drop in two weeks

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there. It's Gavin Newsom. I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a $35 contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Please.

Folks... I am worried. God help us if we lose in California. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts in several states to hold the House; they're going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and their opponents on television and more.

I want to stress the importance of this ask: ballots drop two weeks. We are being outraised and outspent. And a recent poll showed us at 48% -- short of what we need to win. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Democrats. I need yor help and we need it today. So I am asking:

[**If you understand how important it is that Democrats have a fair chance to take back the House, then I am asking you to make a contribution to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. We need the resources today, and will put your donation right to work.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4476?refcode=em250923&t=1&akid=2583%2E4767699%2ETXtVU6) Gavin Newsom |
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4476?t=2&akid=2583%2E4767699%2ETXtVU6)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2583%2E4767699%2ETXtVU6).
Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: HMP for Prop 50, California Teachers Association, Newsom for California – Governor 2022.

name: Brad Wyatt
subject: I just returned from Charlie Kirk's memorial service in Arizona
body:
Thank you to the volunteers helping locally
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q8ApiXix1_zXzJeK8Ed0r-ieiP3VqzJ7aouQPV35U_OGpa1iTVFwSBtK5etjBWcsOehrPWB9XJqJuGNsszYbZSWcTq40u7_oaU-Vyd2MHkb-ZeSMsSDkcaO7H8v8AF3uHMagCKVsZ5Lf0B1bg0yJPw==&c=MNlSUj4LAO76_zlWQsmYr6V7_TpayCuQBVfQTImlBVb5zq5G-VCuxw==&ch=_9fmisjCbhO5vDctIPi24C0sv3Y9gNteZJ9H8qMqGYqCFnbS9h3cCQ==)
---
| Peter,
I just returned from Charlie Kirk's memorial in Arizona (check out the picture with US Senator Mike Lee), and you can feel the grassroots energy exploding as extreme woke policies are failing.
So let me start with a big thank you to all the volunteers that have been helping their local candidates and organizing events in their hometowns. I appreciate your time and sacrifices.
---
| |
---
US Senator Mike Lee of Utah at Charlie Kirk's Memorial in Glendale, AZ.
---
| As the National Committeeman for Massachusetts, I know firsthand that the MassGOP is primed to convert that energy into electoral victories that deliver conservative policies.
That's why, as election season ramps up this fall, I want you to know exactly what your support of the MassGOP means. Flashy headlines & big promises won't win back Massachusetts. 📱 $10 -> covers a candidate's monthly subscription to Numinar, our voter contact software. 📄 $50 -> buys the ink to print handouts and training materials for candidates. 📍 $100 -> sends a town wide text message for a RTC. 🖥️ $250 -> sponsors a full week of digital ads for a State Rep candidate. ✅ $500 -> delivers a districtwide text message for a State Senate candidate.
If you've ever wondered, "Does my gift really matter?" the answer is YES. Because whether you give $10 or $5,000, you're putting the right tools into the hands of the folks on the front lines.
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q8ApiXix1_zXzJeK8Ed0r-ieiP3VqzJ7aouQPV35U_OGpa1iTVFwSG37yf9QNxVadC00Vx1zrAy7Ga_veYOPn4wROgH--TOdIOXFdqi35A75nb1QyalrzPNlVxGyvqpZwCjHk5QZJMwfjmSRAAcIi-xOUXNXQP2LFO9rzTscRIzDfzLeAvTDvSchMqllQooC&c=MNlSUj4LAO76_zlWQsmYr6V7_TpayCuQBVfQTImlBVb5zq5G-VCuxw==&ch=_9fmisjCbhO5vDctIPi24C0sv3Y9gNteZJ9H8qMqGYqCFnbS9h3cCQ==)
---
| |
---
Vice President JD Vance giving remarks at the Charlie Kirk Memorial.
---
| |
---
Glenn Beck walking through the crowd. The grassroots energy was explosive.
---
| The MassGOP doesn't have union bosses or special interest money propping us up.
What we do have is passionate, dedicated supporters like you.
---
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q8ApiXix1_zXzJeK8Ed0r-ieiP3VqzJ7aouQPV35U_OGpa1iTVFwSG37yf9QNxVadC00Vx1zrAy7Ga_veYOPn4wROgH--TOdIOXFdqi35A75nb1QyalrzPNlVxGyvqpZwCjHk5QZJMwfjmSRAAcIi-xOUXNXQP2LFO9rzTscRIzDfzLeAvTDveNfNTINseE3&c=MNlSUj4LAO76_zlWQsmYr6V7_TpayCuQBVfQTImlBVb5zq5G-VCuxw==&ch=_9fmisjCbhO5vDctIPi24C0sv3Y9gNteZJ9H8qMqGYqCFnbS9h3cCQ==)
---
| To Victory,
---
| |

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Do tariffs help or hurt in the long run?
body:
| Hi Peter, Are tariffs good or bad? It's a simple question with a complicated answer. On the one hand, tariffs can protect vulnerable industries and correct trade imbalances.1 On the other, tariffs can usher in shipping delays and steeper prices on goods that may be essential to doing business.1 Ultimately, the answer depends on _several_ factors. And "good versus bad" may not be the best way to frame it all. Instead, it can be more useful to ask who benefits, who bears the cost, and how those trade-offs can trickle down to your wallet.
---
|
---

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie answered the call. Now I will too.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvr05io4k1jkoz4bzu4fauq7ot3expf24h2zvgb215cy3o36hx3rmy7o2a6g3b2b91ctk9u0g7lvd71j&__stmp=t31olo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31olo&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31olo&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvr05io4k1jkoz4bzu4fauq7ot3expf24h2zvgb215cy3o36hx3rmy7o2a6g3b2b91ctk9u0g7lvd71j&__stmp=t31olo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20az0cme8aklmi5oyr8o25vzdr30y6ym70rca3f3127bzc59r9jd4wx21yyw7x02wp6nzn7znq7b8byi3diccmwc7xj3sjws192rofze9r8izpzzh3csci0ub2xe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31olo&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldvmwx9j49z98du7wks47dhy5auhhicxblukvhk6xnltgetd3vepcnp8diw6e5zqx018nh8rtsnqiccabft3oum2muly6zovea8ycgy0urvy4v1n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31olo&__onlt=h)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Come hell or high water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

| Fellow Patriot,
---
_I’m still in shock._
---
Left-wing extremism is on the rise, and the Democrat Party is letting it happen.
---
Democrats are RELEASING criminals from prison to terrorize innocent civilians.
---
The worst governor in America – Kathy Hochul – has enacted sanctuary state policies that let illegal aliens brutalize U.S. citizens.
---
And the frontrunner for Mayor of the largest city in America claims that the **“violence”** you are witnessing with your own eyes is **“artificial.”**
---
_In light of everything, I had hoped to see that good and decent Americans are energized to vote against the extremism that plagues the Left._
---
_But a classified report on special election data that was placed on my desk paints a very troubling picture..._
---
**...Democrats are showing up while Republicans are sitting out elections – sometimes even by DOUBLE DIGITS.**
---
As Chair of House GOP Leadership, I made a promise to President Trump that I would scout the country to find out exactly who we can count on to show up to vote and NOT sit on the sidelines when duty calls.
---
We need to flag which of our voters in the voter file are the _HIGHEST_ _PROPENSITY_ _VOTERS_ – _the patriots who will move heaven and earth to cast a ballot to save America_.
---
Because I’ll tell you how _I_ feel right now... **After the tragic events we’ve seen unfold, come hell or high water, I will vote Republican no matter what to save our country.**
---
_If that sentiment speaks to you, then I need you to flag your voter profile for the President as a high propensity voter who will reliably show up to vote._
---
