name: Marc Hearron
subject: Men suing their partners for abortion care?
body:
The newest desperate reach for control | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761732/571384339/2141984067?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761735/571384343/2141984067?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

[**Anti-abortion extremists are escalating their attacks on medication abortion with increasingly desperate schemes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761737/571384355/1824768205?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

We're seeing a trend where men are filing lawsuits against their partners—or ex-partners—in a disturbing attempt to block abortion access, especially abortion by mail. And now, Texas has passed a law encouraging private citizens to sue health providers for mailing abortion pills—or even _intending_ to do so.

[**This is nothing more than an abusive control tactic designed to intimidate people by surveilling their most private health decisions.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761739/571384372/1824768205?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

As my colleague Molly Duane stated last week in an article in _The Nation:_
> _"Texas extremists are mad they can't control what is happening outside their borders so they're trying to extend their extraterritorial tentacles into other states—even though that's antithetical to our system of federalism."_
The anti-abortion movement is proving that they'll stop short of nothing to completely erode access to abortion care, which is why they're pursuing this egregious and abusive tactic.

We can't afford to stop fighting. [**We must call out these cruel schemes for what they are and work together to defend reproductive freedom.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761742/571384387/1824768205?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Sincerely,

Marc Hearron
Interim Associate Director, U.S. Litigation | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115761745/571384412/2141984067?sourceid=1150898&utm_campaign=26emama-0906aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZmUzYy04ODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2UF7AMbevtJlUqh8p8NInttWHPY6ePPdsoWIpdKSNk=&emci=3831ae7b-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=be89fe3c-8898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

The anti-abortion movement is proving that they'll stop short of nothing to completely erode access to abortion care, which is why they're pursuing this egregious and abusive tactic. We can't afford to stop fighting. Sincerely, Marc Hearron Interim Associate Director, U.S. Litigation | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ce2ho0r3h6rfbl6139spqaklsvadg74uo434eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdim8pj6c9h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znh3t9lvmmn912j5et4cisqiai6v04uef03slk40_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdim8pj6c9h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh37nomjnno23cp8kigmcs9k4mspteaqdo61s9ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sdim8pj6c9h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,

Dinesh D’Souza

name: Seth Koslow for Nassau County Executive
subject: For Immediate Release: Blakeman Must Stand Up for Public Health
body:
Koslow Calls on Blakeman to Stand-Up for Public Health and Against Recent White House Statements

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3be11815ffec/nassau-county-executive-candidate-seth-koslow-slams-blakeman-4961865?e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Contact: Sean, (540)623-7870****Press@KoslowForNassau.com**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **Nassau County Legislator and County Executive Candidate Calls on Opponent to Protect Public Health**
---
| | _The White House’s Claim that Tylenol Causes Autism is a Dangerous Half Truth, and Local Leaders Must Stand with Science_
---
| | **Nassau County, NY** —Nassau County Legislator, former prosecutor, and County Executive candidate Seth Koslow today called on County Executive Bruce Blakeman to stand up to the Trump Administration's reckless guidance claiming [acetaminophen causes autism.](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=9621078d88&e=d16fb2f63d)“Local elected officials are often on the frontlines of public health — their top priority should be keeping our communities safe and healthy.” “Bruce Blakeman should embrace facts and put the health of Nassau County residents first. He should call out unproven, ridiculous statements, like Tylenol causes autism, no matter who makes claims like this, even the president of the United States. Our county executive should do his job and call this out for what it is: pseudoscience that puts our communities at risk of harm."
---
| | **A bout Seth Koslow** _Seth Koslow is not a typical politician. He’s a lifelong Nassau County resident, dad, coach, and former prosecutor._
_Born and raised in Baldwin, Seth grew up watching his father achieve the Nassau County Dream, starting a small CPA business from their home and expanding it into a thriving practice that provided Seth and his siblings with the opportunity to attend college and build their own futures._
_Now, Seth is running for Nassau County Executive because taxes are too high, the county wastes too much money, and regular folks are paying the price._

---
|
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | _Copyright (C) 2025 Koslow for Nassau. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Koslow for Nassau 998 Old Country Rd Ste C PMB 152 Plainview, NY 11803-4936 USA

Peter, September is our biggest month yet, and we won't dance around it:
Abigail Spanberger needs you to join our donor list by midnight so she stays on track to win. If you're ready, use the link below to make your contribution. Otherwise, keep reading.
[_**https://abigailspanberger.com/biggestmonth**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115763680/571389923/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWNlYjEzOWMtOGE5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WDXN6XEy7ED7IOgGkpBNvNo_r5ArZUxqUO9K0UwT6Xg=)
We have only _42 days_ left to flip Virginia blue — the only state where Democrats can flip a Republican-held Governor's office in 2025 — and there is real urgency that we increase our fundraising to meet the demands of this campaign.
Soon, we'll close out the last complete fundraising quarter prior to Election Day and be required under Virginia law to report how much money we've raised.
_From ads to organizing to yard signs, your $25 gift will fund investments that matter._
And with early voting already underway, with our opponent gaining in the polls, and with Donald Trump himself launching attacks against us, it's incumbent on each of us to give what we can before it's too late.
[_**Please, Peter, can Abigail Spanberger count on your contribution today? clean_body: Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this campaign, and the resources we raise from these emails make a real difference. = Peter, September is our biggest month yet, and we won't dance around it: Abigail Spanberger needs you to join our donor list by midnight so she stays on track to win. If you're ready, use the link below to make your contribution. Otherwise, keep reading. = We have only 42 days left to flip Virginia blue — the only state where Democrats can flip a Republican-held Governor's office in 2025 — and there is real urgency that we increase our fundraising to meet the demands of this campaign. Soon, we'll close out the last complete fundraising quarter prior to Election Day and be required under Virginia law to report how much money we've raised. From ads to organizing to yard signs, your $25 gift will fund investments that matter. And with early voting already underway, with our opponent gaining in the polls, and with Donald Trump himself launching attacks against us, it's incumbent on each of us to give what we can before it's too late. = = = = = = = We can't thank you enough, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. This could be a disaster in the upcoming holiday months. Too many parents, grandparents, and loved ones spend some of their last dollars to see each other — paying for tickets, taking unpaid time off work, and driving hours to make it to the airport.

Many can’t afford to pay the consequences when flights are delayed or canceled, or luggage goes missing – we’ve already seen the disastrous consequences this summer at Newark Airport. **_[Will you demand fairness for travelers today by signing onto our petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115763958/571390810/-148664315?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250922_PT_FlightDelay_0_3MO_BonnieWatsonColema_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU1MmQ2OS04Yjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nY8i7tR3JoFn7HMVBUXnJ82cEq2WgRITvLFcokDsGoU=&emci=4e552d69-8b98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4f552d69-8b98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)_**

Dear Fellow American,

As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic

|
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/sHKiSoo3Wbmp1JBKYzMGP58sMqUI2Mxc-iTNiyTXLJrg1N1UhTNuUMpvHBvu3eoiHX--y6Evqpa1vRUVytd6O7E9Q6X2-ByRI7mOw8cQ_NIxZHi9MGcfj7GdDtXLG8AHzchdfUgLGiPFEd0ulGktkn14E5FkhO1P5BTDslAr--PhBG3Smdyw_EVEk7PJuReuWRcVagSwfVTHVn95f9YAhgaVkDQlqiwKIeYQsDapAOjB6DPKryz4Vo9kc8rtc6HIsznCST4d-8D6zPCsMMnN5nXC3ZBNuCMN7IiNkRlvGs6pejv2XZHqRj5Oa8-eU7Ydqw1X-ExarQmnWEGQ3Oz-48oFsqW_IXUUpByt6PirjvY2-2kVshVpagjlTcLSt9NJJaSOBdnr_cyJoG_0C7kStj30hQdNAcINse3SOqPJvqsmzLX9TpgZymko_5fG8GhfIJRExhX0_CuswPfDmQo15XJ8fyx2uNst0TLHlXEe5yvg2yXShbiPD_lnEMPWrMGG2Ssir64cEbrjNnshNygdMv5cTQyLIhBOzE9VL9hckWOH08MCw7nGzAC1KZHuKuzHQ9cyl4voaW_Fkp-B7wMJ7PnTDYNq_awKv-pW3MkjvCgqHNwOiqRP-th0hSOkCjnlqoundNUQRKmsB8RWTBg8n5aplzi1psCc0zjc/tK5XQ_V7xBfAayo5Jb3Ks0B2G6m5OSZi/13)

| | This comprehensive 300+ page guide brings to life 16 of the nation's most influential Founders--not as mythical figures, but as real statesmen confronting the immense political challenges of their time. From George Washington to Thomas Jefferson, you'll explore their pivotal decisions that laid the foundation for American liberty and self-government.

I invite you to claim your FREE copy of this insightful eBook by following the secure link below:

[**https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/vWyOzHxtNkwmC3H_vafYqVFvB4YX0Ug0X_akIkLL9a30Og0m8LOEocRnO6ikCm_msKu_vCrnBDh-j-1xjYVRiE1Mko1Yu2cWPKZRwysrtOYcCwcPLbT411tFiAtZs4uhZXnVOIYcn1IHRaDVs8EwX8U0kiW_uXqePdvPlixG4FFwIT4s01wXQkCHWdoM76CFMKZBKJnPIEf064M8eyK-MKUJYhuX0ZYKWKFHtMPQpNLhbKdOYAV4YaM-h0HKBEqL0KAqpCWHAQ9oBWM881iBLlS1E1HNjMD3XuKtzDT0qLsiH7sIjKgjIYVCBnSJxQ1FtS_EYqQNnivnINpbasbdhwy9zijMCdJxB1cnq2ZP9sLrU4Dn1ShGaHm-BIzt2xY7GmdnvrBEloBJRCWvtDXw-nw_IkRxa2NUf2ElaXzUHpfD6joNqwEvEwebvbZA-XQsEa2TothuCqifByj0SA9dszXLIDm0rgieubOzlar7h5Q7CNCACRLKC061TmTzi8TCr6sKkOtZKcbmx7KL88FnV5kfUTRbU_sx0PXkcMDmzWfETQ0hVVbbV8BFLKMl5_TRJ_C822EdAQrbvBlY7eClku8F6W3RrnrMWfm4Thl9KusC1bOCEFoqUup3107Q9Kmw1TzrU5JufoyIAx5ekEXe7SututSQgBoKF55J/0bYOFaygrUQOrFrE5cHrraOn8R7mZ07g/13)

May this guide deepen your appreciation for the patriots whose vision and sacrifice gave us the inheritance of freedom we enjoy today.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

Team, John James votes with Donald Trump **_100% of the time._**
That’s right — John James’ congressional voting record this year is completely aligned with Donald Trump’s far-right agenda.
James will gladly be a rubber stamp on every Trump policy that hurts families across Michigan: Medicaid cuts, defunding nutrition assistance programs, and taking money from schools.
_If John James became governor of Michigan, he would let Trump have his way with our state._**_We can’t let that happen._**
Jocelyn Benson beats John James in every poll so far for the race for governor. She’s won statewide _twice_ (something John James hasn’t been able to do in his two attempts) and ran ahead of James in his own congressional district.

Flipping these seats will be our clearest path to restoring a Democratic Senate majority. ❌ The bad news: Georgia and Michigan — two critical seats currently held by Democrats — are also on the list. And unfortunately, the GOP is ready to spend whatever it takes to flip these seats + lock in their control of the Senate. The stakes have simply never been higher. name: Josh Cortez
subject: It’s Official: I’m running for Congress…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress
body:
TX-35 is one of the most hotly contested seats in America and it’s a top pickup opportunity for the America First movement. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d587bd91fec544db930eb4b615ef9be7&_e=YF69c8T6Mbv-D6Or76raw1kylJ-9Kpddl4O8WdT30Xyinq_is9g4RA18r0U6A40j3DkvnO0bfyoHzyG9AQxqjMLME06C0ebwkmVQVWBlapRJB38Gp2jPptti_B-Jg5DGShZpjTEkSbpZzm867K1q-uBvQeQE8cziiaMFTOR4OwyvizG9LaXvtYrMJZ5ucBTMpFwvGrKl6FXe_BBpyMk3QM6sopYK4aodpF3D5KdbbkfP0v0-uOIpGqm5arNsMGcym4eMPSs-HUieNaRiKWr63uiEjzCaHoKu3bmUZM2IiTB1Vma0OitFq7_-Xbz6hg9S98HeW-yOrvIhW5yWisZ3rI0nIMp9mp8WPhZtbEvrLexoA-vBK5sOaJ8_98iqhTYtWVQX_sLKiae6TSo2wRkkWhARwj4Ckq5PHioDyKWJs_2x9EEjjnqIJ5bu6Yy-QPw5UyE76XVZFbvi-xDWCYB2gTAkQYE1kID4g75Cu7PR_aTJYfDXMHcij6NeVZqF0jNklZD1KIxQfLciuQZst3kmHIVRoAlxXMDMMLIv-wuOWWNbGenx9Mn-Z33_wyrTT1Yn1RcCzJwTeLVDW3KeQj4JPnl-0upbuX1kvACzaRfVv3_PLFAyG1-KCQZKcUaG1381mRlGe3-gmwYGqZDUfKoQEURZ8AVYoJ4Q6yI8jONRjrwGLbPQ4XEsHx2Rv-bBFsKupw6FPh8pwKftQt78BWlmj2MmoSQq1q70HRTOQL4pUo6LllSUdkrzPtO06c98f2N2)
---
Fellow American,

**I’m writing to you today with big news: I’m officially running to represent Texas’s 35th Congressional District in the United States Congress.**

This decision wasn’t made lightly. For me, it’s about **_home_**. It’s about **_family_**. It’s about **_Texas values_**.

My family has called Texas home for over 250 years — going back to 1773, when my ancestors settled in Texas as Spanish land grantees. Land on the Rio Grande, which remains in the family to this day. I’m an 8th-generation Texan, raised in a multi-generational military family that instilled a deep respect for service, sacrifice, and duty to our country. My family built their lives here through faith, hard work, and community — and those values shaped who I am today.

Now, I’m stepping forward to serve this region that gave so much to me and my family. I believe South Texas deserves a leader who never forgets where they came from, **stands with President Trump on our border** — and who always puts the people of this district _first_.

**The stakes in this race could not be higher.**

****TX-35 is one of the most hotly contested seats in America and it’s a top pickup opportunity for the America First movement.**** This district was written off for years as a guaranteed blue seat — but that’s changed. **In 2024, President Trump carried this whole region after losing it in previous elections. This proves that South Texas is Trump country now.** Families are rejecting the empty promises of woke radical liberal politicians. They are demanding new leadership that reflects our values — faith, freedom, hard work, and opportunity.

[**This is our window to finish what we started — to FLIP TX-35, secure a lasting conservative majority for Texas, and bring a new generation of leadership to Congress.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d587bd91fec544db930eb4b615ef9be7&_e=YF69c8T6Mbv-D6Or76raw1kylJ-9Kpddl4O8WdT30Xyinq_is9g4RA18r0U6A40j3DkvnO0bfyoHzyG9AQxqjMLME06C0ebwkmVQVWBlapRJB38Gp2jPptti_B-Jg5DGShZpjTEkSbpZzm867K1q-uBvQeQE8cziiaMFTOR4OwyvizG9LaXvtYrMJZ5ucBTMpFwvGrKl6FXe_BBpyMk3QM6sopYK4aodpF3D5KdbbkfP0v0-uOIpGqm5arNsMGcym4eMPSs-HUieNaRiKWr63kw_roWm8piS7SbN-2pRM1rPbreQ7B6MScF-waTxM8CAaFS4lXz05h5EaYZ060S8YJvn8AvFrn_OY4YAyL_5IHABiLiB9CUKEh5QzL6pTGGlUEEQTmhPhbf_tOlWkrUldu54yzqJ7kY-OpMKAOZ2Fgk3KEQeHn4ioSE_cE3ad3MtsYc8wklbqt9P_VsipBVvL_YTevDKjr9B5ja9j4n-9k_vXu9bLs7NoBh1bEQshyYPvRJl0DctjFN-MkNkYFBKRccdrhQsAi-PuV7ZAiva4ahptX_p0WlTi3PYhiFrNPEKJjmIwO54w7mH6VVB1cE_EXG-D-IUZ6-capod_zYLNa3Cbo7N56hH4hnz92YYjzAMQN49iMit4wwXQwZCCUk2OOJsHJCTo0WA5domvuVyv2M9woLynVHlsTV8EICiDAY0IXnRGmWHD5p06GY98nuiGViK4KPR5JwlTQsely_3DJmT6r-IxemnXEnv1VYGCoQu)

[**CHIP IN NOW — ELECT JOSH CORTEZ**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d587bd91fec544db930eb4b615ef9be7&_e=YF69c8T6Mbv-D6Or76raw1kylJ-9Kpddl4O8WdT30Xyinq_is9g4RA18r0U6A40j3DkvnO0bfyoHzyG9AQxqjMLME06C0ebwkmVQVWBlapRJB38Gp2jPptti_B-Jg5DGShZpjTEkSbpZzm867K1q-uBvQeQE8cziiaMFTOR4OwyvizG9LaXvtYrMJZ5ucBTMpFwvGrKl6FXe_BBpyMk3QM6sopYK4aodpF3D5KdbbkfP0v0-uOIpGqm5arNsMGcym4eMPSs-HUieNaRiKWr63jiDsC1uUg7izNoCwdMxeKkeCnliYuRHSKaCN9scqtYnJF2vFnpdP4xX60va9D2MxAPCiF4bKb-LWPHL7KTlpJBbbZO6-b1zpoVnyA2ezqV8VAZP3Z_Xuh4hP0wX1Jj2YcmXrwUEy2QAEBgT693mhDT6jbehcb1hsawHJB6TW25eE53Ot5DYUekx0gQbpDBV_DrPJfUwTSvdoID0yRPFBmNGrKQUDFR9dEOQa0gXI3Wcy6ViVl85m4061hAH8c3xl5SEyzWL0Mt0k5sFAkwrSQIanh-LhO1IkSZVz0JIfJz6YDtVDbIJ9_UfeJj1fRwsBhf0gagk6_h0XNtfuNcm94h91rN3wfRpIlrTrkJBmoPNEPxWhTVWE0QVOx5YlHRNUobUMz5EghlkpgHhGmbIe-Kz3erNnTaO8gkCocJM0AP7RvK2Ss-ts6K8VMpnFjAeV_irMUYULRy6zZXvI4C54AZsukLIco3vsEFr_Dj1uzs4)
I didn’t know it at the time, but by the Grace of God, I’ve spent my career preparing for this moment.

I’ve built businesses and created jobs as an entrepreneur and small business owner. I’ve worked on the front lines of politics, helping flip neighboring TX-15 for the first time in a century and forging relationships with community leaders across South Texas. I’ve taught in the classroom as a college professor, invested in the next generation, and served on Capitol Hill as a Deputy Chief of Staff and Senior Advisor — where I fought daily to protect our values and way of life from the out-of-touch Washington elite.

I’m proud to be a life-long conservative, I’m proud to stand for the America First agenda, and I’m proud to fight for the people of South Texas — because this district isn’t just where I live... _It’s who I am._

clean_body: TX-35 is one of the most hotly contested seats in America and it’s a top pickup opportunity for the America First movement. | Fellow American, I’m writing to you today with big news: I’m officially running to represent Texas’s 35th Congressional District in the United States Congress. This decision wasn’t made lightly. For me, it’s about home. It’s about family. It’s about Texas values. My family has called Texas home for over 250 years — going back to 1773, when my ancestors settled in Texas as Spanish land grantees. Land on the Rio Grande, which remains in the family to this day. I’m an 8th-generation Texan, raised in a multi-generational military family that instilled a deep respect for service, sacrifice, and duty to our country. My family built their lives here through faith, hard work, and community — and those values shaped who I am today. Now, I’m stepping forward to serve this region that gave so much to me and my family. I believe South Texas deserves a leader who never forgets where they came from, stands with President Trump on our border — and who always puts the people of this district first. The stakes in this race could not be higher. **TX-35 is one of the most hotly contested seats in America and it’s a top pickup opportunity for the America First movement. This district was written off for years as a guaranteed blue seat — but that’s changed. In 2024, President Trump carried this whole region after losing it in previous elections. This proves that South Texas is Trump country now. Families are rejecting the empty promises of woke radical liberal politicians. They are demanding new leadership that reflects our values — faith, freedom, hard work, and opportunity. I didn’t know it at the time, but by the Grace of God, I’ve spent my career preparing for this moment. I’ve built businesses and created jobs as an entrepreneur and small business owner. I’ve worked on the front lines of politics, helping flip neighboring TX-15 for the first time in a century and forging relationships with community leaders across South Texas. I’ve taught in the classroom as a college professor, invested in the next generation, and served on Capitol Hill as a Deputy Chief of Staff and Senior Advisor — where I fought daily to protect our values and way of life from the out-of-touch Washington elite. I’m proud to be a life-long conservative, I’m proud to stand for the America First agenda, and I’m proud to fight for the people of South Texas — because this district isn’t just where I live... It’s who I am. Democrats are going to come after me with everything they have. This seat is critical to their path to power, and they’ll flood it with outside blue state money from woke D.C. special interests who don’t have the slightest clue about Texans and our values. I need your help to build this campaign the right way: powered by Texans, backed by patriots who believe in faith, freedom, and opportunity, and focused on delivering real results for the hardworking families of our district. This campaign is about restoring common sense back to Washington. It’s about ensuring our borders stay secure, restoring energy independence, unleashing prosperity for working families, and preserving the timeless values that made this country great. If you believe South Texas deserves strong, conservative leadership... if you believe Congress needs more voices who won’t back down from a fight... if you believe it’s time to finish the job we started in South Texas... I’m asking you to stand with me today. I believe in this region and my people. I know that together, we can do something special. Thank you for your trust, support, and belief in this mission. name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen
subject: ✅ Delivered: EPA comments
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Grateful for your continued engagement
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4009604/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

Yesterday, we delivered **20,236** signatures directly to the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) in opposition to their proposal to rescind the endangerment finding, which provides the government with a legal foundation to regulate climate pollution from vehicles, power plants, and other sources.

Public comments are a crucial part of EPA’s rulemaking process. This groundswell of opposition will demonstrate how the Trump regime and its polluter pals are miles away from what Americans like you want for our climate, health, and future.

**Thank you, friend, for standing up for science.**

EPA still needs to complete its rulemaking process before making a final decision on the endangerment finding. And regardless of what happens, we’ll be in touch soon to explain what happens next and how you can get involved. (Spoiler alert: Trump’s EPA just proposed _another_ rule that allows it to abdicate its responsibility to protect our climate, and we’ll be asking you to take action again soon once we’ve developed our comment.)

This is a huge moment for public engagement, **but the fight is far from over** : Your $10 donation (or anything you can give) will help us keep up the pressure on EPA throughout the rulemaking process and whenever they attempt to shield polluters from accountability. [**Will you make a contribution today?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4009605/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CHIP IN](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4009606/87SdQ4wZ)

| With hope and gratitude, |

### Mattea Mrkusic
Senior Policy Lead

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Have you ever smelled a wastewater plant? Wouldn't recommend it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Government works best when it isn’t a distant authority, but when it shows up in people’s lives as a partner.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115767379/571400939/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzhiNzc2NS04ZTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jvm6EKjHZ88cot0_L8wtVrGpWFb41Rtn35S7Uk9mGws=)
Peter,

When I was 21, I put myself through college by working as an engineering intern at the Florida Department of Environmental Protection. My assignments ranged from inspecting wastewater plants (the smell was about what you'd expect) to testing drinking water in restaurants, bars, and office buildings.

At first, it wasn't easy. Many business owners weren't sure what to make of the young woman with a ponytail who showed up with her trusty clipboard, asking to check their systems. Honestly, I couldn't blame them.

I learned quickly that the job wasn't only about the tests or the paperwork. It was about being a friendly face that people could feel comfortable with, someone they could trust to hear their concerns. Once that connection was built, everything else became possible.

That lesson has never left me. Government works best when it isn't a distant authority, but when it shows up in people's lives as a partner.

That’s the approach I'll take with me to Congress. The people of Iowa's First District deserve a representative who is more than a walking title, they deserve a neighbor they can count on who will always put them first.

**[Will you help me bring that perspective to Washington by making a donation today? Chip in to join me in building a future rooted in trust and partnership>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115767381/571400941/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250922_FRFF_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250922_FRFF_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1c8b7765-8e98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzhiNzc2NS04ZTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jvm6EKjHZ88cot0_L8wtVrGpWFb41Rtn35S7Uk9mGws=)**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Only 22% of Americans believe the federal government will do the right thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
That’s why I introduced the Restoring Trust in Public Servants Act.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115768255/571403921/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2FkZjRlZS04ZTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdWp5uB-LT-gx1zgAlvuXgzZK3WQYfEhUMu_FurBs68=&emci=d05eb4ed-e297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d3adf4ee-8e98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Too often, Americans see politicians and government officials putting their own financial interests ahead of the people they serve.** They see headlines about Members of Congress trading stocks or cashing in on connections, and it erodes confidence that our government is working for them. **That's why I introduced the Restoring Trust in Public Servants Act.** This legislation sets one clear, uniform standard across all three branches of the federal government. It would ban members of Congress from:
* Stock ownership and trading
* Earning outside income and holding board memberships
* Lobbying for life

**At its heart, this bill is about something bigger than politics: it's about restoring trust.** Right now, trust in government is near historic lows. Only 22% of Americans believe the federal government will do the right thing. 7 in 10 Americans view Congress unfavorably. And 85% of Americans think elected officials don't care about people like them. _We can and must do better._ Trust is the scarcest resource we have, and without it, our democracy cannot survive. If you send me to do a job defined by our Constitution, you deserve to know I will put service above self, country above profit, and people above politics. That's the standard I hold myself to, and it's the standard this legislation would make law. clean_body: That’s why I introduced the Restoring Trust in Public Servants Act. | | | | Too often, Americans see politicians and government officials putting their own financial interests ahead of the people they serve. They see headlines about Members of Congress trading stocks or cashing in on connections, and it erodes confidence that our government is working for them. That's why I introduced the Restoring Trust in Public Servants Act. This legislation sets one clear, uniform standard across all three branches of the federal government. It would ban members of Congress from: Stock ownership and trading Earning outside income and holding board memberships Lobbying for life At its heart, this bill is about something bigger than politics: it's about restoring trust. Right now, trust in government is near historic lows. Only 22% of Americans believe the federal government will do the right thing. 7 in 10 Americans view Congress unfavorably. And 85% of Americans think elected officials don't care about people like them. We can and must do better. Trust is the scarcest resource we have, and without it, our democracy cannot survive. If you send me to do a job defined by our Constitution, you deserve to know I will put service above self, country above profit, and people above politics. That's the standard I hold myself to, and it's the standard this legislation would make law. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .** Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Our love story
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhyyl0v8tfbhxvlzwgyf09p1coaia1s6ajgbtg6apjixjldsqg15o4sa95mbltmanp0hwdyfjr5eh66ajmrep8&__stmp=t31rfd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31rfd&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31rfd&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhyyl0v8tfbhxvlzwgyf09p1coaia1s6ajgbtg6apjixjldsqg15o4sa95mbltmanp0hwdyfjr5eh66ajmrep8&__stmp=t31rfd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptgr6atpd6jl97qq6e1ctprf4m5b10t6tmh0rf20714kzat6cj4g1bmglsulhrqkzmw0pippt8su05117c3hrxncbr3a7swrrrr952tj3qv1jcxckhv4cbyhj2ye8121ktgda4injbb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31rfd&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfru2osw3kv2junxpehxg63865gt7mzyvde3pve6ubq6k8js3a0pg0fc5mfr272mhnwz61i8z2hxjewdzovhugmotbg1r1zssalh0sjt5k3936b6qp05ffvlews8zcefg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31rfd&__onlt=h)

NOTICE OF AFFILIATE CONNECTION: Be aware that the sender of this email may have a business or affiliate relationship with the parties mentioned and could earn commissions from purchases made through linked sites. Do not rely solely on this email’s information to judge the quality of endorsed products or services. Always conduct your own research before purchasing.

I’ll carry the torch you lit from here.We’ll all carry it from here.** 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / NOTICE OF AFFILIATE CONNECTION: Be aware that the sender of this email may have a business or affiliate relationship with the parties mentioned and could earn commissions from purchases made through linked sites. In-N-Out Burger has become a beloved community restaurant and a popular tourist destination. What began as a burger stand in
California in 1948 has become so much more than a fast food establishment.

President and owner of In-N-Out Burger Lynsi Snyder-Ellingson sat down with Moms for America to share the personal story that
comes along with this multi-generation family business. An outspoken Christian and mother of four, Lynsi is unashamed to speak
about her story and the importance of integrity in business today. Like, subscribe and share.

Dangerous Words Leading to Violence - Is it Really Both Sides?

The assassination of Charlie Kirk has brought on a wave of “bothsidesism” among media and pundits reporting on the tragedy. To
diminish the culpability of those who referred to Charlie as a fascist or a Nazi, they noted instead that both sides have said bad
things and that both sides have committed violent acts in the name of politics.

Many mainstream outlets claim that the Right is actually more prone to violence. But with a rash of ideological attacks, murders,
and attempted assassinations, especially during recent years, it’s time to count the receipts and see the truth. It’s really not
both sides.

clean_body: In-N-Out has become a beloved community restaurant and an iconic fast food chain. President Lynsi Snyder-Ellingson shares why integrity is still at the heart of what they do. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] September 23, 2025 • Newsletter In-N-Out Burger President on What Matters Most Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] In-N-Out Burger has become a beloved community restaurant and a popular tourist destination. What began as a burger stand in California in 1948 has become so much more than a fast food establishment. President and owner of In-N-Out Burger Lynsi Snyder-Ellingson sat down with Moms for America to share the personal story that comes along with this multi-generation family business. An outspoken Christian and mother of four, Lynsi is unashamed to speak about her story and the importance of integrity in business today. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Dangerous Words Leading to Violence - Is it Really Both Sides? The assassination of Charlie Kirk has brought on a wave of “bothsidesism” among media and pundits reporting on the tragedy. To diminish the culpability of those who referred to Charlie as a fascist or a Nazi, they noted instead that both sides have said bad things and that both sides have committed violent acts in the name of politics. Many mainstream outlets claim that the Right is actually more prone to violence. But with a rash of ideological attacks, murders, and attempted assassinations, especially during recent years, it’s time to count the receipts and see the truth. It’s really not both sides. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: what Trump said about me from the Oval
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, this is just ridiculous.
Donald Trump is having a meltdown about his own Justice Department not bringing criminal charges against one of his perceived political enemies.
Now he's pushed out the US attorney that he himself nominated just a few months ago — and he used the fact that I supported the guy to trash him .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Here’s what Trump said to a reporter in the Oval Office when asked about firing the US Attorney for the Eastern District of Virginia, who was in charge of the investigation against New York Attorney General Letitia James:
“He was approved by two Democrat senators, who, in my opinion, are among the worst... Warner and Kaine. Two bad guys. Bad senators. They do a terrible job for the people of Virginia.”
Come on, Donald. You can do better than that!
But seriously — if we want to talk about who’s doing a terrible job for the people they’re supposed to lead, Donald Trump is #1 on the list:
His idiotic (and illegal!) tariffs are skyrocketing the cost of living for people all across the country. His party is on the verge of shutting down the government which could have disastrous effects on our economy. And he’s using the power of the presidency to trample on free speech — our most basic right as Americans!
We all know this Trump administration is a disaster. The question is, what are we going to do about it?
From the Senate, I’m using every single legislative tool at my disposal to fight back against his dangerous policies and push my GOP colleagues to either join me or get on the record.
In Virginia, we’re fighting to flip all three statewide offices blue this November and deliver a loud and clear rebuke to Trump and his cronies.
And in 2026, we need to send another message and take this reckless GOP out of their trifecta of government control. We can do it — but it’s going to take every one of us standing up and getting involved.
If you disagree with Trump that I’m a “bad guy” and a “bad senator” — please join me in this work today. Pitch in any amount today to get ready to win in Virginia in 2025 and all across the country in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Thanks for everything you do. Let’s go win.
—Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

clean_body: [] Derek, this is just ridiculous. Donald Trump is having a meltdown about his own Justice Department not bringing criminal charges against one of his perceived political enemies. Now he's pushed out the US attorney that he himself nominated just a few months ago — and he used the fact that I supported the guy to trash him . [] Here’s what Trump said to a reporter in the Oval Office when asked about firing the US Attorney for the Eastern District of Virginia, who was in charge of the investigation against New York Attorney General Letitia James: “He was approved by two Democrat senators, who, in my opinion, are among the worst... Warner and Kaine. Two bad guys. Bad senators. They do a terrible job for the people of Virginia.” Come on, Donald. You can do better than that! But seriously — if we want to talk about who’s doing a terrible job for the people they’re supposed to lead, Donald Trump is #1 on the list: His idiotic (and illegal!) tariffs are skyrocketing the cost of living for people all across the country. His party is on the verge of shutting down the government which could have disastrous effects on our economy. And he’s using the power of the presidency to trample on free speech — our most basic right as Americans! We all know this Trump administration is a disaster. The question is, what are we going to do about it? From the Senate, I’m using every single legislative tool at my disposal to fight back against his dangerous policies and push my GOP colleagues to either join me or get on the record. In Virginia, we’re fighting to flip all three statewide offices blue this November and deliver a loud and clear rebuke to Trump and his cronies. And in 2026, we need to send another message and take this reckless GOP out of their trifecta of government control. We can do it — but it’s going to take every one of us standing up and getting involved. If you disagree with Trump that I’m a “bad guy” and a “bad senator” — please join me in this work today. Pitch in any amount today to get ready to win in Virginia in 2025 and all across the country in 2026. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $20 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thanks for everything you do. Let’s go win. —Tim Kaine Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. name: Sen. Jeff Bridges
subject: JUST IN: Congressman Joe Neguse Endorses Jeff Bridges
body:
Jeff brings both financial expertise and deep Colorado values to everything he does, and that’s why

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc1c32800696/get-more-smarter-on-colorados-budget-10369544?e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=cf971b66d1&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi there,
I’ve known Joe Neguse for decades. We first worked together at a scrappy then-little-known voter registration group called New Era Colorado. Even back then, it was clear Joe was going places. Today Joe represents Northern Colorado and the Western Slope in the U.S. Congress, and I am running to be Colorado’s next Treasurer.
**I am grateful and honored to share that Congressman Joe Neguse has endorsed my campaign for Treasurer.**
---
|
---
| | "I’ve worked with Jeff Bridges for decades, and I can tell you he’s the real deal. Jeff has always understood that budgets are about more than numbers—they’re about people. As Chair of the Joint Budget Committee, he’s proven he can balance the books while still investing in what matters most to the families I represent in Northern Colorado and across the Western Slope. **He brings both financial expertise and deep Colorado values to everything he does, and that’s why I’m proud to endorse him for Treasurer." —Congressman Joe Neguse**
Even with news this big, our race won’t get a lot of attention in the press. Most voters will only know what our campaign can share with them. I would deeply appreciate any support you can give today to help us build the momentum we need to win!
---
| [CLICK TO DONATE](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=7ac26fe821&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
| | If you’re free, join us in [Denver this Thursday](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=783db55410&e=b48bb2b4f4), or in [Boulder next Tuesday.](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=b7c691c9d5&e=b48bb2b4f4) I’d love to see you there.
Talk soon,
P.S. We have more great endorsements on the way. Should be an exciting end to the quarter!
---
|
---

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: The team is going hard this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
Wanted to make sure this didn’t get lost in the shuffle. The team is going hard this week! They're training up volunteers, knocking doors, making call
| | | | | Hey y’all, Wanted to make sure this didn’t get lost in the shuffle. The team is going hard this week! They're training up volunteers, knocking doors, making calls, and building the people power it’s gonna take to win. Check out my email below, and if you can pitch in with your time or a few bucks, it’ll go a long way toward helping us close strong. See below for volunteering and voting information and **[click here to donate anything you can afford to help us cross the finish line.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8jkcJpbkPENzhMO7ARNuxQ~~/AAUS1hA~/95ENEBaUkoAimojv-rtqO7YVVKa3CXtWW8bHb4Sxfphb49uq_p1sQ5PvF8CJThs2gPBcX20xukQ4CBhAqh_2W1BoS0UMOwJVQg7DqDuW3do2e3vFBNWa-rW9D9M2PZHnSU6BXDFgTpPK7SdaYaDqI5MlYY_Bzh1K_bjLcKWqkfzRiZKUJhERwvC5wHU-fhxmT18SifjKEkMxSvPyDwdYjyGUXeYZpanaqqOLTQUDiEdaqz59q8uoUD6rSov_T2-v69x2E6bFCUqRh9QxkhaNNg~~)** Appreciate you,
Vincent \----Original-Message---- I’ll be straight with you, Peter: _Washington’s a mess._ Folks up there are more interested in protecting their own power than serving the people who sent them. That’s why I’m running. I’m ready to clean house. **And as of today, we're 15 days away from election day.** **[**DONATE $15**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/HcSFTAGN-oPUH5JUQr-AEw~~/AAUS1hA~/lkfi3AR39HUXFzcLgeHXW8VxOJnjaC2d2Z11EXtyhiLYgBvU5ridYvov1xyGKDqupVrkQ0e7WnBzKhLdxpWFyVOBg7KiWBgE8eJAVqgOGXNKqRprlB5knJhgSTO1pjVwMcBpsY1X9tRGvoIWubIAzfj8OeHpJiLKlmFK3zvy025YA0jrEkX_0mlWwDHqAaDD8Zt8RrZXMyT9Jkie71MpyyiXHN8-LsL6NsvF-oQZYrUhcBUNcW4pK--XzWgQh_zEYFs_hBHNzk_ilKS61SkdFlaYl_bLqOe8dQWHuSv95Jk~)** I can’t do it alone, Peter. This movement only works if we’ve got real power behind it like neighbors willing to knock doors, pick up the phone, and talk to folks across TN-07. And it takes resources to keep that fight going. **Here’s what we’re organizing this week:**
* Volunteer Training Sessions
* Community canvassing
* Phone Banks
* Digital outreach teams

The political establishment isn’t going to fix itself. If we want change, we’ve got to roll up our sleeves and make it happen. **[And, right now we’re just 15 days away from election day and 8 days away from our end-of-quarter deadline. Can I count on you today to chip in anything you can afford today?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8jkcJpbkPENzhMO7ARNuxQ~~/AAUS1hA~/95ENEBaUkoAimojv-rtqO7YVVKa3CXtWW8bHb4Sxfphb49uq_p1sQ5PvF8CJThs2gPBcX20xukQ4CBhAqh_2W1BoS0UMOwJVQg7DqDuW3do2e3vFBNWa-rW9D9M2PZHnSU6BXDFgTpPK7SdaYaDqI5MlYY_Bzh1K_bjLcKWqkfzRiZKUJhERwvC5wHU-fhxmT18SifjKEkMxSvPyDwdYjyGUXeYZpanaqqOLTQUDiEdaqz59q8uoUD6rSov_T2-v69x2E6bFCUqRh9QxkhaNNg~~)** **[**VOLUNTEER**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/g8is-XoSRY9lxgKiLcPaHA~~/AAUS1hA~/6oWHzZ_LS_raFKr-YWzd2x5lj73fv7SgRtjCdY4ypqWGc9VwoX7jpkAYZW2k-Ws1VG9eObBKeS4HY5JAKF2F_p3o1hLojoLoVhLeFeAjngQgSq72LVSBEAwOo9jRSEID5_vSVtAyGhdcjYaLWXCLIwBrOmooagzj9r10JSw33r0~)** **[**DONATE TODAY**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8jkcJpbkPENzhMO7ARNuxQ~~/AAUS1hA~/95ENEBaUkoAimojv-rtqO7YVVKa3CXtWW8bHb4Sxfphb49uq_p1sQ5PvF8CJThs2gPBcX20xukQ4CBhAqh_2W1BoS0UMOwJVQg7DqDuW3do2e3vFBNWa-rW9D9M2PZHnSU6BXDFgTpPK7SdaYaDqI5MlYY_Bzh1K_bjLcKWqkfzRiZKUJhERwvC5wHU-fhxmT18SifjKEkMxSvPyDwdYjyGUXeYZpanaqqOLTQUDiEdaqz59q8uoUD6rSov_T2-v69x2E6bFCUqRh9QxkhaNNg~~)** **[**EARLY VOTE LOCATIONS**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/7VjDLaJ7GO0IblSn5uLEYQ~~/AAUS1hA~/x8KHPEjavXGbxBVBp4iRdkJ_gI4-bdg4-YIwLdUXFYZAXbSZc1yY19xtzA_7GmVBx7GdKvQRw61MfegftP7V7_vwD3U8QLxcemnLBzSaApIWr0nprJwhBEoqksE8Tu_9OvxnPykaTpwHWtQBiKSizQ~~)** Let’s get to work. _Vincent Dixie_ [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/931l08GS3PMXEvcPU_zTwA~~/AAUS1hA~/lkfi3AR39HUXFzcLgeHXW8VxOJnjaC2d2Z11EXtyhiLYgBvU5ridYvov1xyGKDqupVrkQ0e7WnBzKhLdxpWFyVOBg7KiWBgE8eJAVqgOGXNKqRprlB5knJhgSTO1pjVwMcBpsY1X9tRGvoIWubIAzfj8OeHpJiLKlmFK3zvy025YA0jrEkX_0mlWwDHqAaDD8Zt8RrZXMyT9Jkie71Mpy65S2tEg-UesRZyOAaBTb9mM2DiEIr5z9K-WLBDnGLWzgvEY4W4ObRW7VYB-VIBztcJFsChPdcuej9ukd7mFfPQ~)

name: Sen. Mark Kelly
subject: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Mark Kelly.
I want to talk through a difficult decision I had to make about six years ago.
We were a few years into Donald Trump’s first term, and Mitch McConnell was the Senate Majority Leader. Gabby and I both knew we couldn’t just sit on the sidelines as our country went further and further down the wrong path. We had to do something.
So, together, we decided to launch a campaign for Arizona’s seat in the U.S. Senate. I didn’t know if I could win, or if anyone would support me, and I had no idea if my team would be able to raise the resources we’d need to win.
But one by one, people came on board. $5 here, $10 there. More than a million people donated and volunteered to help me, and in November of 2020, we won that campaign.
Around that same time, Jon Ossoff was making a similar decision. He went on to win one of the closest, toughest, most expensive races in the country down in Georgia. Over the last several years, it’s been an honor to work beside him in the Senate. Jon’s been a constant ally, and I’m proud to call him a friend.
He’s up for reelection next year, he’s in for an incredibly tough fight, and it’s absolutely critical that he wins. To do it, we all need to help.
[**So, I’m humbly asking you: Can you make a donation to help Jon raise the resources it’ll take to win?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=1&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.Tufhdl&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=20&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)**
---

---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-sep25._DWXhw&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=22&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.up4j6G&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=23&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.5_INH0&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=24&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-sep25._rS0Up&refcode=em250923-1-subs&t=25&akid=804%2E5691347%2EgIn_WK)**
---
****
We need more Jon Ossoffs in the Senate, not less.
Thank you in advance for chipping in.
Mark

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Urgent request as we face this FEC deadline
body:
We don’t want to show any weakness.
**[Our campaign’s first FEC end-of-quarter filing deadline is just days away. Split a donation of any size between our team and Wes Moore to help meet our goal before time runs out.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250923-1?refcode=em-20250923-1&refcode2=658_1086043_5di1YX&akid=658%2E1086043%2E5di1YX)**
---
Hello Peter,
I’m reaching out about our upcoming filing deadline — the first of our campaign so far — but I wanted to make sure you had some important context:
**Nationwide, Republicans and GOP-aligned groups have been outraising Democrats in the lead-up to next year’s midterm elections, and our election in North Carolina is expected to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history.**
My GOP opponent and his allies will be forced to make spending decisions they may not want to make based on what we can raise now, Peter. With all that in mind, it’s even more important for us to show our financial strength in this report.
This is the most consequential Senate election of 2026, and if we win here, Democrats have the chance to take back the majority and stop the far-right’s extreme agenda. Meeting our fundraising goals is key to our chances of success in this toss-up race.
But we have a long way to go to hit our end-of-quarter target, and we’re running out of time to get there.
**[We can’t risk allowing my GOP opponent to outraise us, so I need your help right away. Does a contribution, split between our campaign and Wes Moore, fit in your budget today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250923-1?refcode=em-20250923-1&refcode2=658_1086043_5di1YX&akid=658%2E1086043%2E5di1YX)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250923-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250923-1&refcode2=658_1086043_5di1YX&akid=658%2E1086043%2E5di1YX)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250923-1&t=1&refcode2=658_1086043_5di1YX&akid=658%2E1086043%2E5di1YX)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: Medicaid funds for children = “waste, fraud, and abuse”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Support Roy Cooper’s work to defend kids’ health care. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115771791/571414040/823540626?refcode=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYzMjExNC05Njk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzSHkqKEdua-umNeFgaFkhBjO8DVRTnYcL9lS440gmc=&emci=4686f572-e897-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
Trump’s cuts to Medicaid just keep getting worse, Peter: This time, it’s our children who will suffer. Reporting from NPR just this month revealed that “children’s hospitals collectively stand to lose billions of dollars in revenue once Trump's wide-ranging tax and spending law is fully enacted.” Without these dollars, kids everywhere won’t get the care they need. Children make up nearly half of all enrollees in Medicaid and other public health care programs. _Medicaid keeps kids healthy._ Depriving them of that care is just wrong. **[As Governor, Roy Cooper oversaw the Medicaid Expansion that helped over 675,000 North Carolinians get covered for health care — and as Senator, he’ll continue working to give even more folks access to care. If you’re ready to send a Medicaid champion to Congress, please give $5, $25, or whatever you can to support our campaign today.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115771793/571414042/-1743631236?refcode=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYzMjExNC05Njk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzSHkqKEdua-umNeFgaFkhBjO8DVRTnYcL9lS440gmc=)** Stripping away the ability to see a doctor from children is dangerous and downright cruel, but our opposition doesn’t care. Our kids deserve better: someone who will work tirelessly in Washington to protect their well-being. **[We refuse to play budget cut games with our children’s lives. So we’re humbly asking, Peter: Please give today to power our campaign and defend Medicaid.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115771797/571414045/-1743631236?refcode=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.19f32114-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWYzMjExNC05Njk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzSHkqKEdua-umNeFgaFkhBjO8DVRTnYcL9lS440gmc=)** Thank you,
Team Cooper

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My first time reaching out after the car crash.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1c37954db0541b788491dd5f8128ea4&_e=WrcVCPgp6Kgqao-9fW0v3Mb-N5uQBaR2qC9XDTCwvwQPvpbOpjzgjjcx1goW1CZj81fg9ncs_4cMt4UJgt_7OGJaU_o6oc0MTUpqppzJL4GnPANaaiMXxCWIk8bhE8a9w-UzldOse-oZlIajMi7EtZi9H647A2G9DVuYAojO5VzuvBKzYTT8y0Qaoiv7vtZ4NqE3NK7CR70PO9nLGY6LHwB1BAyWkJnMmgxcSiXtdTsv1dTiTw_aEdkG0j9C4pKSsZCVmQ9PDeiF-OvTG60qYqOk0Mv1DmEwglodGFEow3aXG3Y0eclUVjhG5Y69HNEZ9ZFzWIKE2KLkyeLqsVUAAaj_dKshYZrdJx2LNO8A7k0aGYXFOs0TcwJQ8IephBT5ft0gVzXbl1FKhazEmelPL3aTQKSzEDi0_faQIpiCDwrbCN3OlYbDhUzniBIYjGj6LTgDQ56dDMNyaWplsk4OBJQttUHQ4iA9D3mEsoWSy9cKf_uhlpZcMtXbmljHQDVihcdYdadmcLlRAUMpzYOEXDu5EvRfwV8QVZArRp3Y_Y26RuFZeoEHeFDo2Vbdlpcw4Bxz5aomAqahXUD9Ya4hKo0HGA0YIhBotArHmqHr2SZUJAtFahivFUhDfIG3Cj_18cXLRYwS6ybYRaOW8qI5aA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d1c37954db0541b788491dd5f8128ea4&_e=WrcVCPgp6Kgqao-9fW0v3Mb-N5uQBaR2qC9XDTCwvwQPvpbOpjzgjjcx1goW1CZj81fg9ncs_4cMt4UJgt_7OGJaU_o6oc0MTUpqppzJL4GnPANaaiMXxCWIk8bhE8a9w-UzldOse-oZlIajMi7EtZi9H647A2G9DVuYAojO5VzuvBKzYTT8y0Qaoiv7vtZ4NqE3NK7CR70PO9nLGY6LH5m14hKShEKCUirH5HcGXYd_-uY29xro3QXSpe6OOuIUqk6pPeCTkGPYL7WlgRQxFX-jk325lLwBElxP6NDcv32vlX1G0JYlWkIshuOcK0lNUC2fCzxTDqYFPS0FBeoQk--iO_w8MHt5Os03G7r82bUwPdCOpjC4efDm5YMLou_CwTOcsNXTNngHs_sGmrjnfhVUBDTAOyTvl7AeWJY3heh9Si55sM-da1BX3s90PL-1ktOqbIfnSoeQIEOKoNVIm6iyGjPURwvO6s2tGu3OHQk1yR-LE-arJoOQS6IY9yB91UNajHwvobY1wZ-Zf8yaY66I3zstWwixZ3eZ2wtutbm0JYkuosNNGOJS-fHAQ5ijgIejK3hp_dlG34srnaR78UL9lUMNQq1IVqauuPOavDGpOfOSLvxE9RHwTK3uAy_CM9oYLyFBbxk_m55QNIDsTg%3D%3D)
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__

clean_body: I wanted you to hear this directly from me. Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Jimmy Kimmel: Not a Victim
body:
Christine Flowers | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Jimmy Kimmel is no martyr**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb0ecdecc4&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| "Jimmy Kimmel is not a very funny man. He reminds me of the prep school boys I used to teach back in the 90s, with their snorty kind of humor, that ironic “I’m so smart, ha ha” type of affect that annoys the heck out of people who have to teach them AP French on a Friday afternoon. They weren’t bad kids, not at all. They reminded me of my three younger brothers, who had that same “I’m cool, really I am” attitude. It’s kind of cute in a pathetic way. But it stops being cute when you are an adult making millions of dollars mocking people you don’t like. That is not even funny..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0ebb3da88c&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About Christine Flowers:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=92673cad01&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Christine Flowers** is a lifelong Philadelphian, who has a deep attachment to the region. She has been practicing immigration law for over twenty-five years with a specialization in asylum and refugee law, after having taught high school French and Spanish at area schools. In addition to her legal practice, Christine is a syndicated columnist whose opinion pieces appear in newspapers across the country, as well as a regular participant in local radio and television programs that focus on current affairs.

A graduate of Merion Mercy Academy, Bryn Mawr College and Villanova Law School, her local roots run deep. This can best be expressed by the fact that her mood is directly related to how well the Eagles, Flyers, Sixers and Phillies are playing at any given moment. Christine is an aunt to one human, two Black Labs and a bearded dragon.
---
|
---

name: Olivia Field
subject: can Chris count you in, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115773077/571418071/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJjOGQ1Ny05Njk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnKiddO_PYbw77v0bnq0wSm8zxUXzjTeWXcMsc54QcU=&emci=1e91854e-7f95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=dc2c8d57-9698-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, it’s Olivia, Chris’s Campaign Manager. I’ll be honest, the last few months have been heavy. Watching Trump and Republicans pass a bill to strip Americans of their healthcare and food assistance, attack veterans’ earned care, threaten Social Security, and hand massive tax giveaways to corporations and the ultra-rich—it’s been rough. Through it all, Chris has been fighting every single day in Congress to restore the American Dream, protect the critical programs we rely on, and to be a voice for hardworking people. Seeing him fight relentlessly makes me so glad to be a part of this team, and I hope you are too. With so much going on in Washington, it’s never been more important for Chris’s supporters to have his back—not just today, but tomorrow, and in the months ahead.
