subject: Would this woman still be alive today?
disclaimer_text: paid for by radical billionaire George Soros
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e13719030/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvV1VrakpGUFdUWQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsbXBCU2E0ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNlekJTeWdlaFkxV29scw/gaNLJKQ/s9n04c726d1)
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Patriot, Like you, I’m horrified by the recent violent attacks across our country – and one question keeps running through my mind...
---
| | Would this young woman still be alive today if progressive prosecutors had kept a violent criminal off the streets? You and I will never know the answer – but I can tell you with certainty that Americans across the country are in danger every single day because woke prosecutors are sending good police officers to prison instead of violent criminals.
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Progressive prosecutors like the District Attorney in Austin, Texas – Jose Garza – whose election was bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros. Since getting elected in 2020, Garza has faithfully done Soros’ bidding, bringing charges against dozens of cops. But there’s one police officer Garza has made it his mission to destroy...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **DEFEND THIS OFFICER** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Officer Chance Bretches is a decorated police officer. A loving husband. An amazing father. He volunteers his time back in the community he swore an oath to protect. **Chance is everything woke leftists hate.** That’s the only logical explanation why**** Garza has launched not one but TWO WITCH HUNTS against Chance. Multiple investigations prove Chance followed his training and department protocols to a tee. But Garza won’t back down. **[That’s why I’m rallying pro-police patriots across America to help Chance fight back by donating $35, $50, $100, or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** You see, Chance faces life in prison in two separate assault charges that Garza has outrageously brought against him:
---
1\. In 2019, before Garza was in office, Chance was dispatched to arrest a known drug trafficker. The trafficker resisted arrest forcing Chance to use physical force to handcuff him. He was cleared by SIX different internal investigations. But upon taking office in 2021, Garza charged him with aggravated assault. 2\. In May 2020 during the George Floyd riots, the Austin Police Department assigned Chance to perform crowd control and issued him a non-lethal beanbag launcher. When a rioter began throwing rocks at officers, Chance discharged his beanbag launcher. But a medic stepped in front of him and took a direct hit to the hand, losing a finger. It was a freak accident. But Garza charged Chance with assault once again.
---
Now Chance is scheduled to go on trial in the second case in less than 90 days which is why your support of LELDF today is so important. We estimate a trial like this will cost at least $150,000. That does not take into account any appeals or the first case which still has not been scheduled for trial. [**Can I count on you to pitch in just $35, $50, or $100 to save this hero?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) I don’t have to tell you what happens to police officers in prison... This political witch hunt against a good cop – an outstanding man – is a slap in the face to every American who respects the rule of law. And those Americans – you and me – need to stand up and fight back against the progressives now more than ever. Thank you for standing with Officer Chance Bretches and all the wrongly accused officers LELDF supports.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

You and I will never know the answer – but I can tell you with certainty that Americans across the country are in danger every single day because woke prosecutors are sending good police officers to prison instead of violent criminals. | | | Progressive prosecutors like the District Attorney in Austin, Texas – Jose Garza – whose election was bought and paid for by radical billionaire George Soros. Since getting elected in 2020, Garza has faithfully done Soros’ bidding, bringing charges against dozens of cops. But there’s one police officer Garza has made it his mission to destroy... Officer Chance Bretches is a decorated police officer. A loving husband. An amazing father. He volunteers his time back in the community he swore an oath to protect. Chance is everything woke leftists hate. That’s the only logical explanation why** Garza has launched not one but TWO WITCH HUNTS against Chance. Multiple investigations prove Chance followed his training and department protocols to a tee. But Garza won’t back down. You see, Chance faces life in prison in two separate assault charges that Garza has outrageously brought against him: 1\. In 2019, before Garza was in office, Chance was dispatched to arrest a known drug trafficker. The trafficker resisted arrest forcing Chance to use physical force to handcuff him. He was cleared by SIX different internal investigations. But upon taking office in 2021, Garza charged him with aggravated assault. 2\. In May 2020 during the George Floyd riots, the Austin Police Department assigned Chance to perform crowd control and issued him a non-lethal beanbag launcher. name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie answered the call. Now I will too.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0jwap01epiatjt7y2tivf7s3m46n45hubpszd6svqep81inw0mk6cfy9ssfk80xwfj4y71cbumicur5t2iwwsr0b1r14&__stmp=t31uzr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31uzr&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31uzr&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=o40io4oxrrl4372b3owoz4jylkktsiu9czzgxuxf9py3zoh90ot288hizxkhe22d0opl6uatep0r0b7bz6ff6h3otstlpic7ohevykkqp5xre5bbpmjphpqjwsw8vk5quaquaw08ugzip6tay3243av2gwm2iz1uxl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31uzr&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=64luld8ccj8x0mccd8rmqjfi131mkoetyfjqqqc5l4c9lxwsrhmtyvaaddrechqvxeczf9ak0z8g2kqj0837ndp592e2t99ws9sthzmoyxus4x4zgpqivkrckal6opryad24hmg8avwk44sngtbptgv9dafx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t31uzr&__onlt=h)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Personal update on my recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8c0a7aefc59412c996b3cd256eaf909&_e=B8Rb8Trf5nuaVjM8p_sk-llOPfBJdmKqwV7SxP517kmhEddS_Itccca_oStmqGUj5dj8LiME6DX--ypK8SBdN6HribAIWgEL9tJModM9G8sAXmHlrrNDGWgRDNUfLm7BuiGCxvppM3Aqy4hFNymGJoaxqExwrUchFY_ProId1hQkQWSiWyHtDcfBEoE1UIbXYaZy26bbA4vnnktF-PrQmu_5S_daoUj7PnjmnOHvlEmkrYhlOWkit2yd8Lbfp4kSqRxkvyKkAcUBfeDUp13KumQu4pyk1c02m_Fq__UczDojIgp6OfprurgY55qJ8sHx_ykzpVcsutX5dsr1B31hwDoob_E1Lt0xPt8r1jNgRTy9HKijn3ErBU3Xr1ElmAtslF0-dug1v2LDwTfdCehCg_IwraRGUR-HdD0aMw7Y8SD1lhot2Y6fWnC7Al5wjGfxWkcqS8kJsSDs3FqAZ0bz2BMuALkwEEVnZMWdUenC9YMvMNAjvcMEInbPhfntGHnQICd_ikuXcmyqdirSiVyZRMGm1m0QFjooxRnWTcjVCRsxAsgM0vhHX2-bkNrm4aYey7Hkt1PRtMPGmoPtf_-N6Oyj2sXO9Ft2S_w2ohXVgBJ--DR9wBQDCTmC4y9SQZJzV43rfI_ELz_CpuI5w3ohNQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**

# Trump SAVAGES the UN for its failures in barnstorming speech
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/53f33132-8b8e-4840-9b08-9e4301259d3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump slammed the UN after a series of failures as soon as he walked in the building. Trump was at the UN to deliver a major foreign policy address but the escalator broke as soon as he and First Lady Melania stepped on it.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a72eed29-5e2b-40ab-97f9-312fd939a645?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**The teleprompter broke as Trump began speaking where he switched over to his notes:**
"Whoever is operating this teleprompter is in big trouble."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/62b0fa46-f5e5-4482-a972-107cf087ed5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_"These are the two things I got from the United Nations, a bad escalator and a bad teleprompter."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4b79a5dc-f160-4fef-a0e6-11d872c34444?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Trump then issued a broadside of criticisms at the United Nations over immigration:**
_"The United Nations is funding an assault on Western countries and their borders... The UN is supposed to stop invasions, not create them, and not finance them."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7ae6327b-7d2d-4d42-840f-0530b4737dd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Trump bluntly criticized the Green movement:**
_"Climate change -- it's the greatest con-job ever perpetrated on the world."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a78b74c-e4b3-44ae-a9df-82e57b195c03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**He highlighted Germany in particular:**
_"Germany was being led down a very sick path, both on immigration by the way and on energy. They were going green, and they were going bankrupt."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5a4e6fd1-ecc8-4267-9c3a-72e3f49c0d35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/ef13fd21-9121-4f66-92fc-6793a73aa7d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The $1Trillion Mineral Push Just Made This Battery Company Unstoppable](https://substack.com/redirect/ef13fd21-9121-4f66-92fc-6793a73aa7d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef13fd21-9121-4f66-92fc-6793a73aa7d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Right now, almost every battery in America runs on **lithium**.
Your phone. Your laptop. Your car. Even the power grids storing clean energy.
But here's the catch: **China controls over 80% of the world 's lithium**.9
That means America's future is tied to a supply chain we don't control. If China slows exports or raises prices...we're stuck.
Washington knows this can't continue. That's why the White House just launched a **$1 trillion push to bring mineral production back home.** 9 10
The goal: secure America's energy independence and cut China out of the equation.1
This shift opens the door for a new winner.
Because while everyone else fights over lithium, one overlooked solution is ready right now... **sodium-ion batteries**.1
Here's why they're a game changer:
* Sodium is**1,400x more abundant** **than lithium** , with significant reserves located in the U.S9
* Batteries can be made at a **fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6**
* They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1 9

And one company has already cracked the code:**Next Thing Technologies.**
Their batteries scale from**massive grid storage projects** to**affordable $100/month home backup systems.** 1 9
That means they can power everything from America's infrastructure to your neighborhood.1
The timing couldn't be better.
Billions in federal funding are flowing into U.S. mineral projects. Manufacturing is coming back home. And America is determined to break free from China's supply chains.1
Next Thing Technologies is positioned to be the **backbone of this new energy era**.1
Over **7,800 investors** have already backed them with **$7M+**.3

# Iryna Zarutska's memorial draws hundreds as Democrats fail to stall crime bill reforms
Hundreds **[gathered Monday night](https://substack.com/redirect/e0be737a-5947-495e-895d-8d202d02c6a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/e0be737a-5947-495e-895d-8d202d02c6a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in Charlotte's South End for a candlelight vigil honoring Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska, fatally stabbed near a light rail station, as mourners sang, prayed and demanded city action to prevent future tragedies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7193607a-3995-4ee1-9311-1154549fe52f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Vigil's poignant silence honors** : The two-minute pause symbolized delay in aid after Zarutska's stabbing, drawing tears from diverse crowd of strangers and locals.
* **[Emotional tributes echo grief](https://substack.com/redirect/88ab3473-b3f0-4d84-88c0-02032507e266?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[:](https://substack.com/redirect/88ab3473-b3f0-4d84-88c0-02032507e266?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Speakers like Addul Ali saw his daughter in Zarutska's face, while Bart Noonan decried a "city falling apart" in raw calls for reform.
* **Global resonance unites mourners** : Rev. Vasily Rudnitsky hailed her death touching "Ukraine and the whole world," inspiring prayers and songs in solidarity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dd3144a2-a326-4900-b262-82724bb8c231?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/96fbcc90-6511-4709-9cfc-dceea532f67b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Community pushes memorial change** : Attendees urge renaming light rail station after Zarutska, tying to looming city council vote on post-stabbing police enforcement.

**" Iryna's Law" passed by NC State Senate as Dems try to block passage**
Republican North Carolina state senators **[swiftly passed "Iryna's Law"](https://substack.com/redirect/485315a6-1c9f-45e1-be79-6c6f5e1098db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday, reviving the death penalty with strict appeal timelines and pretrial monitoring in response to last month's random fatal stabbing of 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska aboard a Charlotte light rail.
* **Reviving Death Penalty Swiftly** : The Senate bill imposes two-year appeal limits and mandates executions by 2027, aiming to end decades of judicial delays burdening taxpayers and eroding public trust in justice.
* **Targeted Violent Offense Reforms** : A new category for serious crimes requires GPS tracking and cashless bail elimination, specifically aggravating penalties for attacks on public transit to deter random violence.
* **Mental Health Mandates Enforced** : Suspects with long criminal histories face compulsory evaluations before pretrial release, addressing gaps exposed by the attacker's documented issues in Zarutska's case.
* **Democrats attempt to stall** : Democratic senators attempted to **[stall the passage](https://substack.com/redirect/76aab88c-462d-4b01-9e6b-a75adb727146?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of the bill by **[refusing to vote on it.](https://substack.com/redirect/54e22cae-d517-4aa2-9675-934b599cf782?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
* * *

# Google makes MAJOR U-turn, will reinstate accounts it banned over Covid and election content
Google announced Tuesday it **[will reinstate YouTube accounts](https://substack.com/redirect/ba4cf086-7819-4387-bfc1-9b0aee98838a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** banned for COVID-19 and election speech, admitting in a House Judiciary Committee document that Biden administration pressure led to unwarranted censorship of non-violative content.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f4426d65-d182-491c-99ac-4665b4baaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Biden Pressure Exposed:** Senior White House officials repeatedly urged Alphabet to remove pandemic-related videos that broke no rules, fostering a chilling political atmosphere on misinformation.
* **Key Creators Targeted:** High-profile conservatives like Dan Bongino (banned in 2022 over mask claims), Sebastian Gorka, and Steve Bannon are now eligible for platform return after thriving on alternatives like Rumble.
* **Policy Pivot Embraced:** With now defunct COVID and election rules scrapped; YouTube hails conservative voices as vital to civic debate in its free-expression commitment.
* **Investigations Yield Change:** Years of GOP probes into Big Tech have yielded similar reversals from Meta on Facebook and Instagram.
* * *
* * *

# Mamdani throw "Little Communist" tantrum over Kimmel suspension, it backfires spectacularly
New York City mayoral front-runner Socialist Zohran Mamdani abruptly withdrew Monday from a WABC-TV town hall, protesting ABC's suspension of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" who goes back on air Tuesday night.
* **Kimmel's MAGA Critique Ignites Fury** : Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel drew ire by tying conservative activist Charlie Kirk's alleged killer to the MAGA movement, prompting ABC parent Disney to yank his show.
* **Hollywood Icons Rally for Free Speech** : Oscar winners Robert DeNiro, Jane Fonda, Meryl Streep and Frances McDormand joined an ACLU-led letter condemning the suspension as a "dark moment" for First Amendment rights and journalists' livelihoods.
* **Disney Recants** : It emerged later that the suspension was a decision by Disney not the FCC because of Kimmel's refusal to apologize and the show is slated to be broadcast again Tuesday leaving Mamdani in a bind.
* **Rivals Slam Mamdani's Protest Move** : Andrew Cuomo's campaign called the walkout a dodge from local scrutiny, while the White House mocked Mamdani as a "Little Communist" too scared for live TV defense of his socialist policies.

* * *
* * *
# McDonalds fires the first shot in the Breakfast Wars
McDonald's **[reignited its $5 Extra Value Meals](https://substack.com/redirect/a2dbda45-c921-43c3-939d-3c82019500cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the first time since 2019, bundling breakfast, lunch and dinner options with 15% savings to lure inflation-weary diners, sparking rival chains like IHOP and Burger King to unleash competing discount barrages nationwide this month.
* **Value Meals Resurrected Boldly** : McDonald's revived eight bundled options across dayparts, slashing costs 15% versus a la carte buys to counter stagnant traffic amid rising wages and supply woes.
* **IHOP Counters Swiftly** : IHOP debuted a daily $6 breakfast menu with four full meals plus sides, available 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. at U.S. spots, prioritizing "abundance without compromise" per exec Lawrence Kim.
* **Jack in the Box Upsizes** : Starting October 1, larger 25% bigger drink cups and price cuts drop over 60% of combos under $10, reviving Monster Tacos at two-for-$3 to boost affordability.
* **Industry Experts Foresee Escalation** : TD Bank's Mark Wasilefsky hails it a "power move" driving breakfast discounts, warning rivals must match to shift long-term habits in a low-sentiment economy.

* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba0fcf19-7e17-4412-b02c-a00b72450c8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

clean_body: "Whoever is operating this teleprompter is in big trouble..." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Whoever is operating this teleprompter is in big trouble..." | | | Sep 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Trump speech blows the doors off at the United Nations Iryna** Zarutska's memorial draws hundreds in Charlotte Mamdani throw "Little Communist" tantrum over Kimmel suspension McDonalds fires the first shot in the Breakfast Wars Hulk Hogan's Real American Beer launches to roaring crowds Today 's markets: DOW: 46358.84 ( ⬆️0.09%) - ✅ S &P: 6690.52 (⬆️0.39%) - ✅ NASDAQ: 22766.72 ( ⬆️0.60%) - ✅ CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 15.84 ( ⬆️2.52%) - ⚠️⬆️ Trump SAVAGES the UN for its failures in barnstorming speech | | ---|---|--- President Donald Trump slammed the UN after a series of failures as soon as he walked in the building. Trump was at the UN to deliver a major foreign policy address but the escalator broke as soon as he and First Lady Melania stepped on it. The teleprompter broke as Trump began speaking where he switched over to his notes: "Whoever is operating this teleprompter is in big trouble." "These are the two things I got from the United Nations, a bad escalator and a bad teleprompter." Trump then issued a broadside of criticisms at the United Nations over immigration: "The United Nations is funding an assault on Western countries and their borders... The UN is supposed to stop invasions, not create them, and not finance them." Trump bluntly criticized the Green movement: "Climate change -- it's the greatest con-job ever perpetrated on the world." He highlighted Germany in particular: "Germany was being led down a very sick path, both on immigration by the way and on energy. They were going green, and they were going bankrupt." | | ---|---|--- Right now, almost every battery in America runs on lithium. Your phone. Your laptop. Your car. Even the power grids storing clean energy. But here's the catch: China controls over 80% of the world 's lithium.9 That means America's future is tied to a supply chain we don't control. If China slows exports or raises prices...we're stuck. Washington knows this can't continue. That's why the White House just launched a $1 trillion push to bring mineral production back home. 9 10 The goal: secure America's energy independence and cut China out of the equation.1 This shift opens the door for a new winner. Because while everyone else fights over lithium, one overlooked solution is ready right now... sodium-ion batteries.1 Here's why they're a game changer: Sodium is1,400x more abundant than lithium , with significant reserves located in the U.S9 Batteries can be made at a fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6 They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1 9 And one company has already cracked the code:Next Thing Technologies. Their batteries scale frommassive grid storage projects toaffordable $100/month home backup systems. 1 9 That means they can power everything from America's infrastructure to your neighborhood.1 The timing couldn't be better. Billions in federal funding are flowing into U.S. mineral projects. Manufacturing is coming back home. And America is determined to break free from China's supply chains.1 Next Thing Technologies is positioned to be the backbone of this new energy era.1 Over 7,800 investors have already backed them with $7M+.3 You 4 -- with up to 20% bonus shares 4 Iryna Zarutska's memorial draws hundreds as Democrats fail to stall crime bill reforms Hundreds Charlotte's South End for a candlelight vigil honoring Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska, fatally stabbed near a light rail station, as mourners sang, prayed and demanded city action to prevent future tragedies. | | ---|---|--- Vigil's poignant silence honors : The two-minute pause symbolized delay in aid after Zarutska's stabbing, drawing tears from diverse crowd of strangers and locals. Speakers like Addul Ali saw his daughter in Zarutska's face, while Bart Noonan decried a "city falling apart" in raw calls for reform. Global resonance unites mourners : Rev. Vasily Rudnitsky hailed her death touching "Ukraine and the whole world," inspiring prayers and songs in solidarity. | | ---|---|--- Community pushes memorial change : Attendees urge renaming light rail station after Zarutska, tying to looming city council vote on post-stabbing police enforcement. " Iryna's Law" passed by NC State Senate as Dems try to block passage Republican North Carolina state senators Monday, reviving the death penalty with strict appeal timelines and pretrial monitoring in response to last month's random fatal stabbing of 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska aboard a Charlotte light rail. Reviving Death Penalty Swiftly : The Senate bill imposes two-year appeal limits and mandates executions by 2027, aiming to end decades of judicial delays burdening taxpayers and eroding public trust in justice. Targeted Violent Offense Reforms : A new category for serious crimes requires GPS tracking and cashless bail elimination, specifically aggravating penalties for attacks on public transit to deter random violence. Mental Health Mandates Enforced : Suspects with long criminal histories face compulsory evaluations before pretrial release, addressing gaps exposed by the attacker's documented issues in Zarutska's case. Democrats attempt to stall : Democratic senators attempted to of the bill by Google makes MAJOR U-turn, will reinstate accounts it banned over Covid and election content Google announced Tuesday it banned for COVID-19 and election speech, admitting in a House Judiciary Committee document that Biden administration pressure led to unwarranted censorship of non-violative content. | | ---|---|--- Biden Pressure Exposed: Senior White House officials repeatedly urged Alphabet to remove pandemic-related videos that broke no rules, fostering a chilling political atmosphere on misinformation. Key Creators Targeted: High-profile conservatives like Dan Bongino (banned in 2022 over mask claims), Sebastian Gorka, and Steve Bannon are now eligible for platform return after thriving on alternatives like Rumble. Policy Pivot Embraced: With now defunct COVID and election rules scrapped; YouTube hails conservative voices as vital to civic debate in its free-expression commitment. Investigations Yield Change: Years of GOP probes into Big Tech have yielded similar reversals from Meta on Facebook and Instagram. Mamdani throw "Little Communist" tantrum over Kimmel suspension, it backfires spectacularly New York City mayoral front-runner Socialist Zohran Mamdani abruptly withdrew Monday from a WABC-TV town hall, protesting ABC's suspension of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" who goes back on air Tuesday night. Kimmel's MAGA Critique Ignites Fury : Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel drew ire by tying conservative activist Charlie Kirk's alleged killer to the MAGA movement, prompting ABC parent Disney to yank his show. Hollywood Icons Rally for Free Speech : Oscar winners Robert DeNiro, Jane Fonda, Meryl Streep and Frances McDormand joined an ACLU-led letter condemning the suspension as a "dark moment" for First Amendment rights and journalists' livelihoods. Disney Recants : It emerged later that the suspension was a decision by Disney not the FCC because of Kimmel's refusal to apologize and the show is slated to be broadcast again Tuesday leaving Mamdani in a bind. Rivals Slam Mamdani's Protest Move : Andrew Cuomo's campaign called the walkout a dodge from local scrutiny, while the White House mocked Mamdani as a "Little Communist" too scared for live TV defense of his socialist policies. McDonalds fires the first shot in the Breakfast Wars McDonald's for the first time since 2019, bundling breakfast, lunch and dinner options with 15% savings to lure inflation-weary diners, sparking rival chains like IHOP and Burger King to unleash competing discount barrages nationwide this month. Value Meals Resurrected Boldly : McDonald's revived eight bundled options across dayparts, slashing costs 15% versus a la carte buys to counter stagnant traffic amid rising wages and supply woes. IHOP Counters Swiftly : IHOP debuted a daily $6 breakfast menu with four full meals plus sides, available 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. at U.S. spots, prioritizing "abundance without compromise" per exec Lawrence Kim. Jack in the Box Upsizes : Starting October 1, larger 25% bigger drink cups and price cuts drop over 60% of combos under $10, reviving Monster Tacos at two-for-$3 to boost affordability. Industry Experts Foresee Escalation : TD Bank's Mark Wasilefsky hails it a "power move" driving breakfast discounts, warning rivals must match to shift long-term habits in a low-sentiment economy. | | ---|---|--- Thanks for reading The Capitalist! Hello Friend, I'm reaching out about our upcoming filing deadline -- the first of our campaign so far -- but I wanted to make sure you had some important context: **Nationwide, Republicans and GOP-aligned groups have been outraising Democrats in the lead-up to next year 's midterm elections, and our election in North Carolina is expected to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history.** My GOP opponent and his allies will be forced to make spending decisions they may not want to make based on what we can raise now, Friend. With all that in mind, it's even more important for us to show our financial strength in this report. This is the most consequential Senate election of 2026, and if we win here, Democrats have the chance to take back the majority and stop the far-right's extreme agenda. Meeting our fundraising goals is key to our chances of success in this toss-up race. But we have a long way to go to hit our end-of-quarter target, and we're running out of time to get there. [**We can 't risk allowing my GOP opponent to outraise us, so I need your help right away. Does a contribution, split between our campaign and No Dem Left Behind****, fit in your budget today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtalrKquE0KHW6WQtsxJaGdWBjmVGLROQf_rS4ZdnSY-R_N6d6RFcrq7hI6Z6ElESUxwm7WF9VSaXIKLf6msoYxLUQJZtYSTI4C9GpgZ1UxwjwMN3uphcrcmyiFoXQig6DdT0NzOR3C9FCKz1cHjRAZ4UwuF-aGaR55d7FuwsIKZKHa8m07cAy4IeJsneIzomJMtXgaRkRkyV55HgbPZYtI0w46_0C_68NaHgiPehs2Iw5LYICl4PgD8N2naPvkcPnOrkQgYpAd2eMqSN4pdREmwvHCUzG01Iq1tzw9qjXuRJ7VbBmk7ThMHw5HhOvdj0tuMko6E75wrVXOe2hYDn2U3SK2n7Ml1AdFM1qP30uOkudcBtFaeLCOvOtAK5c-ZojFqvx3EEBW401I38Gbo43O/4k5/vcoz17WcQmORHoUQjiXjnQ/h1/h001.9VIYEeVhQUijTl3ZA0q6TitU325ZvNMhFu8X6olkXxs)

name: Team Rayfield
subject: Consumer Protection Survey: we want to hear from you!
body:
Help us better understand how rising costs are impacting your family | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/consumer-protection-survey-we-want-to-hear-from-you?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
---
| | Friend, As someone who ran on a promise to stand up for working families in Oregon, I know how important every dollar is — and how frustrating it can be when those dollars don't go as far as they should. **That’s why my office has launched a new [Consumer Protection Survey](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=7a927fe489&e=1768325bd4) — and we're asking you to take 10 minutes to share your experience.** Whether it’s unexpected fees, misleading ads, or rising costs on everyday items, your feedback will help us better understand what’s really happening in households across the state. Your insight will allow us to take action to meet the needs of working families. **👉 Take the survey here: [https://qualtricsxmw43v5vw53.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_cvGH4RqEoPjHmvQ](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=03166e1ccc&e=1768325bd4)** **Deadline to respond is tomorrow, Wednesday, September 24, at 11:30 PM PDT. ** By making your voice heard you help us fight for an economy that works better for all Oregonians.

Thank you for your help! Dan Rayfield
Attorney General of Oregon
---
| | | | | | | [](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=e08c238b24&e=1768325bd4)

That’s why my office has launched a new — and we're asking you to take 10 minutes to share your experience. Whether it’s unexpected fees, misleading ads, or rising costs on everyday items, your feedback will help us better understand what’s really happening in households across the state. Your insight will allow us to take action to meet the needs of working families. 👉 Take the survey here: Deadline to respond is tomorrow, Wednesday, September 24, at 11:30 PM PDT. By making your voice heard you help us fight for an economy that works better for all Oregonians. Thank you for your help! Dan Rayfield Attorney General of Oregon | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Friends of Dan Rayfield, All rights reserved. Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

Friend,

In America, we don’t get cheat codes. We don’t get extra lives.

We have one chance to get this right.

Illegal immigration has overwhelmed our communities, and Washington politicians like Susie Lee treat it like just another round in their political game. I’m running to stop that.

That’s why I put together a new video to share this message in a way you probably haven’t seen before.

Take a look...

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=d1277648870e4ca69a11b9707ac5f52e&_e=ZAPDQQcJkR3gdzWrM7xoNjwpvIBMd7W4XGtANzi3U_533r8BuGw4sIT-hQtF1BBoQ0onHJ5UnRkL7LvEYDo5ytXenCqe4sSN944gUOapP2Af8-ue-ZtsaA81KaucxwhFhM6k-0y7Ybnkpw7eu853mhZzMBRFIhIZvkr23JDds492ZLtAE48kBz6TdxE6JxaziDxFA9iOD0aFFmXeZ6CHGDei5TFhnT-JAK1cxPYQyrZPuEbJnFkjeulolwDyD7xBwaUaxe5xRhkUo6Ovv6vfLTXqoQm5pf1-ssBh1LmbeNeZkJ_BtpjwUAW3IFYDu2YjiaGzZGphUkJBp2NSUZhiZ3WrgAFdbv7vZdTsKKIAIH3r3NILLR8wlaOsH22vk6qCex_4VdGvC4voaJhB3VcTE01Z_xoso2SipaoKbubWPXgQ2ZNnQhQTh2Dm-jhRVCa1e-f_IkJdbdTacKvrsRr6dll1q2jp1bB_5by30K6geql14H570GRvDDCgU2n1dciSAKGc9pncgSCFgAhYCpxlAhWWSqJWJPTtSaBJGfcRmWmO7Duk7Ex4Beazq37vOWOf22My963XPrB0fxVJ_E1vln1B24y6LJPYi5lCuDV0oxG996ELCRhefl_Neo5AlPpxPXPASxjO8WZABIM4NHnR_z9GZ0xns7arWfYcBoozDz4z839bqsxUSHFInpwKxo-xuLO6_1Vz6CDXDb2xCPECuNRbAO7Aln2CaQM2RAMlKybjTiXPsLYUDSaq53gIo0RZixg6Qv13GMW56Z9H3jBZIsqER6jr1AZ-EFsvnhDU7_3b2k91381lJieVOfSUDG7PclzVnIAXx6-Ttbmq26r-pw%3D%3D)

**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: NEWS: Investment in clean water for half a million Ohioans
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Hi friend,

This week, I stood alongside the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers as well as Toledo city leaders to celebrate a new $13 million investment in our region’s water system. The $10 million grant from the Corps, made possible by my role as Ranking Member of the House Appropriations subcommittee on Energy and Water, is the largest in the history of the 594 program.

We all remember when harmful algal blooms rendered Northwest Ohio’s water undrinkable. This investment will ensure that we have a secondary source to prevent 500,000 Ohioans from losing access to our region’s most precious resource should another emergency occur.

Here’s what is coming:

💧 A new interconnect between Toledo’s planned 1-billion-gallon reservoir and the raw water mains that carry Lake Erie water to the Collins Park treatment plant.

🏘️ Reliable, safe drinking water for nearly half a million Ohioans.

🛠️ A federal partnership that covers 75% of the cost, because Washington should work for Northwest Ohio.

This isn’t something that happened years ago. It’s happening now, and our work continues. The agreement was signed just weeks ago, and construction is on the horizon. It’s a project that will protect our families, businesses, and neighborhoods for the next century.

I’ve spent my career fighting to bring federal resources back home, and I’m not slowing down. Whether it’s protecting Lake Erie’s Western Basin, upgrading critical infrastructure, or creating jobs right here in Ohio, I will keep delivering results for our district.

If you believe in this work, I’m asking for your support today. Will you make a contribution to help me continue delivering for Northwest Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250923_mk_project_l1]

Support our work → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250923_mk_project_b1]Thank you for being in this fight with me. Together, we’re building a stronger, safer future for our community.

Onward,

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=fda1a72e-9e98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=fda1a72e-9e98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
Patriot, Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Patriot... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They weren’t recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It’s happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Patriot, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your children’s or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t be a small task._ But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here’s how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie’s vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
Also... **Here’s one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHB1c2FzdHVkZW50cy5jb20vc3RhcnRhY2hhcHRlcg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/gaNLSvQ/s3h2346a41e)** Patriot, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated... If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this... **You’re the reason Charlie’s mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Patriot, if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all you can give today, _we’re grateful._ But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS85MGVkZTc3Ni1mNDZjLTQ0MjktYWUxMC0zYjAwZWMyM2FhODU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUZURDcwNzI0JnV0bV90ZXJtPUZURDcwNzI0/gaNLSvQ/s2q8ea37dc7)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Patriot. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e7775773/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsZEFEdUxxTg/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQnZ1NmtQdURXQlpscw/gaNLSvQ/s0n2ea362ac)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: I never thought I’d see this in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **** ******** **** **** **** **** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfCKagP_1GLFkuic09LW8HvFRHY8PtCjDpRx5Ua35P1aa9mh90D7PRvGf9mMtIgSzknLeG5Dmk1dn1KcaKpjANr3Houlyo-kszHUG_swixDIwaK6doe6UdpV7t45ZKLJHjqOm1sqQRGGQffqu8DIcgAPnplOcbIg0eZi34lnfXeyhUIoPbP7iQNYtI341v6Mph1kEZwEbdkZLKjfrzknfkfGb71fljQ370cP2zEVz8aHWMNHvOUy-f3a4VQfk0w5Fmw/4k5/IcITYvfIScGMrfCwXt5m_w/h0/h001.0ujTPSRL3Yf2yWLancu_ETc7-xU68U7ynli-O_oeSSI) I’m Jeff Person, founder of Able Dems, and lifelong resident of the Washington, D.C. area.
The dystopian movie I’m seeing on the streets of D.C. now shakes me to my core.
Armored vehicles in the streets. Troops on the corner. Giant Kim Jong Un-style banners of Trump on federal buildings. And a dark cloud of fear.
_D.C. doesn’t look like the capital of a free nation - it looks like authoritarianism, and it’s spreading to more cities._
**As a person with a disability, I know what it’s like when people in power decide whose voices matter and whose don’t.**
Authoritarians silence people like me first.
That’s why I can’t and won’t stay quiet while Trump dismantles our democracy, one tank, one banner, one city at a time.
**Don’t lose hope, Friend.**
We Democrats across the country are standing up to protect democracy, defend civil rights, and make sure no one is left behind.
We’re pushing back against fear and fighting for freedom.

clean_body: | | | ** **** I’m Jeff Person, founder of Able Dems, and lifelong resident of the Washington, D.C. area. The dystopian movie I’m seeing on the streets of D.C. now shakes me to my core. Armored vehicles in the streets. Troops on the corner. Giant Kim Jong Un-style banners of Trump on federal buildings. And a dark cloud of fear. D.C. doesn’t look like the capital of a free nation - it looks like authoritarianism, and it’s spreading to more cities. As a person with a disability, I know what it’s like when people in power decide whose voices matter and whose don’t. Authoritarians silence people like me first. That’s why I can’t and won’t stay quiet while Trump dismantles our democracy, one tank, one banner, one city at a time. Don’t lose hope, Friend. We Democrats across the country are standing up to protect democracy, defend civil rights, and make sure no one is left behind. We’re pushing back against fear and fighting for freedom. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** The stakes couldn’t be higher. Join us before dystopia becomes reality. -Jeff Person, founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. subject: I'm heading to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, Marc Elias here. After the 2020 election, **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court -- and now, I'm headed to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections.**

[**Before I explain, I have to ask -- will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand up against GOP leaders' blatant disregard for the law and fight for our democracy by flipping the Senate blue? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21297%2E9716520%2EAVvq1x)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21297%2E9716520%2EAVvq1x)
---

As we speak, Donald Trump's cronies are trying to _rewrite_ this country's campaign finance laws to suit their own needs. They're ignoring _decades_ of precedent, attacking our country's values, and shredding bedrock legal principles _**to rig the rules for their own benefit.**_

**Here's how we fight back:**

First, we're headed to the Supreme Court -- where I will _**personally**_ deliver arguments to the justices on behalf of the DSCC and Democrats across the nation, urging the Court to reject the GOP's cynical schemes.

I'm planning to expose the Republican case for what it is: A corrupt effort to drown out the voices of everyday Americans by opening the floodgates to _even more_ money in our politics.

But no matter the outcome, our second step is clear: We MUST flip the Senate blue. The DSCC is the _only_ committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate, and by supporting their work, we can put a much-needed check on Trump's dangerous agenda.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy itself:[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to support the DSCC's efforts to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250923-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21297%2E9716520%2EAVvq1x)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

They're ignoring decades of precedent, attacking our country's values, and shredding bedrock legal principles to rig the rules for their own benefit. Here's how we fight back: First, we're headed to the Supreme Court -- where I will personally deliver arguments to the justices on behalf of the DSCC and Democrats across the nation, urging the Court to reject the GOP's cynical schemes. I'm planning to expose the Republican case for what it is: A corrupt effort to drown out the voices of everyday Americans by opening the floodgates to even more money in our politics. But no matter the outcome, our second step is clear: We MUST flip the Senate blue. The DSCC is the only committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate, and by supporting their work, we can put a much-needed check on Trump's dangerous agenda. So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy itself: We need your help to fight for the Senate. name: Autism Health
subject: A Historic Press Conference on Autism: Trump & Kennedy Speak Truth
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Yesterday, history was made. President Donald Trump and Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. held a powerful press conference on autism that many of us parents have been waiting for—finally, the truth about the causes and treatments of autism is being discussed openly. For decades, parents have been ridiculed, dismissed, and silenced when we spoke about our children’s vaccine injuries, biomedical issues, or the dangers of commonly used medications. Yesterday, the walls started to crumble.
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=629a637c9f&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
## Key Talking Points from the Press Conference
**1\. The dangers of acetaminophen (Tylenol and more).**
Trump and Kennedy highlighted new research confirming what many of us have been saying for years: acetaminophen is not safe. Acetaminophen can open up the blood-brain barrier, making it easier for toxins to penetrate the brain and disrupt neurodevelopment. It’s not just in Tylenol—look at your labels. Acetaminophen is hiding in Advil, Aleve, NyQuil, DayQuil, and countless other over-the-counter medications. I’ve written extensively on this subject—please take a moment to read my article: [Why Tylenol (Acetaminophen) is Problematic](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6e7666a9ee&e=3a42edfdc4). **2\. Leucovorin as a therapeutic option.**
For many children with autism, folate pathway disruptions and mitochondrial dysfunction are part of the puzzle. Leucovorin, a form of folinic acid, has shown significant benefit in supporting language development and behavior in children on the spectrum. This is an important breakthrough that validates biomedical approaches parents have been pursuing for decades. You can read more about the science and applications here: [Leucovorin Calcium and Autism](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b86f8e4a06&e=3a42edfdc4). **3\. The link between vaccines and autism.**
Kennedy was bold in stating what so many of us already know: vaccines can and do cause autism in susceptible children. This truth has been denied and buried by pharmaceutical interests for far too long. But yesterday, it was spoken at the highest levels of government. I’ve documented the evidence and the personal experiences of countless families in my article: [The Link Between Vaccines and Autism](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=74c6f0797f&e=3a42edfdc4).
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=bcb575d34c&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
## My Clarification Video
After the press conference, many people reached out with questions. To help bring clarity, I recorded a video breaking down the main points made by President Trump, Secretary Kennedy, and the experts. My goal was to make sure parents understand exactly what this means for our community: acknowledgment, validation, and a path forward for real solutions.
* **Acetaminophen:** Not safe for our kids. It disrupts brain protection and allows toxins to flood in.
* **Leucovorin:** A hopeful option that is already helping many children.
* **Vaccines:** The elephant in the room is finally acknowledged.

Parents—you are not crazy. You are not alone. You are being heard.
## Gratitude
I want to extend a heartfelt thank you to President Trump for having the courage to take this issue on, and especially to Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. for being the warrior that he is. Kennedy has stood by parents like me for decades, when it wasn’t popular and when it cost him dearly. He is a hero to so many of us who have been mocked, criticized, and silenced for telling the truth about our children’s vaccine injuries. September 22, 2025, will go down as a historic day to remember. It was a BIG win for those of us who have been fighting this fight for so many years. The tide is turning. We are winning the war—and never forget—God always wins.
---
|
---
| **Upcoming Webinar with Dr. Richard Bartlett**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| Please join us for our upcoming webinar: **From Wake-Up Call to Action Plan: COVID taught us—here’s how to be ready for the next pandemic**
**When:** Saturday, **Sept 27, 2025 at 9:00 AM PT/12:00 PM EST** Join Autism Health for our next live webinar with **Dr. Richard Bartlett** , a highly respected emergency room physician, public-health advocate, and innovator in pandemic treatment strategies. We’ll translate hard-won lessons from COVID into a clear, family-ready preparedness plan—what to stock, how to respond early, and how to think about risk with calm, common-sense steps. Dr. Bartlett is widely known for his early, patient-centered use of **inhaled budesonide** during the COVID-19 pandemic, and subsequent Oxford-led studies reported faster recovery in community patients who received early budesonide—insights that helped shape outpatient care discussions. You can explore more of his work at **[budesonideworks.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=64eff521e2&e=3a42edfdc4)**. We’ll cover air, water, medicine-cabinet essentials, communication checklists, when to seek care, and how to separate signal from noise—so your family is prepared, not panicked. Everyone is required to register in advance for this webinar. We look forward to seeing you all there!
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c8d14f7b1d&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
|
## **Join Us for Our Autism Health Summit 2026!**
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=3ad58bfac3&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=44a506e683&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5629960928&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---

San Diego, CA**

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: A bullet won’t silence our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant |

---

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVJUMhBSREetwSqZdlZLP5vt5RdoAYN0va1y-76NepfgAemyBOUrjbjMLZU_oRW8Toez1zp3i-X3R6PHgwNvRD4lZbzTTinuyfSE4JEZy3nZSkp8cIPCChleP8pi5xK8yrUr4Ig4iwhcqaoJPgcXH4Enn4c2upWW2QEF9sjCzTeeIh1YvvqxtId9QjoUn1kBW4zplBTekv4FBk30czJBYasJM77sckQlevq5xj5gOhtOYHZDIiMIRBgQG1QNb7LfyMTkXlXZxWSl3TA-oRkT0uaRt7-mYx0pcSE80a7OljNgCDms7HS1fQrQxoWfC9s4FSm88Du6blfR0QyK9HvELKXhBdMYjCItSmXLMOoD5m4BsZMP1-2u1TeS5vUBQ_GgR0eo8gRGQ-g3rEMZfYWzqHErrsAxdeMLQZaB_n3kZknJ0iHQ2YBKIJBnGCAHS8XboiklsJxQL-tHvELPtAPzxNd2CB5tttxY8RW4Ec2bm5gEAQqERAizx2JBVAC2STWlGcU%3D)**_.

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVIrwwPtudLeiJLVXRgV_qBtY6F-rQUf98wKnczgc3froMDt072atAJVdtcTSTLIr4hoaOn895rveRFBtu6m_x93-9KUG8bL8p8-dYi3Z9cMALEoxtZfd6ogCIfA5vv6gQFu7V7MTD1vPwFRo5Vllt30zHdlS03YOBP2yxnwUGZIYYbNV973TAs07cG40Cv2JQiHEP4rGmPTMTabH7xhys2JNscG8K--fuDFwzZbb3hzJtvv1VjRiLLxrb3MtPCeKdwABRremI1NAHCsb5S0SQm_g2xHwGylqQdZl4RI2zYCcF5OXKueq5Q1v81aSceI3WIi3OdE7oFM24hI27-wbxSHNts_pXE6liGU_l-YiyK0sZUmMj8EnSc1mMxyVYPnEHCXT-zV9Y5CQgFcpEFl1DoUf3YKiXoSV4yL0KRStmGUt9JLRT4-onIqlDqH65PBeqv4SJom7f2SqVrMNBWcB_T3uXKX2-jpf6GmApBPU6vD1-ioKxTuoS1ieIL7K9XFTD4%3D)_
[**FIGHT FOR CHARLIE
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVJSIFrKN9HuCC3Cdt6Lpp4SmVSK0_-OrHbEJ-ktXYFYmWwv5b4NMsdUrdCcbLiWSC-qteiJzC_aPI42wcQNKlIUCBdbSiJXAS9Cx9Bpupk4Cao2mHMsXuoRiMcHVRsyp19ZSDE9IjxbPkG_o4ks7vulp7QMYLU1Fmukbtef3fJ10WstSorbS1o3mRlo16cex3wAJ1z-YGpP-nzpTTSCPK2bnq_GIoBOuKRXgZc7VOdjPLcvoMb6nbZ5-k9T-dqskFG8eqn6Z9naHXvXUSC6XLT4CCnBhI3JdXhtKJUy3_Gkin1CuI87v_NL7OcmKv98qnOSLks2cR4aEYkFndM69GZmwJuzQ2doGsFF6-WQvT6q1QA41A3T_KXzlrw9xrB7UT6xtMJhrY56IL466JrLf-juSeAzhEGQwm2BytnLFPwgBb-HXurOSO2W5E6C-YuuNu24bbTR8kyhCp88B04r_ZqZZ6QjBvBHTpFx2hRakQRQajG2eV8DIQP4ZnvxvxCZkKo%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVIx67zwhrYhjDzoiYi_8c2vm0Qf33ep4JW9oISMXZbUF0kKizT_u0dq2hvvouLjnM8NVzH7fRXJgPL9iIy5nXUUy_GKRLW1az7O639Dxcw8yhENXjw4kPB2TEVrizkpo1TfrPZFrY2ZwIZbG8m9ZEMI1T-z23Cfj-25bT5ca_uwi_I4cNQ8TsrEM7UFyZUSMuwDWY0y46U-BPSmS6hsynHaKAoLhW3_iKUjbtIZeGkFyAtAoNhySdBNhh4QzqjiVEdMwv0pugSV512ibIasd0uQbJd7KhMYh3ixb2g6DKeY6EZ5DMiUXsXVPY5H7r_kF5HRviRYtSB5Wuop519ORBqNzfF2aPKJdx0VA7aqvRUHm8oyueOqwS0_SaZIN9YV1LI-GfFICRoWdvhNge0rZ0eoNwZ9LbBQgNW8QhSOQYYpYLQEEev_CLDDR2UslNpnudKaCp9EnUpukKKXfiYmvLg8q3BTp7Su8mfJ59rEbFn6shPdD41NFaS-AiGFIJnhElY%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVLnnSI7v3mmL9qYPJ8ugm9JRb257jeWeHFafatZ4tlzBhqfApZkO5fcgjlG0Y9QcM92d3BsDQWqVWfppD2QTN_yU50VCLvFNr-HfOPOFbOpxCAgEcmc6ukyQ_dcP_IvibAbWHTYCitDAP2WBJbdXq9TplONijpzLrCrJk8uG-BUB7R-EXNuCj4KJcvpPoT4JomV-k37Qcao3ZB-sk4wf9qJ7ORgtdULo7X0fvGZtLJn-LAf2kiDi5edgCU-pKVskHLYU3lp4Ko23e8LUxOZIcSZzdjd8Jg1vgL62Uhf-mdM8NBxQWncxR6DDnQtZ3zMU6pA5QD8ASTfyxG-L66a-T4ndl3vB2mhjrUgtgs-W-q58sGqqQcystV4xUJd1H7RyTMSX4s1hxknFmKA1rGkzWHYOC8eGe8gLJXJ6hPfczlIhUarkr0Rh1apgFuFTdsqo08J4sAfRbbikKtbTVvMqxkxGFqoCeVDgxcsYbQSiXwR35wXyGojb-1UZDcSmO7ql_o%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2de698217fce474b852ec81cdbc0934e&_e=VeRLSWzFB6FGDaEfAkwrs3Y4x0YLhzf3kmAGsX6cY4635bD4-HLCF4AEsLaqCS2bYEA950gflQ_QMUafV-K54libaqcmIliATyFLpfbBaC6lzgit0PXImEicjO1wv7coU6zDh4sK6U2pvVdRw-mlUY5jhGZUMnjdNFD0ATUMTRSsGzSUjWgTycjBnJA4j8OgX4W_Au2BFwRHGoPyHnrEZUFRaCmkEkK9bsitGerRGwC1IWiXCnqJP5Cw6JE8L1DAjv6dA7-L61RrF4x--aoXK_OnHoa1Y3T86UyS0_Z9MVJevziXRc7cvw1dC6yCREDjs1wNOwahVQgX9ElT2MQupx8pLgEoyiw0SWxuv7V3uAIAT1jzRjjoApUIOo2QpRdz4_rzywSNVvSOPjkkTnA0C5tjEdWpeFll2VS3Xum2p58YRqS2AAzRcSAHH3d5xsYe0jokBsyf66MN_C_eb2STYqzVD-ZSJVtJZ9Tp8ARS98EiVuZTyFlqnvN2SvwzMmf0dJqYIgbBkl2awJOtvli7fwYFnk44HadFbL9K3YNeXdxKjEas6z6StiDELJy1YjtNyRUvnvfWlFW0aD0ogHMYr5k68RtY41NyZCvDeX5MOd8__VViaZNThafkzG0vPmchgkTZFZwKEnDLCDDilvfkCErNNRdQ5zPZEF_R2Z8cUdf4kp6mJ8PbEP6UCUDMACejrd3wWC32rEnUw5SCJfej5EFUnAqxgzvnLrxycu7T5jm34OCJo7vfX0EEZ5wriY8bB03FkPfPwA9G1YSKfocfrSp353UXh3LrLcnu45zjsBo%3D)

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
