They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: not your typical pantsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)
But first, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve **rocked my mocs.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)_My child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior._
On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first – including at the Department of the Interior.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)_My moccasins and yellow ribbon skirt stood out in the sea of black suits at Pres. Biden’s inauguration in 2021._
When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country – enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)_I even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit._
From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and everywhere in between, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Will you chip in $5 so we can build a strong campaign capable of winning this race and making history again?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250923_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-4601&refcode2=4601_400544_NSVr0R&akid=4601%2E400544%2ENSVr0R)**
I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side,
Deb 💙

clean_body: Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to But first, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve rocked my mocs. child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior. On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first – including at the Department of the Interior. moccasins and yellow ribbon skirt stood out in the sea of black suits at Pres. Biden’s inauguration in 2021. When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country – enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud. even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit. From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and everywhere in between, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone. No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor. I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side, Deb 💙

subject: Only 22,000 jobs were created in the U.S. economy in August

body:
The jobs report for August came out earlier this month, and it shows that job creation in this country is falling fast.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779501/571440056/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcyZjYwZi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LGuRmx0CFgbCfXE7WMRVSAsemqnLDsEgKIOt_eO_jU=&emci=26474aad-0390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a872f60f-a398-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **The jobs report for August came out earlier this month, and it shows that job creation in this country is falling fast.** There were only 22,000 jobs created in the U.S. economy in August. Compare that to a year ago, when there were 142,000 jobs created in August of 2024. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779502/571440057/1596212816?refcode=2025-09-23-jobsupdate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a872f60f-a398-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcyZjYwZi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LGuRmx0CFgbCfXE7WMRVSAsemqnLDsEgKIOt_eO_jU=) Economists projected about 75,000 jobs would be created in the month of August. 22,000 jobs created in the month of August are much lower than what even the economists had predicted. The jobs report also shared a revision from the June and July reports. During that time, we actually experienced a 13,000 net job loss in our country. Why is this happening? It is because the Trump administration's economic policies are failing. They are doing nothing to lower costs or help hardworking Americans across the country. [**We are approaching our end-of-quarter deadline. Will you donate $3 to our campaign that believes in bringing and standing up for economic investments to the 2nd District that create good-paying jobs that support families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779503/571440058/1596212816?refcode=2025-09-23-jobsupdate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a872f60f-a398-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcyZjYwZi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LGuRmx0CFgbCfXE7WMRVSAsemqnLDsEgKIOt_eO_jU=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779504/571440059/1596212816?refcode=2025-09-23-jobsupdate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a872f60f-a398-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODcyZjYwZi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LGuRmx0CFgbCfXE7WMRVSAsemqnLDsEgKIOt_eO_jU=) More soon, _Rick_ \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rick Larsen **<camapign@ricklarsen.com>
Date: Weds, Aug 7, 2025 at 10:35 AM
Subject: FWD: Only 72,000 jobs were created last month
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com **Last week, the Bureau of Labor Statistics came out with some job numbers: only 72,000 jobs were created last month.** Right now, we are in the middle of the worst three-month job creation record since the end of the pandemic. **President Trump's economic policies are not working.** Fewer jobs are being created, economic growth is slowing down, inflation is coming back, and the Trump tariffs on other countries are being passed onto the goods you buy every day at the stores you shop at. The tariffs are taking a particular toll on us here in Northwest Washington, where the tariffs are impacting Canadian products, as well as a decrease in Canadian travel into the United States. **We saw a 43% decrease in travel from Canada into Whatcom County and Skagit County.** That means there are fewer people coming to our local stores, shopping, and attending local shows. After the Bureau of Labor Statistics released the low numbers, President Trump fired the commissioner. This is unprecedented. The Bureau of Labor Statistics is the gold standard for measuring economic growth and job creation in this country. **Trump fired the commissioner because he did not like the numbers.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

name: George Whitesides
subject: This is shameful
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779530/571440196/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmE5ZWYyMi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3qZOGvQpNu50daMDoiDPuXN5KAfbneTfFlZdu_74-g=)
It’s happening again, Peter: National Republicans are doubling down on their baseless attacks.

**The NRCC – the GOP’s foremost fundraising arm – just launched a new wave of paid ads against me that are airing across CA-27 as you read this message.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779532/571440199/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmE5ZWYyMi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3qZOGvQpNu50daMDoiDPuXN5KAfbneTfFlZdu_74-g=)
The GOP machine knows that I was one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in 2024, and I’m one of the most at-risk incumbents in the nation. They would rather spend _millions_ to unseat me to secure their House majority for another two years than work for the American people.

It’s honestly shameful. While my colleagues on the other side of the aisle vote to strip health care away from working families, and this administration silences any voice that speaks out against their agenda, I’m staying focused on fighting for this district.

**[I need your help to rise above the noise and keep this seat blue – not only for Southern California, but for control of the House majority. Will you chip in $3 before my FEC deadline to make an immediate impact?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115779533/571440200/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmE5ZWYyMi1hMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3qZOGvQpNu50daMDoiDPuXN5KAfbneTfFlZdu_74-g=)**

body:
Trump is making these companies rich
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/ZhD9gewuYgWQ)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/rkgA8xxMpfaW)
---
Friend, there's a for-profit deportation industry in America, and it's absolutely disgusting. **_Private companies have been receiving contracts from the Trump administration and enriching themselves and their shareholders off the suffering of others._**__ Companies like Palantir, founded by Peter Thiel and focusing on software/data, were given $30 million of taxpayer funds to create "ImmigrationOS," an AI system that "tracks immigrants’ movements." The ICE detention center in Florida, Alligator Alcatraz, was built by construction companies with deep connections to the Republican Party and a history of donating to the GOP. As long as they can continue buying our politicians, there won't be a solution. **I'm running for Congress to change that.** We can stop ICE from kidnapping our neighbors and end the for-profit deportation industry in America, but it's going to take all of us fighting together to get it done. [**Our campaign is going up against powerful interests, and since we're 100% grassroots funded, meeting our End of Quarter Fundraising goal has become even more important. If you're able to, please donate our average donation amount of $32 or what you can today.**](https://ka4il.us/l/weddZLjhBJf6) Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/fPxBSEZkQtha)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/xQCgwAyvjaZ8)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I know this team isn't intimidated by hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
#
Peter, we have less than 50 days to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. **[Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to power our work?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN)
---
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the time left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=10&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=11&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=12&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=13&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=14&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=15&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250923-9467&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=16&akid=9467%2E614464%2EfXtDzN)

I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger

It’s Reilly Neill.

I’m running for Senate because Montana needs real leadership to fight for you. But right now, Daines is leading us toward a government shutdown instead of addressing the real needs of his constituents.

Montanans deserve better, and I need your input by answering my one-click flash poll: [Do you support Daines forcing us into a government shutdown?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-18_YXWTFWVSY3oaaFaQVph4qwzn1yGHT_bHWYeEO2UgG6I3Vwa72FoAVYUfW90vqOQ0Pc1rp9Ux4MhiL57LTtzVbZc0RyfgcNHm4wzH9rfivQixAhiVjr4hLIPlIPoyHSmMmdaxG_cti4YybhEnr3p7ZaGhiLuBLPpihRtSH_AqQGAhGagdTGMxW72aDVlur_o4KQH0S761BG1Z2lthMA-YE5QWanyNrz0VStO9Vun1Knr4DuF9304n8LypjAofo/4k5/Xjr8dEayQXa0QqVHjPeFqQ/h2/h001.t1zBm4IKcMPxR-uVVbrDmOqHXMO1ot1fFFvhOXHd-iM) | | [YES »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-18_YXWTFWVSY3oaaFaQVph4qwzn1yGHT_bHWYeEO2UgG6I3Vwa72FoAVYUfW90vqOQ0Pc1rp9Ux4MhiL57LTtZ9O0ojzf_vDkKrSCvZqpwzsROZbGHnWbjcYB5lJuyaeyptJGdD9TcISK5GUb0fBWrzeuwsnYFe_QLbgxyEzJ6N4lp-CbHRm7TzBg-4i89Em55pQi4w2Uw0PZpAs31dXC0rdEY3uY_CkL5acdEgMd8KII9YiLvfENLbeCIRqA2ck/4k5/Xjr8dEayQXa0QqVHjPeFqQ/h3/h001.ijd_EQuliaUHj-7lsSRBRtdQE_Pw9gXwmdTRg2CH2jY)

Why run for government if you can’t keep the government running?

Daines is so hellbent on taking away your healthcare that he’s willing to risk hundreds of thousands of federal workers losing their pay, delaying benefits, and shutting down our national parks.

In other words, he’s wasting taxpayer money to make our lives worse. **Typical for do-nothing Daines, who won’t even face the people he represents.**
[The people of Montana are fed up, and I’m circulating a one-click poll to prove it. body:
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies tried to force states to hand over highly sensitive information about people who rely on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) — including Social Security numbers and home addresses. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115780222/571442550/651395730?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU4M2FmOC1hNTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRpMBx63nBYNS-aseOsp-s01A7ABLX-OoG01XCy371Y=)
---
Peter,
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies tried to force states to hand over highly sensitive information about people who rely on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) — including Social Security numbers and home addresses.
Minnesota was put in an impossible position: comply and risk exposing our residents to harm, or refuse and face the Trump administration’s threat to cut off critical SNAP funding. More than 400,000 Minnesotans rely on this program to put food on the table.
**I took the Trump administration to court — and we won a temporary order blocking their unlawful actions. This is a victory for Minnesotans, but the fight isn’t over.**
I’ll keep standing up for Minnesotans’ right to privacy, but I can’t do it alone. Our campaign has a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Tuesday, September 30, and meeting our $30,000 fundraising goal before then is essential to showing that we’ll keep fighting back.
According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to support our campaign and receive a full refund from the state.
[**Will you make a fully refundable $75 contribution to help us meet our goal and continue fighting for Minnesotans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115780225/571442553/1310879922?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU4M2FmOC1hNTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRpMBx63nBYNS-aseOsp-s01A7ABLX-OoG01XCy371Y=)

clean_body: Donald Trump and his MAGA allies tried to force states to hand over highly sensitive information about people who rely on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) — including Social Security numbers and home addresses. | = Peter, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies tried to force states to hand over highly sensitive information about people who rely on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) — including Social Security numbers and home addresses. Minnesota was put in an impossible position: comply and risk exposing our residents to harm, or refuse and face the Trump administration’s threat to cut off critical SNAP funding. More than 400,000 Minnesotans rely on this program to put food on the table. I took the Trump administration to court — and we won a temporary order blocking their unlawful actions. This is a victory for Minnesotans, but the fight isn’t over. I’ll keep standing up for Minnesotans’ right to privacy, but I can’t do it alone. Our campaign has a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Tuesday, September 30, and meeting our $30,000 fundraising goal before then is essential to showing that we’ll keep fighting back. According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to support our campaign and receive a full refund from the state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Keith Ellison Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: What Republicans don’t want you to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
Enough of the lies and finger-pointing.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=kHhiqS21Bm72sjH0XrpSinwYGuanKvFd1dZiX7SIHKIy3KKfO6nO9FgmEevD3jj1j6GpH%2BFp1ZKX33HcUc1OuVrq3m0sGLJnyPUFPguRdZ6IVgQ93pV1GUr3eXDmKv6DBM4tNKV2IjDnXptpXGLQ5R5PaRydNdmZ5epZCLeQtKXM89taG5sXI34hdtVv1gnj0lOePa28XZameNymtHAtBoaHm%2Bq7lXlRwPbdO31XEV%2FIGJAkwjwJfFJa41R1v0zifJfe1xWNpjh7F%2FMtylkpZ31xh5QczeS4Wu2%2FFeK8kumE8JgDFCGGi%2F0EPM84E8uMGYA%2FeocaxWzwLMU9FG%2BnEqWI1oYLLqR0aBTRizEaBq38ySwdAnvuyi7yXOHWrBqjfSrsC1lgyZPkdGN88hJpGXIJ%2BFOhq1IJzBkZGnI2hWJ1FOsayuYyH8pHTXQgL7u%2B)
---
| |
---
Republicans just launched an attack ad claiming that I want to shut down the government — along with a few other outlandish claims. They spent money to share this ad in my district to try to destroy my reputation ahead of the midterms. Republican strategists will say whatever they can to gain support for their horrible budget bill, but let me be perfectly clear - **I’m not going down without a fight**. Let’s break down their lies and **_set the record straight_** : **Claim #1: Democrats want to abolish ICE.**
**Reality** : No. What we do oppose is turning ICE into Trump’s personal militia. The “Big Beautiful Bill” Republicans passed gives ICE more money, more power, and no oversight. No one man should have that much unchecked control — that’s how authoritarian regimes work, and we won’t stand for it. **Claim #2: Democrats are hurting veterans.**
**Reality** : Their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” will actually raise costs for veterans, kicking people (including vets) off Medicaid, and cut support for 680,000 children of working veterans. It’s a complete disaster for our veterans and their families. **Claim #3: Democrats are putting police pay at risk.**
**Reality** : Trump’s DOJ already cut $500 million from local policing and justice programs. Republicans are the ones defunding the police — not us. Let’s be clear: **Republicans have had full control of the House since 2023**. They could pass a funding resolution and avoid a government shutdown right now — but their dysfunction and inability to govern is exactly why they can’t. So instead, **they point fingers**. I don’t want a government shutdown. No Democrat does. But we also can’t endorse a reckless, authoritarian power grab that continues gutting health care, defunding our communities, and handing Donald Trump and his MAGA allies unchecked control. [Republicans are trying to shift blame — because deep down, they know what they’re doing is wrong. If you're ready to hold them accountable, chip in $10 now to help us defend CA-25 and keep fighting back against these baseless attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115780429/571443324/1243549332?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_092325_NRCC_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQzYmFiNmItYTY5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uIM7JsoyhRFWKtpMECUcGOJAaBCQcVTX2LhdvgTIVAc=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115780434/571443330/1243549332?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_092325_NRCC_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQzYmFiNmItYTY5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uIM7JsoyhRFWKtpMECUcGOJAaBCQcVTX2LhdvgTIVAc=)**

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: Enough of the lies and finger-pointing. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Republicans just launched an attack ad claiming that I want to shut down the government — along with a few other outlandish claims. They spent money to share this ad in my district to try to destroy my reputation ahead of the midterms. Republican strategists will say whatever they can to gain support for their horrible budget bill, but let me be perfectly clear - I’m not going down without a fight. Let’s break down their lies and set the record straight : Claim #1: Democrats want to abolish ICE. Reality : No. What we do oppose is turning ICE into Trump’s personal militia. The “Big Beautiful Bill” Republicans passed gives ICE more money, more power, and no oversight. No one man should have that much unchecked control — that’s how authoritarian regimes work, and we won’t stand for it. Claim #2: Democrats are hurting veterans. Reality : Their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” will actually raise costs for veterans, kicking people (including vets) off Medicaid, and cut support for 680,000 children of working veterans. It’s a complete disaster for our veterans and their families. Claim #3: Democrats are putting police pay at risk. Reality : Trump’s DOJ already cut $500 million from local policing and justice programs. Republicans are the ones defunding the police — not us. Let’s be clear: Republicans have had full control of the House since 2023. They could pass a funding resolution and avoid a government shutdown right now — but their dysfunction and inability to govern is exactly why they can’t. So instead, they point fingers. I don’t want a government shutdown. No Democrat does. But we also can’t endorse a reckless, authoritarian power grab that continues gutting health care, defunding our communities, and handing Donald Trump and his MAGA allies unchecked control. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. Please join our team to defend the American Dream. ✍️ Sign my petition to get on the 2026 ballot → 💥 Donate today to help us defend this seat → Thank you for your support! Juan | | "JOIN ME IN DEFENDING THE AMERICAN DREAM" | | | PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Ciscomani for Congress, All rights reserved.

How about one?
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/47d5637d-4837-40b5-9e19-78a82ec474fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/47d5637d-4837-40b5-9e19-78a82ec474fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up this week, today I'm talking with Mike Nellis about Kamala Harris's new book, and later I'll be joined by John Solomon. Then Wednesday, I'll be talking with Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights, Harmeet Dhillon about the aftermath of Charlie Kirk's assassination. You won't want to miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!

## Charlie Kirk's memorial, a revival in faith...
I don't remember the last time I sat five hours for anything.
Taking five hours out of your day for anything is a tall order.
But this Sunday I sat for five hours, just taking in Charlie Kirk's memorial service.
It was one of the most powerful things I've ever witnessed.
There's so many things I could talk about:
The music.
The speakers.
The incredible sense of community.
But what transcended it all was faith.
This tribute to Charlie was rooted, start to finish, in the faith that drove him.
It was incredible just to watch; I can't imagine what it was like to witness in person.
I'd like to take time to today just to reflect on what an incredible event it was, and what it means going forward.
I believe it was _the_ turning point in America... here's why...

| | The government funding deadline is September 30, and Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress still don't have a serious plan to prevent a shutdown. **Instead of working with Democrats to keep the government running, they're playing political games with people's lives.** **Republicans are threatening to shut down the government instead of offering solutions to the increasing costs of groceries, housing, and other essentials, and massive cuts to health care that working Americans are worried about.** If that's their plan, then they need to explain it to the American people. Here's what Democrats are fighting for instead:
* A funding bill that reverses Trump's Medicaid cuts
* Extends tax credits to make health care affordable
* Extends NIH funding for critical medical research
* And restores Congress's power of the purse to stop Trump's authoritarian attempts to undermine our democracy

---

We’ll keep this short, Team: **The MAGA-ified U.S. Department of Justice has been demanding voter data from the states** , requesting that election officials turn over unredacted copies of voter rolls and every voter registration application submitted in the past 18 months. Several states with MAGA-aligned Secretaries of State and opponents of voting rights in charge of elections have complied, but other states are holding out to protect voters from intimidation, including Maine. **DOJ has escalated their attacks in Maine** , with suppressive former Trump lawyer, now Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon demanding an electronic copy of the voter registration list that “ _must contain all fields, including the registrant’s full name, date of birth, residential address, his or her state driver’s license number or the last four digits of the registrant’s social security number_ ” from December 1, 2023, through July 1, 2025.Folks, the U.S. Constitution entrusts the states, not the president or his agencies, to run elections. There's no legal basis for the DOJ to demand such sensitive and personally identifying information. **It's yet another overreach by a president fueled by lies and taken by sycophants who are more loyal to his every whim than the rule of law they swore an oath to uphold.** **[Team, voters in Maine and every other state deserve safe, secure, private elections, free of intimidation. Peter,

Donald Trump and his MAGA allies just slashed **$500 million in funding for NPR and PBS** — crippling local stations across the country.

That means children’s programs like _Sesame Street_ could disappear, rural and tribal communities could lose their only trusted local news, and countless Americans could be left with nothing but right-wing talk radio.

[_**So I need to know where you stand: Do you support Trump’s cuts to public broadcasting?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115781615/571447161/-587898865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGU1MzU4My1hNzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mADGnT4vTxWl2rGhsUetyWYiV6qG3L419ZUQex5SJjA=&emci=4ab7e77c-a798-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bde53583-a798-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6681226)

When you click **NO** , you’ll be added to my petition calling on Congress to protect NPR and PBS.

Public broadcasting has been a lifeline for millions of families for more than half a century. Cutting its funding isn’t about saving money. It’s about silencing independent voices and replacing them with MAGA propaganda.

Thanks for speaking up,

Linda

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump’s Plan to Steal Power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

Donald Trump and his allies have been working overtime to rig our elections. They are determined to keep power in 2026, regardless of the will of the American people.

Trump’s playbook is clear: illegal tariffs on our farmers, denying federal disaster relief to blue states and cities, authorizing arrests without warrants, and even declaring “maximum warfare” against California. We cannot sit by while this happens.

In California, we are not standing by. We are meeting Trump’s rigged agenda head-on with Proposition 50. While Trump targets five seats nationally for Republican control, California is restoring balance by creating five new seats for Democrats.

This is what fighting back looks like.

Prop 50 is temporary and strategic. After 2030, we will return redistricting power to our independent citizens’ commission, preserving California’s commitment to nonpartisan democracy.

We are in this together. Our values, our communities, and the future of democracy in all 50 states are at stake. Stand with us while we fight back.

STAND WITH US [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15354-20250923-Prop50-SB-GOP&amount=25]

When Republicans fight dirty, California fights back for fairness, accountability, and the right of every American to help shape our future.

- Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E15354-20250923-Prop50-footer-GOP&amount=25]

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is the seventh inning stretch of September
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Democrats are hellbent on humiliating us. I’m determined to avoid that at all costs.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-mXx_HUQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Believe it or not, the third fundraising quarter of 2025 is over in just **days** -- and Democrats are determined to embarrass the heck out of us when reports are made public in the next couple of weeks. They've already outraised us by millions. They've already launched wave after wave of attack ads against our candidates running for re-election, and they're funding their own new challengers with eye-popping sums that even I'm having trouble believing are real. And every new donation they collect in this final week will be used to prove they have the momentum heading into 2026. **_We must do everything in our power this very moment to prove them wrong. _** That's why I'm not asking for $100. Not even $10. **_Just $1_.** Not because it will fund an entire campaign, but because it tells me you're still on the winning side and that you recognize we're in trouble if we don't stand together. [**_< <CHIP IN $1 OR MORE BEFORE THE END OF THE DAY>>_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) If conservatives like you don't step in during this last stretch, September 30th won't just mark the end of the third quarter -- _it could mark the moment Democrats lock in their advantage for the 2026 midterm cycle_. That's why I need you with me right now. Your gift of $5, $25, or even $1 today will go directly toward fighting back in these final, critical days. _[**< < RUSH YOUR DONATION NOW >>**](https://trk.email.tedcruz._2f8gnqMDcdld_A)_ I refuse to look back on this week with regret. I need to know you'll fight alongside me before it's too late. I refuse to look at September 30th as the date on which we failed to marshal the resources we need to defend conservatism and our shared vision for America. If you love this country, I'm asking for your help right now. For liberty,
**Ted Cruz**

name: Derek Tran HQ
subject: One week remaining
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782251/571449495/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE4ODQxNTAtYTk5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GYPChHRFgGs2Bg9YAfbRErXkpkWCL3k7sq_AFkYJu9c=)
We’ll get right to it: Here’s why Derek’s race is the most consequential nationwide: **First:** Derek flipped this Republican-held seat by 653 votes – _0.2% of the vote_ – in one of the closest election battles last year. We faced millions in attack ads from Elon Musk’s super PAC, and we’re already seeing a huge increase in GOP spending to flip CA-45 right back to red. **Then:** Redistricting news in California complicated the landscape. Democrats are fighting against Texas Republicans’ redrawing of Congressional lines by voting to redraw the lines in California. If passed, this would mean CA-45 would add _thousands_ of new voters. **Now:** Derek is already facing Republican challengers with the full might of the GOP machine behind them. With the attacks on our democracy mounting, and only three seats separating House control, we need a grassroots surge of support to hold the line. [**We’re required to report our fundraising to the FEC in one week, and how we perform will show our opponents and supporters alike the strength of this movement. clean_body: | = We’ll get right to it: Here’s why Derek’s race is the most consequential nationwide: First: Derek flipped this Republican-held seat by 653 votes – 0.2% of the vote – in one of the closest election battles last year. We faced millions in attack ads from Elon Musk’s super PAC, and we’re already seeing a huge increase in GOP spending to flip CA-45 right back to red. Then: Redistricting news in California complicated the landscape. Democrats are fighting against Texas Republicans’ redrawing of Congressional lines by voting to redraw the lines in California. If passed, this would mean CA-45 would add thousands of new voters. Now: Derek is already facing Republican challengers with the full might of the GOP machine behind them. subject: A letter to street vendors who bring us a taste of home🧡
body:
🗣️ “Street vendors are more than stands, more than carts, more than fruta y flores.” | | |
| |
> _“Street vendors are more than stands, more than carts, more than fruta y flores,
> They are a story of resilience, endurance and dreams flying, flying, flying above the skies.”_
| | [Read Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg45nUXkU_bF-ltkNm7wjtf3tV6_e8Y4GE412E4qCXn356nLCAJz3unTUcCp_jtfen7yyAJjJGtSzP_SAJ02ANVFNYBssLVaGNDpYjyuh8dVM3WgIymS_CsoCPjjnyddoxrmiJVpRK5pwAVU3trmCZ_2ORFNvW-SgNwGZly2DHo0Ed7Dt8gv0xpX4Re0ZD-PBu7t3F29TKIKF_uHbjeJkg71PBuU9fVhIqYkCSSnJARfPMuTMngA7jNWQpWTOGh2uLNTipJDeETMYyx_CeFULzqxzoOf3cCALGssEBJTEqfTcCoztO6bWzRj_LCMDcjPO7BF-mQPP4rUaxURadPSaLN69csZbDrmRS6zKeFbWM8lCFA/4k5/Bw0M2fA7Rc2b_pPKk1NWRg/h0/h001.Z7y8EYqO5XFCeUaC2lqVmvlNUCHCgY5JChyE2Vve-lE)

Hey Peter,
From flowers to fruit cups to elotes preparados, street vendors bring the taste of home to every corner of this country. They’ve fed our communities for generations, whether it be a quick-stop breakfast on our way to work or a sweet treat after school. In recent months, as ICE steps into our neighborhoods to target and abduct our loved ones, street vendors have been forced to choose between providing for their families or risk abduction.
**We’re a community that protects each other. More than ever, street vendors need us.**
We collaborated with talented poets in our community to write pieces that highlight the voices of people who power our communities.**Our latest poem “Beloved, Street Vendors” by Katherine Bahena-Benitez is a letter to street vendors everywhere whose resilience inspires us.**
**This letter is a reminder of the power within us to build a future that protects us all — from street vendors to students to our elders. ✊**
Read our poem today, and share it online to remind your friends and neighbors of our commitment to protect what we hold dear: the people in our communities who are irreplaceable.

clean_body: 🗣️ “Street vendors are more than stands, more than carts, more than fruta y flores.” | | | | | “Street vendors are more than stands, more than carts, more than fruta y flores, They are a story of resilience, endurance and dreams flying, flying, flying above the skies.” | | Hey Peter, From flowers to fruit cups to elotes preparados, street vendors bring the taste of home to every corner of this country. They’ve fed our communities for generations, whether it be a quick-stop breakfast on our way to work or a sweet treat after school. In recent months, as ICE steps into our neighborhoods to target and abduct our loved ones, street vendors have been forced to choose between providing for their families or risk abduction. We’re a community that protects each other. More than ever, street vendors need us. We collaborated with talented poets in our community to write pieces that highlight the voices of people who power our communities.Our latest poem “Beloved, Street Vendors” by Katherine Bahena-Benitez is a letter to street vendors everywhere whose resilience inspires us. This letter is a reminder of the power within us to build a future that protects us all — from street vendors to students to our elders. ✊ Read our poem today, and share it online to remind your friends and neighbors of our commitment to protect what we hold dear: the people in our communities who are irreplaceable. | | | | | | We’ll be having a conversation about this poem, , on Instagram live on Friday, September 26, at 7 pm ET. Join us to dive into how to show up for the people who power our communities.🤳Text “RSVP NOW” to 787-57,, to be notified when we go live. Remember to share this poem with your loved ones! Think of a person who could use this powerful message today, and pass it along. In unity, Ximena and the UWD team Follow us on: | | | | |

From the bottom of my heart,**_THANK YOU._** **Peter****, it’s Nancy Mace.** **[You’re receiving this because you supported my campaign for South Carolina Governor from DAY 1.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/0zUlRugjs5V-hlZWvoXcEAju9TtYMTW6fGD5rZNNEEWB3f7DL6bnsi2sfk-kmN_cgk4pAMoOljYZaqoF9nyFZmMHXJZdHLxH7oZ5KJq04PzITr4ycCHmyKihpgxrYJUgjopFXDFMe1r6jsfcreXLUBaho8by3mQSY1eLwkJA6sjLhb2GgKEmSW_WbaxZw8hTUusQh56VEtFUHsHhJ7e6lLilpUnLne4gW3jdwsFhV_8_sOAZt3Dj23O2oDu6BWdbd3wwuPHTigEGkvxO6-KkaiIEgMLYuVgHmS6B7lSZXk-Ln52Honpeuj856dmx6ry2JJouMjCXH1XeDpwut77uEZx77iMFe_TNFe3fhj-ovt8v9l-5VDUJriyg5I2Tx34_YNB6tiLhe33D5RjOvcgpfCFsU1icvKSR6tvmA9aPG--OTVX0AeZAafkuF4qqlriDDKT8pEjNQcBwmIbtC-iUbtCGWLo8qNKmyuMU_x_i1-YBWRfNqEXmZUJdvo0hFxKw3DT_vQTsetCSHOhyiQb_r80gASJidM0x1HsEKwVwYyypSnYEDjY5VFj1lP6UxVhbm1zqXwdHtmI4-xO8bnARrt1Cz7BOQsGTYNOrvi3_w9JtTNFniXRk8JqBwTnLntI7hRA6NTpklQH92SlJOPBZKsBGQS2xYTWCla9AVpJ7Mc_dUIDCQgGkP4zwOKVXiG_-_jmFdFE5YRypU5n44gSv5Mns-CGRRoUteCETXsZSALQeWyUuxJSvT7JsmSns3BOLf7F8wxBNI1m3oX89cKCZUUvTzbNP-sH_nfdTiSI6kOkhbpmqqychdFIsMUi9LHOJ8AYy_w4_08_AbZqlsC9ZryZCqadwZYn3EtCs5JvWzTFhgq1bnCkE7A8/Fe0FVd-3q110bXkAht86LZS51WZAiyVB/13)** I want to convey how much this means to me, because I wasn’t supposed to make it this far... Let me explain. **At 17, I dropped out of high school.** My parents, a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher, gave me two choices: **Go back to school, or get a job.** So I went to work at a fine-dining establishment __**some of you may know as Waffle House.**__

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=51ef515c47ae4c14813f16ab64f51f20&_e=ab-TFF802_2vBwrJKDCqiIhdxgt-m6d7q-2uYbaKuIZnlBLyOnw-cgHtPLr9bMzZjvfr_gspeIy4jfGsivdQZomqOT7Mi2dqkrvJPdJdLvPKO6e5xv2IvUToIzA_6KpF8lTnEs8P5_QdhEkV7Zrkez3vLuXeFcnHjcRWvQREqvQ62xJU2_lLgV7f5oWGasF30Wwf3QE2ffwdzB9IRMS07TxxSptA7jkqVxPIGUrMOZEaxD3QNlh_ojNJjKOHwRN6XJ4UWyviZkLK-RoUZSo0InnO5m9V7NJf20sD6kdYS06g3ImEYPVrSW-_Pi3SCIPfCWK8wfpBGOjnD2CT3oLIa2M-VQlY5n-k22ZeLZVht4hMuvyoWN92hlrBw0bDZI14T_UP3SOIqbtyRpKNxLjHxEuW2p2yrk0zPSeOo26ns4lb6f6kGen8NfGaCBICJG0tvFcQ-LHEh9Dgpjk33e2g-vMMYhQRwjsf5hHqE7lExV2ELi4o4VDJvDbLrOVsaDPKyMCO06_X0zNiPJdR4ZyikBc9FC8RyX2bp_HvxpaxMF9pSNZxV0XeK3diu3TseEl2rXB7oZqn7yZoqHcgH-ciIl5OLZ08yYIXRXxKvqPrAc5Fs3duptZjqhOQde1QHmz9JH8zcW8_L7mLZvb70lf4dVZYiqP4_lv2nNjXBz3ApTtDzFjoQyGq9wGFZIUd325bwxjFv7USZv5WUyi1bBaGfQ%3D%3D)
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=51ef515c47ae4c14813f16ab64f51f20&_e=ab-TFF802_2vBwrJKDCqiIhdxgt-m6d7q-2uYbaKuIZnlBLyOnw-cgHtPLr9bMzZjvfr_gspeIy4jfGsivdQZomqOT7Mi2dqkrvJPdJdLvPKO6e5xv2IvUToIzA_6KpF8lTnEs8P5_QdhEkV7Zrkez3vLuXeFcnHjcRWvQREqvQ62xJU2_lLgV7f5oWGasF30Wwf3QE2ffwdzB9IRMS07TxxSptA7jkqVxPIGUrMOZEaxD3QNlh_ojNJjKOHwRN67ENQ2mRRFVtVdZewBTITzBD0wJV8fvJ2PTeo1Jwrso7rdgy_Gaz8C8ZL0ultZmSe8NsVUJOJJg-3MxEuwIdESqPOqMceQMelZ9h5X-2BTptxrJmHrHAnDvUk07E4bYX4UlBezo3KV2CxRulU-zbIKM6rVMQmF2IOqlBFLJgKKB4X18orHMbaDJe6ELXXbI3EHXvyaJHPk0zBGrc6wxMBhTGTxSA7fippkSrDRTBf8q1onC3VGlQ0sRhjaXP9zdFeAM6GIEiBsM8E2RtevA2Kx74fCSVgxdb0yMbSF8vR9KDagvJbf8eIq78LhoBDTdNMMaOt1jDqcAbEz4vChyhVgZG9vYUJ3JMUXsC1iV9C8SInI8QLBbVWmTe0CxpasJDZ4As8VhuJTmnEFZjex6FAVHr7EhBdpCEmbvOHl4junCN7hYCpSwDr84mx3WZ-9UWT8OKaVp0KlzZlJGQltBRUYg%3D%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: We all need to be a bit more like Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgYteNzcfLo34zOmkUG_JTF_TZI_PT_3nEdS9X_Izh6Xzux9tctpYuCzSTM8XgWUGVi7LzY5KYTkrLgkGbD5-bVq22PFtIab5IHV6lJYIS_Ie-4yPgW0AZKBTd4GPfIXeTr8-2tXjhizjCS5xlNRkI7dG6KTyoD_EFNcTdzuTkCKDF9zEO3OQvJcF1-QBAYcciGXwj1pvjcHKPPdLBAvrXHDleQtY5ukBhUrgmu_ePh3CxZFaeSzlwiBbPzXnjYvfsOjc8ZNPoGaYYUluvbSQkBNLv0hGQfFzFb9MevIQ8AA9Quyx7NrkWDhb6WD_sdkhfcNXjlV5w19AuN5AsVckqMRxVBYJ491i8sKex-kVeiTeXPCbiahf9oChtIyZiGNGKDGksaGIF3xwiD5pPsRrE42SPtudyV5GL4HbNljxanh2Pqrd0JAryCM-tpoHkkN3EvnwFB1C-3fOk-f_bVDsl0Xs37HJyjy0_n7gXtZLBNt0lazBX45xl70s84CHc5K4lg%3D)

---

Peter,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgYBuV64F8g6ViWwq3FJsCTFbPTqMEUmvbjmULgNsfkf_Ixv2Yj9ArB4DOhcbpikFXMuEIPDm42aFjeHQ7RdPk5qbLHXHUGs-DX3mDgqLYpzjnyV7RGqSKz6-mEnFzixrrlRZDQbH4sgjgNzoclbsYZmAqICJ0mULqFEmZG54E1MPsq0Hn_2JU0b0x7NhsJ4hbvhCzZLg2rxqtPNtbqcLRDmczx_6y_7x8TYAQ-FHMZyc7q6RPrqDioBgjiaULLjGuxopTYyMtBTlmK5X9aam_gCoo4jHXY6SXQ5QRF7fxq7IlIHJQGRm5MRKsp9IwU0TkBZsH2ZotpeYooM7g7o14Gqhnqi95iLim0QtTV0_L5TpH7UUbZqK8Ndm5r5ti5Sn6eiz0Z3Ofct8lyKD3zPcKvuHRnkcGfokJa4PDCXcuR0DLrNW9w3Kxvfl6fmNJH4k5xIyiVfFsfN3TmK9zrrYL_yEznEb7A8FXwpAcBhHJsQRxod8fU9Yj62UR5WohwDe9M%3D)**_.

_[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgalv6ial3E5oFWgJL_HCkZ_wAzmPddve--IhlIDYE85z42mJf-GA6nVj1ZWLunW4qOrXj-Ve0omBYha2poOyu4DGPdbeefofYYZE1RmvUSlpAt5TxWAS6RyoUHRPxU5ZVK9fzgt-eyMFs2XTuixEAkbhg1CXKruOeuHsjmsui0403QZoH9GZxXxcIb6geamCmI_-Z1asAjAWNhVPkmEvaNTn3ztfpG3YmsI9ErYFr3R3T9kwqphI7xQ-jgLmbkVsToHcXPcVX_divJRztDRg3VGxGdH9grqovVBz9LDVqtvAoUhKvlnkfvPXNKEdARK2TAPudZ10XcWaF-GUYZgKULIjNZmB3FOIzg_QwBRAXc8yes6ONctT9se2Zsp971by3614Kvn3Ntmebdskcqdxzrx-GOx-6hmFgpMt_c_90znl30yAMBbyBOzSoqOEZ0Swlvs7cYHsls4-94SwJ-2uBKBG6CGIH8UOsOB-JE7mzvsICxr89vZPYrLJJKkdsDqh3w%3D)_
[**FIGHT FOR CHARLIE
**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgaQhojvJDc0TiPMLBoE6ZinSddHwLwFV0lhJJnWY-v5zkYQwTG82lYdOD7V0iKwMj0CnmTEcbZ5cBy-5q3IjrHp_SPMHb8W9TKLwr6jcC0j0E7aFqg8ANJ3m8-npwp4A6-q7rRNNH4KnFGmv1vBQ3QJT7CgKbaiC_Ot4n24OZog0RKmXbk4XkaY6jZLia4SXfnZclkpZnkH9mR2YrY1pN9fSfdZJnPYUnGYcDhX6QL8VPwyxDADUfFCTTiWJt1BTvBghmhVE20_whKgiX3HApDPLW8U5V0tfg6JpM3W1X6bnFiLreX484eG5PGsUy7HGeiUPSPCkFDdyuXLR_WcwSWQIRUcYalFwoS_Km1PlgXHLyFxXuGh3XQzN-h2dMH3huDH2tgoWm19kNLzWensMLMpLyOYb-nH4I2qlp2123SyhHELLuGdpAx59gkj7REkG5Qw4hjSyHdVhEDG3GsYTOmHt3Htw7jk-5IJzoZiGTaPzyqVp_nuSs2ipI6BXmDeNxs%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgYM3G6w0ue8kF7V0qFKQSRbfDnVLwQdMLnpdOc-9rSc0qTPLSATfiI4BwzrOV_crrHwhEPDZwIMcEVumiQt_eW9mC7RNKWJ28rtSPH83JpF4n0yEiDtlNLqBsoEGApZXItQAePRRS-Sbw_TGg6g9SHMzDeUpVPrZopa2-RHB1izrzCns6Z4VvJqChg7falqCOUPAnieTbZxHrfmS9erNW2wAobPO7AJS8ri3M7gXSmpeG_e7qDC8Af93nqnAHzbCLnjt0V8RlK78Jf4mH9RCxp9VGTbV3baL5bKJstqsSNqZnHEVn_u889pfIQ3EzWv9qwFUov9VxGNOqsx6mco-mUEdHwcGzUNSGn8EWu2A_HZXUrL3DyTqv3OmBIV0x_zDKNd0YgxGi5cUWJufzJNgceiFAl-mMlYE3DOgEaSFfEZrTDUJJvuiwOfFT4TTk7LVXIg2Fk_Qsdn1QhXGlVv0N0NlASN6pFiGjWL3dONVJPJUDZK6LSu-XAtNmfEv2YbDow%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1859d1241dc84c278c8b97b32f6cf4d1&_e=sMgM4uzNJbqSE4rdfIF1ifTAAUNI2RzLdKgKxjdJfCbYIuVr4a9kVubWmigw9UhRmXheNh7FC_RuKMPvaKpS1k02ZZBwT1c26d6nCSju0_roor7od4lU9aDnSlr4cHBAVoAstRD6FORkDqjTUhirEoULCF_ZmEl8uw8UzdZEmnN_LQOREt1ovGUQAq8qLOfMcFbOKvpIdKIUQsFqnyf7Ws6zYFfCrGK1JzXE-XugSrbX1udKlEIt3rFrcvRASqpkr1PTLXVE6TKSUyiAMGsEd59afUn7YfqTfAkAFroycgall22qcOcjTEh47XJjVE21N7vhLBSvBOPZhb07dOJkkku4ZwGuuQ8AbdEKSgYd4qvHX7zVkY1Mry8EmRMh4sSS_FjCD2aok4Zidkuzm5AjTheaNJP2UlltaA-FmjN8bosbtGlJ0waPD6Nv1hYW4uaL105zKQXU441vNSOkHubY0UL_teu5KMa0EP9L8KGQ3bnpBAFOjXCmhL5-3sMariDChkqlx_fEAew5Y5uMVTv9ufW0Qv4IbTUIeNmXr2Bg2fxdo9zjEF2KCa2zrg_ibktOagHroWNZMiU1b4OuJWlpk-NYsE91I7n2fshrTTxyU8mfDTDxXoHnp4WlH59hTiFs6oH9xhLgkvXLsKQGP_bHYX432DSiYSDmZj_i6St7ogqUiHwTil3xnbWb5xGQmnOd-xDf5ve53Wa-o8tElLVZ2LEFtypsqTT-gjfQqOyQqkxjgiTZSFxdmbWG6ba6sLXWMlQI5fB4GP-YQKCSm-t_PcKxsHPz_Hl4SRF773u2EfQ%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Peter, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I read the Constitution live
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782931/571452011/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=)
Peter, Not a day goes by that I don’t reflect on the honor of having your trust to work in this place. For decades as your Meteorologist, looking out for families in bad weather. And now as a Representative of my home state and for my hometown. But I’ll be honest: it’s not easy to work in this environment of hate and division that extremists promote, and reminding ourselves that the most engaged click-bait isn’t reality. But what is real? Our Constitution. I always keep a copy of it in my office when I’m in Washington, and it keeps me grounded, and hungry to serve you every day. But it sure seems like a lot of people sworn to uphold it have no idea what’s in it! **So Peter, I spent some time on the steps of the People’s House to read the Constitution out loud, in case some of my colleagues in need might pick up a thing or two.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782932/571452012/1022683961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=&emci=9ce52057-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ef94d5d-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858) [**I encourage you to watch along – with or without your own copies of the Constitution handy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782933/571452013/1022683961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=&emci=9ce52057-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ef94d5d-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858) | [Watch Along](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782934/571452014/1022683961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=&emci=9ce52057-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ef94d5d-ad98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858)
---
As long as I’m in Congress, I will always follow our most cherished founding document, even when it’s not “fun” or “easy.”
And I encourage you to take today to remind ourselves to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest.
Together,
-Eric
### ***Before you click away***
Eric is coming up upon a critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline in less than one week, and every contribution will make a difference in our fight to hold IL-17 from extremists and flip the House blue. [**If you’re able, please consider chipping in before the end of September.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782935/571452015/896231865?refcode=em-9.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782936/571452016/896231865?refcode=em-9.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=)
