He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115782940/571452020/896231865?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5NGQ1ZC1hZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qY-9Jh-B3o38t878XTi3Q3BP4XkaTr67-5mqS-n04cI=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=y9g0hateRFQz1TZfHQM%2FTQ%2FBjTwWsM1QKp61M7SgOppbDuS4lRDGOTVSH9P7TVVz%2BeiGlv8DX8SHQauVmLNP3MPphN7LAliaWciqV5UXPzvVMgt6BuowENRNnIcaSEHwb%2F7UIlENjL4wLS5mf0ppQavqxV%2Bgr%2Fl2ydmdfxHzbqfvSyRI%2Flwv9%2F2SjAPY8rFlmmw58lPijiC60MOmYrKB2pJDz%2Bxgl7Db3%2BvJ6%2FTsnk9AKzcXBI1OeML92jGWwK0RFQGmIyNbq1gOQm0%2BHnsR%2B95j0zaX6W9ks6wuChw7%2B%2BRDC8y2R4jNid%2F%2BJC9%2Fic0DQjBU21V6XWx7hcD9J7FI%2Fg76J2zlrF1mY5oT8J69aLVJfyhuyH%2FELbBlraKu%2BjyRDvJnmficlpFHn1tyeAe1K3b0ePCY4ooV870Kn5LXaTvumNltiHCw3R79GIH3oUDs). Dear Peter,

Here’s a testimony I have to share. Last month’s Canadian Tour was the talk of the country—revivals were being canceled last minute, Antifa was showing up to disrupt our worship, and local governments tried to keep us from gathering. Despite all the risks, this family traveled two hours, with no guarantee that the revival would even happen—talk about faith! The revival was powerful, and all three were BAPTIZED!! You have to hear them tell their story!

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1844%2E791427%2ETbuyp3)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-tom-homan/?source=em250923-1-180&akid=1844%2E791427%2ETbuyp3)
Team — This is a major scandal, and we have to make some noise about it.
Tom Homan is the White House “Border Czar.” He has led and overseen Trump’s violent and disastrous mass deportation agenda.
Last year, he was caught red-handed accepting a $50,000 bribe from undercover FBI agents, who were posing as contractors seeking favorable treatment under Trump’s presidency.
According to MSNBC’s new reporting, “Several FBI and Justice officials believed that they had a strong criminal case against Homan for conspiracy to commit bribery.” But when Trump took office, his FBI appointees closed the case.
**This is corruption. This is a cover-up. This is lawlessness.**
Just think, what would happen if Tom Homan was treated the way he and this administration has treated immigrants?
**He would be scooped up off the street by masked men, denied due process, given no trial or access to his attorneys, and put on a plane to a gulag in El Salvador.**
He’s lucky he’s not one of the innocent people swept up in his ICE raids. He’s even luckier that he has Trump’s corrupt FBI to protect him.
Friend, we now have a man who is a criminal, working for a criminal President, deporting people and tearing apart families under the guise of enforcing the law.
Like we said, this is a major scandal, and we can’t let this become just another footnote in Trump’s chaotic presidency. We have to get loud.
That starts with putting pressure on Congress to do their constitutional duty to hold the executive branch accountable. Congress deserves a full accounting of what happened in this investigation and why Trump's FBI is now covering it up.
**[Please, sign Ilhan Omar’s petition calling for Congressional hearings on Tom Homan accepting cash bribes and Trump’s FBI sweeping the evidence under the rug. The American people deserve transparency from public servants. Your voice helps us turn up the heat and demand answers.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-tom-homan/?source=em250923-1-180&akid=1844%2E791427%2ETbuyp3)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-tom-homan/?source=em250923-1-180&akid=1844%2E791427%2ETbuyp3)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

name: Troy Downing
subject: MAGA extremist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-x4Ax7-FlpAERA)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._gvB6-g)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$10 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/23/2025
body:
Free speech and consequences: CU Boulder lecturer and Vail teacher face scrutiny over Kirk assassination remarks
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Free speech and accountability are colliding after a CU Boulder lecturer and a Vail teacher faced [backlash for comments on Charlie Kirk’s assassination](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Evergreen High will [reopen in phases](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after the recent shooting, while Children’s Hospital Colorado reported a [26% spike in kids’ mental health ER visits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In Mesa County, Caprock Academy’s analytics director was [arrested on child exploitation charges](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And a new law bans [rental “CAM fees,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) though businesses say they also need protection from surprise costs.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Erika Kirk offered forgiveness to her husband’s assassin before 200,000 mourners, turning [grief into grace](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) at Charlie Kirk’s funeral. Meanwhile, the RNC is driving Trump’s [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)[election-integrity agenda ahead of 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), pushing lawsuits to clean voter rolls, curb mail-in abuse, and enforce proof-of-citizenship in registration.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Jon Caldara says Colorado schools should allow [trained, armed staff to protect students](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), pointing to the success of FASTER programs. Tyler O’Neil warns [violence tied to transgender ideology](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) demands FBI recognition as domestic terrorism. And Rachel Gabel argues Biden-era land policies let [activists block grazing and energy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), hurting balance and local communities.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, September 23, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Free speech and consequences: CU Boulder lecturer and Vail teacher face scrutiny over Kirk assassination remarks](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Freedom of speech is one of America’s most cherished rights. But too often it is misunderstood as a free pass to say anything without consequence. The killing of conservative activist Charlie Kirk earlier this month has made that painfully clear. Across the country, people who publicly cheered Kirk’s death — whether at work, online, or in classrooms — soon found out that words can carry real consequences. Some were fired. Others were suspended. Many faced a wave of anger from the public.
In Colorado, questions about free speech and accountability are now playing out in two very different settings. One involves a lecturer at CU Boulder. The other centers on a teacher at Vail Ski and Snowboard Academy.
The First Amendment leads numerous people to believe they have complete freedom to express themselves without facing any repercussions. The reality is more limited. The amendment protects most forms of speech including political speech from government punishment but it does not shield people from the actionable reaction of the workplace, educational institutions or the community.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Evergreen High School Sets Gradual Reopening After Tragic Shooting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Evergreen High School will begin a phased reopening the week of Sept. 22, starting with staff preparation followed by a structured open house for students and families to re-acclimate.

* Support services such as therapy dogs, wellness rooms, and a “Hearts for Hope” project with encouraging messages will be available during the transition.

* Students will return gradually, with short days on Sept. 29–30 to ease back into classroom learning after the recent shooting.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Kids’ mental health ER visits jumped 26% at Children’s Hospital Colorado this summer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Children’s Hospital Colorado saw a 26% increase in kids visiting the ER for mental health crises this summer compared to last year.

* The number of children needing inpatient care has surged more than 55% from 2020 to 2024, reflecting worsening severity and longer hospital stays.

* Experts point to economic and political uncertainty and an under-resourced mental health system as key factors driving the rise in complex youth mental health cases.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[How early Christians stood against Rome, Part 2](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 22** _Every spiritual movement takes place in a practical way, from person to person, in the real world. Miracles did take place, the faith spread, and the church grew, for a few reasons which I provide here. Please note that this is entirely conjecture, but I believe that it aligns with Scripture and historical fact, and the context of the times in which it took place._
__

**[The fruit of true martyrdom: What Stephen, Bonhoeffer and Kirk reveal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 21** _Martyrdom is a word thrown around with reckless ease. In our political and cultural vocabulary, anyone who dies for a cause is immediately baptized as a martyr. But that is a sloppy use of a sacred word. There is a difference — a decisive one — between dying for an idea and dying for Christ. And the difference shows itself in the fruit._
__

**[How early Christians stood against Rome, Part 1](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****
****BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 21** _“You are the salt of the earth. But what good is salt if it has lost its flavor? Can you make it salty again? It will be thrown out and trampled underfoot as worthless. You are the light of the world—like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden. No one lights a lamp and then puts it under a basket. Instead, a lamp is placed on a stand, where it gives light to everyone in the house. In the same way, let your good deeds shine out for all to see, so that everyone will praise your heavenly Father.” (Matt. 5:13-16, NLT)_
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🎨 DID YOU KNOW?** Before the invention of modern paint tubes, artists stored paint in pig bladders, tying them shut with string and pricking them open to squeeze out the color. The method was messy and unreliable, as the bladders often burst. In the 19th century, American painter John G. Rand revolutionized the process by creating tin tubes with screw caps, making paint storage and use far more practical.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Freedom lies in being bold." – Robert Frost
|

# [When care workers can't afford healthcare. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=174347904&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MzQ3OTA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTg2NTQ0NjgsImV4cCI6MTc2MTI0NjQ2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jTbq-Svksov_VEUw_Ln_ZNLiP3M0PaQSG0mq4D6MJCE)
### A conversation about the stakes of the government-funding debate.
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa) and [Lynn W](https://substack.com/@lynnifer21)
---
| Sep 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)| | [](https://substack.com/@lynnifer21)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=174347904&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MzQ3OTA0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1ODY1NDQ2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzYxMjQ2NDY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIzMzM1MiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WF2tALUsBkzcgWxKAslXGZABcbBHEv6qz6KFMIDqVEc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/conorlambpa/p/when-care-workers-cant-afford-healthcare?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Earlier this year, Trump's reconciliation bill killed the ACA credits that made it possible for people like Lynn -- a care worker whose job doesn't provide her with healthcare -- to buy an individual healthcare plan online. In Pennsylvania, that's on a website called Pennie. People who bought their health insurance on Pennie are being told the price could go up by 82% next year because of Trump's bill. Listen to Lynn talk about how much she already pays (a lot), how much more she'll have to pay if this isn't fixed (a lot more), and all the people in her life who will be affected if she can't afford healthcare. Also, hear what she would have said to Senator Fetterman if he had been willing to meet with her when she went to his office, and what she would say to Trump and Senator Schumer about what's at stake.
Thank you [Margaret](https://open.substack.com/users/312673441-margaret?utm_source=mentions), [Kathleen Arffmann](https://open.substack.com/users/45528646-kathleen-arffmann?utm_source=mentions), [O. Ross McIntyre](https://open.substack.com/users/184339543-o-ross-mcintyre?utm_source=mentions), and many others for tuning into my live video with [Lynn W](https://open.substack.com/users/42127320-lynn-w?utm_source=mentions)! Join me for my next live video in the app.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I'm so grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I'm determined to make every moment count.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115784290/571457409/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU5MDU0MzEtYjA5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OHkRUF8M0qqV9x5OUVJtdh-LdLfsPh6NecC2hyU9hCs=)
Peter, we have only six weeks left until Election Day.
_And I'm determined to make every moment count._
I know most messages we send are packed with details about how competitive this race is — and it's true. The whole country really is looking to us to lead the way.
_But right now, I'm just thinking about all of you, about the remarkable community we've created in this campaign._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115784291/571457410/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU5MDU0MzEtYjA5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OHkRUF8M0qqV9x5OUVJtdh-LdLfsPh6NecC2hyU9hCs=)
We wouldn't be in such a strong position to flip Virginia blue if not for the enthusiasm and dedication of top supporters like you, Peter. I'm so grateful.
The job's not done yet, of course. September has to be our strongest month of fundraising yet to stay on track to win.

clean_body: I'm determined to make every moment count. = Peter, we have only six weeks left until Election Day. And I'm determined to make every moment count. I know most messages we send are packed with details about how competitive this race is — and it's true. The whole country really is looking to us to lead the way. But right now, I'm just thinking about all of you, about the remarkable community we've created in this campaign. = We wouldn't be in such a strong position to flip Virginia blue if not for the enthusiasm and dedication of top supporters like you, Peter. I'm so grateful. The job's not done yet, of course. September has to be our strongest month of fundraising yet to stay on track to win. = = = = = = = Honored to have your support, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. A law enforcement officer — someone entrusted with enforcing laws and safeguarding the rights of others — decided it would be a good idea to go on social media and openly declare allegiance to Antifa, a group that, as of [...] The depths of online conspiracies seem to have no floor — and the latest target is Erika Kirk, the grieving widow of Charlie Kirk, who has endured more than enough in the days since her husband’s assassination. On Sunday in Arizona, Erika stood on stage alongside President Donald Trump at the close of her husband’s [...] Only at Harvard could the shuttering of a DEI office turn into a full-blown funeral, complete with black clothing, rainbow origami, and a “Southern widow hat.” On Friday, student activists held a memorial service for the university’s Office of BGLTQ Student Life — or “QuOffice” — after Harvard announced it would be closing the doors [...] Ashley Jamieson (@DearAshley) wants the world to believe she’s the victim of a vast conspiracy. The reality? She torpedoed her own career. Hi. My name is Ashley Jamieson. I am an attorney. And for the last 19 months, I have been working for @USDA in the Office of General Counsel in the Civil Rights, Labor, [...] Kathy Hochul’s approach to the New York City subway system has been one long, bizarre exercise in political theater. First, she called in the National Guard to “clean up” the subways, even as her own administration insisted crime wasn’t a serious problem. Charlie Kirk’s memorial at State Farm Stadium was not just a service for the slain activist — it was a political and spiritual flashpoint for a movement grappling with grief, anger, and determination. Tens of thousands filled the Glendale venue, joined by thousands more in overflow sites, to honor the 31-year-old Turning Point USA founder [...] P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Trump Wants to Silence Us, We Won’t Let Him
body:
We fight back.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=05bceec0ea&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,Last week, ABC/Disney caved to political pressure from Donald Trump and his allies in Washington by firing Jimmy Kimmel for jokes the President didn’t like. Let’s be clear: this was never about the jokes.This is about the First Amendment, and whether democracy still means free expression, or if Trump gets to decide who speaks in America.And here’s the good news: after massive nationwide boycotts, ABC was forced to reinstate Kimmel. That’s a victory for free speech and for democracy — proof that when people stand together, we can beat back Trump’s authoritarian politics.But we can’t stop here. If Trump can silence a network once, he’ll try again — against journalists, activists, and ordinary Americans. He’s already detaining Green Card holders, tearing families apart, and threatening to revoke citizenship from U.S. citizens. That’s not the America we believe in.I’m running for Congress to defend our freedoms and stand up to Trump’s dangerous overreach and unconscionable inhumanity. We need grassroots supporters like you: people who have had enough of Trump’s cruel, xenophobic agenda.**Protect Free Speech and Democracy, Donate Now** Your donation today powers our fight to defend democracy, protect the First Amendment, and stop Trump’s authoritarian politics from taking hold in our communities.No fear. No silence.

Friend,

Earlier this month, I sent you my latest survey to hear directly from you about what issues matter most to you and your family. This is my most important job – listening to your thoughts and using them to make change in Congress.

Here’s what folks had to say:
| **89% of respondents** said they were affected by **rising costs** in the last year.
**A majority** of respondents are concerned about the **attacks on our democracy**.
**82% of respondents** said they were worried by **cuts to programs** including Medicaid and food assistance.
---

There’s no question about it: We’re facing unprecedented challenges. How we respond is critical, and with your continued support, I’m pushing back to make progress for IL-13.

There’s a lot more to be done – fighting for the dignity of work, advocating for farmers, securing health care, offsetting the cost of living, and much more. While the work is hard, it’s well worth it.

**[If you’re with me, $3 or any amount today will keep me in Congress working for you. name: Team Fetterman
subject: we picked you to weigh in on health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c)
| | |
---
Hi, Derek! We chose you for a quick health care focus group. It'll only take a minute, we swear. [**Click here or the button below to begin >>**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51677?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c)
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51678?amp%3Bemail=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&t=3&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c)
---
👉**Here’s the deal:** Trump is ripping away access to care. And if it's not completely gone, it's sure as hell more expensive.

He’s gutting Medicaid, which is driving up costs, shutting down rural hospitals, and forcing nursing homes to close.

And now he’s threatening to remove pieces of the Affordable Care Act, like tax credits and assistance that lowers your deductible, that could send premiums soaring for families in PA + across the country.

We're being left with fewer choices and higher costs, and it's not just folks on Medicaid getting hit – every family in America will feel this.
**[So John needs to hear from you. Will you take 60 seconds to be a part of our health care focus group?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51677?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c) 🙏 **
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51678?amp%3Bemail=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&t=5&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c)
---
Thanks for jumping in.
– Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk267-su-fl-footer&t=6&refcode2=10320_434096_aqkA4c&akid=10320%2E434096%2EaqkA4c)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0d3afbf-c118-4650-9e74-52572ee03693/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Here I am, Lord — I will carry Charlie’s torch.
body:
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e19710126/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVWJ1Ull4UHBHNg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsV0dLQ29nbQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNkJ2dWdaMzVscw/gaNLzoA/s1pecd4c6c4) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](test@test.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e19710126/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsV0dLQ29nbQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNkJ2dWdaMzVscw/gaNLzoA/sak3143fa6a)

name: Heidi Hall
subject: 98% is ridiculous! (my opponent voting with Trump)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, a new report found that our opponent, Kevin Kiley, voted with Donald Trump 98% of the time.
That makes him one of the most loyal Republicans in the House and puts him only one vote away from being completely in line with Trump.
Was the one time he went against his leader relating to the thousands in our district who had their healthcare cut because of Trump's budget bill? No, he agreed on that.
Was it when Trump wanted to consolidate power by restricting federal courts from using national injunctions to block White House actions? No, he agreed on that too.
Friend, political partisanship is toxic, and it's keeping our elected officials from properly representing us in Congress. We can't allow these labels to get in the way of positive change, and we can't allow Kevin Kiley to continue throwing us under the bus to make Trump happy.
I'm running a people-powered campaign to flip this seat and work to end the toxicity in Washington and deliver real results for our district. This is an important month for our people-powered campaign. If you're able to, will you please donate what you can today to help us continue to spread our message? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250923_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Action Alert via Team Griswold
subject: Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?refcode=250923-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?refcode=250923-email]
Peter,
Getting Jimmy Kimmel pulled from the air is suppressing free speech and censoring critics. That’s exactly what Donald Trump and his MAGA allies want—to silence anyone who dares to challenge them and scare Americans into complacency.
We’re glad Kimmel will be back this week. But this is bigger than one TV show. It’s part of a dangerous pattern of attacks on our democracy and our constitutional rights. From spreading election lies to trying to take away reproductive freedoms, the far right is determined to strip away our voices and our choices.
Here in Colorado, we’ve always stood up for freedom. We’ve shown the country that democracy can be both secure and accessible. And we will not allow extremists to decide what we can or cannot say.
That’s why we’re asking you to stand with us: Add your name today to show you believe in protecting free speech and defending our democracy. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/o3_c0wSKRUaP6Qg9-KKdLQ2]
Add Your Name → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/o3_c0wSKRUaP6Qg9-KKdLQ2]Jena has taken on Donald Trump and his extremist allies before, and she’s ready to keep fighting for Coloradans as Attorney General. But she can’t do it alone.
Together, we can send a powerful message: Coloradans believe in protecting freedom of speech and the foundation of our democracy.
Thank you for standing with us,
Team Griswold

clean_body: [] Peter, Getting Jimmy Kimmel pulled from the air is suppressing free speech and censoring critics. That’s exactly what Donald Trump and his MAGA allies want—to silence anyone who dares to challenge them and scare Americans into complacency. We’re glad Kimmel will be back this week. But this is bigger than one TV show. It’s part of a dangerous pattern of attacks on our democracy and our constitutional rights. From spreading election lies to trying to take away reproductive freedoms, the far right is determined to strip away our voices and our choices. Here in Colorado, we’ve always stood up for freedom. We’ve shown the country that democracy can be both secure and accessible. And we will not allow extremists to decide what we can or cannot say. That’s why we’re asking you to stand with us: Add your name today to show you believe in protecting free speech and defending our democracy. [] Add Your Name → [ has taken on Donald Trump and his extremist allies before, and she’s ready to keep fighting for Coloradans as Attorney General. But she can’t do it alone. Together, we can send a powerful message: Coloradans believe in protecting freedom of speech and the foundation of our democracy. Thank you for standing with us, Team Griswold Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent. Jena for Colorado P.O. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: the job Oregonians elected me to do
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I haven’t lost sight of my core mission: fighting for YOU

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115785685/571462177/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWVlNGY4ZS1iNjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghbNiOhFdTP_iFBFjUbYd8jRhSf8A1KR45tyd2I-7-Y=) Team, I know the deluge of awful news lately can be genuinely overwhelming. We’ve seen rollbacks of clean energy and environmental programs, a horrifying increase in politically-motivated violence, and we’ve even had to face down even more attacks on our most basic rights and freedoms from President Trump and his allies. But I refuse to get lost in the constant churn of the daily news cycle, because though Democrats may have limited power to affect change from the House minority, I haven’t lost sight of my core mission: **fighting for YOU, and pushing for bold legislation that uplifts working families, farmers, small business owners, and everyone who calls OR-06 home.** **[I’ll tell you more about the challenges I’m working to address in just a moment, but if you’re already with me, can I count on you to pitch in to my re-election campaign before my upcoming end-of-quarter FEC deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115785688/571462180/-480163815?refcode=email_092325_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWVlNGY4ZS1iNjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghbNiOhFdTP_iFBFjUbYd8jRhSf8A1KR45tyd2I-7-Y=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115785696/571462187/-480163815?refcode=email_092325_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWVlNGY4ZS1iNjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghbNiOhFdTP_iFBFjUbYd8jRhSf8A1KR45tyd2I-7-Y=)**
---
For months, Donald Trump has abused ICE’s authority to sow chaos and score cheap political points, disrupting the lives of families both in my district and across the nation. So I stepped up and paid a visit to Portland’s ICE field office to demand answers — and I fully intend to hold these officials accountable for the terror they’re spreading through our communities.
I’m leading the charge to oppose the Trump administration’s attempt to repeal the 2001 Roadless Rule, a critical environmental policy that protects almost 60 million acres of American forests from construction and development that would damage the untouched forestland and increase the risk of wildfires.
And as the federal government faces a looming funding deadline, I haven’t wavered for a moment in fighting for a spending agreement that reverses Medicaid cuts and brings down health care costs for Oregon families. But Republicans have so far refused to negotiate — **so I voted against their partisan spending bill, because I refuse to go along with the GOP scheme to strip Americans of their health care and drive up costs.**
Listen, standing up for OR-06 in Washington D.C. these past few months hasn’t been easy, but it’s worth it — _because Oregonians are worth it._ And it’s the job my constituents elected me to do.
**But in just a few days, I’m facing a critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline, and I’ll need your support to meet my grassroots fundraising goal and keep pushing this campaign forward to Election Day.**** [So if you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in $25 or whatever makes sense to help me keep up the fight for you and your family in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115785703/571462193/-480163815?refcode=email_092325_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWVlNGY4ZS1iNjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghbNiOhFdTP_iFBFjUbYd8jRhSf8A1KR45tyd2I-7-Y=)**

clean_body: I haven’t lost sight of my core mission: fighting for YOU = Team, I know the deluge of awful news lately can be genuinely overwhelming. We’ve seen rollbacks of clean energy and environmental programs, a horrifying increase in politically-motivated violence, and we’ve even had to face down even more attacks on our most basic rights and freedoms from President Trump and his allies. But I refuse to get lost in the constant churn of the daily news cycle, because though Democrats may have limited power to affect change from the House minority, I haven’t lost sight of my core mission: fighting for YOU, and pushing for bold legislation that uplifts working families, farmers, small business owners, and everyone who calls OR-06 home. = | | = For months, Donald Trump has abused ICE’s authority to sow chaos and score cheap political points, disrupting the lives of families both in my district and across the nation. So I stepped up and paid a visit to Portland’s ICE field office to demand answers — and I fully intend to hold these officials accountable for the terror they’re spreading through our communities. I’m leading the charge to oppose the Trump administration’s attempt to repeal the 2001 Roadless Rule, a critical environmental policy that protects almost 60 million acres of American forests from construction and development that would damage the untouched forestland and increase the risk of wildfires. And as the federal government faces a looming funding deadline, I haven’t wavered for a moment in fighting for a spending agreement that reverses Medicaid cuts and brings down health care costs for Oregon families. But Republicans have so far refused to negotiate — so I voted against their partisan spending bill, because I refuse to go along with the GOP scheme to strip Americans of their health care and drive up costs. Listen, standing up for OR-06 in Washington D.C. these past few months hasn’t been easy, but it’s worth it — because Oregonians are worth it. And it’s the job my constituents elected me to do. But in just a few days, I’m facing a critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline, and I’ll need your support to meet my grassroots fundraising goal and keep pushing this campaign forward to Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Tina Newsletters
subject: Our September newsletter has arrived! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Hi Peter,
Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter — here’s what I’ve been up to this month!
I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters.
Thanks!
— TK

Fighting for Workers’ Rights

# [#]

Governor Tina Kotek recently spoke at the AFL-CIO convention, where she shared her support for Senate Bill 916, which allows striking workers to access unemployment benefits — because no one should have to choose between fighting for a fair contract and putting food on the table.

Preparing for Earthquake Risk

Governor Kotek signed an executive order to bolster Oregon's preparedness for potential earthquakes. This proactive measure aims to safeguard our communities by enhancing resilience and readiness. Tina's focus on public safety is unwavering, and this executive order is a testament to her dedication.

Protecting Consumers from Price Hikes

# [#]

Governor Kotek signed several bills designed to support Oregon families who are struggling to make ends meet. These new laws ban hidden online fees, make auto loans more fair and aim to protect consumers and make it easier to pay the bills.

Putting Science Ahead of Politics on Vaccine Recommendations

In a unified effort with other West Coast states, Governor Kotek has reaffirmed vaccine recommendations following the politicization of the CDC by the federal administration. By standing united, we ensure that science guides our public health policies and decisions. Tina remains committed to keeping Oregonians safe and healthy by promoting evidence-based approaches.

Thanks for tuning in to this month’s edition of Team Tina’s Newsletter. Please forward this to a friend to help us reach more Oregonians — and if someone forwarded you this message, sign up to keep receiving updates here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/mtRcnQw5MUCpt68XOFey3w2]

Thanks, team. Talk soon!

— Team Tina

Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services.
Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?

Tina for Oregon

Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]

I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks! — TK Fighting for Workers’ Rights [#] Governor Tina Kotek recently spoke at the AFL-CIO convention, where she shared her support for Senate Bill 916, which allows striking workers to access unemployment benefits — because no one should have to choose between fighting for a fair contract and putting food on the table. Preparing for Earthquake Risk Governor Kotek signed an executive order to bolster Oregon's preparedness for potential earthquakes. This proactive measure aims to safeguard our communities by enhancing resilience and readiness. Tina's focus on public safety is unwavering, and this executive order is a testament to her dedication. Protecting Consumers from Price Hikes [#] Governor Kotek signed several bills designed to support Oregon families who are struggling to make ends meet. These new laws ban hidden online fees, make auto loans more fair and aim to protect consumers and make it easier to pay the bills. [**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 15 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94102?t=7&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94102?t=8&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94102?t=9&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94102?t=10&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21303%2E878179%2EBLbcgM).**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: How I plan to solve Colorado's housing crisis:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
We can make Colorado affordable again – but I first need your help to win.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786974/571466420/-2054079050?refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UtySZWHxSBKNcezecbIjdDUyR6DxZLntuNGYWam59s=)
---
**No matter where I go across our state, I keep hearing the same stories:**
_Families love Colorado but aren’t sure if they can afford to stay.

Parents worry their kids may never be able to buy a home here.

Young people entering the workforce struggle to find a place near their jobs.

Seniors who spent a lifetime building their communities looking to downsize but can’t._
**In many parts of Colorado, the number of hours a family must work to afford a mortgage has doubled over the past decade, even though average wages have increased by nearly 50%.**
I'm running to tackle this crisis head-on – but ahead of my biggest end-of-quarter fundraising deadline yet on Sept. 30, I can't solve it as Colorado's next governor without your help, starting today.
_[**So if you're short on time, then before I dive into my housing platform, will you please chip in toward my $30,000 end-of-quarter goal now to help me win this race and make Colorado affordable again?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786975/571466421/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UtySZWHxSBKNcezecbIjdDUyR6DxZLntuNGYWam59s=)_
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786976/571466422/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UtySZWHxSBKNcezecbIjdDUyR6DxZLntuNGYWam59s=)
---
**Here's the rundown of what I plan to do:**
🏗️ Increase state-supported housing supply by as much as 30% by 2035
🏠 Help renters become owners by bringing starter homes back to Colorado
💰 Improve and expand support for first-time homebuyers
🏚️ Preserve and rehabilitate existing houses into affordable homes
❌ Eliminate expensive, unnecessary red tape through state government that is reliable, consistent and efficient
📈 Expand and strengthen state financing to attract private investments in housing statewide
📉 Lower the cost of construction, permitting and regulatory delays
🫂 Reduce homelessness and address the root causes of housing instability
Housing should be a foundation for opportunity in Colorado, not a barrier to it. We owe it to ourselves, and the next generation, to make homeownership in our state within reach of us all – because it's key to building a future.
So as governor, I'll bring everyone to the table – from state and local government, to builders, to nonprofits, to philanthropists, to businesses – to deliver meaningful change.
**And if we act with urgency and vision, I know that together, we can build a Colorado where every family has an affordable place to call home.**
But I won't be able to make this happen without your urgent support today.
**_[Please, friend, join me in the fight to make Colorado the most affordable state to live, work and raise a family by pitching in $5, $25 or the best gift you can make to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786977/571466423/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UtySZWHxSBKNcezecbIjdDUyR6DxZLntuNGYWam59s=)_**

body:
Demand the DOJ Release the Epstein Files NOW
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786982/571466430/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xOQ8I47kquY6U9NY2HZBsiyklurL--E0WTxS6aJ2zk=)
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia, the top-ranking Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
I need your help to break a 40-day wall of silence and obstruction.
Last month, Oversight Dems subpoenaed the FULL, unredacted files from the Department of Justice to get justice for survivors and expose every single person involved in Epstein’s ring of predators.
**Their response?_A giant nothingburger._** They sent over old, already-public files to distract us. Meanwhile, Republicans are just... letting them get away with it.
But we’re fighting back. Last week, we got documents from the Epstein Estate and directly verified that Donald Trump’s creepy birthday note to Epstein is, in fact, real. **But this is just one piece of the puzzle they're trying to hide.**
We cannot let them bury the truth. The survivors and the American public deserve justice.
**[That’s why I’m demanding the Department of Justice comply with our subpoena and release the full Epstein files. Will you add your name right now to put the pressure on Trump’s DOJ to finally expose his ultimate cover-up once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786983/571466431/-1957785870?refcode=250923_RG_40-day-pet-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xOQ8I47kquY6U9NY2HZBsiyklurL--E0WTxS6aJ2zk=&emci=85f1d8ff-8b98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c624796-b898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
[add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786984/571466432/-1957785870?refcode=250923_RG_40-day-pet-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xOQ8I47kquY6U9NY2HZBsiyklurL--E0WTxS6aJ2zk=&emci=85f1d8ff-8b98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c624796-b898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
The Department of Justice has a duty to uphold the rule of law in this country. And right now, they’re burying the evidence to let Trump get away with his heinous crimes.
**This will not stand.**
**[Republicans know that their days sweeping Trump’s Epstein ties under the rug are coming to an end. They’re running scared. And with your help, we can put the pressure on, finally release the files, and hold dangerous predators like Trump accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115786985/571466433/-1957785870?refcode=250923_RG_40-day-pet-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyNDc5Ni1iODk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xOQ8I47kquY6U9NY2HZBsiyklurL--E0WTxS6aJ2zk=&emci=85f1d8ff-8b98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c624796-b898-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
The survivors and the American public deserve the truth. It’s time to release the files.
Robert Garcia

Hey folks,
**Katie Phang** joined me for the very first edition of our new weekly series, _Wellness Check_ , and we covered so much ground. From Charlie Kirk and the permission structures of the right, to algorithms, to protecting your peace in Miami--we went deep on life, politics, and everything in between. Katie is sharp, candid, and just plain fun to talk with. This one set the bar high.
* [00:04:59] Katie on finding peace outside of constant productivity culture--and why it matters
* [00:09:29] Living in Miami, the looming Trump library, and what it feels like to raise a daughter there
* [00:16:00] The realities of engaging on right-wing platforms as a woman of color and former Republican
* [00:23:00] What "swing voters" are really crying out for--and how both parties have failed them
* [00:31:30] Katie on grace, boundaries, and why she's okay walking away from bad-faith relationships

**[This debut episode is a mix of humor, hard truth, and the kind of grounded conversation we need more of. If you believe in building community and creating space for honest dialogue, becoming a paid subscriber makes all of this possible. Don't miss the chance to be part of it.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ad62b7-412f-4901-b255-2cab386bec4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! | Fellow American, I’ll be blunt. To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! If we start missing our fundraising deadlines, we’ll have to start slashing key components of our campaign infrastructure. Right now, we’re in serious danger of falling short of our upcoming End of Quarter fundraising objective by just a few dollars. In a race as contested as the one we’re facing, we need every part of our campaign running at full speed now through Election Day. I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but donations from patriots like you across the country add up fast. I don’t have the luxury of leaning on coastal elites and Leftist megadonors to keep my campaign running. Your support is the lifeblood of my campaign’s fight to keep this Senate seat and our Senate Majority in Republican hands. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Team Mazie
subject: How does this make sense?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:

Peter, Health insurance companies are raising premiums by up to 18% — the largest increase in _15 years_ — because of Donald Trump’s tariffs. This comes after Republicans voted to kick _millions_ of Americans off their health insurance with their Big Ugly Bill. And don’t forget that Donald Trump promised that he was going to “Make America Healthy Again” on the campaign trail. **How does this make sense, Peter?** Republicans are doing everything _but_ making America healthy again. From putting RFK Jr. in charge of our public health so he can undermine vaccines and fire thousands of health professionals to slashing funding for cancer research, this regime is putting millions of people in Hawaii and across the country at risk. **[While Trump and RFK Jr. are decimating our agencies like the Department of Health and Human Services and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), Mazie is fighting back. clean_body: | Peter, Health insurance companies are raising premiums by up to 18% — the largest increase in 15 years — because of Donald Trump’s tariffs. This comes after Republicans voted to kick millions of Americans off their health insurance with their Big Ugly Bill. And don’t forget that Donald Trump promised that he was going to “Make America Healthy Again” on the campaign trail. How does this make sense, Peter? Republicans are doing everything but making America healthy again. From putting RFK Jr. in charge of our public health so he can undermine vaccines and fire thousands of health professionals to slashing funding for cancer research, this regime is putting millions of people in Hawaii and across the country at risk. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It’s more important than ever that Congress steps up to defend the future of our country. subject: Big news re: Jimmy Kimmel

body:

Hey Peter, I’m excited to share that Jimmy Kimmel is _back_ on the air. Here's what happened: Last week, I led a resolution that over 115 of my Democratic colleagues in Congress signed onto. We pushed back against the authoritarian attempts to silence free speech, speaking out against Donald Trump and the officials in his administration. Peter, this wasn’t just because of this resolution. **It was because millions of you also stood up in defense of free speech — and it worked. ** Far too often, Trump and his administration make us feel hopeless. They flood the zone with ridiculous policies and authoritarian plans. They make us feel powerless. **But we aren’t powerless. We can speak out, fight back, and defend our democracy. ** When we organize and mobilize together, we can win — and we will continue to do so. This is a proud moment, but we can’t rest on our victory. Because Donald Trump will continue to come after free speech. He wants to systematically silence us, one journalist, comedian, or politician at a time. _We can’t let him._ [Chip in to help keep up the fight. Every time Trump comes for our rights, we respond — and your support powers our resistance. name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
We’re reaching out to ask you to make a contribution ahead of our September 30 FEC deadline. But before we ask, you deserve an explanation.
Now that James is running for the U.S. Senate, our campaign has to regularly report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. It’s about transparency, so the public can see who is funding these Senate campaigns.
That’s great. We’re proud to show the world that this is a true grassroots campaign. We’re funded by the people, not corporate PACs.
But the numbers we report are also analyzed by the media and our opponents. They’ll be judging if our movement has what it takes to beat the billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. A weak report means they write us off.
We cannot let that happen. We need to send a message loud and clear that the people are behind James. We need to put in the work now to have the resources and grassroots organizing power to win this campaign.
[**Please, if you can, make a contribution today. It’s critical that we have as many donations as possible before the FEC deadline. Each one is a powerful show of force for our movement.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250923-ak&t=1&akid=52%2E1347274%2Echw8Ee)
Look, most people wouldn’t try to launch a campaign 21 days before an FEC deadline.
Most insiders would tell a candidate to give themselves as much time as possible. They say you need weeks and weeks of calling mega-donors to raise as much money as possible.
But James doesn’t follow the DC playbook. He doesn’t do things like a typical politician.
If we’re going to win, it will require taking risks.
He believed in our movement. And he took a leap of faith that you would have his back when it mattered. That even with a short amount of time, we could do big things.
[**Can you make a contribution today to have James’ back? Our job is to stun the political world. We’ll show them why you don’t bet against James and the people of Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250923-ak&t=2&akid=52%2E1347274%2Echw8Ee)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

Thank you in advance.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Promises made, promises broken
disclaimer_text: paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health care
body:
Remember Trump’s repeated promises during the campaign to lower prices for working families?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787139/571467082/1435897075?refcode=email_092325_broken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkzNDk4Zi1iOTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sa7iYlNbe6WSabayg7o8Jy0AfZhTXY1ymrwTpxv9pzs=&emci=261c0191-7695-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ee93498f-b998-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Folks, remember Trump’s repeated promises during the campaign to lower prices for working families? _Look where that got us:_ _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787140/571467083/-984874665?refcode=email_092325_broken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkzNDk4Zi1iOTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sa7iYlNbe6WSabayg7o8Jy0AfZhTXY1ymrwTpxv9pzs=)_**It’s been just eight months since Trump took office, and Americans are already sicker and poorer than they were. So far we’ve seen prices RISE in grocery stores across the country as his reckless tariff-taxes drive up inflation, taking more and more money out of your wallet each month.** Donald Trump promised he wouldn’t touch Medicaid, then turned his back on working people and signed lavish tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy into law — _paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health care._ Trump promised to lower energy prices, but his budget _(the Big, Beautiful Betrayal, as we like to call it)_ guts tax credits for clean energy sources like wind and solar, and jacks up your energy bill in the long term. He even promised to release the Epstein files once in office — _and eight months later, we’re still waiting for the truth._ It’s the Donald Trump cycle: _**Promises made, promises broken.**_ But the thing is, we have a real shot at putting a stop to all this chaos and dysfunction — **by defending Colorado and helping Democrats take back the Senate majority on Election Day.[_So if you’re with us, can we count on your support today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787141/571467084/-984874665?refcode=email_092325_broken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkzNDk4Zi1iOTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sa7iYlNbe6WSabayg7o8Jy0AfZhTXY1ymrwTpxv9pzs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787142/571467085/1397206114?refcode=email_092325_broken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkzNDk4Zi1iOTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sa7iYlNbe6WSabayg7o8Jy0AfZhTXY1ymrwTpxv9pzs=)
