name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207ma4w0fntcqg6120v9wcxqso1c9zamap6i5hthc88n8b5csxoobq5sslfs8gkuudvnpc0hpam7iyiv8f9&__stmp=t325pr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=5am8d02cgef0gvzvskoz72n9agou2yw0w14zoibn8j84sx80h280aecem2v69cye7guffs2463w1tzgidnnfwxzztnjngn1ivwsvvfgpfzdgtbgyzmy6q6ivy1gr7fa2teylii2lop7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t325pr&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Healthcare execs getting richer — and we’re still denied care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump’s tax policies gave $34 billion away to health care executives.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250923-5461-footer&t=1&akid=5461%2E420207%2EJWySen)
Peter,
Under President Trump, the healthcare industry is raking in record-breaking profits — while patients pay more, are denied care more often, and live in fear of going bankrupt just for getting the care they need to live.
Thanks to Trump’s 2017 tax law, seven of the largest healthcare corporations avoided **more than $34 billion** in taxes. That’s a 75% increase in profits.
And what did they do with all that money?
* Did they pass along savings to consumers and decrease costs?
* Did they deny fewer claims for sick patients?
* Did they finally give their workers a real raise?

**Nope. They gave it to their top executives and shareholders. Six executives — _yes, just six_ — received a combined $100 million in additional pay.**
How do Trump and Republicans respond? By slashing Medicare — just to fund even more tax breaks for the same greedy corporations.
And it only gets worse. As healthcare corporate executives profit, **more sick patients are being denied insurance claims** — while the industry doesn’t even try to hide how disgusting their practices have become.
Take Centene, a company that denies millions of claims every year, only to have **93%** of denials overturned when patients appeal. Their strategy is clear: reject legitimate claims and hope the patient is too busy — or too sick — to fight back.
Peter, this is what happens when you treat healthcare like a business — not a human right.
But we don’t have to accept it. In fact, we already know what the solution is: **Medicare for All.**
It’s not radical — it’s what every other major industrialized country does. But greedy corporations have funded a decades-long lobbying campaign to control politicians' votes.
But that won’t work on me. I’ve fought for Medicare for All every single day in Congress, and I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. I know the only way we’ll ever break this cycle is with grassroots power — and with people like you standing up and saying enough is enough.
[**Chip in $3 or whatever you can to help fuel my work for Medicare for All.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250923-1?refcode=em20250923-5461&amount=3&refcode2=5461_420207_JWySen&akid=5461%2E420207%2EJWySen)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250923-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250923-5461&refcode2=5461_420207_JWySen&akid=5461%2E420207%2EJWySen)**
Together, we’re building a movement to make Medicare for All a reality — because no one in the richest country on Earth should be denied care so a CEO can buy a second beach house.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250923-5461-footer&t=2&refcode2=5461_420207_JWySen&akid=5461%2E420207%2EJWySen)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5461%2E420207%2EJWySen)

name: Team AOC
subject: “So bad.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
On Fox News Sunday night, Trump said AOC’s philosophy is “so bad.”
Here are Alexandria’s beliefs and philosophy:
* That in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world, when a person gets sick, they shouldn’t go bankrupt. **Common sense.**
* A minimum wage should cover the minimum cost to live. **Common sense.**
* Alexandria believes that homes are not slot machines for investors and Wall Street to extort working families out of every last dollar that they have.

Donald Trump and Fox News love to paint Alexandria as an extremist with values straight out of the communist manifesto.
**But Alexandria believes these things because she was a waitress.** Because she’s had to work double shifts to keep the lights on. Because she’s in Congress to represent working families like hers.
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[ Will you donate $5 to power our fight for progress? Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or curry favor with billionaires, so every donation makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250923.OwWqv7&refcode=em20250923-9805-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9805%2E2526796%2Esm2jZs)

Whether or not you contribute today, thank you for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: David Hogg
subject: If anything happens to me…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’ve been thinking a lot about the moment we’re in.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250923-1&t=1&akid=2683%2E587540%2Ep6G72Z)
Peter,
I’ve been thinking a lot about the moment we’re in. About the threats that come with speaking out. And I want to be clear about something.
**If anything ever happens to me — if I’m ever killed by one of these right-wing extremists — I want you to politicize the hell out of it. Immediately. I’m talking before my blood runs cold.**
* Use it to demand gun laws.
* Use it to call out the politicians who enabled it.
* Use it to raise hell and kick out every Democrat and Republican who stood in the way of progress.

This is not a note I’m writing out of fear. It’s a note I’m writing with _purpose_. I’m sharing this because we live in a dangerous world, and silence has never kept us safe.
I will never be the person who says “don’t make this political” — because our lives are already political. Our schools. Our streets. Our futures. They’ve been politicized by people with power who refuse to protect us.
So if they ever try to say I wouldn’t have wanted people to speak out if I’m gone...
**_Don’t believe it._**
I do want people to speak up, to take action. Now and always. That’s why I’m in this fight.
We believe a better future is possible — one that’s free from gun violence, fueled by courage, and powered by young people who aren’t afraid to demand more.
Stay safe. Stay loud. And keep going.
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250923-1&t=2&refcode2=2683_587540_p6G72Z&akid=2683%2E587540%2Ep6G72Z)**

Friends, Would you support Democrats shutting down the government to stop MAGA extremists? On MSNBC, Seth didn’t hesitate. He said it loud and clear: **“Absolutely”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787385/571468080/1866411932?refcode=250923_Seth_MFC_ShutdownClip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM3YTUzZS1iYjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlvKrOhFohth5LP6soc5YhkIKEuTIBEj8XrSSqcYyds=) Here’s the truth: the chaos caucus in Congress has already ground Washington to a halt. They’ve hijacked government funding to push an extremist agenda. And the only way to stop them is to stand firm – even if it means shutting things down. Seth knows the stakes couldn’t be higher and he understands now’s the time for Democrats to dig in and fight.
* MAGA Republicans want to slash Social Security and Medicare
* They want to roll back reproductive rights nationwide
* They’re trying to draw new Congressional maps and rig the midterms

That’s why Seth is saying what too many Democrats won’t: **We have to be willing to fight fire with fire.** [**Can you show Seth that you’ve got his back by making a contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787386/571468081/1866411932?refcode=250923_Seth_MFC_ShutdownClip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM3YTUzZS1iYjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlvKrOhFohth5LP6soc5YhkIKEuTIBEj8XrSSqcYyds=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115787387/571468082/1866411932?amount=18&refcode=250923_Seth_MFC_ShutdownClip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM3YTUzZS1iYjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlvKrOhFohth5LP6soc5YhkIKEuTIBEj8XrSSqcYyds= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

body:
We promise this email is worth the read: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115788000/571469940/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDgxMWYzMi1iZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OzqABuTMc3w1cv6UCxBC50qNjfp9Zbmd_5UYam7VCHg=&emci=ae1b5243-9d98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=14811f32-bd98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, in a moment, we're going to ask you to [**consider chipping in $5, or anything you can, to support Kim and ensure this campaign stays in fighting shape.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115788002/571469942/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250923_thrwrk_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250923_thrwrk_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=14811f32-bd98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDgxMWYzMi1iZDk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OzqABuTMc3w1cv6UCxBC50qNjfp9Zbmd_5UYam7VCHg=) _But first, let us explain why we're asking:_

When Kim decided to become a doctor, it wasn't because it was an easy path—it was because she felt a deep calling to help people.

She chose pediatrics for a reason. Kim knew that if you give kids a strong, healthy foundation, you set them up for a lifetime of opportunity.

Parents came to her during their most anxious moments: Worried about fevers, struggling with questions about vaccines, or looking for guidance on how to raise healthy kids in an uncertain world.

Kim listened, gave reassurance, and always took the time to talk through any questions and offer her patients the care and respect they deserved. That's why families trusted her, because they knew she would put in the work every single time. **But there came a moment when Kim realized her patients needed her in a different way.**

When politicians threatened to take away healthcare protections for millions of Americans, including children and people with pre-existing conditions like Kim herself, she knew she couldn't stand by and watch as American families struggled. She made another choice to serve and left the exam room she loved to step into a new kind of service: **Running for Congress.**

And just like she did in medicine, Kim started by listening. She knocked on doors, sat down with neighbors, and had honest conversations about what families in Washington's 8th District were really facing. From the rising cost of living and the strain of medical bills to the fear of losing hard-won protections like reproductive care, Kim promised to fight for the best interests of the American people, and she's been delivering on that promise ever since in the House.

Kim knows that leadership isn't about headlines or grandstanding—it's about showing up, listening, and doing the hard work to make people's lives better. That's the kind of leader Kim is, and that's the kind of leadership we need now in the face of unrelenting attacks against essential American freedoms.

[**But the truth is, Kim is one of the most vulnerable members of Congress. Special interests and extremists are already targeting this district, because they know how much is at stake. If you believe in leaders who answer the call to serve, not for themselves, but for their communities, then we need you with us. Can you chip in today to help Kim keep fighting for Washington families in body:

He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. If you would like to unsubscribe from this list, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ftyCir6CcU6Y5W3bkJVHYQ2?unsubscribedata=trv2VikjLAwAD3LHL%2BDDAuMwVTazAOof8VKmWlKRuOQPfR7Vi5CL6R2klDHI7baG7p%2FWiW85ZSSn1EbDja8kx17TB6L4yAiCYgj9%2FRcjw2RHnk%2FZb2Xl2H6UI6FZrW0CS1vFVfIN0bRmCLDAUOhsYU9ho9Y0GbPnzn5WV87%2BdZqvtCJiDewIGOvAVE%2B38Xz1McOZM6s5tpsbE31X0xYzaAdlQaRDwn%2BdDt0SgmkqqPZdnEUwYT9ddAvBIG2E3uLKH2sI9YtcTW0nRm%2Bq8Ecz%2FZTo5gwDRxSmxaLQNUq7TVDTezvmMYWft9OAw%2FUUz%2FLLE8BXYzc5trr8CxQg183vlCXNxHGFhcbfCJ6ur8Cu1LB9HVGLqxPicy1S9TjE7aAh1KQkiJSuXqbRtS8Kqj%2BK%2BOgSskS3kKARSNj8UROfGKDySUJo30jc470CMJsOX5AC) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115788262/571470815/-181333179?source=EM_NBI_KS_20250923_FR_MAGAEconomics_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWYyNzE0MWMtYmU5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FveuLGs-8-LT2XO7NoD2pHcV01m_MF_pRh-mtQFdOYE=&emci=9827141c-be98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9f27141c-be98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6708998)
---
**Peter, the numbers don’t lie.**

Last month, the U.S. added just **_22,000 jobs_**. That number is far below expectations. And to make matters worse, June and July’s numbers were revised downward too.

This is what happens when MAGA’s economic policies run the show: higher costs, fewer jobs, and a shrinking future for working families.

This is the reality of MAGA’s economic policies:
* Tariffs that drive up prices on Alabama families.
* Policies that shrink our markets and choke small businesses.
* A one-party machine in our state that ignores working people while rewarding the wealthy and well-connected.

**_Meanwhile, politicians like Tommy Tuberville would rather parrot talking points than admit what’s happening right in front of us._**

I know Alabamians are tired of being left behind. Families in Mobile, Birmingham, Huntsville, they’re all feeling the squeeze. We deserve leaders who fight for fair wages, real job growth, and an economy that works for everyone and not just the powerful few.

But building that future takes all of us.

clean_body: | Kyle Sweetser is running for Senate because he knows that Alabama deserves real representatives, not party pawns. He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. If you would like to unsubscribe from this list, | Peter, the numbers don’t lie. Last month, the U.S. added just 22,000 jobs. That number is far below expectations. And to make matters worse, June and July’s numbers were revised downward too. This is what happens when MAGA’s economic policies run the show: higher costs, fewer jobs, and a shrinking future for working families. This is the reality of MAGA’s economic policies: Tariffs that drive up prices on Alabama families. Policies that shrink our markets and choke small businesses. A one-party machine in our state that ignores working people while rewarding the wealthy and well-connected. Meanwhile, politicians like Tommy Tuberville would rather parrot talking points than admit what’s happening right in front of us. I know Alabamians are tired of being left behind. Families in Mobile, Birmingham, Huntsville, they’re all feeling the squeeze. We deserve leaders who fight for fair wages, real job growth, and an economy that works for everyone and not just the powerful few. But building that future takes all of us. = | = The stakes couldn’t be clearer: MAGA is dragging us down. Together, we can stand up and demand better. — Kyle = | Follow us on , and ! Peter, Labor built our state, and we’re proud to have their back every day. 21 years of Republican control has left our wages trailing neighboring states, and led to unprecedented attacks on workers, including Right to Work and laws that make it harder for Hoosiers to join a union. We know Trump’s administration is building a two-tiered economy that has workers on the bottom and billionaires on the top. That’s why we’re focused on the three Ws: Workers, Wages, and Wallets. **[We know when we elect more Democrats, Hoosier workers and their families win, not billionaire shareholders. Liberals are betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump’s agenda.
FIRST, Democrats named me the "Most Vulnerable Republican" in Texas. THEN, they poured millions of deep-blue dollars into my district. And NOW, they've unleashed an ultra-liberal Grammy star to try to take me down.[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1b5558c3eb2d4f7d8ada52d5acf74d70&_e=i3C115FtsLJuBOk_0w9YvJgbFFUGwzekoa-3OcvkRMTUp_zNoOK9rBfj6C6-6pBMpiwY6gEIsiR8349sZ2mIJWUpVpuXxBns3hJbM6fsDBkxTrJQkwmCzOMpvyangruLAnfwaUbi-_e-W8a7zUxA9wCM7dey5nokTEW2cuBiHKLo_mQ0-pxTmnHVo3wN8w55PEXE-cH1W-_xpeVmNmNt51FQxHCeS0sOMbASfmz9DJ8t789e6rEN5ZN-2U8tvpcxgGaefC285Ej_qnFb-iagPlWSoOU0w15_cPYmy_ivko4RQlFMlArfGlzSTrJFgqErsyfE79XWxz8jzuga6ltt2ThMHpZxE6H_zIlv0BzJnWwKVhB3EGMbkw2ymZklMwe0p6cPJCX4ME0y_WrVYnyiNWN85cFep5EX-ugGJlNMmQvd7Gs1wt8fXZ4tvq4ufx3TkSgixSfSEf85zL8bm0JwC4FIm-wp8v4RR7lyDY-aicGsD9OQgaDrE4kHJCPVruBe5suiH9kkV6P9D_j1DU3iYlX83HdHkbTg38KL5fsXimE7lkM-4WcnbZQ5KJ9eQ-H5pgCoLcu-wxxelnFgfKqEwVIxea-_22ZA0IujYA9aXGMtyht0sltYT-0KcUNxzVlYhPfp_zIYA24WklnfT_bBz3Lmv-udaHO_B3cZT1ChR_1eWIM8rthr85PNR01dJFQC5GLJ7YlnY6Tn0aKl3gHoj04Yy4q0p-bXYIL4GRzs9onWwoXBlpa9dD63xKDlfxGdQU-u9eZKs-TBcJ1BDNKIBg%3D%3D)This is Monica De La Cruz, and I need your help.
I'm 100% MAGA - proudly endorsed by President Trump himself. But that endorsement put a bullseye on my back, and now Democrats are unloading everything they've got to crush us.
Texas-15 is not just another race - it is the most critical House seat in America. We made HISTORY by flipping it in 2022, and we shocked the nation by defending it again in 2024. But now, the Left is pouring everything they have into erasing those victories.
They know our GOP House Majority hangs by a thread - and they're betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump's agenda.

clean_body: Liberals are betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump’s agenda. FIRST, Democrats named me the "Most Vulnerable Republican" in Texas. THEN, they poured millions of deep-blue dollars into my district. And NOW, they've unleashed an ultra-liberal Grammy star to try to take me down. is Monica De La Cruz, and I need your help. I'm 100% MAGA - proudly endorsed by President Trump himself. But that endorsement put a bullseye on my back, and now Democrats are unloading everything they've got to crush us. Texas-15 is not just another race - it is the most critical House seat in America. We made HISTORY by flipping it in 2022, and we shocked the nation by defending it again in 2024. But now, the Left is pouring everything they have into erasing those victories. They know our GOP House Majority hangs by a thread - and they're betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump's agenda. If they succeed, our Majority is GONE. Trump's agenda? Stopped in its tracks. isn't a red carpet walk - it's a fight to defend Texas-15, protect our Republican Majority, and keep President Trump's America First movement alive. If we can rally enough grassroots support in the next 24 hours, we will send Democrats a message they cannot ignore: our MAGA movement is unbreakable, unstoppable, and ready for the fight of our lives. The deadline is MIDNIGHT tonight. Can I count on you Peter? you,Monica De La Cruz * Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list! name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Virginia Is NOT For Sale!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
I want to level with you. Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He thinks he can buy this seat.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us9.campaign-archive.com/?e=606d7e9aa2&u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=08cc3d881e)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=94027f94a7&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Friends,
I want to level with you. **Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He has made a fortune off renting to our community.** When the chance came to give people an option besides breaking the bank on overpriced rent,**he was the only member of the council to vote against an affordable housing project.**
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=17789a5d42&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | That tells you everything you need to know about who he fights for.
Here is the kicker: **Danville is one of the few localities in Virginia with its own municipal power grid, a legacy of the New Deal. Dominion Power has wanted it for years.** Our opponent just took $10,000 from Dominion, more than half of his entire cash on hand. He is sitting on only $18,000, and Dominion is counting on him to be their man inside Richmond.
**I do not take a dime from Dominion.** I do not vote for my best interest; I vote for the best interest of the people. I always have, and I always will. Our city, and all of Southside, is not for sale.
This is our chance. He is vulnerable right now, but only if we have the funds to get our message out. **Dominion and the landlord lobby are not going to sit this out**. If we go dollar for dollar with them in these final weeks, we win. If we do not, we risk letting one of the most self-interested politicians in Virginia slip into office.
I need you to step up today. Not next week. Not tomorrow. **Today.**
Your [contribution of $50, $100, or $250](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=0a3fe41c64&e=606d7e9aa2) **will go straight into keeping ads on the air, signs in the ground, and organizers in the field**. Every dollar matters.
**We cannot afford to let Dominion and a self-funded landlord buy this seat. Let us prove once again that the people’s voices are louder than corporate checks.**

---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=9f99e389a0&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | With determination,

Dr. Gary Miller
Democratic Nominee
House of Delegates
49th District
---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=dff4d28f30&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=3dac410b13&e=606d7e9aa2)
---

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Thank you to Everyone Who Came to Our 30,000 Book Giveaway!
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170690.172899.729&gen=1).

#
# **30,000 Book Giveaway!**
**** Thank you to everyone who came out this weekend to participate in the Reading Opens the World Literacy Fair that Senator Hughes co-hosted in partnership with the [American Federation of Teachers](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170690.172899.729&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15518), the [Philadelphia Federation of Teachers](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170690.172899.729&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15519), and [Councilmember Katherine Gilmore Richardson](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170690.172899.729&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15520). More than 2,500 Philadelphians joined us to enjoy free books and show their love of reading. Attendees received free books, Legos, health screenings, food, and laptop giveaways. It was an incredible event that celebrated reading, education, and families learning together. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170690.172899.729&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15521) The tremendous turnout showed that the community wants more access to books and more learning resources for our children. Senator Hughes is committed to doing more!

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Erika Kirk's Shocking Forgiveness Statement Stuns Crowd
body:
Plus, The REAL Reason Kimmel Got Suspended. New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=84a6185c5b&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | People from around the world flooded Arizona Sunday for what became less of a funeral and more of a revival. The Charlie Kirk memorial lasted 5.5 hours and featured the entire Trump cabinet - but [it was Erika Kirk's stunning forgiveness statement that left everyone speechless.](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2fabb9b070&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3702d16aad&e=567664f14c)
| |
🔥 **CHARLIE KIRK MEMORIAL BECOMES HISTORIC REVIVAL**
Nearly 65,000 packed into State Farm Stadium while close to 35,000 were put in overflow areas for Charlie Kirk's memorial service. President Trump, JD Vance, Tulsi Gabbard, and virtually the entire cabinet attended the 5.5-hour service that felt more like a political revival than a traditional funeral.
The most powerful moment came when Erika Kirk, now CEO of Turning Point USA, publicly forgave Tyler Robinson - Charlie's assassin. Standing before the world, she echoed Christ's words: "Father, forgive them for they know not what they do." The entire stadium erupted in a standing ovation.
JD Vance brought fire to the crowd, declaring: "They tried to silence Charlie Kirk, and instead we have had a revival!" Trump called Charlie "immortal" and a "modern martyr for American freedom."
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5ffc4e19b3&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🚨 **JIMMY KIMMEL SUSPENDED - BUT NOT BY TRUMP**
Here's what the media won't tell you about Jimmy Kimmel's suspension: Trump and his administration had NOTHING to do with it. This was pure business.
Kimmel's ratings have cratered 75% since 2010 - he's down to just 160,000 viewers while costing ABC $16 million annually. Major affiliate ownership groups Nexstar and Sinclair finally said "enough" after Kimmel deliberately lied about the Charlie Kirk shooting, claiming the assassin was MAGA when everyone knew Tyler Robinson was a radicalized leftist.
The real kicker? FCC Chair Brendan Carr overstepped by threatening ABC on a podcast, drawing criticism even from Ted Cruz who called it "dangerous as hell." But Carr didn't actually file any complaints - this was angry affiliates protecting their collapsing brands.
We break down the devastating ratings charts showing how late-night TV lost three-quarters of its audience by telling half the country to pound sand.

💰 **GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: DEMOCRATS WON'T RISK IT**
Trump mentioned potential government shutdowns, but here's why Democrats will cave: The president always wins these fights because "keep government open" is simpler than complex policy explanations.
Even John Fetterman (yes, Mark's hoodie buddy) warned against shutdowns as "dangerous tactics."
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=08d1abc357&e=567664f14c)
---
|

clean_body: Plus, The REAL Reason Kimmel Got Suspended. New for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | | | | | | | | People from around the world flooded Arizona Sunday for what became less of a funeral and more of a revival. The Charlie Kirk memorial lasted 5.5 hours and featured the entire Trump cabinet - but | | 🔥 CHARLIE KIRK MEMORIAL BECOMES HISTORIC REVIVAL Nearly 65,000 packed into State Farm Stadium while close to 35,000 were put in overflow areas for Charlie Kirk's memorial service. President Trump, JD Vance, Tulsi Gabbard, and virtually the entire cabinet attended the 5.5-hour service that felt more like a political revival than a traditional funeral. The most powerful moment came when Erika Kirk, now CEO of Turning Point USA, publicly forgave Tyler Robinson - Charlie's assassin. Standing before the world, she echoed Christ's words: "Father, forgive them for they know not what they do." The entire stadium erupted in a standing ovation. JD Vance brought fire to the crowd, declaring: "They tried to silence Charlie Kirk, and instead we have had a revival!" Trump called Charlie "immortal" and a "modern martyr for American freedom." | | | 🚨 JIMMY KIMMEL SUSPENDED - BUT NOT BY TRUMP Here's what the media won't tell you about Jimmy Kimmel's suspension: Trump and his administration had NOTHING to do with it. This was pure business. Kimmel's ratings have cratered 75% since 2010 - he's down to just 160,000 viewers while costing ABC $16 million annually. Major affiliate ownership groups Nexstar and Sinclair finally said "enough" after Kimmel deliberately lied about the Charlie Kirk shooting, claiming the assassin was MAGA when everyone knew Tyler Robinson was a radicalized leftist. The real kicker? FCC Chair Brendan Carr overstepped by threatening ABC on a podcast, drawing criticism even from Ted Cruz who called it "dangerous as hell." But Carr didn't actually file any complaints - this was angry affiliates protecting their collapsing brands. We break down the devastating ratings charts showing how late-night TV lost three-quarters of its audience by telling half the country to pound sand. 💰 GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: DEMOCRATS WON'T RISK IT Trump mentioned potential government shutdowns, but here's why Democrats will cave: The president always wins these fights because "keep government open" is simpler than complex policy explanations. Even John Fetterman (yes, Mark's hoodie buddy) warned against shutdowns as "dangerous tactics." | | | | ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 We reveal how Erika Kirk plans to make Turning Point "the biggest thing this nation has ever seen," why network affiliates are revolting against partisan hosts, and what the latest 2026 congressional polling really means. Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Gaza and the Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
We have a plan that gets the Democrats back to winning. But we can’t do it without your help.
Peter,
This is a longer email than usual, but I hope you’ll give me just 30 seconds to make my case to you. I promise, it’s important.
When I see the horrific, authoritarian, regressive stuff that Donald Trump is doing, it makes me sick.
We need to see the Democrats get back to winning again. Don’t you agree?
So how do we get to a point where Democrats can retake the Senate and House, setting us up to retake the White House?
The unfortunate answer is we’re not there yet. Our party leaders are wedded to a 1990s playbook that won’t work. (Keep reading, because we have a way forward.)
**There is no issue where this tired old playbook is more clearly on display than when talking about the genocide in Gaza.**
Americans of all political persuasions are furious that we are sending our tax dollars overseas to aid Benjamin Netanyahu in bombing and starving the children and families of Gaza.
Yet the establishment of both political parties has supported this. And voters are fed up. Nearly 8-in-10 Democrats and a majority of independents call it a genocide.
Shamefully, Democratic establishment leaders ignore the fact that sentiment has changed rapidly. And as we speak, they are doing their best to squash the next generation of qualified Democratic candidates (myself included) on the basis that they are not pro-Israel enough.
**When Democrats are out of step with our base and the broader electorate, we cannot win.**
So, people will say, _Abdul, what is the solution?_ How do we get the Democratic Party to speak with one voice on this issue? How do we show moral clarity to the voters in a way that allows us to finally defeat the forces of Trumpism?
Well, my friends, it starts with dealing a few decisive blows in races like mine.
There is a war going on with the AIPAC-establishment wing of the Democratic Party. And that war will be fought in small and medium-sized battles all across the nation.
One of the most critical battles is happening here in Michigan, and whether or not we win comes down to what folks like you decide in response to emails like these.
On September 30, we will close the books on our mandatory FEC deadline. All the money we’ve raised to that point will become public, and so will our opponents’ fundraising numbers.
Those same establishment politicians and all the political pundits will be watching our race very closely because they know it is “Abdul vs. AIPAC.”
**If we put up big fundraising numbers, it will be a strong signal to the media and the party leadership that the energy of the party is with us. We’ll deal a major blow to AIPAC and the establishment leaders who defer to them.** They’ll be forced to contend with the fact that their hand-picked, AIPAC-funded candidates lack the popular support to win here in Michigan and nationwide.
So when I ask you for money, it’s not just about winning this race — although that is very, very important. It’s about all of us together sending an unmistakable message about where the Democratic Party needs to go.
We have the opportunity to do that on September 30, but only if a sizable portion of the people reading this email now choose to dig deep and donate as much as they can to make this end-of-quarter fundraising deadline into a huge surge.
**Here is the link to give before the deadline:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250923-1-ak**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250923-1-ak?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-971&refcode2=971_251025_FX6k1a&akid=971%2E251025%2EFX6k1a)
Thank you for allowing me to spell out my thoughts here. I believe all of us deeply want to see the Democrats get back to winning elections. And it’ll take winning first in each incremental moment leading up to 2026 for us to make that happen.
This deadline is no exception.
Before I go, I would be remiss if I didn’t mention that the forces of AIPAC will be working extremely hard to oppose us in this fight. They are backing my opponent in this primary. And they know how important this September deadline is to the narrative.
That’s why I’m approaching this deadline with such urgency, and I hope you will too.
**One more time, here’s the link to give. Share with family and friends who can support us too:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250923-1-ak**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250923-1-ak?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-971&refcode2=971_251025_FX6k1a&akid=971%2E251025%2EFX6k1a)
In solidarity,
Abdul

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=2&akid=971%2E251025%2EFX6k1a)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=971%2E251025%2EFX6k1a)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

name: Jay Jones
subject: I’m taking a break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q32025]
Hey folks, I just took a quick break from canvassing to reach out.
All morning, we’ve been knocking on doors, talking to Virginians about what’s at stake:
* Rising costs from tariffs are crippling working families – and my opponent, Jason Miyares, won’t stand up against Trump’s policies or his corporate donors.

* Right here in Virginia, our civil liberties are under threat, from reproductive rights to voting access – and Miyares is an anti-abortion extremist who has fought against expanding voting rights.

* Trump’s federal overreach is hurting Virginia’s workforce, healthcare, and democracy – and Miyares is too weak to stand up to him.
Voters should know exactly how Miyares is failing to protect us – and canvassing is how we reach them. But it takes resources to keep this effort going strong.
We need flyers to keep voters informed, clipboards to keep canvassers organized, pens to sign up supporters, and water bottles to keep canvassers hydrated.
Can we count on you to chip in to equip our canvassers and help us reach every undecided voter across Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q32025]
$4 FOR A PACK OF PENS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q32025?amount=4]

Right here in Virginia, our civil liberties are under threat, from reproductive rights to voting access – and Miyares is an anti-abortion extremist who has fought against expanding voting rights. * Trump’s federal overreach is hurting Virginia’s workforce, healthcare, and democracy – and Miyares is too weak to stand up to him. Voters should know exactly how Miyares is failing to protect us – and canvassing is how we reach them. But it takes resources to keep this effort going strong. We need flyers to keep voters informed, clipboards to keep canvassers organized, pens to sign up supporters, and water bottles to keep canvassers hydrated. Can we count on you to chip in to equip our canvassers and help us reach every undecided voter across Virginia? [] $4 FOR A PACK OF PENS [] $12 FOR A PACK OF CLIPBOARDS [] $16 FOR A PACK OF FLYERS [] $19 FOR PACKS OF WATER BOTTLES [] DONATE MORE [] I couldn’t do it without you, - Jay Jones Jay Jones for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

# Boebert clashes with Lateefah Simon
GOP Rep. Lauren Boebert went off at Democrat Rep. Lateefah Simon for berating republicans who want to curb crime in America's dangerous Democrat-run cities.
**[She did not hold back...](https://substack.com/redirect/60ccd014-1f83-4ac0-95ea-49722e1c03bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **[[TRAITORS?] Republicans turning on RFK Jr?](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just testified before the US Senate, and it was an all-out _**WAR**_.
Angry liberals questioned his assault on _**untested vaccines, the CDC and Big Pharma**_ ...
But instead of defending him, multiple turncoat Republicans _**joined in**_ on the attack.
Kennedy REFUSED to back down.
He boldly stood up for the American people and VOWED to tell them the truth.
And now, he's issued **[a terrifying new warning](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Americans need to hear in 2025.
If you were born before Jan 1st, 1965, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** affects you most of all.
Get the full facts **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
P.S. Liberals will call **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** crazy too, until they see **[the data](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Learn why RFK Jr is warning Americans about this emerging health crisis before it's too late. Watch **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ecfb4781-1879-4dd5-973e-541790fdaf08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Attempted Trump assassin found guilty on five charges - Appears to try to stab himself with pen
Ryan Routh, 59, **[was found guilty](https://substack.com/redirect/28a7089f-fed7-45d9-8625-d2ceb60b1baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on five federal counts including attempting to assassinate a major presidential candidate after lying in wait at Trump's West Palm Beach golf course for approximately 10 hours on September 15, 2024, facing a maximum sentence of life in prison.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28a7089f-fed7-45d9-8625-d2ceb60b1baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Dramatic courtroom scene follows verdict:** After the guilty verdict was read, Routh reportedly attempted to stab himself in the neck with a pen before being restrained by U.S. Marshals, while his daughter Sara stood up and shouted profanities at the court, calling the proceedings "rigged" and unfair.
* **Extensive evidence presented by prosecution:** Over nearly three weeks, prosecutors presented evidence from 38 witnesses including forensic proof linking Routh's fingerprints and DNA to a loaded SKS rifle found at the scene, surveillance footage of 17 reconnaissance trips to the golf course, and a manifesto offering $150,000 to "complete the job."
* **Defense case minimal and ineffective:** Routh, who represented himself, presented virtually no admissible evidence and rested his defense after just several hours with only three witnesses--two friends who admitted under cross-examination they hadn't spoken to him in years--while prosecutors demonstrated clear intent and substantial steps toward carrying out the assassination.

* * *
# **" Gotta catch em all!" \- DHS releases viral Pokemon-themed immigration video**
The Department of Homeland Security created a video using the Pokemon theme song and **["Gotta Catch 'Em All"](https://substack.com/redirect/f483c566-3a0f-43fe-81a6-5501ce6cfd94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** slogan to showcase immigration arrests, which garnered over 37 million views on X as of midday Tuesday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/55182292-a84d-4ed8-bc71-3a38496c4899?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Features "Worst of the Worst" as trading cards:** The video concludes by displaying arrested individuals as mock Pokemon cards, including alleged sexual predators and criminals with serious prior convictions, each marked with a snowflake symbol representing ICE.
* **Highlights serious criminal cases:** Featured arrestees include Nery Garcia Linares, a 32-year-old alleged sexual predator from Guatemala, Moises Lopez-Zepeda, a 44-year-old from Mexico previously convicted of intoxicated manslaughter, and Hossein Sharifi, a 67-year-old alleged child sex abuser from Iran.

* * *
# **Keith Olbermann 's unhinged antics just got worse...**
Former MSNBC host Keith Olbermann **[posted a series of vulgar social media attacks](https://substack.com/redirect/8d72a888-fe5d-4b01-a53d-25baad4cdf27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** targeting Secretary of State Marco Rubio (calling him a "political prostitute"), border czar Tom Homan (making crude jokes about his name), and Health Secretary RFK Jr. regarding his sexting scandal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f3329b31-04d8-4593-a4c6-507c1d2c5d32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Posts follow threat to CNN pundit:** The attacks came hours after Olbermann was widely criticized for a since-deleted post that appeared to threaten conservative CNN commentator Scott Jennings, writing "You're next motherf-ker" in response to news about Jimmy Kimmel's reinstatement at ABC.
* **FBI involvement after escalating rhetoric:** Jennings flagged Olbermann's threatening posts to FBI Director Kash Patel, sharing screenshots of the deleted messages that also included additional hostile language about ending Jennings' career and calling him an "amateur."
* **Pattern of unhinged social media behavior:** The incident represents part of Olbermann's ongoing pattern of extreme social media posts, with the threats and crude attacks on government officials occurring in the context of broader political tensions following recent controversies involving media figures and the Trump administration.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b7fcbd2-f33f-42f1-a954-16b2901f0e52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Peter,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d119ac960680481dac65acf961379967&_e=wXnuEVa248-zwExYcfaYnMHSjNURnNEXt4taR3Me4MDGZ-w8u3UzXywnAe0-knJA7IiR9i9JU7V7nIF7yC7Kg8XikQHperTpUfo7AAEPxImYz4TejEoLWGYWWGlsrvfXr6djwW6YcF9ehHBgmkq_QYzGZS_kwfwU66eEGXJ3heyOHeQ_Oy-FkyHDxPx_2uHvqln62T06vpz_FcJf1UJEAdzfThRPfnU7sAxyvw6zt505_fHUKF_Ip33b0oNT5aIq3FEiSyXMQC-2U39CZ4N5i4ZdrkUmBxBWlgVkQyeaB0VzNEPCKIIvburIIxkMkNb2jOxa2aJYYW067ZE5PNLoXgTp8m0RZDUrFpeLvrhn61w6VIX5pWsN11tPJppfbCTZnskm2yEg9PFJaoopUMcszxb4UcNqXHY1CQdWyYWLPr0GwvsZBWZF9v9HwiPPCAL3bYh_HjNFKV83WDqU5AqRPjXdNm5EL3kuNtPc7SjguJxRI85PdT1zh0ZkLSOxavxeds0RGBLR-091NIPCh1LfByIgNZnE0-wtQvmQPqTzpw8fqmegBKyukIPm-rMf5kAbiqVlM4qxi1KPkfKGy8R418nle4DEayL3NeDF9lHFOzG07KHAsf0E_NY7stY4gUnCVR94LybVQvtW-RGebcEsf4Mvh9NQVVEjHN4DWdbnKfs%3D)

Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten.

clean_body: Peter, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten. This isn't about politics. It's about justice. These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you'll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. P.O. Box 470100 Tulsa, OK 74147

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: The First Amendment is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, **The First Amendment is under attack.** In the wake of Charlie Kirk’s murder, the Trump administration has launched an all-out assault on free speech. After some mafia-style threats from FCC chairman Brendan Carr, ABC suspended late night host Jimmy Kimmel “indefinitely.” But thanks to grassroots pressure, Jimmy will be back tonight. **This is a small victory, but a meaningful one. We’ve shown that when the people stand up for the First Amendment, we can overpower Trump’s repressive forces.** [**We can’t let a wannabe dictator take an inch of our free speech. Now is the time to stand up and clearly say that we won’t stand for attacks on our First Amendment rights. Tell every media owner: Don’t bend to authoritarianism, protect the First Amendment!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-ggUuJ3Yen1NjSZB7uBd6zf0TIytNNM7OAhT8zRa7vH36VHWDL72Za_9sq57VY7DUc1aSOMhPDjNtMfICIkzVk1s2rKVpjTm5Uhzqyosy9nerKJvws-SQu7RytuEe-J3as25FlgPEN0JKWTZLc67C2I6JaTeyXvacX-PmgJMBuiPrygegz3VQax6ovbj07mrKBF2cmy3nf1hqZFlweIaFVhgFI43UYJvIgGAyUIGe6k59Q_6fUDAjF0fuQhrkr7TIltUWj0GCMw3AeYjCnYMXlRW5hiOuA44wDnldQ6sQzBg/4k5/KjIhho40SmqUuzvpExBqiw/h0/h001.dcv7L3ReyKQwcvD5FO6KtrYa-Wa3KLuRUQ9UQAZB0mk) **Let’s recap what’s happened since Kirk’s murder:** **Attorney General Pam Bondi announced she would “absolutely target” and “go after” anyone engaging in what she considers “hate speech.” 1 **Vice President JD Vance has encouraged Americans to seek vengeance against those critical of Kirk by trying to get them fired. **When asked about Bondi’s comments, Trump told ABC News reporter Jon Karl, “We’ll probably go after people like you.”** Right after, Trump’s FCC chair told ABC to yank Jimmy Kimmel off the air after they disapproved of his commentary on Republican politicization of Kirk’s murder. Carr went on a right-wing podcast and told ABC “We can do this the easy way or the hard way.”2 Under normal circumstances, this would be an open and shut abuse of the First Amendment: the government cannot compel or censor speech of a private citizen based on the subject matter alone. But with a MAGA majority in the Supreme Court, nothing is that easy. Trump’s Republican allies like Wyoming Sen. Cynthia Lummis are signaling that they’re open to defying the Constitution. She said: “Under normal times ... I tend to think that the First Amendment should always be sort of the ultimate right. And that there should be almost no checks and balances on it. **I don’t feel that way anymore.”** 3 Let’s be clear: Hate speech that does not directly incite violence is constitutionally protected as free speech under the First Amendment—but MAGA’s definition of hate speech appears to be broadly defined toward anyone critical of Kirk’s highly controversial legacy, or even Trump himself. [**We need to send a loud, clear message: We the People will not tolerate attacks on the First Amendment! clean_body: | | Peter, The First Amendment is under attack. In the wake of Charlie Kirk’s murder, the Trump administration has launched an all-out assault on free speech. After some mafia-style threats from FCC chairman Brendan Carr, ABC suspended late night host Jimmy Kimmel “indefinitely.” But thanks to grassroots pressure, Jimmy will be back tonight. This is a small victory, but a meaningful one. We’ve shown that when the people stand up for the First Amendment, we can overpower Trump’s repressive forces. Let’s recap what’s happened since Kirk’s murder: Attorney General Pam Bondi announced she would “absolutely target” and “go after” anyone engaging in what she considers “hate speech.” 1 Vice President JD Vance has encouraged Americans to seek vengeance against those critical of Kirk by trying to get them fired. When asked about Bondi’s comments, Trump told ABC News reporter Jon Karl, “We’ll probably go after people like you.” Right after, Trump’s FCC chair told ABC to yank Jimmy Kimmel off the air after they disapproved of his commentary on Republican politicization of Kirk’s murder. Carr went on a right-wing podcast and told ABC “We can do this the easy way or the hard way.”2 Under normal circumstances, this would be an open and shut abuse of the First Amendment: the government cannot compel or censor speech of a private citizen based on the subject matter alone. But with a MAGA majority in the Supreme Court, nothing is that easy. Trump’s Republican allies like Wyoming Sen. Cynthia Lummis are signaling that they’re open to defying the Constitution. She said: “Under normal times ... I tend to think that the First Amendment should always be sort of the ultimate right. And that there should be almost no checks and balances on it. I don’t feel that way anymore.” 3 Let’s be clear: Hate speech that does not directly incite violence is constitutionally protected as free speech under the First Amendment—but MAGA’s definition of hate speech appears to be broadly defined toward anyone critical of Kirk’s highly controversial legacy, or even Trump himself. Thank you for standing up for the First Amendment, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy 1 2 3 Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Wes Moore
subject: This is our first big test
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=659%2E1086043%2E1Tf2Eh)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes with an update.
Every few months, campaigns like ours face a big test: **Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.** Since this is the very first deadline since we officially launched our campaign for reelection, the pressure is on. **[Can you chip in your first donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250923-2?refcode=em-20250923-2&refcode2=659_1086043_1Tf2Eh&akid=659%2E1086043%2E1Tf2Eh)**
Our end-of-quarter fundraising total doesn’t just sit on the shelf. It shows the world that our movement is strong enough to stand up to Trump’s influence.
If we fall short, Republicans will seize on it as proof they can outspend us, and roll back the progress we’ve made together.
But if we rise to the challenge, it proves Marylanders are ready to keep leading the way — with a campaign powered by people, not PACs.
**[So Peter, can I count on you to chip in just $5 today to help us finish this quarter strong?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250923-2?refcode=em-20250923-2&refcode2=659_1086043_1Tf2Eh&akid=659%2E1086043%2E1Tf2Eh)**

Thank you.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The New York Times says this race is a TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Making sure you didn’t miss this
_**New York Times: Tossup Race for NJ Governor Draws Big Money and a Bright Spotlight**_
With less than two months left in this campaign and mail-in ballots being received as we speak, The New York Times officially classified my race as a **TOSS-UP** , and said that _all eyes are on New Jersey._
The country is watching us — because if we win here in the Garden State and reject our MAGA opponent, we send a powerful message to the country and to the White House. **But we can only do that with your support.**
[**This is the most competitive race in the country this year, and it’s neck-and-neck. In the final stretch of this campaign, can you split a contribution between my campaign and Sarah McBride to help power my team to victory?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250923-1?refcode=em20250923-2357&refcode2=2357_21716_LCZMF3&akid=2357%2E21716%2ELCZMF3)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Texas leaders are testing the essence of America.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The powerful idea at the heart of this country: we are a government of,
by, and for the people. That means no one is above or below the law and
that each of us should have an equal say in how we are governed, no matter
our differences of ancestry, faith, or political persuasion.

That idea is what sets America apart — and it’s being tested like never
before here in Texas.

Texas Republicans were already undermining free elections through
obstacles that make it harder to vote here than in any other state and
attacking free speech by requiring classrooms to post the Ten Commandments
and limiting political discourse on university campuses.

But then it got much worse: Trump demanded new Republican districts, and
Abbott and the GOP redrew Texas’ maps mid-census to lock in their power.
When Democrats broke quorum to stop them, Republicans threatened arrests
and felony charges against the legislators. And then they came after
Powered by People, the group I lead.

Ken Paxton accused us of bribery, tried to freeze our funds, attempted to
shut us down, and even said I should be imprisoned—all for speaking up and
organizing.

But we recently won a major victory. The 15th Court of Appeals, all Abbott
appointees, ruled unanimously that our First Amendment rights were
violated, and restored our ability to speak, fundraise, and organize.

That’s exactly why Powered by People stepped up. Because when the
traditional centers of power—media giants, tech corporations, elite
universities, and big law firms—choose to bend the knee to those in power,
someone’s got to fight back.

We raised and donated over a million dollars to support Texas Democrats.
Our volunteers have registered hundreds of thousands of new voters across
the state. And we’re not stopping there.

We’re on the front lines—hosting town halls, organizing rallies, and
building the people power it’ll take to change the balance of power in
Texas. That fighting spirit—especially from everyday Texans—is what gives
me hope.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250923.yWnGkO&refcode=ema20250923-240368&t=1002&akid=240368%2E444211%2EjG5mrz ]And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us right now. Will you chip
in $3 to Powered by People today to help defend our
democracy?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250923.yWnGkO&refcode=ema20250923-240368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240368%2E444211%2EjG5mrz ]DONATE $3

I am grateful to be in the fight with you.

Beto O’Rourke

P.S. You can read my new Houston Chronicle op-ed [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67136?t=1022&akid=240368%2E444211%2EjG5mrz ]here

.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240368%2E444211%2EjG5mrz

Peter,

Earlier this year, GOP think tanks released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. **And RFK Jr. took the bait.** He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care.

We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond!

We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible.
[**This is your chance to help shape the strategy of our team, Peter. clean_body: This is your chance to help shape Democratic strategy, Peter | Even when it's not front page news, Republicans are constantly working to undermine reproductive rights nationwide, at every level of government. We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions — and we need your insight! | Peter, Earlier this year, GOP think tanks released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. And RFK Jr. took the bait. He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care. We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond! We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible. Thank you for your input, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? With prices out of control and Trump’s administration running wild, we can’t afford to miss this opportunity to elect Katie Porter— _a true progressive champion_ who has what it takes to win.

clean_body: This is momentum we can all be proud of, but it doesn’t mean we can let up. You’re going to want to see this, Peter: A NEW POLL FURTHER CEMENTS KATIE PORTER AS THE CLEAR FRONTRUNNER IN THE CALIFORNIA GOVERNOR’S RACE. In poll after poll, Katie Porter is leading the race to be California’s next governor. Here’s what the latest numbers show: 👉 Katie has quadruple the support of the next closest declared Democrat. 👉 Our campaign leads among Latino voters. 👉 We’re the only Democrat polling in double digits—even when potential candidates are included. This is momentum we can all be proud of, but it doesn’t mean we can let up. If Republicans consolidate support, they could pull into the lead and put our campaign at risk. With prices out of control and Trump’s administration running wild, we can’t afford to miss this opportunity to elect Katie Porter— a true progressive champion who has what it takes to win. Thank you, Katie Porter HQ Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.
