clean_body: To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! | Fellow American, I’ll be blunt. To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! If we start missing our fundraising deadlines, we’ll have to start slashing key components of our campaign infrastructure. Right now, we’re in serious danger of falling short of our upcoming End of Quarter fundraising objective by just a few dollars. In a race as contested as the one we’re facing, we need every part of our campaign running at full speed now through Election Day. I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but donations from patriots like you across the country add up fast. I don’t have the luxury of leaning on coastal elites and Leftist megadonors to keep my campaign running. Your support is the lifeblood of my campaign’s fight to keep this Senate seat and our Senate Majority in Republican hands. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: [SURVEY] ScottPeters.com
subject: URGENT: California’s iconic tree is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | | _**The New York Times:**
Firefighters Race to Save a Treasured Sequoia Grove in California

"Giant sequoias can live for thousands of years, but wildfires have killed staggering numbers of the trees in recent years." _
---

Peter –

Troubling headlines like this are becoming all too common.

Over the past decade, **we’ve lost 20% of the sequoias** to fire caused by years of drought, disease, and forest mismanagement.

If we don’t act now, this once-fire-resilient species is vulnerable to _**complete elimination.**_

**That’s why Scott re-introduced the Save Our Sequoias Act to protect California’s iconic tree before it’s too late.**
[We need to hear from our strongest supporters on Scott’s bold climate action: Do you stand with Scott behind his work to protect these towering trees?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115791986/571484373/-1475596988?refcode2=e53648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_SV_180DO_250923_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM2NDhjYy1jYTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndP1hi842Hmapufq2BMq0dNZbhxyVMDBi2nwFGgLVTI=&emci=dd3648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e53648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741) | **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115791987/571484374/-1475596988?refcode2=e53648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=SP_EM_SV_180DO_250923_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM2NDhjYy1jYTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndP1hi842Hmapufq2BMq0dNZbhxyVMDBi2nwFGgLVTI=&emci=dd3648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e53648cc-ca98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5258741)**

For generations, the giant sequoia has been an iconic species that has provided immense cultural, environmental, and recreational benefits.

Not only have warming temperatures and drought caused by climate change created an environment that is killing sequoias at an alarming rate, but the resultant wildfires also create pollution that causes impact comparable to the entire energy sector in California – a troubling cycle that must be stopped.

**The Save Our Sequoias Act will enhance collaboration of land management between federal and local governments, fund comprehensive sequoia restoration projects, strengthen emergency procedures, and more.**

Scott is working to combat climate change and ensure the giant sequoias stand safely in their natural habitat for years to come – but we need to know you stand with this bold action.

Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: While meeting voters face-to-face is an incredibly important part of our path to victory, it’s also expensive to travel across Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250923-610&t=1&akid=619%2E294397%2ENYjrxn)
Hey there, it’s Ashley.
I want to level with you — this race is as unpredictable as it gets right now.
We don’t know our opponent yet.
Right-wing special interests are using this time to recruit someone who will do their bidding. Once they make their choice, **they’ll bankroll that campaign overnight.**
Our job is to be ready before that wave hits.
Grassroots contributions give us the organizing muscle, rapid response, and digital reach to stay competitive the second the right-wing money starts pouring in.
Your support also helps us get Judge Chris Taylor out on the campaign trail:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250923_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250923-610&refcode2=619_294397_NYjrxn&akid=619%2E294397%2ENYjrxn)Recently, Judge Chris Taylor chatted with folks in Milwaukee during Laborfest.
**But while meeting voters face-to-face is an incredibly important part of our path to victory, it’s also expensive to travel across Wisconsin.**
[**If you can, please pitch in $10 now so we aren’t playing catch-up later.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250923_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250923-610&refcode2=619_294397_NYjrxn&akid=619%2E294397%2ENYjrxn)

Thank you for being part of this team. When we prepare early, we win.
Ashley
Campaign Manager

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: All eyes on New Jersey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_sherrill2025.Z2Cj9n&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250923_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=9011%2E5257348%2EV-7ZE7)
Derek, every single day since he took office in January, it seems like Donald Trump has found new ways to abuse his power and make life harder for our families.
He’s illegally withheld funding that New Jerseyans rely on for child care, for health care, and for access to healthy food.
He’s deployed the National Guard to American cities in a transparent attempt to instill terror and fear.
He signed a devastating spending bill that guts Medicaid access and makes everything from groceries to heating your home less affordable — all to give billionaires a giant tax cut.
And honestly, that’s just a fraction of it.
**As Trump has inflicted all this damage on our country, Republican politicians like Jack Ciattarelli have cheered him on every step of the way.**
There is seemingly nothing Trump can do — no matter how illegal, reckless, or outright devastating for New Jersey families — that would make Jack Ciattarelli say “enough is enough.”
**And Derek****,****polls show that Ciattarelli is within a few percentage points of becoming New Jersey’s next governor.**
If we’re going to win that race and prevent that from happening, we need to work night and day these next 6 weeks to get our message out.
I intend to do exactly that, Derek — because the stakes for New Jersey, and for our nation, are too high to give it anything less. But I can’t win this race without your help.
**[Let’s send a message that the people reject Donald Trump and Jack Ciattarelli’s disastrous agenda, Derek. Let’s send a message that we won’t stand for their attacks on working families or on the rule of law — and that we’re ready to lead the way with a better path forward. Please rush a split donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff today before our September deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs_em_sherrill2025.lgAJeg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250923_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9011%2E5257348%2EV-7ZE7)**
[DONATE →](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs_em_sherrill2025.E7b3lZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250923_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=9011%2E5257348%2EV-7ZE7)
---
Thank you,
Mikie

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Real progress for Eastern Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Real progress for Eastern Washington

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
Earlier this year, we worked to expand broadband access in rural communities — something that helps students learn, businesses grow, and families stay connected. Seeing the difference this makes reminds me why serving Eastern Washington is the greatest honor of my life.We’ve also passed legislation to add extra funds for rural health care and put more money into repairs and maintenance at veterans clinics, including those in Eastern Washington. These aren’t just policies — they are real results that improve lives across our communities.The **September 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline** is coming up. [Can I count on you to chip in **$25, $50, or $100** to keep this momentum going?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=5d956f75d1&e=5a45b9550e)Together, we’ll keep making a difference for Eastern Washington families.— Michael Baumgartner

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a89ce4f49d0f406e8a139da551ff7568&_e=Kplw3-El74nazSzeFOUsUvvMtKqZ66BWx-3f04023Uy6GFDMC3YrRB-CyhjDDS5qrYsUEdHBF1lNKTf3h3rMWH1eXBYcnokP4x9Lyh3h9V43FO0fyJnb0vOBwI2lhY5Wf9f8ePsfAtwr7kn56ngm92cBWvvnuAzVYTKgazBYu1ayOrCvi4qqAxChXPpVp8nGTcZWuhlPyz6Y4kAheTiIm-wnAXAgbgx4Q5LuqhapHWVNgJGs_W0Hn13tB2qTh2YM5nYvw2F3HULZqxvxad28MyVaYU_djL5TQqJg3HBCJGAMYHem_WrEB6G7PZeJljdH_OBvwm1dReNw9RZUKPelYeA4ukliqY9BMJaNDmGpuW0gUegk1snS6I6w16WMimA5DGySMayto1AWtogWBzrn688mBsRrb8S0IAObkHA4Mha5c27ykLsamOe3XXJSuh4XGCbkkPY4zMnzn6MfUyDGoUGnq7FASffRHzvcQI4GLB4rDO38tI8a6fIr69mPPLhXiCHz-UeJYWNX__p7tAthZeLVpR5uc8fWd1ZbVXWPSkfXZJkx6B5pMz5BL1QU6PUqDKAuhesBQXQRRhzOdyH7R_hSqtQ0Wc8aI_s2qHiobHeTD4ZY8RUREi3QqP00ZBtQcoWjf5-v4gnpepxIjciKcaAaqICYXCJXnsegC7TcvT07W4G3htfJiwV7563mlC4PLwyA1oJdp-_LE__q1FNFIw%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Peter,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

clean_body: Peter, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten. - This isn't about politics. It's about justice. These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you'll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. P.O. Box 470100 Tulsa, OK 74147

clean_body: Liberals are betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump’s agenda. FIRST, Democrats named me the "Most Vulnerable Republican" in Texas. THEN, they poured millions of deep-blue dollars into my district. And NOW, they've unleashed an ultra-liberal Grammy star to try to take me down. is Monica De La Cruz, and I need your help. I'm 100% MAGA - proudly endorsed by President Trump himself. But that endorsement put a bullseye on my back, and now Democrats are unloading everything they've got to crush us. Texas-15 is not just another race - it is the most critical House seat in America. We made HISTORY by flipping it in 2022, and we shocked the nation by defending it again in 2024. But now, the Left is pouring everything they have into erasing those victories. They know our GOP House Majority hangs by a thread - and they're betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump's agenda. If they succeed, our Majority is GONE. Trump's agenda? Stopped in its tracks. isn't a red carpet walk - it's a fight to defend Texas-15, protect our Republican Majority, and keep President Trump's America First movement alive. If we can rally enough grassroots support in the next 24 hours, we will send Democrats a message they cannot ignore: our MAGA movement is unbreakable, unstoppable, and ready for the fight of our lives. The deadline is MIDNIGHT tonight. Can I count on you Peter? you,Monica De La Cruz * Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list! There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now. - Monica De La Cruz| | | | | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a06236bec7741e99819734e8c8b424f&_e=33PI199fGHQj2aMxJFM-Zuy3mjn0v963-gB88qDnykDOWu1PByFBv54ABUT9jRtf2yLNf_SrnpLppuZpwImtPFi2k7EfrGe6HbSor5ikMEBOuubQcgX19q3f_lLa09gLaVAwid15dUypGOY9hnosBEZRC80VqQw5LgOfnJyCdz-ng1d4lgcjnSCAeBLcOQUEtjF2FfZvPKgmBmMDgoPiH8eD5JuFNjS8xehwDI9MEYqoVMEK_vVsf-VwFDaMhOS15xmMblAIgRXs3xV0GeWSn44PxjH4IVGHhVbS7t18m0d2uLue6ILz0BUJgYaCfknQjfhgSHoVdRhkaduRUeiq1PgeTdtKMZg9UWKFlAtpfvfg8wcgvMw5N0KhyXdCLeIKy7YUI6OjKGj1D4zkW8M2REk8-qkLA1HY4vsoFAxcqGXBQ6LQ9VG6baDhnYRr_rly3b3Z54RwwFs3z8pI2VrBYTKo7EDOz0Hkz4EAmgssjoXrjMy-u60orOi6VY8LJkxxL9-hLJNKVcBVC2r_BGv0UDhP6uqRub_qfzGFFtU7CsCPlEP2PTY8vQ0N7xPshiYJxoHoO1qzCVj3RtVq987_0PtAMUCKjfpUJSPgOWFYpEFx7BDCfX5Z8OYqEC7r62hs0r7x4mV02jDSYKOlzNsuuBCmWPawpBwKzgFkxLz-qyN-VGKmA5F_CugosuR8dNMuAG915_Kv06aMrQUHOAipr6rHIl_6AUKIu-GylqiwF6_SgQCc6a1-q6s-XL1y7atdDqLKdAFV0gs7ClqAouUfj45TLDXWHPnuaT-kopv4IeU%3D)**_.

**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a06236bec7741e99819734e8c8b424f&_e=33PI199fGHQj2aMxJFM-Zuy3mjn0v963-gB88qDnykDOWu1PByFBv54ABUT9jRtf2yLNf_SrnpLppuZpwImtPFi2k7EfrGe6HbSor5ikMEBOuubQcgX19q3f_lLa09gLaVAwid15dUypGOY9hnosBEZRC80VqQw5LgOfnJyCdz-ng1d4lgcjnSCAeBLcOQUEtjF2FfZvPKgmBmMDgoPiH8eD5JuFNjS8xehwDI9MEYqoVMEK_vVsf-VwFDaMhOS15xmMblAIgRXs3xV0GeWSn44PxjH4IVGHhVbS7t18m0fZF7aHhJbSWUn25KTO4VV3pFilTI9AgufuR66n1mA4-wDKlz9gBo3VX3wFq5huBZJuov84unBC65mp_eewnVfARrg4I3u3mVCHPKw4wcVOCwglJEbzBRB8eK3flZVt7fFJJsibIuqvJJ__BK_VZdOJegcN5KTz0M9vpc6U4H_TTN6okzXBGVXcn6BQFK3zbRGs72X6bzds0fhLAVaOPdZUtal_I__c9wFf5vfhf6R9Xkr4CV03MI7rFdWTlPsnyk3eQ7H3cwD_5rejsPzWDpvrG8FQxqO53EJ4BX8fW5au5YS-7krSwr_gmichh_Pg7kPLHbmrD-NPA2mh5NA0J53gVjHydFnIH2dva3gLYOe5hSAGn4YIsyrrniUvWP_yBFzudvORdljKqZQ9tv3qu6GocMK7zw3KlO1DbVR5_DdywZVJteK-aIN6QdgTNfRsgBcLx5lOsV62rtb4lghvErEnPXyALhZM7No5n2YrwPB3D-2bK-J-1fNyuldmzKmeAUs%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a06236bec7741e99819734e8c8b424f&_e=33PI199fGHQj2aMxJFM-Zuy3mjn0v963-gB88qDnykDOWu1PByFBv54ABUT9jRtf2yLNf_SrnpLppuZpwImtPFi2k7EfrGe6HbSor5ikMEBOuubQcgX19q3f_lLa09gLaVAwid15dUypGOY9hnosBEZRC80VqQw5LgOfnJyCdz-ng1d4lgcjnSCAeBLcOQUEtjF2FfZvPKgmBmMDgoPiH8eD5JuFNjS8xehwDI9MEYqoVMEK_vVsf-VwFDaMhOS15xmMblAIgRXs3xV0GeWSn44PxjH4IVGHhVbS7t18m0fDk_u6u_53jxitg7-AO4Zl-Sj977WG6sHIdrluVDpHq2K5sdkyWhw5-CZP2HTgaEeuCpNsSgcw1FjVFs4xEagBamf2LGU7iVJiFB8G80ja7TaX0W_7H1ugwj6l2Gnmh6j80jyjZyyoPvDYtDa6Kxzs0rLdyOeQ1099MGszkGhMk_B15Xf2tp7QPQw_YFngGTDesa4-nuK-GWXClmsJkbd1VyHFvAFjat9dXGEXgu6sbdAidlbp03QtQJLNvl1tebcKdj07yBYi23RzXMq6aBQ4T9Wdac0cmKVR6RvD1Vdk7oqFAHEWnYKSJjJOzOtCanZ8yAE37s7JOqFsIG5DO3qsOHvyLa43psQuKHp2GrRvdroagsLNgOl3uNmZfMjESF7P0Ipd3oTw8US2zuwD22AmMQ8Hbyh-muisX-3N1JYMs4plzscKsVYr0YrfH2INwC6tKMGcSQo0stPMFKJTeddoggOMJvHiHO4WNEMsCkgVmoFHczAAz2_amyASzNZnkg4%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a06236bec7741e99819734e8c8b424f&_e=33PI199fGHQj2aMxJFM-Zuy3mjn0v963-gB88qDnykDOWu1PByFBv54ABUT9jRtf2yLNf_SrnpLppuZpwImtPFi2k7EfrGe6HbSor5ikMEBOuubQcgX19q3f_lLa09gLaVAwid15dUypGOY9hnosBEZRC80VqQw5LgOfnJyCdz-ng1d4lgcjnSCAeBLcOQUEtjF2FfZvPKgmBmMDgoPiH8eD5JuFNjS8xehwDI9MEYqoVMEK_vVsf-VwFDaMhOS15xmMblAIgRXs3xV0GeWSn44PxjH4IVGHhVbS7t18m0ci1CJkNUszV6YQczc15n7EINCEtS-kN8hjfD9KcNrYkRJWbM7Cm65CZP69QCiCPSl2o91kMsR-m6UZyhOQkxJy-f3826RpYlFjVYDs6wbeyojYEnd0O2JWUJAI0O0RoDMx9wrgCj9uVpQS-td-SS8w2K1hNV2sHblomqRJaEzm1G9-Xaajj9dTlJonNUZ95MA2bZq00hJX79psCnI-Cz7D_iMRzGUaXC5vOPyIeHdO0Jd5l4YsokHEQAfv5czxZaMok-CrfE4SdnUs6bYqyvONx1J-YZbj0LQwKjz5zFsNxAABbv7nwf7RGhYuE26uE0AHK3TZlQONp7QwIT889LplRQ0a-BUDEwc-QNo-T3ynXqWAdIwFbKoTdiin3LknxFCbqUp5vUrE-9moNx5WMfoD39CQs2MrcNUkjXpl4JL99RBROIMiRh7dUHvw5aBY9ukhIXHkw-nGpi7exaKvfE9-5bHJ7EV2sJEebfkpHppJIX45ggrsSvACgBvxvQcCZKo%3D)**.

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | | Check this out Friend: After years of research and development I’m super pumped to announce our most accurate and most advanced red dot sight ever. Using holographic technology -- once reserved for military and police use exclusively -- **[The Stinger Combat Sight by MCG Tactical](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e25689385/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsOVJEU0s0OQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTEyMCZhZmZfaWQ9MTIzNCZhZmZfc3ViPXdhcnJvb20mYWZmX3N1YjI9OTIzJmZpbGVfaWQ9MzU3/gaNMefQ/sejec7fcd4f)** can put a bullet through a dime at 300 yards without breaking a sweat. With a precision laser reticle measuring in at one MOA, the stinger projects a target picture with holographic clarity... achieving long distance precision like never before. This bad boy is not just similar to the technology used by US special forces... it's identical. [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e25689385/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsOVJEU0s0OQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTEyMCZhZmZfaWQ9MTIzNCZhZmZfc3ViPXdhcnJvb20mYWZmX3N1YjI9OTIzJmZpbGVfaWQ9MzU3/gaNMefQ/sejec7fcd4f) Through an exclusive manufacturing agreement MCG Tactical is proud to offer this elite sighting technology to you at a fraction of the cost. Sights like this one typically sell for over $600. And that’s not just defense companies ripping off the government either. Plenty of discerning shooters have paid that and counted themselves lucky to do so... But YOU are much luckier than even them. Through our agreement with our manufacturer, MCG Tactical is able to offer this MIL SPEC site for UNDER $100. And I’m gonna do you one better. Because during this introductory sale I'm not only knocking 67% OFF... But I will pay the shipping. There’s only one catch and that I have a very limited supply of Stingers allotted to our warehouse. And these are selling like hotcakes. I have no doubt that these will be completely sold out by the end of the day. That’s why I am limiting all orders to a maximum of three Stingers per order. **[Grab yours before I have to shut the page down Friend](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e25689385/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjM/LbmNsOVJEU0s0OQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTEyMCZhZmZfaWQ9MTIzNCZhZmZfc3ViPXdhcnJvb20mYWZmX3N1YjI9OTIzJmZpbGVfaWQ9MzU3/gaNMefQ/sejec7fcd4f)** MCG Tactical

name: Toni Atkins
subject: Trump’s DOJ is targeting trans youth and their providers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toni Atkins for Governor 2026
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em]
Hey Peter — if you know me, you know I’m not much for foul language and curse words. But frankly, there’s no other way to describe what’s happening with the Department of Justice targeting trans youth:
This is fucked up.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Jjq4Giw-Xk-02oXlW2XVqg2?contactdata=4TYYMNUsjlr+i7KctX9WRJN7rAgfh7QY3XRyaaTyNvKtaOt7l4xr2dQF6S78sdAL20Z+cvLvdNq1t4uZCYt+ZVWAtrB9v9RRPZalF+wJfEmTc0q45m6A1Br6p3GDfw+D [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Jjq4Giw-Xk-02oXlW2XVqg2?contactdata=4TYYMNUsjlr+i7KctX9WRJN7rAgfh7QY3XRyaaTyNvKtaOt7l4xr2dQF6S78sdAL20Z+cvLvdNq1t4uZCYt+ZVWAtrB9v9RRPZalF+wJfEmTc0q45m6A1Br6p3GDfw+D]
Let me say it straight: The government has no business targeting trans youth or demanding their medical records. What happened to the right to privacy? That’s a fundamental human right for ALL Americans, period.
The DOJ has issued subpoenas to hospitals across the country demanding the private medical records of trans kids — names, birthdates, addresses, social security numbers, billing information, and even the personal notes and files shared between providers and the patients’ families.
This is political surveillance and harassment disguised as “investigation” — and it’s terrifying.
And the Trump administration’s actions are already working the way they intend: more than a dozen hospitals have scaled back or ended transition care for minors, even in states where that care is legal.
Parents are scrambling to find doctors before their children’s prescriptions run out, and providers are worried they’ll be prosecuted for doing their jobs.
This is cruelty, plain and simple. And it’s part of a larger campaign to erase trans kids from public life and strip families of their dignity and privacy.
It’s not enough to have rights on paper — we need leaders who act when those rights are being dismantled.
California must remain a safe place for trans youth and their families. As governor, I’ll protect gender-affirming care from political attacks — and ensure no one has to look over their shoulder for doing their job or being who they are.
Will you add your name now to stand with trans youth, demand privacy, and insist on dignity in care? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Jjq4Giw-Xk-02oXlW2XVqg2?contactdata=4TYYMNUsjlr+i7KctX9WRJN7rAgfh7QY3XRyaaTyNvKtaOt7l4xr2dQF6S78sdAL20Z+cvLvdNq1t4uZCYt+ZVWAtrB9v9RRPZalF+wJfEmTc0q45m6A1Br6p3GDfw+D]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Jjq4Giw-Xk-02oXlW2XVqg2?contactdata=4TYYMNUsjlr+i7KctX9WRJN7rAgfh7QY3XRyaaTyNvKtaOt7l4xr2dQF6S78sdAL20Z+cvLvdNq1t4uZCYt+ZVWAtrB9v9RRPZalF+wJfEmTc0q45m6A1Br6p3GDfw+D]
In solidarity and resistance,
Toni
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em]
Thank you for being a strong supporter for progress in California! Your partnership has helped Toni accomplish so much over the years – and together, we can get even more done in the future. We hope you'll continue to stay in touch by reading emails like this one – email is a critical way for Toni to stay close with her supporters. Whether or not you're able to donate, we're always glad you're on the team.
https://www.facebook.com/ToniAtkinsCA [https://www.facebook.com/ToniAtkinsCA] https://twitter.com/toniatkins [https://twitter.com/toniatkins] https://www.instagram.com/toniatkinsca [https://www.instagram.com/toniatkinsca]
Paid for by Toni Atkins for Governor 2026
374 No. Coast Hwy. 101, Ste. 2
Encinitas CA, 92024

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on
body:
Let’s finish what Charlie started
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c4ac364013134e11b6cf34bfe940e6dd&_e=ShoFITMzSgOzfCy-Lwlz69HpAXVc1ye-_DHNvYJfallWNLBSQdzlHLqK79UFrVaOZ5ZlxwNUJuGRZkjvSU703hKiIk8b8A6NpGXFBeTJdZl1sNyF8Srf-UUlWnALC9YmXISPFnMmSSLI-orS9RkNHm_Io9w7xmmyjubOL97na9jIAtciGxE1OhVR04aEX1_w2w4RHoAA56qHYVMYr55sCupknlTgtuVLuWN9Wrc6M-nurqcoI88eAt76ce8HWRPwNWC5z9_8qM2wfz2yraOmex68kQs6amEujZOxmQMNsx5GrQA4BaM3SF4A5NHcK3uB04ZPExwdbNCpkEMomC26Ch1oSuYVm281hH365yMARWbHWv9pvUgmkuQSNlYfW9JtARgU6Y8CorLy8jeYRH9p_bcysD2Tq4ojyUe0o_zC15cu1Z08kGRH8HVZGa0Xzz9LOny8qCLRZ-jZDS9-GQcp2yUi3GRuYx8lPzsBFgE8CViGRFdjbopokFf-AQ2FYj2iCZi31WIxB7MvkaHkHsevn48jfhtJRlnxbth6oazcR-bG_W7j2ZD4hyTfQIVGhxis9Rgxed42IMoml5rNaqcw-CgMHAKWMMqqXSuOJ0VsE2YFXyqEjW9-fJBrOvfAOeN0za18hoFgbFaIn7iPwGobwYKn7uFDx1Pb1n2x9VrF6escPSA55BbbonlThl1qV5k1VPNXaJ0ZjLwZqrQDmCNWoKPJT5kKPBOcXPcjPF-e9FI%3D)
---
Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---

I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Friend, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=c4ac364013134e11b6cf34bfe940e6dd&_e=ShoFITMzSgOzfCy-Lwlz69HpAXVc1ye-_DHNvYJfallWNLBSQdzlHLqK79UFrVaOZ5ZlxwNUJuGRZkjvSU703hKiIk8b8A6NpGXFBeTJdZl1sNyF8Srf-UUlWnALC9YmXISPFnMmSSLI-orS9RkNHm_Io9w7xmmyjubOL97na9jIAtciGxE1OhVR04aEX1_w2w4RHoAA56qHYVMYr55sCupknlTgtuVLuWN9Wrc6M-nurqcoI88eAt76ce8HWRPw_bGgtFDQgZ5LF5ST5UKCAmlAi2qS_qD6HJvBPfbQGX0DBqjSpphL9wc6pWAdP3AlM7FlzFzxWBTu9SAzFyMGKISksudE3WrGRLFu-J9t5fgRnemTjY1JL6s3h94iYbaJpEh-QMpfbo2vI86I1cENRZt-6LJn4-uaUUNjJnuCApOpwEdIYYsjpHdmtG5stZ9dS85L5zpW7-YvnudjO0QdGB5lbwlLKbPsf0s7YgNQ-MsBsQqdf4pDZbfQFnNoIq-tsocjQ338lDBelHMOaclqHbxTgAIElzHvBLMOauxMJ80ldxOkYqap2Ujwgn2J9IyCcuR6WzTqyBB4U4_s_CddovbZ-bZCspWl3F6WW1e5Hk1Zv2Kyad1BXaD7i9VNZf4ZNeTZsCvRueMp5z50vU_mJnu5Mbf8gW7pkcsNq9Z5wQomRyUEGl1CegGJLVXNe8g__sEVpI4_A_sZZy4qdGfC56O6q1uvlagQtc0jFonJ_1w%3D)**

clean_body: Let’s finish what Charlie started His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning. | | | Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. To me, Charlie was a little brother. That honor I will carry with me forever. I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough.But his memory will.And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well.Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive... so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten. That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations.Let 's make the world remember him. Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever.For you, we 'll save our great country.Rest in peace, brother.For Charlie, Don Jr. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Urgent request as we face this FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
We don’t want to show any weakness.
|
---
| | | [_**Our campaign’s first FEC end-of-quarter filing deadline is just days away. Split a donation of any size between our team and The Long Run to help meet our goal before time runs out**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4873?t=1&akid=5611%2E196590%2EjyWNBf)
---
Hello Team,

I’m reaching out about our upcoming filing deadline — the first of our campaign so far — but I wanted to make sure you had some important context:

**Nationwide, Republicans and GOP-aligned groups have been outraising Democrats in the lead-up to next year’s midterm elections, and our election in North Carolina is expected to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history.**

My GOP opponent and his allies will be forced to make spending decisions they may not want to make based on what we can raise now. With all that in mind, it’s even more important for us to show our financial strength in this report.

This is the most consequential Senate election of 2026, and if we win here, Democrats have the chance to take back the majority and stop the far-right’s extreme agenda. Meeting our fundraising goals is key to our chances of success in this toss-up race.

But we have a long way to go to hit our end-of-quarter target, and we’re running out of time to get there.

[_**We can’t risk allowing my GOP opponent to outraise us, so I need your help right away. Does a contribution, split between our campaign and The Long Run, fit in your budget today?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4873?t=2&akid=5611%2E196590%2EjyWNBf)
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4873?t=3&akid=5611%2E196590%2EjyWNBf)
---
Thank you,

Roy Cooper
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4874?t=5&akid=5611%2E196590%2EjyWNBf)
---
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597, Milwaukee, WI 53201

We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=11&akid=5611%2E196590%2EjyWNBf). clean_body: | = Hey folks — Gretchen here with an important request. In just one week, we’ll reach our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. You’re one of our top supporters, so I wanted to take some time and reach out to explain why this is so important. A lot is on the line in Michigan next year. Voters will head to the polls to elect our next governor, senator, and candidates up and down the ballot — which means that we really need to hit the ground running to ensure we have the resources to compete in all 83 counties. Last year, Fight Like Hell PAC worked to help invest early in top races, train candidates and staff, and ultimately elect leaders who will put working families first. Michigan is set to be at the center of the political world once again, meaning we need to start right now to win in the toughest races. If we’re falling behind where we need to be, they could invest millions of dollars into Michigan to flip the state red and elect extremists up and down the ballot. So I’m personally asking you: Can you please pitch in $10 to help us reach our quarterly fundraising goal and fight like hell to elect Michigan Democrats up and down the ballot? Here’s a personal link you can use to donate:= Every time I’ve needed you, this team has stepped up to meet the moment and help me continue our fight. Thanks for all your support. — Gretchen | | Team — our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in one week, and we’re falling behind where we need to be to reach our goals. We need 74 more donations from your area before midnight tonight to catch up. Will you chip in a $10 donation now so Fight Like Hell PAC can end this quarter as strong as possible? | = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: Toula, Team Pappas
subject: Chris has our back — now it’s our turn to have his
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ve known Chris since he was a teenager — trust me when I say we need him in the Senate.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)
**My name is Toula, and I’ve known Chris Pappas since he was a teenager.**
I met him when I started working in his family’s restaurant, the Puritan Backroom, more than 30 years ago. I’ve loved him and his family ever since, and I’m so proud to see the leader he’s become.
A few weeks ago, I caught up with him at **Glendi,** our annual Greek festival in Manchester. Glendi translates to “a festive gathering,” and seeing Chris made me so happy.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250923_1_toula?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-2513&refcode2=2513_582294_UZ0_pF&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)
Let me tell you a few things I know about Chris:
* He has an amazing work ethic. Give him something to do, he does it right away.
* He loves to listen and learn what people need — and then he goes out and makes it happen.
* He’s respected by everyone — Democrats, Republicans, and especially in Greece, where people tell me how proud of him they are.
* He’s honest. If Chris says something, he means it.
* He can still spell “koulourakia” — and he might be a Congressman and future Senator, but he’ll always be our Chris!

Chris has always been there for New Hampshire, our communities, and our families. That’s why I always say I’m 150% proud to support him. We’re so lucky to have him fighting for us in Congress — and soon, in the Senate.
**Right now Chris needs our support.** He has a big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of September. This race is going to be close, and I don’t like what I’m seeing. They’re getting ready to spend tons of money on attack ads. We need to have his back.
[**If everyone reading this chipped in $10 — or whatever you spent at Dunkin’ this morning — Chris can hit his goal, win this race, and keep making us proud.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250923_1_toula?refcode=em20250923-2513&amount=5&refcode2=2513_582294_UZ0_pF&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250923_1_toula?amount=5&refcode=em20250923-2513&refcode2=2513_582294_UZ0_pF&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)**
Chris always has our back. Now it’s our time to show him we’ve got his, too.
Thank you,
Toula
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20250923-1&t=2&refcode2=2513_582294_UZ0_pF&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2513%2E582294%2EUZ0_pF)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

## Commonsense Corner:
---
58. That’s the number of House Democrats who voted against a measure to honor the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk. Another 38 just voted “present.” The Left can drone on and on about “hate,” but if there’s anything the last couple of weeks have proven, it’s that we know where the problem lies. As if dancing on Charlie’s grave wasn’t bad enough, Democrats couldn’t even muster up a shred of morality to let us memorialize him the way he deserves. Can you imagine the outrage if the shoe was on the other foot? You can’t—because it wouldn’t come to that. Exhibit A: House Resolution [519](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/E-Z82ibPoIEan_UQ4wjDZxCDt92Zh6aYMiyiM4gHnXT5VshhGk4R03PCwOtZ6pzNQx9-WvjtTArRy_ap71W_HWvU8ybi5KuYXt-wmMOaNwTE-bjnW3OmZt-i4Hs_pDh3kmBknuDZsEumnNsTZKxrtc5c0lfYizzAKUXfp6S0u2YwSG3DhBg5pi92pMc_MXsXGaQn7aqEBV_g11T7XL0e8MY7r-i4pU9OyMfRcS-swOq7HUTJs4zopLSA_WmC7srSJSvAKvQc62amWr-pbEttZt3ewbMDj1kyWqeGCJEd7tLg5okbEyr9dA1l9EblWH8qJLoi3_bZFEdz-yXxS_C_OAanOeQqizdP4r-w3IO4VLYZJCj4U1I0t2k_Okpgy370YhflCXpFKMkcBdfMuo-ixv977PIjPz89SFZQUv-oXOjF7zjThyaAbUMxTM5mr-JiiFWPFeVM1jv-h7yC-qgnMcwKGDZooUEOkQNN/UMhg72vJhEoN5S9Me6yQ1YXa4dsDMn8p/13), which condemned the attacks on the Democrat Minnesota lawmakers back in June passed unanimously. As the old saying goes, the proof is in the pudding. You see, the Left operates by their own set of rules. We saw this play out last week when they were whining and moaning about Jimmy Kimmel. They had no problem canceling conservatives, firing Americans who wouldn’t get the COVID vax, and turning off President Trump’s Twitter account. Rules for thee, not for me. As Charlie pointed out years ago, if we try to be fair and square, we [LOSE](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/KrFh6ZbbVXrHOz-RVVes-tpNVzpchCAYxLK6jyhcEz6wLsBv7E8gxvfRJ7iaDlk6P5uSdNkHsY2e-HN-UzTBT4nbsNq3gLBpqXf8nyFC8BNdgVFKnZw8oZhqlPvBPpXTt7CGkOvNPCyRj8csRyhkLTJTWiDfavzCwWvmBmrC4AAhWVfhwRtnqte8eHWP101y-NSXz7yUVl0tVLiNyE_PaMUaPn_os8kAgIOHZXFjOJ0PME4c-F476myVBTOqzLtJcyiQu_zOkaWCAKAOJcq1Ut_knatLqbHIektVhDnoySh21ZAZvbn9q4jyRPeoB7V-xKZYZMI-pWVj2IbqCiFa8L2Z9I8m_CXalnlRiTDAbtsOSr5v4sSzH9wcqKu8IJdd-OTViDi9PccEBSJJaOxfk8ojrC2KtJVk7P8llMBU0ydZ5RyoYe5Y01Y/itflssBU9LT_h4D0RLpB8N5l9C6CTS7z/13)—so we’re not exactly crying in our Wheaties that a not-so-funny “comedian” lost his slot on broadcast television. There’s a lot of noise out there on the internet, and trust us, we get mad! But we can’t get so worked up that we lose sight of our mission. Let’s recommit ourselves to the conservative fight for faith, freedom, and the American family.

Whether you’re young or just young at heart, grab the download, break out the crayons, and let your creativity run wild. When you’re finished, snap a pic and tag Tim on social—it truly brings him joy to see the fun ways folks show their support while he’s fighting for us in Washington.

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: 58. That’s the number of House Democrats who voted against a measure to honor the life and legacy of Charlie Kirk. Another 38 just voted “present.” The Left can drone on and on about “hate,” but if there’s anything the last couple of weeks have proven, it’s that we know where the problem lies. As if dancing on Charlie’s grave wasn’t bad enough, Democrats couldn’t even muster up a shred of morality to let us memorialize him the way he deserves. Can you imagine the outrage if the shoe was on the other foot? You can’t—because it wouldn’t come to that. Exhibit A: House Resolution , which condemned the attacks on the Democrat Minnesota lawmakers back in June passed unanimously. As the old saying goes, the proof is in the pudding. You see, the Left operates by their own set of rules. We saw this play out last week when they were whining and moaning about Jimmy Kimmel. They had no problem canceling conservatives, firing Americans who wouldn’t get the COVID vax, and turning off President Trump’s Twitter account. Rules for thee, not for me. As Charlie pointed out years ago, if we try to be fair and square, we —so we’re not exactly crying in our Wheaties that a not-so-funny “comedian” lost his slot on broadcast television. There’s a lot of noise out there on the internet, and trust us, we get mad! But we can’t get so worked up that we lose sight of our mission. Let’s recommit ourselves to the conservative fight for faith, freedom, and the American family. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Who is primarily responsible for the heinous uptick in political violence in America? | Just for Kicks: Need a little break from the serious stuff? We put together a Tim-themed coloring page for y’all to enjoy! Whether you’re young or just young at heart, grab the download, break out the crayons, and let your creativity run wild. When you’re finished, snap a pic and tag Tim on social—it truly brings him joy to see the fun ways folks show their support while he’s fighting for us in Washington. name: Maggie W. Hassan
subject: Respectfully asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Project 2025 is over halfway complete.

Maggie Hassan here. It’s been 8 months since Donald Trump began his second term in office, and **experts say Project 2025 is almost halfway complete.**

Let me lay out what this means. Trump and his Republican allies:
* Gutted USAID and foreign aid.
* Cut off funding for public broadcasting.
* Withdrew from the Paris Climate Agreement.
* Slashed Medicaid and SNAP benefits.
* And so much more.

Despite Trump’s promises to improve the lives of working folks, his administration has sent everyday costs through the roof. Americans are struggling to make ends meet. It’s outrageous.

Every day in the Senate, GOP extremists are bending the knee to Trump and enabling his abuses of power. I’ve had enough. We cannot afford another two years of their failed leadership.

**That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to support key Senate races across the country — from Texas to Georgia to Maine. ****_[Before my next public fundraising deadline on September 30th, I’m respectfully asking: Will you please rush $5 or more to show the GOP that we have the momentum to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115792793/571486911/-597123557?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.23_Costs-Skyrocketing_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM1MjUxMS1jZjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9u1N8MiK3YVKakDPm1G2yFZmU1tqhxdsZJgaWPoSwGA=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115792794/571486912/-597123557?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.23_Costs-Skyrocketing_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM1MjUxMS1jZjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9u1N8MiK3YVKakDPm1G2yFZmU1tqhxdsZJgaWPoSwGA=)

name: Tim Walz
subject: Cruelty and corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party
body:
As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqve2mSNajDJo2CppZOFnk-RWsdMN-vgStgYdag3yHZoHRCd6hiOu5iHERYZR9G6I73joxYA9dPqtCm6n1X7uAFpvqXSqCSsoEjlaWnZtiFkeCFoXbD20xzKgAW_4ZkAucIXO-XDcDbamI-jFz8UAlaY7ybhsrHkatYVCUPflXIoVUmsHGavLFdKEO93JFjmqT37-nZqxPVUCX4Wr4QMNe-Wd0jnMhnazfxzibEI7Y4KOOIF2C9SeYbo5ljhQTLkjSJSUuoH3CT0pT-_CEnNUScxTffM9R2D4dybM6KVJtHgpM-p26M6eIMoAnyhzFPAuGkg1KeVHTN_CMrV9FGASIemTBBuxfTS6a9KhJIg2e9BTK5Srs0oXGNbahyKu6pu_bM/4k5/ag2VAmh5QhmKUkexyPqKpg/h0/h001.TMR6MJ_fShuXN0lqiPfqM8dyYAVIpGCjmrXHtJ9XEB8)
---
Team,
Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering.
He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on.
This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago.
But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it.

clean_body: As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington | | | | Team, Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering. He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on. This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago. But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington and make sure it stays at arm’s length from Minnesota. Thank you for being with me, Tim Walz The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Working Families Party
subject: Add your name: Break up big media companies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
When regular people stand up, the bullies back down. | | | Peter, Last week, Donald Trump succeeded in strong-arming Disney and ABC into suspending Jimmy Kimmel. It was as chilling an attack on freedom of speech as we’ve seen in generations. **But hundreds of thousands of people stood up and spoke out — and Disney ended up backing down.** Jimmy Kimmel will return to the airwaves on most ABC stations tonight. Attacks like these are made so much easier when only a handful of mega-corporations control what we see, hear, and scroll through every day. **Forty years ago, 50 different companies comprised 90% of the U.S. media market. That number is now down to just FIVE.** 1 All of those corporations have mergers that need to be approved by the federal government. And every media company is vulnerable to corrupt threats or promised rewards coming from Trump and his hand-picked FCC chair. That includes corporations like Nexstar — who just announced they will keep Jimmy Kimmel's show off the air on its 32 local ABC stations, and who needs Donald Trump's approval for a $6 billion merger.2 Right now, the Trump administration is growing more desperate by the day. Whatever support they once enjoyed from working people is sinking as fast as grocery prices, health care costs, and our other bills are rising. They may be growing weaker and weaker in the polls, but we know what their playbook will be — more threats, more bullying, and more attempts to try and silence our voices and our votes in order to hold on to power. And these media companies will continue to be in their sights. **[Now more than ever, we need our leaders to show they stand with working people and not the billionaires and CEOs who are consolidating more and more power and making us more and more vulnerable to authoritarian attacks. Add your name to tell elected officials: We need to break up big media companies and hold them accountable.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJFNYItT8Yg7U277fIjIwbdmC9_G3m4mvIv_B5wWCKuEGmHNpcIRb3iTNOW4Qp85z13aBbr9GrbGa149_e5eVjhT5l-UjrpRncB83LjSX1XsPnkxfBSarzuLwZkfrw5Lfd0X49loEHpXUkwSumnVk_GaPPImOMDza0g0MTwqMBRJk46iohcnDfcbFZ8UQKE4C5-t1kqcBK0MDQUXwvEgnUh4sQFXs65YVue14DPLsebzyWZhBv10mNVsQ8IsFnVqcmycLAciFNhie18fvlrxixZ/4k5/wt7a3V_6SsSkRgLzFESyJA/h0/h001.hm3AtgskGhEdlXqPhdoNLpGdSyr1rRlDSCcKSkhiHC4)** [Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJFNYItT8Yg7U277fIjIwbdmC9_G3m4mvIv_B5wWCKuEGmHNpcIRb3iTNOW4Qp85z13aBbr9GrbGa149_e5eVjhqjUG7vTqQpAjIM28r0hViByZEjKwcxAiz9s9nstlifwasgpFDgpYKmpPbAyHaBcON418jmaClwZ7s8qUMR5O8dFXfzOSsPZ5FwDGjBc5OLOd8OMprDQ4j5oxG0BPVgHW7ddXHGOXPPhwaxLqBQgNkNiY_SRqDmQNKaDdTsUr_ODSeeMbsdB0PaXJWkj9HK7y/4k5/wt7a3V_6SsSkRgLzFESyJA/h1/h001.FAiPPYOR8db5c-Ope6hnIo5qyo7MVSGQSnQBiyQhmOc) This is about so much more than just late-night TV, Peter. Donald Trump wants the power to cancel, prosecute, or deport anyone who looks at him the wrong way. He's a thin-skinned leader who can’t stand the idea that someone might disagree with him. He’s also the second least popular president in recent history at this moment in his term — second only to himself.3 And that combination is a dangerous one. And as we’ve seen over and over, institutions and corporations who _could_ stand up to him are either afraid to do so or more than willing to go along. **But we’ve also seen what happens when regular people decide to stand up and fight back against this deeply unpopular administration: the bullies end up caving.** We believe power in America doesn’t come from a throne. And it doesn’t come from a corporate boardroom.**It comes from the people. And the people are saying that they’ve had enough.** **[Tell our leaders to stand with working people and not the billionaires and CEOs of these media mega-corporations. clean_body: When regular people stand up, the bullies back down. | | | Peter, Last week, Donald Trump succeeded in strong-arming Disney and ABC into suspending Jimmy Kimmel. It was as chilling an attack on freedom of speech as we’ve seen in generations. But hundreds of thousands of people stood up and spoke out — and Disney ended up backing down. Jimmy Kimmel will return to the airwaves on most ABC stations tonight. Attacks like these are made so much easier when only a handful of mega-corporations control what we see, hear, and scroll through every day. Forty years ago, 50 different companies comprised 90% of the U.S. media market. That number is now down to just FIVE. 1 All of those corporations have mergers that need to be approved by the federal government. And every media company is vulnerable to corrupt threats or promised rewards coming from Trump and his hand-picked FCC chair. That includes corporations like Nexstar — who just announced they will keep Jimmy Kimmel's show off the air on its 32 local ABC stations, and who needs Donald Trump's approval for a $6 billion merger.2 Right now, the Trump administration is growing more desperate by the day. Whatever support they once enjoyed from working people is sinking as fast as grocery prices, health care costs, and our other bills are rising. They may be growing weaker and weaker in the polls, but we know what their playbook will be — more threats, more bullying, and more attempts to try and silence our voices and our votes in order to hold on to power. And these media companies will continue to be in their sights. This is about so much more than just late-night TV, Peter. Donald Trump wants the power to cancel, prosecute, or deport anyone who looks at him the wrong way. He's a thin-skinned leader who can’t stand the idea that someone might disagree with him. He’s also the second least popular president in recent history at this moment in his term — second only to himself.3 And that combination is a dangerous one. And as we’ve seen over and over, institutions and corporations who could stand up to him are either afraid to do so or more than willing to go along. But we’ve also seen what happens when regular people decide to stand up and fight back against this deeply unpopular administration: the bullies end up caving. We believe power in America doesn’t come from a throne. And it doesn’t come from a corporate boardroom.It comes from the people. And the people are saying that they’ve had enough. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Twitter , September 18, 2025 2\. , CNN, August 19, 2025 3\. , Strength In Numbers , September 23, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. name: Tim Walz
subject: Cruelty and corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington

|
---
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115793304/571488968/-1259262679?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250923_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&refcode3=em250923twDOTL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4NzM2ODA1LWQxOTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2-sssZibBtvTdHGDDeahV7epp7J_EhA_EumRNQc-Lfg=)** Peter,

Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering.

He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on.

This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago.

But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it.

clean_body: As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington | = Peter, Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering. He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on. This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago. But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tim Walz and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | **= = = = As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington and make sure it stays at arm’s length from Minnesota. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115793447/571489232/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250922Impact_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczNjgwNS1kMTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_BZCEozdBNQ3oZ_jnXI7qjpiEGnDfFtzjLdQR6K-7M=) Peter –

In another move to destabilize our economy, Trump has asked the United States Supreme Court to allow him to remove Lisa Cook as a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors. On Monday, they ruled in his favor. At this point, Republicans aren’t even _trying_ to hide their efforts to undermine the foundations of our democracy.

Trump and his cronies have been working overtime to replace independent federal employees with MAGA loyalists. By doing so, Trump is giving himself free rein to do whatever he pleases without consequence – **and Republicans in the House are applauding his every move.**

Putting MAGA cronies on the Federal Reserve specifically could have outsized and devastating economic consequences. With inflation and unemployment on the rise (in no small part thanks to Trump’s chaotic tariffs), it’s essential that this body maintains its independence. The future of our economy hangs in the balance.

[**We cannot let Republicans continue to trample all over our institutions and freedoms. With their blatant power grabs, it’s clear: Nothing is safe. We need all hands on deck: Join us as we work to flip the House from red to blue to serve as a critical check and balance on this administration by rushing $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115793449/571489235/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250922Impact_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczNjgwNS1kMTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_BZCEozdBNQ3oZ_jnXI7qjpiEGnDfFtzjLdQR6K-7M=)

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

body:

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/be6e/?__vbtrk=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Patriot, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That’s the rally cry on the lips of millions of Americans – and the message they’re carrying out into the world with their “We are Charlie Kirk” wristbands. We want you to have one. To be a part of the incredible movement carrying Charlie’s legacy forward. **When you make a gift of any amount today, we’ll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the movement Charlie started and the mission we carry on.**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/be6e/?__vbtrk=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/be6e/?__vbtrk=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIyMDY2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

This isn’t just a wristband, friend. It’s a symbol of bold conviction. It’s a tribute to Charlie’s legacy of courage. **And when you wear it, you’re sending a statement.** You’re declaring that you stand for America. For faith, for family, and for freedom. _And most of all, for the vision Charlie ignited._ Your donation will help carry this vision forward and fuel the next generation of leaders who will defend these values — and never surrender. **And when you give any amount today, we’ll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**

You’re standing with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. **So please — make your first gift now to help Turning Point USA push this movement even further...** And we’ll send you your “We are Charlie Kirk” wristband as a symbol of the mission you’ve joined. Together, let’s carry Charlie’s vision forward.

**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team

🫣 I need your help, friend: I'm coming up short on my end-of-quarter goal and we need to get back on track ASAP. A monthly donation of $1, $3, or $5 may not feel like much, but let us explain what it can do
The way we close this quarter will define how we start the next one. Donald Trump and his GOP allies are already preparing to flood the airwaves with negative ads, dark money and billionaire-backed super PAC spending. They want to make sure Democrats are on defense from day one in 2026 — and burnt out by Election Day. **The best way we can prepare is with a strong foundation of recurring donations.** A monthly donation of $1, $3 or $5 may not feel like much, but multiplied across thousands of grassroots supporters, it’s how we can build early infrastructure, plan ahead and stay competitive with the GOP’s billions. [**_Will you start a recurring monthly gift of $3 today to help power Kirsten’s fight to flip the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794225/571491616/246949951?amount=3&recurring=true&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.23_Every-Single-Day_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTBjZTM2OS1kMjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXHe2nnvguiyEXPKgPaYZuHfHZMpNbzIFetyjvoETHs=) | | [Start a Monthly Gift >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794227/571491617/246949951?amount=3&recurring=true&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.23_Every-Single-Day_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTBjZTM2OS1kMjk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXHe2nnvguiyEXPKgPaYZuHfHZMpNbzIFetyjvoETHs=)

* They allow our campaign to plan ahead with confidence, knowing resources will be there when the GOP unleashes attacks.
* They help us mobilize organizers earlier in battleground states like Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, Iowa and Texas – the five states that will decide control of the Senate.
* They show the strength of a movement powered by people, not billionaires.

Kirsten isn’t afraid of Trump or his allies. _But she can’t do it alone_ — she needs us to build the kind of campaign that can withstand whatever comes our way.

But she can’t do it alone — she needs us to build the kind of campaign that can withstand whatever comes our way. = | = Thank you for being part of this team. With your support, we’ll outwork, outlast and outfight the GOP – and together, we’ll win. — Team Gillibrand =
