| | Hi, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. **The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared.** They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. [**If you’re with Fair Fight and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) in our fight for fairness, we need your support. This is an existential moment for our democracy, and what we do today will resonate for years to come. Rush your split donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794358/571492096/96112333?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250923_T1_NDRCSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZhYjY2YS1kMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snWrDirRHW8rQby1OREujVYoc277IiZl9cwxI3ryECA=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794359/571492099/96112333?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250923_T1_NDRCSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZhYjY2YS1kMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snWrDirRHW8rQby1OREujVYoc277IiZl9cwxI3ryECA=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794360/571492100/96112333?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250923_T1_NDRCSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZhYjY2YS1kMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snWrDirRHW8rQby1OREujVYoc277IiZl9cwxI3ryECA=)

Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality.
This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy.
**So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness.**
Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.”
[**They’re not going to let up — so we’ve got to be ready for whatever it is they try to throw at us. Make a donation to Fair Fight and the NDRC so we can respond strategically to preserve our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794365/571492132/96112333?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250923_T1_NDRCSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZhYjY2YS1kMzk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snWrDirRHW8rQby1OREujVYoc277IiZl9cwxI3ryECA=)
You’re a critical part of this effort — thank you for never giving up on our movement.
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.

#### **Jimmy Kimmel may be coming back. But corporate media proved they can make Trump-critical media disappear. Independent media is all we have. Please keep us** _**Fighting**_**with a** _**Paid Subscription**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.aFK1q7VWMZpA0GeCeJgJeaQ2MYQcHRsNTsPX6HrFpyc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173970646)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0d20dd11-aa23-4a21-ae92-cc84a3ef2b8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Ladies and gentlemen, gather 'round and behold the latest masterstroke from our ever-wise Trump administration custodians of public health.
The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, a federal colossus once tasked with shielding the citizenry from pestilence and plague, has now found a new threat to neutralize. It comes on the form of disabled workers with internet access.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a6129bc-557e-4e89-8941-02787b05b38b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yes, in a bold act of bureaucratic bravado, the Trump/RFK jr. CDC has decided that telework--the lifeline, liberty, and legal right for the medically infirm--is simply no longer "reasonable."
The pandemic is _over_ , don't you know?
Never mind your chronic illness, your immune deficiency, your [PTSD from a shooting](https://substack.com/redirect/91c702fc-5cb6-4f76-8d56-8dd4ccdfff57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the very workplace they now demand you return to. It's back to the cubicle you go, peasant, lest the sanctity of the in-person meeting be forever defiled evermore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e403342-8076-4120-aedf-83e34b7fc1f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What's that, you say? [The Americans with Disabilities Act? The Rehabilitation Act](https://substack.com/redirect/f48667a7-f178-40c7-9034-99dacf2c5e61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? Mere trifles.
Those are ancient parchments, suitable for framing, not following. The CDC, in its Olympian wisdom, has declared it will no longer entertain any more of this "case-by-case" nonsense.
Individual assessments are messy. Compassion is inefficient. Equity is inconvenient. And the law?
The law is for the little people, not the Trump administration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a23566dc-343d-4d71-98e4-596a1f619a36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The savage poetry is breathtaking. The agency that once pleaded with the masses to stay home, mask up, and save lives now shoves the disabled and immunocompromised back into the office like some Dickensian factory foreman with a federal budget.
The CDC has gone from Florence Nightingale to **Ebenezer Scrooge in a lab coat** , muttering "no exceptions" as it slams the door on anyone asking for mercy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f433b6-a095-473d-8ccc-416074e1755e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.aFK1q7VWMZpA0GeCeJgJeaQ2MYQcHRsNTsPX6HrFpyc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173970646)
According to recent reports, this policy change began on August 13th. An unlucky date, indeed, for anyone naive enough to believe that public service should include serving the public.
Or that the government might obey its own laws. Or that working while sick or disabled--and still being productive --might be preferable to turning the workplace into a petri dish and therapy trigger.
But no. The gods of MAGA bureaucracy have spoken. Telework is dead.
Not because it doesn't work (it does), or because it's unlawful (it's not). But because it offends the Trumpian managerial class, those brave souls whose only purpose is to peer over your shoulder to ensure you look busy.
It's a tree falling in the forest, Trump version. If they can't see you suffer, how do they know you're working?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e6f7b89-c222-4593-9fc7-8c859b29e0e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) may still mouth quaint little phrases about "reasonable accommodation," but don't be fooled. The [real rule is this: uniformity above humanity, compliance above compassion](https://substack.com/redirect/1e403342-8076-4120-aedf-83e34b7fc1f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And when that fails, gaslight, ignore, and hope that the CDC workers just quit.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d861ac35-c1b0-46fc-bda1-9aabba3a888c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let us not dress this up as policy. It is cowardice hiding in the shadow of courage, cruelty sold as efficiency. It is the full might of a federal agency brought to bear on the weak, the vulnerable, and the quietly competent.
Those who dared to believe their rights were more than a slogan. Or a punchline.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/de3409f4-b442-45a0-a9ea-a15f8f99000e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The CDC, once a bulwark against contagion, _has become the contagion_.
A festering culture of institutional Trump arrogance that sees laws as optional and disabled Americans as disposable. And in this latest act of petty tyranny, it reminds us that while diseases may fade, the disease of unchecked power is always with us.
#### **Jimmy Kimmel may be coming back. But corporate media proved they can make Trump-critical media disappear. Independent media is all we have. Please keep us** _**Fighting**_**with a** _**Paid Subscription**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.aFK1q7VWMZpA0GeCeJgJeaQ2MYQcHRsNTsPX6HrFpyc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173970646)
You're currently a free subscriber to [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/redirect/1bd09afe-d1d4-47d5-98cb-49de9cc1c98d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.aFK1q7VWMZpA0GeCeJgJeaQ2MYQcHRsNTsPX6HrFpyc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Sandra Bishop
subject: overwhelmed yet hopeful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Every training we run, every woman we prepare to run for office, is a step toward rewriting the rules, turning the old boys’ club into the new girls’ network.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115794483/571492453/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZWQ0NjNmLWQ0OTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hhEw4T_QRC455FjL6TOR_ynN4ldP58Uxul6V5Fz_oCo=)

| Peter,

These are difficult times. Every day, Trump and the Republicans push policies that threaten democracy and silence the voices of women and communities of color. It can feel overwhelming, even impossible.

But here are two reasons I have hope: the over 1,200 Emerge alums in office (from school board to Congress), who are leading and protecting our communities, and the women stepping up to join them. Every training we run, every woman we prepare to run for office, is a step toward rewriting the rules, turning the old boys’ club into the new girls’ network.

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: New Ad featuring Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
This has been a total team effort.

**The campaign to pass the Election Rigging Response Act is a team effort.**
Grassroots supporters have made more than 800,000 individual donations in just a month-and-a-half, helping us combat the spending of one MAGA millionaire who has given $30 million of his own money to beat us.
Coalition partners from across the state are helping us build the largest field and Get Out the Vote operation in California history.
And elected officials from California and across the country are lending their voices where they can. Here's the latest example.
**[Today we released our latest ad featuring Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Watch it here.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4868?t=1&akid=2585%2E4767699%2EsIl2rn)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4868?t=2&akid=2585%2E4767699%2EsIl2rn)
Like we've said before, this is one of many ads all sharing one central message: we have to stop Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election. But it's only possible with your support. Don't stop now.
Team Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250923-2&refcode2=2585_4767699_sIl2rn&akid=2585%2E4767699%2EsIl2rn)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: We got to draw the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=os5IqVMnFKXlPurpK4XB%2FiV9LLTO5KkvsfHm8tLNX34AJoVD%2B6QLZAI%2Fe91no0SyjN%2BK0CWTqP6GI28azBet4aaufZRXeUAiWrqNOVtao5fN6MSqdz6fCfocB4ezXTdoZqCTB3kUFbmS%2BXvbKBFAo%2FIpy8CrQvTj%2FDmNEJOkAzhjZ5tBuMG1WhzcfLOOZAI0fbl4gQiafA2NZKWSa7qt1uPws%2BD7j3ike3wrBxBl6S%2F5aVdOe5tlRxQmqvniQdHQvm%2B23Y0lr3jSqvjBPJxOiCSJZ6rGArBgRLG2PKmgsnj%2Fpc8NGCvlM2F8U259z5uHKZ%2BmAWmwRxf1IEiShU3YpblzzxTHy6u9zWdkaast4XkVTFAvlyU3nBpq9l5g5l4xq%2B0by2d%2BMEnhlJnk0NtOk5bUBzNppzZRkGZwuV%2Fjy1w%3D)

It's Gabe. It’s only been a few days since I officially launched my re-election campaign — and already, the stakes are coming into sharp focus. The House is lurching toward a government shutdown. Families in New Mexico are bracing for the fallout. And Republicans — who hold the power to stop it — are too busy chasing headlines, pushing their extreme MAGA agenda, and doing whatever it takes to consolidate power for Donald Trump. Republicans have had the House majority since January 2023 — and what do they have to show for it? **Nothing but chaos.** Now, those same Republicans are setting their sights on New Mexico’s 2nd District. They haven’t named their candidate yet — but they’ve made one thing clear: **they’ll do whatever it takes to flip this seat and drag their chaos even further into our communities**. Here’s the good news: **we know how to win tough races like this**. But we also know that it takes real resources — and we’ve got a major public deadline coming up. We’ve set a $25,000 end-of-quarter goal to make sure we show up strong on our FEC report. That report isn’t just for the press or the pundits — it’s what Republican strategists, national donors, and party leaders will use to decide how hard they come after this seat. We need to make a showing that says loud and clear: **we are no longer putting up with this chaos**. This is our moment to draw a line. To say enough is enough — and to show that we’re ready to fight for something better — together. [Will you chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today to help us put an end to the chaos, power the fight ahead, and send a clear message before this critical FEC deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115794721/571493184/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092325_EOQ1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjVhY2U2ZS1kNTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfLqXWv2BMYl4YWIpAHWpUFeTtrWNxyXcRDPDHTNHZ8=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: [Awaiting action from you]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
This is how we STOP Mamdani...
This is how we STOP Mamdani...
| **_A LETTER FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
September 30th is the FINAL FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day.
---
**That means it’s our LAST CHANCE to raise vital funds we need to _STOP_ communist Democrat Zohran Mamdani from becoming the next mayor of New York.**
---
_As New York’s Senior elected Republican, I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to save our state’s largest city, including launching an unprecedented city-wide GOTV effort._
---
Per _Politico_ :
---
**“New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have not cast ballots in mayoral elections.”**
---
However, I’ll be perfectly honest with you, Fellow Patriot...
---
_**If we don’t reach this critical goal, we’ll lack the funds we need to keep our operation running all the way through Election Day (and beyond as ballots are counted).**_
---
That is why I’m officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push earlier than ever before with an ambitious target of **_1,000,000 NEW grassroots contributions_** before September 30th.
---
And given the scale of the threat we face, we need contributions from not just New York, but from all over the country.
---
That is why I’ve also set an ambitious goal of securing a contribution from every single zip code in the United States of America to SAVE the largest city in America.
---
[**_Can I count on YOU to represent your zip code by making a grassroots contribution of ANY amount? clean_body: This is how we STOP Mamdani... This is how we STOP Mamdani... | A LETTER FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK Fellow Patriot, September 30th is the FINAL FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day. That means it’s our LAST CHANCE to raise vital funds we need to STOP communist Democrat Zohran Mamdani from becoming the next mayor of New York. As New York’s Senior elected Republican, I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to save our state’s largest city, including launching an unprecedented city-wide GOTV effort. Per Politico : “New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have not cast ballots in mayoral elections.” However, I’ll be perfectly honest with you, Fellow Patriot... If we don’t reach this critical goal, we’ll lack the funds we need to keep our operation running all the way through Election Day (and beyond as ballots are counted). That is why I’m officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push earlier than ever before with an ambitious target of 1,000,000 NEW grassroots contributions before September 30th. And given the scale of the threat we face, we need contributions from not just New York, but from all over the country. That is why I’ve also set an ambitious goal of securing a contribution from every single zip code in the United States of America to SAVE the largest city in America. You see, while it may be easy to dismiss this as a problem for New York alone, that couldn’t be further from the truth. The consequences of a Mamdani victory will not be limited to New York. The rise of Zohran Mamdani bears a lot of similarity to the rise of a radical young community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama. In fact, many are already calling Zohran Mamdani “the next Obama,” and Obama has even called Mamdani to offer his advice and support! Knowing what you know now, if you had the chance to destroy Obama’s political career before he rose to national prominence, wouldn’t you do everything in your power to do so? Well, this is our chance to STOP the next Obama! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: This is it | Peter, This is it. Last call to take the field with Coach Tuberville before our End-of-Quarter deadline. Don't miss the cutoff. Every minute counts. | We can't afford to fumble this drive. -- Team Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Trump’s new executive order threatens all of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In his ongoing assault on free speech and political dissent, Donald Trump
just signed an unconstitutional executive order to follow through on his
promise to designate ‘antifa’ as a domestic terrorist organization.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250923?refcode=em20250923-37049&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37049_1203867_2KXdLb&akid=37049%2E1203867%2E2KXdLb ]The New York Times: Trump Signs Order Targeting Antifa Movement;
President Trump's executive order threatened to prosecute donors who
support antifascist philosophy and issued a domestic terrorism designation
that doesn't exist under U.S. law.

We know that ‘antifa’ isn’t a singular entity or organization. So who does
this executive order actually target? The answer is, all of us.

As many are pointing out, this order is written in a way that considers
anyone who protests at ICE detention centers or films ICE agents
disappearing people off the streets in their communities to be a domestic
terrorist.

This is another dangerous step to criminalize political dissent and roll
back our freedom of speech,
Peter.

Trump and his extremist goons like Stephen Miller want to be able to label
any left-wing group or activist they don’t like as ‘antifa’ and use their
power to criminalize and punish them. This is what authoritarian
governments do.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250923?refcode=em20250923-37049&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37049_1203867_2KXdLb&akid=37049%2E1203867%2E2KXdLb ]We need to be ready in case this fascist administration sets its sights
on us or our allies. If you can, please contribute $5 or
more to build our grassroots resources and help ensure we’re prepared for
whatever comes next.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250923?refcode=em20250923-37049&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37049_1203867_2KXdLb&akid=37049%2E1203867%2E2KXdLb ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250923-37049-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37049_1203867_2KXdLb&akid=37049%2E1203867%2E2KXdLb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37049%2E1203867%2E2KXdLb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can, to compete. It may not sound like much, but with only 42 days until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. Your $25 will allow us to counter right-wing disinformation. Your $25 will allow us to promote Abigail's plans to make our lives more affordable, strengthen our schools, and protect our freedoms.
